Announcement Module

pages/announcements.php

PHP / HTML / JavaScript 548 lines 28.9 KB
Selected source code for capstone documentation. Vendor libraries, uploads, logs, and backup data are excluded.
1<?php
2require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/config/db.php';
3require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/auth-session.php';
4require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/announcements.php';
5require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/notifications.php';

7biotern_boot_session(isset($conn) ? $conn : null);
8
9function announcements_h($value): string
10{
11 return htmlspecialchars((string)$value, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
12}
13
14function announcements_excerpt(string $value, int $limit = 110): string
15{
16 $value = trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value));
17 if (strlen($value) <= $limit) {
18 return $value;
19 }
20 return substr($value, 0, max(0, $limit - 3)) . '...';
21}
22
23function announcements_ensure_runtime_dir(string $path): bool
24{
25 $path = rtrim(str_replace('\\', DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR, $path), DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR);
26 if ($path === '') {
27 return false;
28 }
29
30 if (!is_dir($path) && !@mkdir($path, 0775, true) && !is_dir($path)) {
31 return false;
32 }
33
34 @chmod($path, 0775);
35 return is_dir($path);
36}
37
38function announcements_store_upload(array $file, ?string &$error, ?string &$mediaType): string
39{
40 $error = null;
41 $mediaType = null;
42 $GLOBALS['announcement_pending_media'] = null;
43 if (($file['error'] ?? UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) === UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) {
44 return '';
45 }
46 if (($file['error'] ?? UPLOAD_ERR_OK) !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
47 $error = 'Unable to upload announcement media.';
48 return '';
49 }
50 if ((int)($file['size'] ?? 0) > 80 * 1024 * 1024) {
51 $error = 'Announcement media must be 80 MB or smaller.';
52 return '';
53 }
54
55 $tmp = (string)($file['tmp_name'] ?? '');
56 $mime = '';
57 if (is_file($tmp) && class_exists('finfo')) {
58 $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
59 $mime = (string)$finfo->file($tmp);
60 }
61 if ($mime === '' && is_file($tmp)) {
62 $imageInfo = @getimagesize($tmp);
63 $mime = is_array($imageInfo) ? (string)($imageInfo['mime'] ?? '') : '';
64 }
65 if ($mime === '') {
66 $extension = strtolower(pathinfo((string)($file['name'] ?? ''), PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
67 $extensionMimeMap = [
68 'jpg' => 'image/jpeg',
69 'jpeg' => 'image/jpeg',
70 'png' => 'image/png',
71 'webp' => 'image/webp',
72 'gif' => 'image/gif',
73 'mp4' => 'video/mp4',
74 'webm' => 'video/webm',
75 'ogv' => 'video/ogg',
76 'ogg' => 'video/ogg',
77 'mov' => 'video/quicktime',
78 ];
79 $mime = $extensionMimeMap[$extension] ?? '';
80 }
81
82 $imageExtensions = [
83 'image/jpeg' => 'jpg',
84 'image/png' => 'png',
85 'image/webp' => 'webp',
86 'image/gif' => 'gif',
87 ];
88 $videoExtensions = [
89 'video/mp4' => 'mp4',
90 'video/webm' => 'webm',
91 'video/ogg' => 'ogv',
92 'video/quicktime' => 'mov',
93 ];
94
95 if (isset($imageExtensions[$mime])) {
96 $extension = $imageExtensions[$mime];
97 $mediaType = 'image';
98 } elseif (isset($videoExtensions[$mime])) {
99 $extension = $videoExtensions[$mime];
100 $mediaType = 'video';
101 } else {
102 $error = 'Upload a JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, MP4, WebM, OGV, or MOV announcement file.';
103 return '';
104 }
105
106 $blob = is_file($tmp) ? file_get_contents($tmp) : false;
107 if ($blob === false || $blob === '') {
108 $error = 'Unable to read announcement media.';
109 return '';
110 }
111
112 $safeOriginalName = trim((string)($file['name'] ?? 'announcement.' . $extension));
113 $GLOBALS['announcement_pending_media'] = [
114 'blob' => $blob,
115 'mime' => $mime,
116 'name' => $safeOriginalName !== '' ? substr($safeOriginalName, 0, 255) : ('announcement.' . $extension),
117 'size' => strlen($blob),
118 ];
119
120 return '__announcement_media_pending__';
121}
122
123function announcements_target_user_ids(mysqli $conn, string $targetRole, int $authorId): array
124{
125 $targetRole = biotern_announcements_normalize_target($targetRole);
126 $where = ['is_active = 1'];
127 if ($targetRole !== 'all') {
128 $where[] = "LOWER(role) = '" . $conn->real_escape_string($targetRole) . "'";
129 }
130
131 $ids = [];
132 $result = $conn->query('SELECT id FROM users WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where));
133 if ($result instanceof mysqli_result) {
134 while ($row = $result->fetch_assoc()) {
135 $id = (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
136 if ($id > 0) {
137 $ids[] = $id;
138 }
139 }
140 $result->close();
141 }
142
143 if (!in_array($authorId, $ids, true) && $authorId > 0 && $targetRole === 'all') {
144 $ids[] = $authorId;
145 }
146
147 return array_values(array_unique($ids));
148}
149
150function announcements_send_notifications(mysqli $conn, array $userIds, string $title, string $body): int
151{
152 $message = trim($body);
153 if ($message === '') {
154 $message = 'A new announcement has been posted.';
155 }
156 $sent = 0;
157 foreach ($userIds as $targetUserId) {
158 if (biotern_notify($conn, (int)$targetUserId, $title, $message, 'system', 'announcements.php')) {
159 $sent++;
160 }
161 }
162 return $sent;
163}
164
165$userId = (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0);
166$role = strtolower(trim((string)($_SESSION['role'] ?? $_SESSION['user_role'] ?? '')));
167if ($userId <= 0) {
168 header('Location: auth-login.php');
169 exit;
170}
171if (!biotern_announcements_can_manage($role)) {
172 http_response_code(403);
173 exit('Forbidden');
174}
175
176biotern_announcements_ensure_tables($conn);
177
178$message = '';
179$error = '';
180
181if (($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] ?? 'GET') === 'POST') {
182 $action = strtolower(trim((string)($_POST['announcement_action'] ?? '')));
183
184 if ($action === 'create') {
185 $title = trim((string)($_POST['title'] ?? ''));
186 $body = trim((string)($_POST['body'] ?? ''));
187 $uploadError = null;
188 $mediaType = null;
189 $mediaPath = announcements_store_upload($_FILES['announcement_media'] ?? [], $uploadError, $mediaType);
190 $mediaType = biotern_announcements_normalize_media_type((string)($mediaType ?? 'image'));
191 $popupSize = biotern_announcements_normalize_size((string)($_POST['popup_size'] ?? 'medium'));
192 $accentColor = biotern_announcements_normalize_color((string)($_POST['accent_color'] ?? '#3454d1'));
193 $buttonLabel = trim((string)($_POST['button_label'] ?? 'Got It'));
194 if ($buttonLabel === '') {
195 $buttonLabel = 'Got It';
196 }
197 if (strlen($buttonLabel) > 80) {
198 $buttonLabel = substr($buttonLabel, 0, 80);
199 }
200 $showTitle = isset($_POST['show_title']) ? 1 : 0;
201 $showAuthor = isset($_POST['show_author']) ? 1 : 0;
202 $displayMode = biotern_announcements_normalize_display_mode((string)($_POST['display_mode'] ?? 'popup'));
203 $target = biotern_announcements_normalize_target((string)($_POST['target_role'] ?? 'all'));
204 $startsAt = biotern_announcements_datetime_or_null($_POST['starts_at'] ?? null);
205 $endsAt = biotern_announcements_datetime_or_null($_POST['ends_at'] ?? null);
206 if ($title === '' && $mediaPath !== '') {
207 $title = 'Photo Announcement';
208 $showTitle = 0;
209 }
210
211 if ($uploadError !== null) {
212 $error = $uploadError;
213 } elseif ($title === '' || ($body === '' && $mediaPath === '')) {
214 $error = 'Add a title and either a message or an announcement photo.';
215 } elseif ($startsAt === null || $endsAt === null) {
216 $error = 'Start and end date/time are required.';
217 } elseif (strtotime($endsAt) < strtotime($startsAt)) {
218 $error = 'End date cannot be earlier than start date.';
219 } else {
220 $mediaForInsert = $mediaPath === '__announcement_media_pending__' ? '' : $mediaPath;
221 $stmt = $conn->prepare(
222 "INSERT INTO announcements (title, body, media_path, media_type, popup_size, accent_color, button_label, show_title, show_author, display_mode, target_role, starts_at, ends_at, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at)
223 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, ?, NOW(), NOW())"
224 );
225 if ($stmt) {
226 $stmt->bind_param('sssssssiissssi', $title, $body, $mediaForInsert, $mediaType, $popupSize, $accentColor, $buttonLabel, $showTitle, $showAuthor, $displayMode, $target, $startsAt, $endsAt, $userId);
227 if ($stmt->execute()) {
228 $announcementId = (int)$stmt->insert_id;
229 $pendingMedia = is_array($GLOBALS['announcement_pending_media'] ?? null) ? $GLOBALS['announcement_pending_media'] : null;
230 if ($announcementId > 0 && $pendingMedia !== null) {
231 $mediaUrl = 'announcement-media.php?id=' . $announcementId;
232 $mediaMime = (string)($pendingMedia['mime'] ?? '');
233 $mediaName = (string)($pendingMedia['name'] ?? '');
234 $mediaSize = (int)($pendingMedia['size'] ?? 0);
235 $mediaBlob = (string)($pendingMedia['blob'] ?? '');
236 $mediaStmt = $conn->prepare('UPDATE announcements SET media_path = ?, media_mime = ?, media_name = ?, media_size = ?, media_blob = ? WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1');
237 if ($mediaStmt) {
238 $mediaStmt->bind_param('sssisi', $mediaUrl, $mediaMime, $mediaName, $mediaSize, $mediaBlob, $announcementId);
239 if (!$mediaStmt->execute()) {
240 $mediaError = $mediaStmt->error;
241 $cleanupStmt = $conn->prepare('DELETE FROM announcements WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1');
242 if ($cleanupStmt) {
243 $cleanupStmt->bind_param('i', $announcementId);
244 $cleanupStmt->execute();
245 $cleanupStmt->close();
246 }
247 $error = 'Unable to save announcement media in the database. ' . $mediaError;
248 }
249 $mediaStmt->close();
250 if ($error === '') {
251 $mediaPath = $mediaUrl;
252 }
253 } else {
254 $cleanupStmt = $conn->prepare('DELETE FROM announcements WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1');
255 if ($cleanupStmt) {
256 $cleanupStmt->bind_param('i', $announcementId);
257 $cleanupStmt->execute();
258 $cleanupStmt->close();
259 }
260 $error = 'Unable to prepare announcement media save.';
261 }
262 }
263 if ($error === '') {
264 $sentCount = 0;
265 if (in_array($displayMode, ['notification', 'both'], true)) {
266 $sentCount = announcements_send_notifications($conn, announcements_target_user_ids($conn, $target, $userId), $title, $body);
267 }
268 $message = 'Announcement posted successfully.';
269 if ($sentCount > 0) {
270 $message .= ' Notifications sent: ' . $sentCount . '.';
271 }
272 }
273 } else {
274 $error = 'Unable to save announcement right now.';
275 }
276 $stmt->close();
277 } else {
278 $error = 'Unable to prepare announcement save.';
279 }
280 }
281 } elseif ($action === 'toggle') {
282 $announcementId = (int)($_POST['announcement_id'] ?? 0);
283 $isActive = (int)($_POST['is_active'] ?? 0) === 1 ? 1 : 0;
284 if ($announcementId > 0) {
285 $stmt = $conn->prepare('UPDATE announcements SET is_active = ?, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = ?');
286 if ($stmt) {
287 $stmt->bind_param('ii', $isActive, $announcementId);
288 $stmt->execute();
289 $stmt->close();
290 $message = $isActive === 1 ? 'Announcement reactivated.' : 'Announcement hidden.';
291 }
292 }
293 } elseif ($action === 'delete') {
294 $announcementId = (int)($_POST['announcement_id'] ?? 0);
295 if ($announcementId > 0) {
296 $readStmt = $conn->prepare('DELETE FROM announcement_reads WHERE announcement_id = ?');
297 if ($readStmt) {
298 $readStmt->bind_param('i', $announcementId);
299 $readStmt->execute();
300 $readStmt->close();
301 }
302
303 $stmt = $conn->prepare('DELETE FROM announcements WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1');
304 if ($stmt) {
305 $stmt->bind_param('i', $announcementId);
306 if ($stmt->execute()) {
307 $message = 'Announcement deleted permanently.';
308 } else {
309 $error = 'Unable to delete announcement right now.';
310 }
311 $stmt->close();
312 } else {
313 $error = 'Unable to prepare announcement delete.';
314 }
315 }
316 }
317}
318
319$announcements = [];
320$result = $conn->query(
321 "SELECT a.*, u.name AS author_name
322 FROM announcements a
323 LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a.created_by
324 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC
325 LIMIT 50"
326);
327if ($result instanceof mysqli_result) {
328 while ($row = $result->fetch_assoc()) {
329 $announcements[] = $row;
330 }
331 $result->close();
332}

371 <h4>Post Announcement</h4>
372 <p>Upload a poster/photo, set when it starts and ends, then choose whether users see a popup, notification, or both.</p>

391 </select>
392 </div>
393 <div class="settings-field-card">
394 <label class="form-label" for="display_mode">Display As</label>
395 <select class="form-select" id="display_mode" name="display_mode">
396 <option value="popup">Popup Only</option>
397 <option value="notification">Notification Only</option>
398 <option value="both" selected>Popup + Notification</option>
399 </select>
400 <small class="form-text">Use both for important announcements. Notification-only will not interrupt users.</small>
401 </div>

404 <input type="file" class="form-control" id="announcement_media" name="announcement_media" accept="image/png,image/jpeg,image/webp,image/gif,video/mp4,video/webm,video/ogg,video/quicktime">
405 <small class="form-text">Use a poster image or short video. JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, MP4, WebM, OGV, or MOV up to 80 MB.</small>
406 </div>

414 </select>

431 </div>
432 </div>

496 <tr>
497 <td>

499 <?php if (trim((string)($item['media_path'] ?? '')) !== ''): ?>

502 <video src="<?php echo announcements_h((string)$item['media_path']); ?>" muted style="width: 120px; max-height: 72px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 6px;"></video>
503 <?php else: ?>
504 <img src="<?php echo announcements_h((string)$item['media_path']); ?>" alt="" style="width: 96px; max-height: 72px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 6px;">
505 <?php endif; ?>
506 </div>
507 <?php endif; ?>
508 <div class="text-muted small"><?php echo announcements_h(announcements_excerpt((string)($item['body'] ?? ''))); ?></div>
509 </td>
510 <td><?php echo announcements_h(biotern_announcements_target_label((string)($item['target_role'] ?? 'all'))); ?></td>
511 <td><?php echo announcements_h(biotern_announcements_display_mode_label((string)($item['display_mode'] ?? 'popup'))); ?></td>
512 <td>
513 <span class="badge <?php echo $active ? 'bg-soft-success text-success' : 'bg-soft-secondary text-secondary'; ?>">
514 <?php echo $active ? 'Active' : 'Hidden'; ?>
515 </span>
516 </td>
517 <td><?php echo announcements_h($createdAt !== '' ? date('M d, Y h:i A', strtotime($createdAt)) : ''); ?></td>
518 <td class="text-end">
519 <form method="post" class="d-inline">
520 <input type="hidden" name="announcement_action" value="toggle">
521 <input type="hidden" name="announcement_id" value="<?php echo (int)($item['id'] ?? 0); ?>">
522 <input type="hidden" name="is_active" value="<?php echo $active ? 0 : 1; ?>">
523 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm <?php echo $active ? 'btn-outline-danger' : 'btn-outline-primary'; ?>">
524 <?php echo $active ? 'Hide' : 'Reactivate'; ?>
525 </button>
526 </form>
527 <form method="post" class="d-inline" data-confirm-message="Delete this announcement permanently?">
528 <input type="hidden" name="announcement_action" value="delete">
529 <input type="hidden" name="announcement_id" value="<?php echo (int)($item['id'] ?? 0); ?>">
530 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger ms-1">Delete</button>
531 </form>
532 </td>
533 </tr>
534 <?php endforeach; ?>

538 <?php endif; ?>

Attendance and DTR Module

pages/attendance.php

PHP / HTML / JavaScript 2519 lines 123.3 KB
Selected source code for capstone documentation. Vendor libraries, uploads, logs, and backup data are excluded.
1<?php
2require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/config/db.php';
3require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/section_schedule.php';
4require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/section_format.php';
5require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/attendance_bonus_rules.php';
6require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/attendance_workflow.php';
7require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/external_attendance.php';
8require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/ops_helpers.php';
9require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/tools/biometric_auto_import.php';
10require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/avatar.php';
11require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/auth-session.php';
12biotern_boot_session(isset($conn) ? $conn : null);
13attendance_bonus_rules_ensure_schema($conn);
14external_attendance_ensure_schema($conn);
15
16$attendance_role = strtolower(trim((string)($_SESSION['role'] ?? $_SESSION['user_role'] ?? '')));
17if ($attendance_role === 'student') {
18 require __DIR__ . '/student-dtr.php';
19 return;
20}
21$attendance_user_id = (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0);
22$attendance_is_supervisor = ($attendance_role === 'supervisor');
23$attendance_supervisor_profile_id = 0;
24
25// Database Connection
26$host = defined('DB_HOST') ? DB_HOST : 'localhost';
27$db_user = defined('DB_USER') ? DB_USER : 'root';
28$db_password = defined('DB_PASS') ? DB_PASS : '';
29$db_name = defined('DB_NAME') ? DB_NAME : 'biotern_db';
30$db_port = defined('DB_PORT') ? (int)DB_PORT : 3306;
31
32try {
33 $conn = new mysqli($host, $db_user, $db_password, $db_name, $db_port);
34 if ($conn->connect_error) {
35 die("Connection failed: " . $conn->connect_error);
36 }
37 section_schedule_ensure_columns($conn);
38 external_attendance_ensure_schema($conn);
39
40 $calendarColumns = [];
41 $calendarColumnsRes = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM calendar_events");
42 if ($calendarColumnsRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
43 while ($calendarColumn = $calendarColumnsRes->fetch_assoc()) {
44 $calendarColumns[strtolower((string)($calendarColumn['Field'] ?? ''))] = true;
45 }
46 $calendarColumnsRes->close();
47 }
48 if (!isset($calendarColumns['attendance_multiplier'])) {
49 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE calendar_events ADD COLUMN attendance_multiplier DECIMAL(6,2) NULL AFTER color");
50 }
51 if (!isset($calendarColumns['apply_when_not_late'])) {
52 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE calendar_events ADD COLUMN apply_when_not_late TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER attendance_multiplier");
53 }
54 if (!isset($calendarColumns['late_grace_minutes'])) {
55 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE calendar_events ADD COLUMN late_grace_minutes INT NULL AFTER apply_when_not_late");
56 }
57 if (!isset($calendarColumns['applies_to_weekday'])) {
58 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE calendar_events ADD COLUMN applies_to_weekday VARCHAR(16) NULL AFTER late_grace_minutes");
59 }
60} catch (Exception $e) {
61 die("Database Error: " . $e->getMessage());
62}
63
64if ($attendance_is_supervisor && $attendance_user_id > 0) {
65 $attendance_scope_stmt = $conn->prepare('SELECT id FROM supervisors WHERE user_id = ? LIMIT 1');
66 if ($attendance_scope_stmt) {
67 $attendance_scope_stmt->bind_param('i', $attendance_user_id);
68 $attendance_scope_stmt->execute();
69 $attendance_scope_row = $attendance_scope_stmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc();
70 $attendance_supervisor_profile_id = (int)($attendance_scope_row['id'] ?? 0);
71 $attendance_scope_stmt->close();
72 }
73}
74
75function attendance_machine_config_path(): string
76{
77 return dirname(__DIR__) . '/tools/biometric_machine_config.json';
78}
79
80function attendance_load_machine_config(): array
81{
82 $configPath = attendance_machine_config_path();
83 if (!file_exists($configPath)) {
84 return [];
85 }
86
87 $json = file_get_contents($configPath);
88 if (!is_string($json) || trim($json) === '') {
89 return [];
90 }
91
92 $decoded = json_decode($json, true);
93 return is_array($decoded) ? $decoded : [];
94}
95
96function attendance_write_machine_config(array $config): void
97{
98 $json = json_encode($config, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
99 if (!is_string($json)) {
100 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to encode biometric machine config.');
101 }
102
103 file_put_contents(attendance_machine_config_path(), $json . PHP_EOL);
104}
105
106function attendance_ensure_bridge_status_tables(mysqli $conn): void
107{
108 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_bridge_profile (
109 id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
110 profile_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default',
111 bridge_enabled TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
112 bridge_token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
113 cloud_base_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
114 ingest_path VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '/api/f20h_ingest.php',
115 ingest_api_token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
116 poll_seconds INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
117 ip_address VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
118 gateway VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
119 mask VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '255.255.255.0',
120 port INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 5001,
121 device_number INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
122 communication_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
123 output_path VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
124 updated_by INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
125 created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
126 updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
127 PRIMARY KEY (id),
128 UNIQUE KEY uniq_profile_name (profile_name)
129 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
130
131 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_bridge_heartbeat (
132 id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
133 node_name VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
134 status_text VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
135 created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
136 updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
137 PRIMARY KEY (id),
138 UNIQUE KEY uniq_node_name (node_name),
139 KEY idx_updated_at (updated_at)
140 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
141
142 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_bridge_user_cache (
143 id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
144 source_node VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
145 users_json LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
146 users_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
147 created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
148 PRIMARY KEY (id),
149 KEY idx_created_at (created_at)
150 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
151
152 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_ingest_events (
153 id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
154 received_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
155 source_ip VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
156 source_node VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
157 token_status VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
158 http_status INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
159 events_received INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
160 events_accepted INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
161 note VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
162 PRIMARY KEY (id),
163 KEY idx_received_at (received_at)
164 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
165}
166
167function attendance_bridge_runtime_status(mysqli $conn): array
168{
169 try {
170 attendance_ensure_bridge_status_tables($conn);
171 } catch (Throwable $ignored) {
172 return [
173 'label' => 'Bridge Unknown',
174 'class' => 'secondary',
175 'icon' => 'feather-help-circle',
176 'detail' => 'Bridge status tables are not available yet.',
177 'age_seconds' => null,
178 ];
179 }
180
181 $profile = [];
182 $profileRes = $conn->query("SELECT bridge_enabled, poll_seconds FROM biometric_bridge_profile WHERE profile_name = 'default' LIMIT 1");
183 if ($profileRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
184 $profile = $profileRes->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
185 $profileRes->close();
186 }
187
188 $bridgeEnabled = empty($profile) || !empty($profile['bridge_enabled']);
189 $pollSeconds = max(10, (int)($profile['poll_seconds'] ?? 30));
190
191 $latestHeartbeatAt = '';
192 $heartbeatStatusText = '';
193 $heartbeatRes = $conn->query("SELECT updated_at, status_text FROM biometric_bridge_heartbeat ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1");
194 if ($heartbeatRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
195 $row = $heartbeatRes->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
196 $latestHeartbeatAt = (string)($row['updated_at'] ?? '');
197 $heartbeatStatusText = (string)($row['status_text'] ?? '');
198 $heartbeatRes->close();
199 }
200
201 $latestCacheAt = '';
202 $cacheRes = $conn->query("SELECT created_at FROM biometric_bridge_user_cache ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1");
203 if ($cacheRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
204 $row = $cacheRes->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
205 $latestCacheAt = (string)($row['created_at'] ?? '');
206 $cacheRes->close();
207 }
208
209 $latestIngestAt = '';
210 $ingestRes = $conn->query("SELECT received_at FROM biometric_ingest_events ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1");
211 if ($ingestRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
212 $row = $ingestRes->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
213 $latestIngestAt = (string)($row['received_at'] ?? '');
214 $ingestRes->close();
215 }
216
217 $workerLogAt = '';
218 $workerLogPath = dirname(__DIR__) . '/tools/bridge-worker.log';
219 $workerLogMtime = @filemtime($workerLogPath);
220 if ($workerLogMtime !== false && $workerLogMtime > 0) {
221 $workerLogAt = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', (int)$workerLogMtime);
222 }
223
224 $candidates = [
225 'cloud heartbeat' => $latestHeartbeatAt,
226 'bridge user cache' => $latestCacheAt,
227 'ingest event' => $latestIngestAt,
228 'local worker log' => $workerLogAt,
229 ];
230
231 $lastSeenAt = '';
232 $lastSeenSource = '';
233 $lastSeenTs = 0;
234 foreach ($candidates as $source => $candidate) {
235 if (trim((string)$candidate) === '') {
236 continue;
237 }
238 $ts = strtotime((string)$candidate);
239 if ($ts !== false && $ts > $lastSeenTs) {
240 $lastSeenTs = $ts;
241 $lastSeenAt = (string)$candidate;
242 $lastSeenSource = (string)$source;
243 }
244 }
245
246 if (!$bridgeEnabled) {
247 return [
248 'label' => 'Bridge Paused',
249 'class' => 'warning',
250 'icon' => 'feather-pause-circle',
251 'detail' => 'Bridge profile is paused. Resume or revive it in Machine Manager.',
252 'age_seconds' => null,
253 ];
254 }
255
256 if ($lastSeenTs <= 0) {
257 return [
258 'label' => 'Bridge Unknown',
259 'class' => 'secondary',
260 'icon' => 'feather-help-circle',
261 'detail' => 'No bridge heartbeat, user cache, ingest activity, or local worker log has been seen yet.',
262 'age_seconds' => null,
263 ];
264 }
265
266 $ageSeconds = max(0, time() - $lastSeenTs);
267 $onlineThreshold = max(600, $pollSeconds * 12);
268 $isOnline = $ageSeconds <= $onlineThreshold;
269 $pullStatus = strtolower($heartbeatStatusText);
270 $pullFailing = $isOnline && (
271 strpos($pullStatus, 'f20h pull failed') !== false
272 || strpos($pullStatus, 'device connection failed') !== false
273 || strpos($pullStatus, 'failed') !== false
274 );
275
276 return [
277 'label' => $pullFailing ? 'Bridge Online / F20H Pull Failing' : ($isOnline ? 'Bridge Online' : 'Bridge Offline'),
278 'class' => $pullFailing ? 'warning' : ($isOnline ? 'success' : 'danger'),
279 'icon' => $pullFailing ? 'feather-alert-triangle' : ($isOnline ? 'feather-wifi' : 'feather-wifi-off'),
280 'detail' => ($isOnline ? 'Last activity ' : 'Last activity stale: ') . $lastSeenAt
281 . ($lastSeenSource !== '' ? ' via ' . $lastSeenSource : '')
282 . ' (age ' . $ageSeconds . 's, poll ' . $pollSeconds . 's)'
283 . ($heartbeatStatusText !== '' ? '. Heartbeat: ' . $heartbeatStatusText : ''),
284 'age_seconds' => $ageSeconds,
285 'last_seen_at' => $lastSeenAt,
286 'last_seen_source' => $lastSeenSource,
287 ];
288}
289
290function attendance_redirect_self(): void
291{
292 $target = 'attendance.php';
293 $query = trim((string)($_SERVER['QUERY_STRING'] ?? ''));
294 if ($query !== '') {
295 $target .= '?' . $query;
296 }
297 header('Location: ' . $target);
298 exit;
299}
300
301function attendance_local_today(): string
302{
303 $tzName = trim((string)(getenv('APP_TIMEZONE') ?: 'Asia/Manila'));
304 try {
305 $tz = new DateTimeZone($tzName !== '' ? $tzName : 'Asia/Manila');
306 } catch (Throwable $e) {
307 $tz = new DateTimeZone('Asia/Manila');
308 }
309
310 $now = new DateTimeImmutable('now', $tz);
311 return $now->format('Y-m-d');
312}
313
314function attendance_school_hours_config(?array $machineConfig = null): array
315{
316 $machineConfig = is_array($machineConfig) ? $machineConfig : attendance_load_machine_config();
317
318 $start = section_schedule_format_time_input((string)($machineConfig['attendanceStartTime'] ?? '08:00:00'));
319 $end = section_schedule_format_time_input((string)($machineConfig['attendanceEndTime'] ?? '19:00:00'));
320
321 return [
322 'schedule_time_in' => $start !== '' ? $start : '08:00',
323 'schedule_time_out' => $end !== '' ? $end : '19:00',
324 'late_after_time' => $start !== '' ? $start : '08:00',
325 ];
326}
327
328$machineConfig = attendance_load_machine_config();
329
330// Fetch Attendance Statistics
331$stats_query = "
332 SELECT
333 SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_count,
334 SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('pending', 'pending_correction', 'incomplete') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_count,
335 SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_count,
336 COUNT(*) as total_count
337 FROM attendances
338";
339$attendance_stats_where = [];
340if ($attendance_is_supervisor && $attendance_user_id > 0) {
341 $attendance_stats_scope = ["(i.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_user_id . " OR s.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_user_id . ")"];
342 if ($attendance_supervisor_profile_id > 0 && $attendance_supervisor_profile_id !== $attendance_user_id) {
343 $attendance_stats_scope[] = "(i.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_supervisor_profile_id . " OR s.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_supervisor_profile_id . ")";
344 }
345 $attendance_stats_where[] = '(' . implode(' OR ', $attendance_stats_scope) . ')';
346}
347if (!empty($attendance_stats_where)) {
348 $stats_query = "
349 SELECT
350 SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_count,
351 SUM(CASE WHEN a.status IN ('pending', 'pending_correction', 'incomplete') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_count,
352 SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_count,
353 COUNT(*) as total_count
354 FROM attendances a
355 LEFT JOIN students s ON a.student_id = s.id
356 LEFT JOIN internships i ON s.id = i.student_id AND i.status = 'ongoing'
357 WHERE " . implode(' AND ', $attendance_stats_where);
358}
359$stats_result = $conn->query($stats_query);
360$stats = $stats_result->fetch_assoc();
361// Prepare filter inputs (defaults: today's date)
362$filter_date = isset($_GET['date']) && $_GET['date'] !== '' ? $_GET['date'] : '';
363$start_date = isset($_GET['start_date']) && $_GET['start_date'] !== '' ? $_GET['start_date'] : '';
364$end_date = isset($_GET['end_date']) && $_GET['end_date'] !== '' ? $_GET['end_date'] : '';
365$filter_course = 0;
366$filter_department = 0;
367$filter_section = 0;
368$filter_school_year = '';
369$filter_supervisor = '';
370$filter_coordinator = '';
371$filter_source = isset($_GET['source']) ? trim((string)$_GET['source']) : 'all';
372$valid_source_filters = ['all', 'manual', 'biometric', 'external-biometric'];
373if (!in_array($filter_source, $valid_source_filters, true)) {
374 $filter_source = 'all';
375}
376$filter_status = strtolower(trim((string)($_GET['status'] ?? 'all')));
377$valid_status_filters = ['all', 'early', 'present', 'late', 'absent', 'approved', 'pending_correction'];
378if (!in_array($filter_status, $valid_status_filters, true)) {
379 $filter_status = 'all';
380}
381$has_active_status_filter = $filter_status !== 'all';
382$filter_reports = isset($_GET['reports']) ? trim((string)$_GET['reports']) : 'all';
383$valid_report_filters = ['all', 'internal_dtr', 'external_queue', 'proof'];
384$has_valid_report_filter = in_array($filter_reports, $valid_report_filters, true);
385if (!$has_valid_report_filter) {
386 $filter_reports = 'all';
387}
388
389$has_application_status = false;
390$col_app = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM users LIKE 'application_status'");
391if ($col_app instanceof mysqli_result) {
392 $has_application_status = $col_app->num_rows > 0;
393 $col_app->close();
394}
395
396$has_school_year_column = false;
397$col_sy = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM students LIKE 'school_year'");
398if ($col_sy instanceof mysqli_result) {
399 $has_school_year_column = $col_sy->num_rows > 0;
400 $col_sy->close();
401}
402
403$school_year_options = [];
404$school_year_start = 2005;
405$attendance_today_local = attendance_local_today();
406$current_calendar_month = (int)date('n', strtotime($attendance_today_local));
407$current_calendar_year = (int)date('Y', strtotime($attendance_today_local));
408$current_school_year_start = $current_calendar_month >= 7 ? $current_calendar_year : ($current_calendar_year - 1);
409$latest_school_year_start = max(2025, $current_school_year_start);
410for ($year = $latest_school_year_start; $year >= $school_year_start; $year--) {
411 $school_year_options[] = sprintf('%d-%d', $year, $year + 1);
412}
413
414$has_additional_filters = (
415 $has_active_status_filter
416 || $filter_reports !== 'all'
417 || $filter_source !== 'all'
418);
419
420// default to local current date when no date filters provided
421if (empty($filter_date) && empty($start_date) && empty($end_date) && !$has_additional_filters) {
422 $filter_date = $attendance_today_local;
423}
424
425// Safety net: process any pending raw biometric logs so Attendance stays current
426// even if ingest accepted events while auto-import was temporarily disabled.
427try {
428 $pendingRaw = 0;
429 $pendingRes = $conn->query('SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending_count FROM biometric_raw_logs WHERE processed = 0');
430 if ($pendingRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
431 $pendingRow = $pendingRes->fetch_assoc();
432 $pendingRaw = (int)($pendingRow['pending_count'] ?? 0);
433 $pendingRes->close();
434 }
435
436 if ($pendingRaw > 0) {
437 run_biometric_auto_import_stats();
438 }
439} catch (Throwable $ignored) {
440 // Keep attendance page load resilient if biometric sync tables are unavailable.
441}
442
443// Fetch dropdown lists
444$courses = [];
445// Determine which column exists for active flag on courses to avoid schema mismatch errors
446$db_esc = $conn->real_escape_string($db_name);
447$has_is_active = false;
448$has_status_col = false;
449$col_check = $conn->query("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = '" . $db_esc . "' AND TABLE_NAME = 'courses' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('is_active','status')");
450if ($col_check && $col_check->num_rows) {
451 while ($c = $col_check->fetch_assoc()) {
452 if ($c['COLUMN_NAME'] === 'is_active') $has_is_active = true;
453 if ($c['COLUMN_NAME'] === 'status') $has_status_col = true;
454 }
455}
456
457$courses_query = "SELECT id, name FROM courses";
458if ($has_is_active) {
459 $courses_query .= " WHERE is_active = 1";
460} elseif ($has_status_col) {
461 $courses_query .= " WHERE status = 1";
462}
463$courses_query .= " ORDER BY name ASC";
464
465$courses_res = $conn->query($courses_query);
466if ($courses_res && $courses_res->num_rows) {
467 while ($r = $courses_res->fetch_assoc()) $courses[] = $r;
468}
469
470$departments = [];
471$dept_res = $conn->query("SELECT id, name FROM departments ORDER BY name ASC");
472if ($dept_res && $dept_res->num_rows) {
473 while ($r = $dept_res->fetch_assoc()) $departments[] = $r;
474}
475
476$sections = [];
477$section_res = $conn->query("SELECT id, code, name, COALESCE(NULLIF(code, ''), name) AS section_label FROM sections ORDER BY section_label ASC");
478if ($section_res && $section_res->num_rows) {
479 while ($r = $section_res->fetch_assoc()) {
480 $r['section_label'] = biotern_format_section_label((string)($r['code'] ?? ''), (string)($r['name'] ?? ''));
481 $sections[] = $r;
482 }
483}
484
485$supervisors = [];
486$sup_res = $conn->query("
487 SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', first_name, middle_name, last_name)) AS supervisor_name
488 FROM supervisors
489 WHERE TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', first_name, middle_name, last_name)) <> ''
490 ORDER BY supervisor_name ASC
491");
492if ($sup_res && $sup_res->num_rows) {
493 while ($r = $sup_res->fetch_assoc()) $supervisors[] = $r['supervisor_name'];
494}
495
496$coordinators = [];
497$coor_res = $conn->query("
498 SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', first_name, middle_name, last_name)) AS coordinator_name
499 FROM coordinators
500 WHERE TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', first_name, middle_name, last_name)) <> ''
501 ORDER BY coordinator_name ASC
502");
503if ($coor_res && $coor_res->num_rows) {
504 while ($r = $coor_res->fetch_assoc()) $coordinators[] = $r['coordinator_name'];
505}
506
507// Build attendance query filtered by provided inputs. Default shows today's records.
508// Build WHERE clauses depending on provided filters
509$where = [];
510if ($attendance_is_supervisor && $attendance_user_id > 0) {
511 $attendanceScopeParts = ["(i.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_user_id . " OR s.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_user_id . ")"];
512 if ($attendance_supervisor_profile_id > 0 && $attendance_supervisor_profile_id !== $attendance_user_id) {
513 $attendanceScopeParts[] = "(i.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_supervisor_profile_id . " OR s.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_supervisor_profile_id . ")";
514 }
515 $where[] = '(' . implode(' OR ', $attendanceScopeParts) . ')';
516}
517if (!empty($start_date) && !empty($end_date)) {
518 $where[] = "a.attendance_date BETWEEN '" . $conn->real_escape_string($start_date) . "' AND '" . $conn->real_escape_string($end_date) . "'";
519} elseif (!empty($filter_date)) {
520 $where[] = "a.attendance_date = '" . $conn->real_escape_string($filter_date) . "'";
521}
522if ($filter_source !== 'all') {
523 if ($filter_source === 'biometric') {
524 $where[] = "(a.source = 'biometric' OR a.source = 'external-biometric')";
525 } else {
526 $where[] = "a.source = '" . $conn->real_escape_string($filter_source) . "'";
527 }
528}
529if ($filter_course > 0) {
530 $where[] = "s.course_id = " . intval($filter_course);
531}
532if ($filter_department > 0) {
533 // join internships table to filter by department assignment
534 $where[] = "i.department_id = " . intval($filter_department);
535}
536if ($filter_section > 0) {
537 $where[] = "s.section_id = " . intval($filter_section);
538}
539if ($filter_school_year !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{4}$/', $filter_school_year) && in_array($filter_school_year, $school_year_options, true)) {
540 $esc_school_year = $conn->real_escape_string($filter_school_year);
541 $where[] = "s.school_year = '{$esc_school_year}'";
542}
543if (!empty($filter_supervisor)) {
544 $esc_sup = $conn->real_escape_string($filter_supervisor);
545 $where[] = "(
546 TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', sup.first_name, sup.middle_name, sup.last_name)) LIKE '%{$esc_sup}%'
547 OR s.supervisor_name LIKE '%{$esc_sup}%'
548 )";
549}
550if (!empty($filter_coordinator)) {
551 $esc_coor = $conn->real_escape_string($filter_coordinator);
552 $where[] = "(
553 TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', coor.first_name, coor.middle_name, coor.last_name)) LIKE '%{$esc_coor}%'
554 OR s.coordinator_name LIKE '%{$esc_coor}%'
555 )";
556}
557
558$hasManualDtrAttachments = function_exists('table_exists') && table_exists($conn, 'manual_dtr_attachments');
559if ($filter_reports === 'proof') {
560 $where[] = $hasManualDtrAttachments
561 ? "EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM manual_dtr_attachments mda_filter WHERE mda_filter.attendance_id = a.id AND mda_filter.deleted_at IS NULL)"
562 : '1 = 0';
563}
564
565$manualProofSelect = 'NULL AS proof_photo_path, NULL AS proof_reason';
566$manualProofJoin = '';
567if ($hasManualDtrAttachments) {
568 $manualProofSelect = "CASE WHEN mda.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('manual-dtr-proof.php?id=', mda.id) ELSE NULL END AS proof_photo_path, mda.reason AS proof_reason";
569 $manualProofJoin = "
570 LEFT JOIN manual_dtr_attachments mda ON mda.id = (
571 SELECT MIN(mda_inner.id)
572 FROM manual_dtr_attachments mda_inner
573 WHERE mda_inner.attendance_id = a.id
574 AND mda_inner.deleted_at IS NULL
575 )";
576}
577
578$hasStudentAssistancePrograms = false;
579$saTableRes = $conn->query("SHOW TABLES LIKE 'student_assistance_programs'");
580if ($saTableRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
581 $hasStudentAssistancePrograms = $saTableRes->num_rows > 0;
582 $saTableRes->close();
583}
584$saStudentSelect = $hasStudentAssistancePrograms
585 ? "CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM student_assistance_programs sap WHERE sap.student_id = s.id AND sap.deleted_at IS NULL AND sap.status = 'active') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_sa_student,"
586 : "0 AS is_sa_student,";
587
588$include_internal_records = in_array($filter_reports, ['all', 'internal_dtr', 'proof'], true);
589$include_external_records = in_array($filter_reports, ['all', 'external_queue', 'proof'], true);
590
591$attendance_query = "
592 SELECT
593 a.id,
594 a.attendance_date,
595 a.morning_time_in,
596 a.morning_time_out,
597 a.break_time_in,
598 a.break_time_out,
599 a.afternoon_time_in,
600 a.afternoon_time_out,
601 a.total_hours,
602 a.source,
603 a.status,
604 a.approved_by,
605 a.approved_at,
606 a.remarks,
607 'internal' AS record_origin,
608 {$manualProofSelect},
609 s.id as student_id,
610 s.user_id,
611 s.department_id,
612 {$saStudentSelect}
613 COALESCE(NULLIF(u_student.profile_picture, ''), NULLIF(s.profile_picture, '')) AS profile_picture,
614 s.student_id as student_number,
615 s.first_name,
616 s.last_name,
617 s.email,
618 s.section_id,
619 s.supervisor_name,
620 s.coordinator_name,
621 sec.code AS section_code,
622 sec.name AS section_name,
623 c.name as course_name,
624 d.name as department_name,
625 sec.attendance_session,
626 sec.schedule_time_in,
627 sec.schedule_time_out,
628 sec.late_after_time,
629 sec.weekly_schedule_json,
630 u.name as approver_name
631 FROM attendances a
632 LEFT JOIN students s ON a.student_id = s.id
633 LEFT JOIN users u_student ON s.user_id = u_student.id
634 LEFT JOIN sections sec ON s.section_id = sec.id
635 LEFT JOIN courses c ON s.course_id = c.id
636 LEFT JOIN internships i ON s.id = i.student_id AND i.status = 'ongoing'
637 LEFT JOIN supervisors sup ON i.supervisor_id = sup.id
638 LEFT JOIN coordinators coor ON i.coordinator_id = coor.id
639 LEFT JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.id
640 LEFT JOIN users u ON a.approved_by = u.id
641 {$manualProofJoin}
642 WHERE " . implode(' AND ', $where) . "
643 ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC, a.id DESC, s.last_name ASC
644 LIMIT 100
645";
646
647$attendances = [];
648if ($include_internal_records) {
649 $attendance_result = $conn->query($attendance_query);
650 if ($attendance_result && $attendance_result->num_rows > 0) {
651 $seen_attendance_ids = [];
652 while ($row = $attendance_result->fetch_assoc()) {
653 $aid = isset($row['id']) ? (int)$row['id'] : 0;
654 if ($aid > 0 && isset($seen_attendance_ids[$aid])) {
655 continue;
656 }
657 if ($aid > 0) {
658 $seen_attendance_ids[$aid] = true;
659 }
660 $attendances[] = $row;
661 }
662 }
663}
664
665$externalWhere = ["ea.status = 'approved'"];
666if ($has_application_status) {
667 $externalWhere[] = "COALESCE(u_student.application_status, 'approved') = 'approved'";
668}
669if ($filter_source !== 'all') {
670 if ($filter_source === 'biometric') {
671 $externalWhere[] = "(ea.source = 'biometric' OR ea.source = 'external-biometric')";
672 } else {
673 $externalWhere[] = "ea.source = '" . $conn->real_escape_string($filter_source) . "'";
674 }
675}
676if ($filter_reports === 'proof') {
677 $externalWhere[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(ea.photo_path, '')) <> '' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM external_dtr_attachments eda_filter WHERE eda_filter.external_attendance_id = ea.id AND eda_filter.deleted_at IS NULL))";
678}
679if ($start_date !== '' && $end_date !== '') {
680 $safeStartDate = $conn->real_escape_string($start_date);
681 $safeEndDate = $conn->real_escape_string($end_date);
682 $externalWhere[] = "ea.attendance_date BETWEEN '{$safeStartDate}' AND '{$safeEndDate}'";
683} elseif ($filter_date !== '') {
684 $safeDate = $conn->real_escape_string($filter_date);
685 $externalWhere[] = "ea.attendance_date = '{$safeDate}'";
686}
687if ($filter_course > 0) {
688 $externalWhere[] = "s.course_id = " . (int)$filter_course;
689}
690if ($filter_department > 0) {
691 $externalWhere[] = "COALESCE(s.department_id, i.department_id) = " . (int)$filter_department;
692}
693if ($filter_section > 0) {
694 $externalWhere[] = "s.section_id = " . (int)$filter_section;
695}
696if ($has_school_year_column && $filter_school_year !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{4}$/', $filter_school_year) && in_array($filter_school_year, $school_year_options, true)) {
697 $externalWhere[] = "s.school_year = '" . $conn->real_escape_string($filter_school_year) . "'";
698}
699if (!empty($filter_supervisor)) {
700 $escSup = $conn->real_escape_string($filter_supervisor);
701 $externalWhere[] = "(
702 TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', sup.first_name, sup.middle_name, sup.last_name)) LIKE '%{$escSup}%'
703 OR s.supervisor_name LIKE '%{$escSup}%'
704 )";
705}
706if (!empty($filter_coordinator)) {
707 $escCoor = $conn->real_escape_string($filter_coordinator);
708 $externalWhere[] = "(
709 TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', coor.first_name, coor.middle_name, coor.last_name)) LIKE '%{$escCoor}%'
710 OR s.coordinator_name LIKE '%{$escCoor}%'
711 )";
712}
713if ($attendance_is_supervisor && $attendance_user_id > 0) {
714 $scopeParts = ["(i.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_user_id . " OR s.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_user_id . ")"];
715 if ($attendance_supervisor_profile_id > 0 && $attendance_supervisor_profile_id !== $attendance_user_id) {
716 $scopeParts[] = "(i.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_supervisor_profile_id . " OR s.supervisor_id = " . (int)$attendance_supervisor_profile_id . ")";
717 }
718 $externalWhere[] = '(' . implode(' OR ', $scopeParts) . ')';
719}
720
721$externalAttendanceQuery = "
722 SELECT
723 ea.id,
724 ea.attendance_date,
725 ea.morning_time_in,
726 ea.morning_time_out,
727 ea.break_time_in,
728 ea.break_time_out,
729 ea.afternoon_time_in,
730 ea.afternoon_time_out,
731 ea.total_hours,
732 ea.source,
733 ea.status,
734 ea.reviewed_by AS approved_by,
735 ea.reviewed_at AS approved_at,
736 ea.notes AS remarks,
737 (
738 SELECT eda_reason.reason
739 FROM external_dtr_attachments eda_reason
740 WHERE eda_reason.external_attendance_id = ea.id
741 AND eda_reason.deleted_at IS NULL
742 ORDER BY eda_reason.id DESC
743 LIMIT 1
744 ) AS proof_reason,
745 'external' AS record_origin,
746 " . external_attendance_proof_url_sql('ea') . " AS proof_photo_path,
747 s.id AS student_id,
748 s.user_id,
749 COALESCE(s.department_id, i.department_id) AS department_id,
750 {$saStudentSelect}
751 COALESCE(NULLIF(u_student.profile_picture, ''), NULLIF(s.profile_picture, '')) AS profile_picture,
752 s.student_id AS student_number,
753 s.first_name,
754 s.last_name,
755 s.email,
756 s.section_id,
757 s.supervisor_name,
758 s.coordinator_name,
759 sec.code AS section_code,
760 sec.name AS section_name,
761 c.name AS course_name,
762 d.name AS department_name,
763 sec.attendance_session,
764 sec.schedule_time_in,
765 sec.schedule_time_out,
766 sec.late_after_time,
767 sec.weekly_schedule_json,
768 u.name AS approver_name,
769 ea.multiplier,
770 ea.multiplier_reason
771 FROM external_attendance ea
772 LEFT JOIN students s ON ea.student_id = s.id
773 LEFT JOIN users u_student ON s.user_id = u_student.id
774 LEFT JOIN sections sec ON s.section_id = sec.id
775 LEFT JOIN courses c ON s.course_id = c.id
776 LEFT JOIN internships i ON s.id = i.student_id AND i.status = 'ongoing'
777 LEFT JOIN supervisors sup ON i.supervisor_id = sup.id
778 LEFT JOIN coordinators coor ON i.coordinator_id = coor.id
779 LEFT JOIN departments d ON d.id = COALESCE(s.department_id, i.department_id)
780 LEFT JOIN users u ON ea.reviewed_by = u.id
781 WHERE " . implode(' AND ', $externalWhere) . "
782 ORDER BY ea.attendance_date DESC, ea.id DESC, s.last_name ASC
783 LIMIT 100
784";
785
786$externalAttendanceResult = null;
787if ($include_external_records) {
788 $externalAttendanceResult = $conn->query($externalAttendanceQuery);
789}
790if ($externalAttendanceResult instanceof mysqli_result) {
791 while ($row = $externalAttendanceResult->fetch_assoc()) {
792 $attendances[] = $row;
793 }
794 $externalAttendanceResult->close();
795}
796
797// Remove same-day duplicates per student, preferring the row that has actual punches.
798if (count($attendances) > 1) {
799 $attendance_by_student_date = [];
800 foreach ($attendances as $attendance) {
801 $student_id_key = isset($attendance['student_id']) ? (string)$attendance['student_id'] : '';
802 $attendance_date_key = isset($attendance['attendance_date']) ? (string)$attendance['attendance_date'] : '';
803 $record_origin_key = trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'));
804 $dedupe_key = ($student_id_key !== '' && $attendance_date_key !== '')
805 ? ($student_id_key . '|' . $attendance_date_key . '|' . $record_origin_key)
806 : ('id|' . (string)($attendance['id'] ?? ''));
807
808 if (!isset($attendance_by_student_date[$dedupe_key]) || shouldPreferAttendanceRow($attendance, $attendance_by_student_date[$dedupe_key])) {
809 $attendance_by_student_date[$dedupe_key] = $attendance;
810 }
811 }
812 $attendances = array_values($attendance_by_student_date);
813}
814
815foreach ($attendances as &$attendance) {
816 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
817 continue;
818 }
819 attendance_workflow_mark_incomplete_if_needed($conn, $attendance);
820}
821unset($attendance);
822
823if ($has_active_status_filter) {
824 $attendances = array_values(array_filter($attendances, function (array $attendance) use ($filter_status): bool {
825 if ($filter_status === 'pending_correction') {
826 return strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['status'] ?? ''))) === 'pending_correction';
827 }
828 return attendance_list_status_key($attendance) === $filter_status;
829 }));
830}
831
832synchronizeAttendanceProgress($conn, $attendances);
833
834$missingScheduleAttendances = [];
835foreach ($attendances as $attendance) {
836 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['source'] ?? ''))) !== 'biometric') {
837 continue;
838 }
839
840 $schedule = attendance_effective_schedule($attendance);
841 if (($schedule['window_source'] ?? 'none') === 'none') {
842 $missingScheduleAttendances[] = $attendance;
843 }
844}
845
846$attendanceBridgeStatus = attendance_bridge_runtime_status($conn);
847
848// If requested via AJAX, return only the table rows HTML so frontend can replace tbody
849if (isset($_GET['ajax']) && $_GET['ajax'] == '1') {
850 if (!empty($attendances)) {
851 foreach ($attendances as $idx => $attendance) {
852 $checkboxId = 'checkBox_' . $attendance['id'] . '_' . $idx;
853 echo '<tr class="single-item">';
854 if (attendanceCanReview($attendance)) {
855 echo '<td data-label="Select"><div class="item-checkbox ms-1"><div class="custom-control custom-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" class="custom-control-input checkbox" id="' . $checkboxId . '" data-attendance-id="' . (int)$attendance['id'] . '"><label class="custom-control-label" for="' . $checkboxId . '"></label></div></div></td>';
856 } else {
857 echo '<td data-label="Select"><span class="text-muted fs-12" title="Biometric records are auto-verified">Auto</span></td>';
858 }
859 // build avatar (use uploaded profile picture when available)
860 $avatar_html = '<a href="students-internal-dtr.php?id=' . (int)$attendance['student_id'] . '" class="hstack gap-3">';
861 $pp_url = resolve_attendance_profile_image_url((string)($attendance['profile_picture'] ?? ''), (int)($attendance['user_id'] ?? 0));
862 if ($pp_url !== null) {
863 $avatar_html .= '<div class="avatar-image avatar-md"><img src="' . htmlspecialchars($pp_url) . '" alt="" class="img-fluid"></div>';
864 } else {
865 $initials = strtoupper(substr($attendance['first_name'] ?? 'N', 0, 1) . substr($attendance['last_name'] ?? 'A', 0, 1));
866 $avatar_html .= '<div class="avatar-image avatar-md"><div class="avatar-text avatar-md bg-light-primary rounded">' . $initials . '</div></div>';
867 }
868 $saBadge = ((int)($attendance['is_sa_student'] ?? 0) === 1) ? ' <span class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary ms-1">SA</span>' : '';
869 $avatar_html .= '<div><div class="fw-bold">' . htmlspecialchars(($attendance['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($attendance['last_name'] ?? '')) . $saBadge . '</div><small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($attendance['student_number'] ?? '') . '</small></div></a>';
870 echo '<td data-label="Student Name">' . $avatar_html . '</td>';
871 echo '<td data-label="Attendance Date"><span class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary">' . date('Y-m-d', strtotime($attendance['attendance_date'])) . '</span></td>';
872 echo '<td data-label="Morning In">' . attendanceDisplayTimeHtml($attendance, 'morning_time_in', 'bg-soft-success text-success') . '</td>';
873 echo '<td data-label="Morning Out">' . attendanceDisplayTimeHtml($attendance, 'morning_time_out', 'bg-soft-success text-success') . '</td>';
874 echo '<td data-label="Afternoon In">' . attendanceDisplayTimeHtml($attendance, 'afternoon_time_in', 'bg-soft-warning text-warning') . '</td>';
875 echo '<td data-label="Afternoon Out">' . attendanceDisplayTimeHtml($attendance, 'afternoon_time_out', 'bg-soft-warning text-warning') . '</td>';
876 echo '<td data-label="Total Hours">' . attendance_hours_cell_html($attendance) . '</td>';
877 echo '<td data-label="Status">' . attendance_status_cell_html($attendance) . '</td>';
878 echo '<td data-label="Source">' . getSourceBadge($attendance['source'] ?? 'manual', $attendance) . '</td>';
879 echo '<td data-label="Reports">' . attendance_reports_cell_html($attendance) . '</td>';
880 $student_name = trim((string)($attendance['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($attendance['last_name'] ?? ''));
881 $approval_status_label = ucfirst((string)($attendance['status'] ?? 'pending'));
882 $morning_in_text = $attendance['morning_time_in'] ? date('h:i A', strtotime($attendance['morning_time_in'])) : '-';
883 $morning_out_text = $attendance['morning_time_out'] ? date('h:i A', strtotime($attendance['morning_time_out'])) : '-';
884 $afternoon_in_text = $attendance['afternoon_time_in'] ? date('h:i A', strtotime($attendance['afternoon_time_in'])) : '-';
885 $afternoon_out_text = $attendance['afternoon_time_out'] ? date('h:i A', strtotime($attendance['afternoon_time_out'])) : '-';
886 echo '<td data-label="Actions">' . attendanceActionMenuItems($attendance) . '</td>';
887 echo '</tr>';
888 }
889 }
890 exit;
891}
892
893// Helper function to format time
894function formatTime($time) {
895 if ($time) {
896 return date('h:i A', strtotime($time));
897 }
898 return '-';
899}
900
901function attendanceDateWeekdayKey(?string $date): string {
902 $date = trim((string)$date);
903 if ($date === '') {
904 return '';
905 }
906 $timestamp = strtotime($date);
907 if ($timestamp === false) {
908 return '';
909 }
910 return strtolower((string)date('l', $timestamp));
911}
912
913function attendanceScheduleDisplayFallback(array $attendance, string $column): ?string {
914 global $conn;
915
916 if ($conn instanceof mysqli) {
917 $settings = biotern_attendance_settings($conn);
918 if ((string)($settings['scheduled_slot_display'] ?? '1') !== '1') {
919 return null;
920 }
921 }
922
923 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['source'] ?? ''))) !== 'biometric') {
924 return null;
925 }
926
927 $schedule = attendance_effective_schedule($attendance);
928 if (($schedule['window_source'] ?? 'none') === 'none') {
929 return null;
930 }
931
932 $session = section_schedule_inferred_session($schedule);
933 $dayType = section_schedule_normalize_day_type(
934 (string)($schedule['day_type'] ?? 'class'),
935 attendanceDateWeekdayKey((string)($attendance['attendance_date'] ?? ''))
936 );
937 $scheduleIn = section_schedule_normalize_time_input((string)($schedule['schedule_time_in'] ?? ''));
938 $scheduleOut = section_schedule_normalize_time_input((string)($schedule['schedule_time_out'] ?? ''));
939
940 if ($dayType === 'class' || $dayType === 'x2_schedule') {
941 if ($column === 'morning_time_in') {
942 return $scheduleIn;
943 }
944 if ($column === 'morning_time_out') {
945 return $scheduleOut;
946 }
947 return null;
948 }
949
950 if ($session === 'morning_only') {
951 if ($column === 'morning_time_in') {
952 return $scheduleIn;
953 }
954 if ($column === 'morning_time_out') {
955 return $scheduleOut;
956 }
957 return null;
958 }
959
960 if ($session === 'afternoon_only') {
961 if ($column === 'afternoon_time_in') {
962 return $scheduleIn;
963 }
964 if ($column === 'afternoon_time_out') {
965 return $scheduleOut;
966 }
967 return null;
968 }
969
970 if ($column === 'morning_time_in') {
971 return $scheduleIn;
972 }
973 if ($column === 'afternoon_time_out') {
974 return $scheduleOut;
975 }
976
977 return null;
978}
979
980function attendanceResolvedTime(array $attendance, string $column): array {
981 $raw = trim((string)($attendance[$column] ?? ''));
982 if ($raw !== '' && $raw !== '00:00:00') {
983 return ['time' => $raw, 'is_schedule' => false];
984 }
985
986 $fallback = attendanceScheduleDisplayFallback($attendance, $column);
987 if ($fallback !== null && $fallback !== '') {
988 return ['time' => $fallback, 'is_schedule' => true];
989 }
990
991 return ['time' => null, 'is_schedule' => false];
992}
993
994function attendanceIsMorningAbsentForWholeDay(array $attendance): bool {
995 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['source'] ?? ''))) !== 'biometric') {
996 return false;
997 }
998
999 $schedule = attendance_effective_schedule($attendance);
1000 if (($schedule['window_source'] ?? 'none') === 'none') {
1001 return false;
1002 }
1003
1004 $dayType = section_schedule_normalize_day_type(
1005 (string)($schedule['day_type'] ?? 'class'),
1006 attendanceDateWeekdayKey((string)($attendance['attendance_date'] ?? ''))
1007 );
1008 if ($dayType === 'class' || $dayType === 'x2_schedule') {
1009 return false;
1010 }
1011
1012 $session = section_schedule_inferred_session($schedule);
1013 if ($session !== 'whole_day') {
1014 return false;
1015 }
1016
1017 $morningIn = trim((string)($attendance['morning_time_in'] ?? ''));
1018 $morningOut = trim((string)($attendance['morning_time_out'] ?? ''));
1019 $afternoonIn = trim((string)($attendance['afternoon_time_in'] ?? ''));
1020 $afternoonOut = trim((string)($attendance['afternoon_time_out'] ?? ''));
1021
1022 $hasMorning = ($morningIn !== '' && $morningIn !== '00:00:00') || ($morningOut !== '' && $morningOut !== '00:00:00');
1023 $hasAfternoon = ($afternoonIn !== '' && $afternoonIn !== '00:00:00') || ($afternoonOut !== '' && $afternoonOut !== '00:00:00');
1024
1025 return !$hasMorning && $hasAfternoon;
1026}
1027
1028function attendanceScheduledClassLabel(array $attendance): string
1029{
1030 $schedule = attendance_effective_schedule($attendance);
1031 $scheduleIn = section_schedule_normalize_time_input((string)($schedule['schedule_time_in'] ?? ''));
1032 $scheduleOut = section_schedule_normalize_time_input((string)($schedule['schedule_time_out'] ?? ''));
1033
1034 if ($scheduleIn === null || $scheduleOut === null) {
1035 return 'Class';
1036 }
1037
1038 $from = date('g:i A', strtotime($scheduleIn));
1039 $to = date('g:i A', strtotime($scheduleOut));
1040 return $from . ' to ' . $to;
1041}
1042
1043function attendanceScheduleFallbackSuffix(array $attendance): string
1044{
1045 $schedule = attendance_effective_schedule($attendance);
1046 $dayType = section_schedule_normalize_day_type(
1047 (string)($schedule['day_type'] ?? 'class'),
1048 attendanceDateWeekdayKey((string)($attendance['attendance_date'] ?? ''))
1049 );
1050
1051 return ($dayType === 'class' || $dayType === 'x2_schedule') ? 'Class' : 'OJT';
1052}
1053
1054function attendanceExpectedEndLabel(array $attendance, string $column): string
1055{
1056 return '';
1057}
1058
1059function attendanceDisplayTimeHtml(array $attendance, string $column, string $badgeClass): string {
1060 if ($column === 'morning_time_in' && attendanceIsMorningAbsentForWholeDay($attendance)) {
1061 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-danger text-danger">Absent</span>';
1062 }
1063
1064 $resolved = attendanceResolvedTime($attendance, $column);
1065 if ($resolved['time'] === null) {
1066 $expectedEnd = attendanceExpectedEndLabel($attendance, $column);
1067 return '<span class="badge ' . $badgeClass . '">-</span>'
1068 . ($expectedEnd !== ''
1069 ? '<div class="fs-11 text-muted mt-1">' . htmlspecialchars($expectedEnd, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</div>'
1070 : '');
1071 }
1072
1073 $timeLabel = date('h:i A', strtotime((string)$resolved['time']));
1074 if (!$resolved['is_schedule']) {
1075 return '<span class="badge ' . $badgeClass . '">' . htmlspecialchars($timeLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>';
1076 }
1077
1078 $classTimeLabel = date('g:i A', strtotime((string)$resolved['time']));
1079 $suffix = attendanceScheduleFallbackSuffix($attendance);
1080 return '<span class="badge ' . $badgeClass . '">' . htmlspecialchars($classTimeLabel . ' ' . $suffix, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>';
1081}
1082
1083function resolve_attendance_profile_image_url(string $profilePath, int $userId = 0): ?string {
1084 $resolved = biotern_avatar_public_src($profilePath, $userId);
1085 return $resolved !== '' ? $resolved : null;
1086}
1087
1088// Helper function to get status badge
1089function getStatusBadge($status) {
1090 switch($status) {
1091 case 'approved':
1092 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-success text-success">Approved</span>';
1093 case 'rejected':
1094 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-danger text-danger">Rejected</span>';
1095 case 'pending_correction':
1096 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-warning text-warning">Needs Correction</span>';
1097 case 'incomplete':
1098 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-warning text-warning">Incomplete</span>';
1099 case 'pending':
1100 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-warning text-warning">Pending</span>';
1101 default:
1102 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-secondary text-secondary">Unknown</span>';
1103 }
1104}
1105
1106function attendancePlacementContextLabel(array $attendance): string {
1107 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['source'] ?? ''))) !== 'biometric') {
1108 return '';
1109 }
1110
1111 $schedule = attendance_effective_schedule($attendance);
1112 if (($schedule['window_source'] ?? '') === 'section') {
1113 return 'Placed using the student section schedule for this day.';
1114 }
1115
1116 if (($schedule['window_source'] ?? '') === 'school') {
1117 return 'Placed using school open hours because the student section has no schedule for this day.';
1118 }
1119
1120 return 'No attendance window is configured for this student or the school hours fallback.';
1121}
1122
1123function attendancePlacementContextShortLabel(array $attendance): string {
1124 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['source'] ?? ''))) !== 'biometric') {
1125 return '';
1126 }
1127
1128 $schedule = attendance_effective_schedule($attendance);
1129 if (($schedule['window_source'] ?? '') === 'section') {
1130 return 'Section Schedule';
1131 }
1132 if (($schedule['window_source'] ?? '') === 'school') {
1133 return 'School Hours';
1134 }
1135
1136 return 'No Window';
1137}
1138
1139function getSourceBadge($source, array $attendance = []) {
1140 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1141 $label = strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['status'] ?? 'approved'))) === 'approved'
1142 ? 'External Approved'
1143 : 'External Upload';
1144 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-info text-info">' . htmlspecialchars($label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>';
1145 }
1146
1147 $placementLabel = attendancePlacementContextLabel($attendance);
1148 $placementShortLabel = attendancePlacementContextShortLabel($attendance);
1149 $titleAttr = $placementLabel !== '' ? (' title="' . htmlspecialchars($placementLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" data-bs-toggle="tooltip"') : '';
1150
1151 switch (strtolower(trim((string)$source))) {
1152 case 'biometric':
1153 $html = '<span class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary"' . $titleAttr . '>Biometric</span>';
1154 if ($placementShortLabel !== '') {
1155 $html .= '<div class="fs-11 text-muted mt-1">' . htmlspecialchars($placementShortLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</div>';
1156 }
1157 return $html;
1158 case 'uploaded':
1159 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-info text-info">Uploaded</span>';
1160 default:
1161 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-secondary text-secondary">Manual</span>';
1162 }
1163}
1164
1165// Helper function to calculate total hours
1166function calculateTotalHours($morning_in, $morning_out, $afternoon_in, $afternoon_out) {
1167 $total = 0;
1168
1169 if ($morning_in && $morning_out) {
1170 $morning_time = strtotime($morning_out) - strtotime($morning_in);
1171 $total += $morning_time / 3600;
1172 }
1173
1174 if ($afternoon_in && $afternoon_out) {
1175 $afternoon_time = strtotime($afternoon_out) - strtotime($afternoon_in);
1176 $total += $afternoon_time / 3600;
1177 }
1178
1179 return round($total, 2);
1180}
1181
1182function parseAttendanceTime($time) {
1183 $value = trim((string)$time);
1184 if ($value === '') {
1185 return null;
1186 }
1187
1188 $timestamp = strtotime($value);
1189 return $timestamp === false ? null : $timestamp;
1190}
1191
1192function attendance_effective_schedule(array $attendance): array {
1193 global $machineConfig;
1194 return section_schedule_effective_day(
1195 section_schedule_from_row($attendance),
1196 (string)($attendance['attendance_date'] ?? ''),
1197 attendance_school_hours_config($machineConfig ?? [])
1198 );
1199}
1200
1201function attendance_collect_punch_values(array $attendance): array {
1202 $values = [];
1203 foreach (['morning_time_in', 'morning_time_out', 'afternoon_time_in', 'afternoon_time_out'] as $column) {
1204 $value = trim((string)($attendance[$column] ?? ''));
1205 if ($value === '' || $value === '00:00:00') {
1206 continue;
1207 }
1208 $values[] = $value;
1209 }
1210
1211 usort($values, static function (string $left, string $right): int {
1212 return strcmp($left, $right);
1213 });
1214
1215 return $values;
1216}
1217
1218function attendance_schedule_bounds(array $attendance): array {
1219 $schedule = attendance_effective_schedule($attendance);
1220 $schoolHours = attendance_school_hours_config($GLOBALS['machineConfig'] ?? []);
1221 $dayType = section_schedule_normalize_day_type(
1222 (string)($schedule['day_type'] ?? 'class'),
1223 attendanceDateWeekdayKey((string)($attendance['attendance_date'] ?? ''))
1224 );
1225 $scheduleIn = section_schedule_normalize_time_input((string)($schedule['schedule_time_in'] ?? ''));
1226 $scheduleOut = section_schedule_normalize_time_input((string)($schedule['schedule_time_out'] ?? ''));
1227 $schoolOut = section_schedule_normalize_time_input((string)($schoolHours['schedule_time_out'] ?? '')) ?: '19:00:00';
1228
1229 if (($dayType === 'class' || $dayType === 'x2_schedule') && ($schedule['window_source'] ?? '') === 'section' && $scheduleOut !== null) {
1230 return [
1231 'schedule' => $schedule,
1232 'official_start' => $scheduleOut,
1233 'official_end' => $schoolOut,
1234 'late_after' => $scheduleOut,
1235 ];
1236 }
1237
1238 return [
1239 'schedule' => $schedule,
1240 'official_start' => $scheduleIn ?: '08:00:00',
1241 'official_end' => $scheduleOut ?: '19:00:00',
1242 'late_after' => section_schedule_normalize_time_input((string)($schedule['late_after_time'] ?? ''))
1243 ?: ($scheduleIn ?: '08:00:00'),
1244 ];
1245}
1246
1247function attendance_clamped_duration_seconds(?int $startTs, ?int $endTs, string $windowStart, string $windowEnd): int
1248{
1249 if ($startTs === null || $endTs === null || $endTs <= $startTs) {
1250 return 0;
1251 }
1252
1253 $windowStartTs = strtotime($windowStart);
1254 $windowEndTs = strtotime($windowEnd);
1255 if ($windowStartTs === false || $windowEndTs === false) {
1256 return max(0, $endTs - $startTs);
1257 }
1258
1259 $clampedStart = max($startTs, $windowStartTs);
1260 $clampedEnd = min($endTs, $windowEndTs);
1261 return max(0, $clampedEnd - $clampedStart);
1262}
1263
1264function attendance_actual_duration_seconds(?int $startTs, ?int $endTs): int
1265{
1266 if ($startTs === null || $endTs === null || $endTs <= $startTs) {
1267 return 0;
1268 }
1269
1270 return max(0, $endTs - $startTs);
1271}
1272
1273function attendance_credited_seconds(array $attendance, ?array $bounds = null): int
1274{
1275 $bounds = is_array($bounds) ? $bounds : attendance_schedule_bounds($attendance);
1276 $officialStart = (string)($bounds['official_start'] ?? '08:00:00');
1277 $officialEnd = (string)($bounds['official_end'] ?? '19:00:00');
1278 $useScheduleCredit = false;
1279 global $conn;
1280 if ($conn instanceof mysqli) {
1281 $track = strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal')));
1282 $useScheduleCredit = biotern_attendance_uses_schedule_credit($conn, $track === 'external' ? 'external' : 'internal');
1283 }
1284
1285 $totalSeconds = 0;
1286 $pairs = [
1287 ['morning_time_in', 'morning_time_out'],
1288 ['afternoon_time_in', 'afternoon_time_out'],
1289 ];
1290
1291 foreach ($pairs as $pair) {
1292 $startTs = parseAttendanceTime($attendance[$pair[0]] ?? null);
1293 $endTs = parseAttendanceTime($attendance[$pair[1]] ?? null);
1294 $totalSeconds += $useScheduleCredit
1295 ? attendance_clamped_duration_seconds($startTs, $endTs, $officialStart, $officialEnd)
1296 : attendance_actual_duration_seconds($startTs, $endTs);
1297 }
1298
1299 $breakInTs = parseAttendanceTime($attendance['break_time_in'] ?? null);
1300 $breakOutTs = parseAttendanceTime($attendance['break_time_out'] ?? null);
1301 $totalSeconds -= $useScheduleCredit
1302 ? attendance_clamped_duration_seconds($breakInTs, $breakOutTs, $officialStart, $officialEnd)
1303 : attendance_actual_duration_seconds($breakInTs, $breakOutTs);
1304
1305 return max(0, $totalSeconds);
1306}
1307
1308function attendance_window_metrics(array $attendance): array {
1309 $bounds = attendance_schedule_bounds($attendance);
1310 $schedule = $bounds['schedule'];
1311 $punches = attendance_collect_punch_values($attendance);
1312 $firstPunch = $punches[0] ?? null;
1313 $lastPunch = $punches !== [] ? $punches[count($punches) - 1] : null;
1314 $hasCompletedRange = $firstPunch !== null && $lastPunch !== null && strcmp($lastPunch, $firstPunch) > 0;
1315
1316 $officialStart = (string)$bounds['official_start'];
1317 $officialEnd = (string)$bounds['official_end'];
1318 $lateAfter = (string)$bounds['late_after'];
1319
1320 $earlyHours = 0.0;
1321 $officialHours = round(attendance_credited_seconds($attendance, $bounds) / 3600, 2);
1322 $overtimeHours = 0.0;
1323
1324 if ($firstPunch !== null && strcmp($firstPunch, $officialStart) < 0) {
1325 $earlySeconds = max(0, strtotime($officialStart) - strtotime($firstPunch));
1326 $earlyHours = round($earlySeconds / 3600, 2);
1327 }
1328
1329 if ($hasCompletedRange) {
1330 if (strcmp($lastPunch, $officialEnd) > 0) {
1331 $overtimeSeconds = max(0, strtotime($lastPunch) - strtotime($officialEnd));
1332 $overtimeHours = round($overtimeSeconds / 3600, 2);
1333 }
1334 }
1335
1336 $arrivalStatus = 'absent';
1337 if ($firstPunch !== null) {
1338 if (strcmp($firstPunch, $officialStart) < 0) {
1339 $arrivalStatus = 'early';
1340 } elseif (strcmp($firstPunch, $lateAfter) > 0) {
1341 $arrivalStatus = 'late';
1342 } else {
1343 $arrivalStatus = 'present';
1344 }
1345 }
1346
1347 return [
1348 'schedule' => $schedule,
1349 'first_punch' => $firstPunch,
1350 'last_punch' => $lastPunch,
1351 'has_completed_range' => $hasCompletedRange,
1352 'arrival_status' => $arrivalStatus,
1353 'official_hours' => $officialHours,
1354 'early_hours' => $earlyHours,
1355 'overtime_hours' => $overtimeHours,
1356 'late_after' => $lateAfter,
1357 ];
1358}
1359
1360function attendanceCalendarBonusRulesForDate(string $dateKey): array {
1361 static $cache = [];
1362 global $conn;
1363
1364 if ($dateKey === '') {
1365 return [];
1366 }
1367 if (isset($cache[$dateKey])) {
1368 return $cache[$dateKey];
1369 }
1370 if (!($conn instanceof mysqli)) {
1371 $cache[$dateKey] = [];
1372 return $cache[$dateKey];
1373 }
1374
1375 $sql = "
1376 SELECT
1377 id,
1378 title,
1379 attendance_multiplier,
1380 apply_when_not_late,
1381 late_grace_minutes,
1382 applies_to_weekday
1383 FROM calendar_events
1384 WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
1385 AND attendance_multiplier IS NOT NULL
1386 AND attendance_multiplier > 0
1387 AND DATE(start_at) <= ?
1388 AND DATE(end_at) >= ?
1389 ORDER BY attendance_multiplier DESC, id DESC
1390 ";
1391
1392 $rules = [];
1393 $stmt = $conn->prepare($sql);
1394 if ($stmt) {
1395 $stmt->bind_param('ss', $dateKey, $dateKey);
1396 $stmt->execute();
1397 $result = $stmt->get_result();
1398 while ($row = $result->fetch_assoc()) {
1399 $rules[] = $row;
1400 }
1401 $stmt->close();
1402 }
1403
1404 $cache[$dateKey] = $rules;
1405 return $cache[$dateKey];
1406}
1407
1408function attendanceMultiplierContext(array $attendance, ?array $metrics = null): array {
1409 global $conn;
1410 $dateKey = substr((string)($attendance['attendance_date'] ?? ''), 0, 10);
1411 $rules = attendanceCalendarBonusRulesForDate($dateKey);
1412 $customRules = [];
1413 if ($conn instanceof mysqli) {
1414 $customRules = attendance_bonus_rules_for_context(
1415 $conn,
1416 $dateKey,
1417 'internal',
1418 (int)($attendance['section_id'] ?? 0),
1419 (int)($attendance['department_id'] ?? 0)
1420 );
1421 }
1422
1423 $metrics = is_array($metrics) ? $metrics : attendance_window_metrics($attendance);
1424 $weekday = attendanceDateWeekdayKey($dateKey);
1425 $best = ['multiplier' => 1.0, 'rule' => null];
1426
1427 foreach ($customRules as $rule) {
1428 $multiplier = (float)($rule['multiplier'] ?? 1);
1429 if ($multiplier <= $best['multiplier']) {
1430 continue;
1431 }
1432 $best = [
1433 'multiplier' => $multiplier,
1434 'rule' => ['title' => 'Rule: ' . (string)($rule['title'] ?? 'Attendance bonus')],
1435 ];
1436 }
1437
1438 foreach ($rules as $rule) {
1439 $ruleWeekday = strtolower(trim((string)($rule['applies_to_weekday'] ?? '')));
1440 if ($ruleWeekday !== '' && $ruleWeekday !== $weekday) {
1441 continue;
1442 }
1443
1444 $requiresNotLate = (int)($rule['apply_when_not_late'] ?? 0) === 1;
1445 if ($requiresNotLate) {
1446 $firstPunch = trim((string)($metrics['first_punch'] ?? ''));
1447 if ($firstPunch === '') {
1448 continue;
1449 }
1450
1451 $lateAfter = trim((string)($metrics['late_after'] ?? ''));
1452 if ($lateAfter === '') {
1453 continue;
1454 }
1455
1456 $lateSeconds = strtotime($firstPunch) - strtotime($lateAfter);
1457 $lateMinutes = $lateSeconds > 0 ? (int)floor($lateSeconds / 60) : 0;
1458 $graceMinutes = max(0, (int)($rule['late_grace_minutes'] ?? 0));
1459 if ($lateMinutes > $graceMinutes) {
1460 continue;
1461 }
1462 }
1463
1464 $multiplier = (float)($rule['attendance_multiplier'] ?? 1);
1465 if ($multiplier <= 0) {
1466 continue;
1467 }
1468
1469 if ($multiplier > (float)$best['multiplier']) {
1470 $best = [
1471 'multiplier' => $multiplier,
1472 'rule' => $rule,
1473 ];
1474 }
1475 }
1476
1477 return $best;
1478}
1479
1480function attendance_format_hours_label(float $hours): string {
1481 return number_format($hours, 2) . 'h';
1482}
1483
1484function attendance_hours_cell_html(array $attendance): string {
1485 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1486 $hours = (float)($attendance['total_hours'] ?? 0);
1487 $html = '<span class="badge bg-soft-info text-info">' . attendance_format_hours_label($hours) . '</span>';
1488 $multiplierReason = trim((string)($attendance['multiplier_reason'] ?? ''));
1489 if ($multiplierReason !== '') {
1490 $html .= '<div class="fs-11 text-muted mt-1">' . htmlspecialchars($multiplierReason, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</div>';
1491 }
1492 return $html;
1493 }
1494
1495 $computedHours = isset($attendance['computed_total_hours'])
1496 ? (float)$attendance['computed_total_hours']
1497 : calculateAttendanceRowHours($attendance);
1498
1499 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-secondary text-secondary">' . attendance_format_hours_label($computedHours) . '</span>';
1500}
1501
1502function attendance_list_status_key(array $attendance): string {
1503 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1504 return 'approved';
1505 }
1506
1507 $metrics = attendance_window_metrics($attendance);
1508 $status = strtolower(trim((string)($metrics['arrival_status'] ?? 'absent')));
1509
1510 return in_array($status, ['early', 'present', 'late', 'absent'], true) ? $status : 'absent';
1511}
1512
1513function attendance_status_cell_html(array $attendance): string {
1514 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1515 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-success text-success">Approved</span>'
1516 . '<div class="fs-11 text-muted mt-1">Teacher-reviewed external DTR</div>';
1517 }
1518
1519 $status = attendance_list_status_key($attendance);
1520
1521 if ($status === 'early') {
1522 $badge = '<span class="badge bg-soft-info text-info">Early</span>';
1523 } elseif ($status === 'present') {
1524 $badge = '<span class="badge bg-soft-success text-success">Present</span>';
1525 } elseif ($status === 'late') {
1526 $badge = '<span class="badge bg-soft-warning text-warning">Late</span>';
1527 } else {
1528 $badge = '<span class="badge bg-soft-danger text-danger">Absent</span>';
1529 }
1530
1531 $metrics = attendance_window_metrics($attendance);
1532
1533 $notes = [];
1534 if ((($metrics['schedule']['window_source'] ?? '') === 'school')) {
1535 $notes[] = 'School hours';
1536 } elseif ((($metrics['schedule']['window_source'] ?? '') === 'section')) {
1537 $notes[] = 'Section schedule';
1538 }
1539
1540 return $badge . ($notes !== []
1541 ? '<div class="fs-11 text-muted mt-1">' . htmlspecialchars(implode(' | ', $notes), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</div>'
1542 : '');
1543}
1544
1545function calculateAttendanceRowHours(array $attendance): float {
1546 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1547 return round((float)($attendance['total_hours'] ?? 0), 2);
1548 }
1549
1550 $baseHours = round(attendance_credited_seconds($attendance) / 3600, 2);
1551 if ($baseHours <= 0) {
1552 return 0.0;
1553 }
1554
1555 $bonus = attendanceMultiplierContext($attendance);
1556 $multiplier = max(1.0, (float)($bonus['multiplier'] ?? 1));
1557 return round($baseHours * $multiplier, 2);
1558}
1559
1560function synchronizeAttendanceProgress(mysqli $conn, array &$attendances): void {
1561 if (empty($attendances)) {
1562 return;
1563 }
1564
1565 $studentIds = [];
1566 $updateAttendanceStmt = $conn->prepare("UPDATE attendances SET total_hours = ?, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = ?");
1567
1568 foreach ($attendances as &$attendance) {
1569 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1570 continue;
1571 }
1572
1573 $computedHours = calculateAttendanceRowHours($attendance);
1574 $attendance['computed_total_hours'] = $computedHours;
1575
1576 $studentId = (int)($attendance['student_id'] ?? 0);
1577 if ($studentId > 0) {
1578 $studentIds[$studentId] = true;
1579 }
1580
1581 $attendanceId = (int)($attendance['id'] ?? 0);
1582 $storedHours = isset($attendance['total_hours']) && $attendance['total_hours'] !== null && $attendance['total_hours'] !== ''
1583 ? (float)$attendance['total_hours']
1584 : null;
1585
1586 if ($attendanceId > 0 && $updateAttendanceStmt && ($storedHours === null || abs($storedHours - $computedHours) > 0.009)) {
1587 $updateAttendanceStmt->bind_param('di', $computedHours, $attendanceId);
1588 $updateAttendanceStmt->execute();
1589 $attendance['total_hours'] = $computedHours;
1590 }
1591 }
1592 unset($attendance);
1593
1594 if ($updateAttendanceStmt) {
1595 $updateAttendanceStmt->close();
1596 }
1597
1598 if (empty($studentIds)) {
1599 return;
1600 }
1601
1602 $sumStmt = $conn->prepare("
1603 SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_hours), 0) AS rendered
1604 FROM attendances
1605 WHERE student_id = ? AND LOWER(COALESCE(status, 'pending')) = 'approved'
1606 ");
1607 $internshipLookupStmt = $conn->prepare("
1608 SELECT id, required_hours
1609 FROM internships
1610 WHERE student_id = ? AND status = 'ongoing'
1611 ORDER BY id DESC
1612 LIMIT 1
1613 ");
1614 $internshipUpdateStmt = $conn->prepare("
1615 UPDATE internships
1616 SET rendered_hours = ?, completion_percentage = ?, updated_at = NOW()
1617 WHERE id = ?
1618 ");
1619 $studentLookupStmt = $conn->prepare("
1620 SELECT assignment_track, internal_total_hours, external_total_hours
1621 FROM students
1622 WHERE id = ?
1623 LIMIT 1
1624 ");
1625 $studentInternalUpdateStmt = $conn->prepare("
1626 UPDATE students
1627 SET internal_total_hours_remaining = ?, updated_at = NOW()
1628 WHERE id = ?
