1629 ");
1630 $studentExternalUpdateStmt = $conn->prepare("
1631 UPDATE students
1632 SET external_total_hours_remaining = ?, updated_at = NOW()
1633 WHERE id = ?
1634 ");
1635
1636 foreach (array_keys($studentIds) as $studentId) {
1637 if (!$sumStmt) {
1638 break;
1639 }
1640
1641 $sumStmt->bind_param('i', $studentId);
1642 $sumStmt->execute();
1643 $sumRow = $sumStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc();
1644 $rendered = isset($sumRow['rendered']) ? (float)$sumRow['rendered'] : 0.0;
1645
1646 if ($internshipLookupStmt && $internshipUpdateStmt) {
1647 $internshipLookupStmt->bind_param('i', $studentId);
1648 $internshipLookupStmt->execute();
1649 $internship = $internshipLookupStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc();
1650
1651 if ($internship) {
1652 $required = max(0, (int)($internship['required_hours'] ?? 0));
1653 $percentage = $required > 0 ? round(($rendered / $required) * 100, 2) : 0.0;
1654 if ($percentage > 100) {
1655 $percentage = 100.0;
1656 }
1657
1658 $internshipId = (int)$internship['id'];
1659 $internshipUpdateStmt->bind_param('ddi', $rendered, $percentage, $internshipId);
1660 $internshipUpdateStmt->execute();
1661 }
1662 }
1663
1664 if ($studentLookupStmt) {
1665 $studentLookupStmt->bind_param('i', $studentId);
1666 $studentLookupStmt->execute();
1667 $student = $studentLookupStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc();
1668
1669 if ($student) {
1670 $track = strtolower(trim((string)($student['assignment_track'] ?? 'internal')));
1671 $roundedRendered = (int)floor($rendered);
1672
1673 if ($track === 'external' && $studentExternalUpdateStmt) {
1674 $externalTotal = max(0, (int)($student['external_total_hours'] ?? 0));
1675 $externalRemaining = max(0, $externalTotal - $roundedRendered);
1676 $studentExternalUpdateStmt->bind_param('ii', $externalRemaining, $studentId);
1677 $studentExternalUpdateStmt->execute();
1678 } elseif ($studentInternalUpdateStmt) {
1679 $internalTotal = max(0, (int)($student['internal_total_hours'] ?? 0));
1680 $internalRemaining = max(0, $internalTotal - $roundedRendered);
1681 $studentInternalUpdateStmt->bind_param('ii', $internalRemaining, $studentId);
1682 $studentInternalUpdateStmt->execute();
1683 }
1684 }
1685 }
1686 }
1687
1688 if ($sumStmt) {
1689 $sumStmt->close();
1690 }
1691 if ($internshipLookupStmt) {
1692 $internshipLookupStmt->close();
1693 }
1694 if ($internshipUpdateStmt) {
1695 $internshipUpdateStmt->close();
1696 }
1697 if ($studentLookupStmt) {
1698 $studentLookupStmt->close();
1699 }
1700 if ($studentInternalUpdateStmt) {
1701 $studentInternalUpdateStmt->close();
1702 }
1703 if ($studentExternalUpdateStmt) {
1704 $studentExternalUpdateStmt->close();
1705 }
1706}
1707
1708function attendanceIsBiometricRecord(array $attendance): bool
1709{
1710 return strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['source'] ?? ''))) === 'biometric';
1711}
1712
1713function getReviewBadge(array $attendance): string
1714{
1715 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1716 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-success text-success">Teacher Approved</span>';
1717 }
1718
1719 if (attendanceIsBiometricRecord($attendance)) {
1720 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-success text-success">Auto-Verified</span>';
1721 }
1722
1723 return getStatusBadge(strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['status'] ?? 'pending'))));
1724}
1725
1726function attendance_reports_cell_html(array $attendance): string
1727{
1728 $studentId = (int)($attendance['student_id'] ?? 0);
1729 $attendanceId = (int)($attendance['id'] ?? 0);
1730
1731 if ($studentId <= 0 || $attendanceId <= 0) {
1732 return '<span class="text-muted">N/A</span>';
1733 }
1734
1735 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1736 $proofPath = trim((string)($attendance['proof_photo_path'] ?? ''));
1737 $externalUrl = 'external-attendance.php?status=approved';
1738 $html = '<div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-1">'
1739 . '<a class="badge bg-soft-info text-info" href="' . htmlspecialchars($externalUrl, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '">External Queue</a>';
1740 if ($proofPath !== '') {
1741 $html .= '<a class="badge bg-soft-secondary text-secondary" href="' . htmlspecialchars($proofPath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Proof</a>';
1742 }
1743 return $html . '</div>';
1744 }
1745
1746 $dtrUrl = 'students-internal-dtr.php?id=' . $studentId;
1747 $printUrl = 'print_attendance.php?id=' . $attendanceId;
1748 $proofPath = trim((string)($attendance['proof_photo_path'] ?? ''));
1749 $proofLink = $proofPath !== ''
1750 ? '<a class="badge bg-soft-info text-info" href="' . htmlspecialchars($proofPath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Proof</a>'
1751 : '';
1752
1753 return '<div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-1">'
1754 . '<a class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary" href="' . htmlspecialchars($dtrUrl, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '">Internal DTR</a>'
1755 . '<a class="badge bg-soft-secondary text-secondary" href="' . htmlspecialchars($printUrl, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Print</a>'
1756 . $proofLink
1757 . '</div>';
1758}
1759
1760function attendance_photo_cell_html(array $attendance): string
1761{
1762 $proofPath = trim((string)($attendance['proof_photo_path'] ?? ''));
1763 if ($proofPath === '') {
1764 return '<span class="text-muted">-</span>';
1765 }
1766
1767 return '<a class="attendance-proof-thumb" href="' . htmlspecialchars($proofPath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Open proof image">'
1768 . '<img src="' . htmlspecialchars($proofPath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" alt="Proof image">'
1769 . '</a>';
1770}
1771
1772function attendance_notes_cell_html(array $attendance): string
1773{
1774 $parts = [];
1775 foreach (['remarks', 'proof_reason'] as $key) {
1776 $value = trim((string)($attendance[$key] ?? ''));
1777 if ($value !== '' && !in_array($value, $parts, true)) {
1778 $parts[] = $value;
1779 }
1780 }
1781
1782 if ($parts === []) {
1783 return '<span class="text-muted fs-12">No notes</span>';
1784 }
1785
1786 return '<div class="attendance-notes-cell">' . htmlspecialchars(implode(' | ', $parts), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</div>';
1787}
1788
1789function attendanceCanReview(array $attendance): bool
1790{
1791 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1792 return false;
1793 }
1794
1795 return !attendanceIsBiometricRecord($attendance);
1796}
1797
1798function attendance_review_cell_html(array $attendance): string
1799{
1800 $attendanceId = (int)($attendance['id'] ?? 0);
1801 $status = strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['status'] ?? 'pending')));
1802
1803 if (!attendanceCanReview($attendance) || $attendanceId <= 0) {
1804 return '<span class="text-muted fs-12">No manual review needed</span>';
1805 }
1806
1807 $approveSelected = $status === 'rejected' ? '' : ' selected';
1808 $rejectSelected = $status === 'rejected' ? ' selected' : '';
1809
1810 return '<form class="attendance-review-form" data-attendance-review-form data-attendance-id="' . $attendanceId . '">'
1811 . '<label class="visually-hidden" for="attendanceReviewAction' . $attendanceId . '">Review action</label>'
1812 . '<select id="attendanceReviewAction' . $attendanceId . '" class="form-select form-select-sm" name="review_action">'
1813 . '<option value="approve"' . $approveSelected . '>Approve</option>'
1814 . '<option value="reject"' . $rejectSelected . '>Reject</option>'
1815 . '</select>'
1816 . '<label class="visually-hidden" for="attendanceReviewNote' . $attendanceId . '">Review note</label>'
1817 . '<input id="attendanceReviewNote' . $attendanceId . '" class="form-control form-control-sm" type="text" name="review_note" placeholder="Review note (optional)" value="">'
1818 . '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" data-attendance-review-save>Save</button>'
1819 . '</form>';
1820}
1821
1822function attendanceActionMenuItems(array $attendance): string
1823{
1824 $attendanceId = (int)($attendance['id'] ?? 0);
1825 $studentId = (int)($attendance['student_id'] ?? 0);
1826
1827 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal'))) === 'external') {
1828 $items = [];
1829 $proofPath = trim((string)($attendance['proof_photo_path'] ?? ''));
1830 $items[] = '<li><a class="dropdown-item" href="external-attendance.php?status=approved"><i class="feather feather-briefcase me-3"></i><span>Open External Queue</span></a></li>';
1831 if ($proofPath !== '') {
1832 $items[] = '<li><a class="dropdown-item" href="' . htmlspecialchars($proofPath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="feather feather-image me-3"></i><span>Open Proof</span></a></li>';
1833 }
1834 return '<div class="hstack gap-2 justify-content-end"><a href="javascript:void(0)" class="avatar-text avatar-md" data-bs-toggle="tooltip" title="View Details" onclick="viewDetails(' . $studentId . ')"><i class="feather feather-eye"></i></a><div class="dropdown"><a href="javascript:void(0)" class="avatar-text avatar-md" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" data-bs-offset="0,21"><i class="feather feather-more-horizontal"></i></a><ul class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end">' . implode('', $items) . '</ul></div></div>';
1835 }
1836
1837 $items = [];
1838 $proofPath = trim((string)($attendance['proof_photo_path'] ?? ''));
1839
1840 if (attendanceCanReview($attendance)) {
1841 $items[] = '<li><a class="dropdown-item" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="approveAttendanceIndividual(' . $attendanceId . ')"><i class="feather feather-check-circle me-3"></i><span>Approve</span></a></li>';
1842 $items[] = '<li><a class="dropdown-item" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="rejectAttendanceIndividual(' . $attendanceId . ')"><i class="feather feather-x-circle me-3"></i><span>Reject</span></a></li>';
1843 } else {
1844 $items[] = '<li><span class="dropdown-item-text text-muted"><i class="feather feather-shield me-3"></i><span>Auto-verified by machine</span></span></li>';
1845 }
1846
1847 if ($proofPath !== '') {
1848 $items[] = '<li><a class="dropdown-item" href="' . htmlspecialchars($proofPath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="feather feather-image me-3"></i><span>Open Proof</span></a></li>';
1849 }
1850 $items[] = '<li><a class="dropdown-item" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="editAttendance(' . $attendanceId . ')"><i class="feather feather-edit-3 me-3"></i><span>Edit</span></a></li>';
1851 $items[] = '<li><a class="dropdown-item printBTN" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="printAttendance(' . $attendanceId . ')"><i class="feather feather-printer me-3"></i><span>Print</span></a></li>';
1852 $items[] = '<li><a class="dropdown-item" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="sendNotification(' . $attendanceId . ')"><i class="feather feather-mail me-3"></i><span>Send Notification</span></a></li>';
1853 $items[] = '<li class="dropdown-divider"></li>';
1854 $items[] = '<li><a class="dropdown-item" href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="deleteAttendanceIndividual(' . $attendanceId . ')"><i class="feather feather-trash-2 me-3"></i><span>Delete</span></a></li>';
1855
1856 return '<div class="hstack gap-2 justify-content-end"><a href="javascript:void(0)" class="avatar-text avatar-md" data-bs-toggle="tooltip" title="View Details" onclick="viewDetails(' . $studentId . ')"><i class="feather feather-eye"></i></a><div class="dropdown"><a href="javascript:void(0)" class="avatar-text avatar-md" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" data-bs-offset="0,21"><i class="feather feather-more-horizontal"></i></a><ul class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end">' . implode('', $items) . '</ul></div></div>';
1857}
1858
1859// Determine attendance status based on the section schedule.
1860function getAttendanceStatus(array $attendance) {
1861 return (string)(attendance_window_metrics($attendance)['arrival_status'] ?? 'absent');
1862}
1863
1864function attendanceFilledSlotScore(array $attendance): int {
1865 $score = 0;
1866 foreach (['morning_time_in', 'morning_time_out', 'afternoon_time_in', 'afternoon_time_out'] as $column) {
1867 $value = trim((string)($attendance[$column] ?? ''));
1868 if ($value !== '' && $value !== '00:00:00') {
1869 $score++;
1870 }
1871 }
1872 return $score;
1873}
1874
1875function shouldPreferAttendanceRow(array $candidate, array $existing): bool {
1876 $candidateScore = attendanceFilledSlotScore($candidate);
1877 $existingScore = attendanceFilledSlotScore($existing);
1878
1879 if ($candidateScore !== $existingScore) {
1880 return $candidateScore > $existingScore;
1881 }
1882
1883 return (int)($candidate['id'] ?? 0) > (int)($existing['id'] ?? 0);
1884}
1885
1886if (trim((string)($_GET['print'] ?? '')) === 'list') {
1887 $printRange = $start_date !== '' && $end_date !== ''
1888 ? ($start_date . ' to ' . $end_date)
1889 : ($filter_date !== '' ? $filter_date : 'Current filtered list');
1890 ?>
1891<!doctype html>
1892<html lang="en">
1893<head>
1894 <meta charset="utf-8">
1895 <title>BioTern || Attendance Print Preview</title>
1896 <style>
1897 @page { size: A4 landscape; margin: 10mm; }
1898 body { margin: 0; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: #111827; background: #fff; }
1899 .screen-actions { max-width: 1120px; margin: 18px auto 0; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 10px; }
1900 .screen-actions button { border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; background: #fff; color: #0f172a; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }
1901 .screen-actions .primary { background: #0ea5e9; border-color: #0ea5e9; color: #fff; }
1902 .paper { max-width: 1120px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 8mm 8mm 10mm; box-sizing: border-box; }
1903 .print-header { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 78px minmax(0,1fr) 78px; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border-bottom: 2px solid #2f5fb3; padding-bottom: 9px; }
1904 .print-header img { width: 68px; height: 68px; object-fit: contain; }
1905 .print-header-copy { text-align: center; line-height: 1.25; }
1906 .print-school { margin: 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; }
1907 .print-meta { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; color: #1f4e9f; font-weight: 600; }
1908 .print-title { text-align: center; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; margin: 18px 0 10px; text-transform: uppercase; }
1909 .filter-line { font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
1910 table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 11px; }
1911 th, td { border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px 7px; text-align: left; vertical-align: top; }
1912 thead th { background: #f8fafc; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 10px; }
1913 .text-center { text-align: center; }
1914 @media print { .screen-actions { display: none; } .paper { max-width: none; padding: 0; } }
1915 </style>
1916</head>
1917<body>
1918 <div class="screen-actions"><button type="button" onclick="window.close()">Close</button><button type="button" class="primary" onclick="window.print()">Print</button></div>
1919 <main class="paper">
1920 <header class="print-header">
1921 <img src="assets/images/ccstlogo.png" alt="CCST">
1922 <div class="print-header-copy">
1923 <h1 class="print-school">CLARK COLLEGE OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY</h1>
1924 <p class="print-meta">SNS Bldg. Aurea St., Samsonville Subd., Dau, Mabalacat, Pampanga</p>
1925 <p class="print-meta">Telefax No.: (045) 624-0215</p>
1926 </div>
1927 <div aria-hidden="true"></div>
1928 </header>
1929 <div class="print-title">Attendance List</div>
1930 <div class="filter-line"><strong>FILTER:</strong> <?php echo htmlspecialchars($printRange, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?> / <?php echo htmlspecialchars($filter_reports === 'all' ? 'All reports' : ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $filter_reports)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?> / <?php echo htmlspecialchars($filter_status === 'all' ? 'All statuses' : ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $filter_status)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
1931 <table>
1932 <thead>
1933 <tr>
1934 <th>#</th>
1935 <th>Date</th>
1936 <th>Student No.</th>
1937 <th>Name</th>
1938 <th>Course / Section</th>
1939 <th>AM In</th>
1940 <th>AM Out</th>
1941 <th>PM In</th>
1942 <th>PM Out</th>
1943 <th>Total Hours</th>
1944 <th>Status</th>
1945 <th>Type</th>
1946 </tr>
1947 </thead>
1948 <tbody>
1949 <?php if (empty($attendances)): ?>
1950 <tr><td colspan="12" class="text-center">No attendance records matched the current filters.</td></tr>
1951 <?php else: ?>
1952 <?php foreach ($attendances as $index => $attendance): ?>
1953 <tr>
1954 <td><?php echo (int)$index + 1; ?></td>
1955 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($attendance['attendance_date'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1956 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($attendance['student_number'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1957 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($attendance['last_name'] ?? '') . ', ' . (string)($attendance['first_name'] ?? '')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1958 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($attendance['course_name'] ?? '-') . ' / ' . biotern_format_section_label((string)($attendance['section_code'] ?? ''), (string)($attendance['section_name'] ?? ''))), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1959 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(!empty($attendance['morning_time_in']) ? date('h:i A', strtotime((string)$attendance['morning_time_in'])) : '-', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1960 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(!empty($attendance['morning_time_out']) ? date('h:i A', strtotime((string)$attendance['morning_time_out'])) : '-', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1961 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(!empty($attendance['afternoon_time_in']) ? date('h:i A', strtotime((string)$attendance['afternoon_time_in'])) : '-', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1962 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(!empty($attendance['afternoon_time_out']) ? date('h:i A', strtotime((string)$attendance['afternoon_time_out'])) : '-', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1963 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(number_format((float)($attendance['total_hours'] ?? 0), 2), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1964 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', attendance_list_status_key($attendance))), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1965 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(ucfirst((string)($attendance['record_origin'] ?? 'internal')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1966 </tr>
1967 <?php endforeach; ?>
1968 <?php endif; ?>
1969 </tbody>
1970 </table>
1971 </main>
1972</body>
1973</html>
1974 <?php
1975 exit;
1976}
1977?>
1978<?php
1979$page_title = !empty($biotern_attendance_sandbox) ? 'BioTern || Test Attendance' : 'BioTern || Internal Attendance';
1980$page_body_class = 'attendance-page';

1983 'assets/js/theme-customizer-init.min.js',
1984 'assets/js/modules/pages/pages-attendance-runtime.js?v=20260509c',
1985];
1986include 'includes/header.php';
1987?>

1991 <div class="page-header">

'secondary'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" title="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($attendanceBridgeStatus['detail'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
2004 <i class="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($attendanceBridgeStatus['icon'] ?? 'feather-help-circle'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"></i>
2005 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($attendanceBridgeStatus['label'] ?? 'Bridge Unknown'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
2006 <?php if (isset($attendanceBridgeStatus['age_seconds']) && $attendanceBridgeStatus['age_seconds'] !== null): ?>
2007 <small><?php echo (int)$attendanceBridgeStatus['age_seconds']; ?>s</small>
2008 <?php endif; ?>
2009 </a>
2010 <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-light-brand page-header-actions-toggle" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="attendanceActionsMenu">
2011 <i class="feather-grid me-1"></i>
2012 <span>Actions</span>
2013 </button>
2014 <div class="page-header-actions" id="attendanceActionsMenu">
2015 <div class="dashboard-actions-panel">
2016 <div class="dashboard-actions-meta">
2017 <span class="text-muted fs-12">Quick Actions</span>
2018 </div>
2019 <div class="dashboard-actions-grid page-header-right-items-wrapper">
2020 <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="btn btn-light-brand" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseAttendanceStats">
2021 <i class="feather-bar-chart me-2"></i>
2022 <span>Statistics</span>
2023 </a>
2024 <button type="button" class="btn filter-toggle-btn" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#attendanceFilterCollapse" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="attendanceFilterCollapse">
2025 <i class="feather-filter me-2"></i>
2026 <span>Filters</span>

2035 </a>

2038 <span>Sync Machine</span>
2039 </button>

2041 <label class="btn btn-light-brand mb-0" for="f20hOfflineReportFile">

2043 <span>Import F20H Excel</span>
2044 </label>
2045 <input type="file" id="f20hOfflineReportFile" name="f20h_report_file" class="d-none" accept=".xls,application/vnd.ms-excel" onchange="if (this.files && this.files.length) { this.form.submit(); }">
2046 </form>
2047 <div class="dropdown">
2048 <a class="btn btn-light-brand" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" data-bs-offset="0, 10" data-bs-auto-close="outside">
2049 <i class="feather-sliders me-2"></i>
2050 <span>Quick Filter</span>
2051 </a>
2052 <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end">
2053 <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="dropdown-item attendance-filter" data-type="status" data-value="approved">
2054 <i class="feather-check-circle me-3"></i>
2055 <span>Approved</span>
2056 </a>
2057 <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="dropdown-item attendance-filter" data-type="status" data-value="present">
2058 <i class="feather-check-square me-3"></i>
2059 <span>Present</span>
2060 </a>
2061 <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="dropdown-item attendance-filter" data-type="status" data-value="late">
2062 <i class="feather-clock me-3"></i>
2063 <span>Late</span>
2064 </a>
2065 <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="dropdown-item attendance-filter" data-type="status" data-value="absent">
2066 <i class="feather-x-circle me-3"></i>
2067 <span>Absent</span>
2068 </a>
2069 </div>
2070 </div>
2071 <div class="dropdown">
2072 <a class="btn btn-light-brand" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" data-bs-offset="0, 10" data-bs-auto-close="outside">
2073 <i class="feather-paperclip me-2"></i>
2074 <span>Export</span>
2075 </a>
2076 <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end">
2077 <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="dropdown-item">
2078 <i class="bi bi-filetype-pdf me-3"></i>
2079 <span>PDF</span>
2080 </a>
2081 <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="dropdown-item">
2082 <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv me-3"></i>
2083 <span>CSV</span>
2084 </a>
2085 <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="dropdown-item">
2086 <i class="bi bi-filetype-xml me-3"></i>
2087 <span>XML</span>
2088 </a>
2089 <div class="dropdown-divider"></div>
2090 <?php $attendancePrintQuery = http_build_query(array_merge($_GET, ['print' => 'list'])); ?>
2091 <a href="attendance.php?<?php echo htmlspecialchars($attendancePrintQuery, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="dropdown-item">
2092 <i class="bi bi-printer me-3"></i>
2093 <span>Print</span>
2094 </a>
2095 </div>
2096 </div>
2097 </div>
2098 </div>
2099 </div>
2100 <div class="d-md-none d-flex align-items-center">
2101 <a href="javascript:void(0)" class="page-header-right-open-toggle">
2102 <i class="feather-align-right fs-20"></i>
2103 </a>
2104 </div>
2105 </div>
2106 </div>
2107
2108 <?php
2109 $attendance_sync_flash = $_SESSION['attendance_sync_flash'] ?? null;
2110 unset($_SESSION['attendance_sync_flash']);
2111 if (is_array($attendance_sync_flash) && !empty($attendance_sync_flash['message'])):
2112 ?>
2113 <div class="alert alert-<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($attendance_sync_flash['type'] ?? 'info'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?> alert-dismissible fade show mx-3" role="alert" id="attendanceSyncAlert">
2114 <?php echo nl2br(htmlspecialchars((string)$attendance_sync_flash['message'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8')); ?>
2115 <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
2116 </div>
2117 <?php endif; ?>
2118 <?php if (!empty($biotern_attendance_sandbox)): ?>
2119 <div class="alert alert-info mx-3" role="alert">
2120 Test Attendance sandbox. This page uses the same data as Internal Attendance so display changes can be reviewed here before changing the original workflow.
2121 </div>
2122 <?php endif; ?>
2123 <?php if (!empty($missingScheduleAttendances)): ?>
2124 <?php
2125 $missingScheduleLabels = [];
2126 foreach ($missingScheduleAttendances as $attendance) {
2127 $studentLabel = trim((string)($attendance['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($attendance['last_name'] ?? ''));
2128 $sectionLabel = biotern_format_section_label(
2129 (string)($attendance['section_code'] ?? ''),
2130 (string)($attendance['section_name'] ?? '')
2131 );
2132 $missingScheduleLabels[] = trim($studentLabel . ($sectionLabel !== '' ? (' [' . $sectionLabel . ']') : ''));
2133 }
2134 $missingScheduleLabels = array_values(array_unique(array_filter($missingScheduleLabels)));
2135 ?>
2136 <div class="alert alert-warning alert-dismissible fade show mx-3" role="alert">
2137 Section schedule is missing for some biometric rows on this page. Review the section schedule before trusting their slot placement.
2138 <?php if ($missingScheduleLabels !== []): ?>
2139 <div class="mt-2 small"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(implode(', ', array_slice($missingScheduleLabels, 0, 8)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?><?php echo count($missingScheduleLabels) > 8 ? '...' : ''; ?></div>
2140 <?php endif; ?>
2141 <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
2142 </div>
2143 <?php endif; ?>
2144 <div id="attendanceSyncAlertHost" class="mx-3"></div>
2145
2146
2147 <div class="collapse show" id="attendanceFilterCollapse">
2148 <div class="row mb-3 px-3">
2149 <div class="col-12">
2150 <div class="filter-panel filter-panel-compact">
2151 <form method="GET" action="attendance.php" class="filter-form row g-2 align-items-end" id="attendanceFilterForm">
2152 <div class="col-sm-2">
2153 <label class="form-label" for="filter-date">Date</label>
2154 <input id="filter-date" type="date" name="date" class="form-control" value="<?php
2155echo htmlspecialchars((string)$filter_date, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
2156 </div>
2157 <div class="col-sm-2">
2158 <label class="form-label" for="filter-status">Status</label>
2159 <select id="filter-status" name="status" class="form-control">
2160 <option value="all" <?php echo $filter_status === 'all' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>All Statuses</option>
2161 <option value="early" <?php echo $filter_status === 'early' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Early</option>
2162 <option value="present" <?php echo $filter_status === 'present' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Present</option>
2163 <option value="late" <?php echo $filter_status === 'late' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Late</option>
2164 <option value="absent" <?php echo $filter_status === 'absent' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Absent</option>
2165 <option value="approved" <?php echo $filter_status === 'approved' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Approved</option>
2166 <option value="pending_correction" <?php echo $filter_status === 'pending_correction' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Needs Correction</option>
2167 </select>
2168 </div>
2169 <div class="col-sm-2">
2170 <label class="form-label" for="filter-source">Source</label>
2171 <select id="filter-source" name="source" class="form-control">
2172 <option value="all" <?php echo $filter_source === 'all' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>All Sources</option>
2173 <option value="manual" <?php echo $filter_source === 'manual' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Manual</option>
2174 <option value="biometric" <?php echo $filter_source === 'biometric' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Biometric</option>
2175 <option value="external-biometric" <?php echo $filter_source === 'external-biometric' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>External Biometric</option>
2176 </select>
2177 </div>
2178 <div class="col-sm-2">
2179 <label class="form-label" for="filter-reports">Reports</label>
2180 <select id="filter-reports" name="reports" class="form-control">
2181 <option value="all" <?php echo $filter_reports === 'all' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>All Reports</option>
2182 <option value="internal_dtr" <?php echo $filter_reports === 'internal_dtr' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Internal DTR / Print</option>
2183 <option value="external_queue" <?php echo $filter_reports === 'external_queue' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>External Queue</option>
2184 <option value="proof" <?php echo $filter_reports === 'proof' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>With Proof</option>
2185 </select>
2186 </div>
2187 <div class="col-sm-2 filter-form-actions">
2188 <a href="attendance.php" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">Reset</a>
2189 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Apply</button>
2190 </div>
2191 </form>

2193 </div>

2298 <div class="row mb-2 px-3" id="bulkActionsToolbar" style="display: none;">
2299 <div class="col-12">
2300 <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between p-2 rounded bulk-toolbar">
2301 <span class="fs-6" style="font-weight: 600;">
2302 <i class="feather feather-check me-1" style="font-size: 16px;"></i>
2303 <strong id="selectedCount" style="font-size:1.1rem;">0</strong> record(s) selected
2304 </span>
2305 <div class="d-flex gap-1">
2306 <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-success py-1 px-2" onclick="performBulkAction('approve')" title="Approve selected">
2307 <i class="feather feather-check fs-8 me-1"></i> Approve
2308 </button>
2309 <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-warning py-1 px-2" onclick="performBulkAction('reject')" title="Reject selected">
2310 <i class="feather feather-x fs-8 me-1"></i> Reject
2311 </button>
2312 <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-danger py-1 px-2" onclick="performBulkAction('delete')" title="Delete selected">
2313 <i class="feather feather-trash-2 fs-8 me-1"></i> Delete
2314 </button>
2315 <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary py-1 px-2" onclick="clearSelection()">
2316 <i class="feather feather-x fs-8 me-1"></i> Clear
2317 </button>
2318 </div>
2319 </div>
2320 </div>
2321 </div>
2322 <div class="main-content">
2323 <div class="row">
2324 <div class="col-lg-12">
2325
2326 <div class="card stretch stretch-full attendance-table-card app-data-card app-data-toolbar">
2327 <div class="card-body p-0">
2328 <div class="table-responsive app-data-table-wrap">
2329 <table class="table table-hover app-data-table" id="attendanceList">
2330 <thead>
2331 <tr>
2332 <th class="wd-30">
2333 <div class="btn-group mb-1">
2334 <div class="custom-control custom-checkbox ms-1">
2335 <input type="checkbox" class="custom-control-input" id="checkAllAttendance">
2336 <label class="custom-control-label" for="checkAllAttendance"></label>
2337 </div>
2338 </div>
2339 </th>
2340 <th>Student Name</th>
2341 <th>Attendance Date</th>
2342 <th>Morning In</th>
2343 <th>Morning Out</th>
2344 <th>Afternoon In</th>
2345 <th>Afternoon Out</th>
2346 <th>Total Hours</th>
2347 <th>Status</th>
2348 <th>Source</th>
2349 <th>Photo</th>
2350 <th>Reports</th>
2351 <th>Notes</th>
2352 <th>Review</th>
2353 </tr>
2354 </thead>
2355 <tbody>
2356 <?php
2357if (!empty($attendances)): ?>
2358 <?php
2359foreach ($attendances as $index => $attendance): ?>
2360 <tr class="single-item">
2361 <td data-label="Select">
2362 <?php if (attendanceCanReview($attendance)): ?>
2363 <div class="item-checkbox ms-1">
2364 <div class="custom-control custom-checkbox">
2365 <input type="checkbox" class="custom-control-input checkbox" id="checkBox_<?php
2366echo (int)$attendance['id']; ?>_<?php
2367echo (int)$index; ?>" data-attendance-id="<?php
2368echo (int)$attendance['id']; ?>">
2369 <label class="custom-control-label" for="checkBox_<?php
2370echo (int)$attendance['id']; ?>_<?php
2371echo (int)$index; ?>"></label>
2372 </div>
2373 </div>
2374 <?php else: ?>
2375 <span class="text-muted fs-12" title="Biometric records are auto-verified">Auto</span>
2376 <?php endif; ?>
2377 </td>
2378 <td data-label="Student Name">
2379 <a href="students-internal-dtr.php?id=<?php
2380echo $attendance['student_id']; ?>" class="hstack gap-3">
2381 <?php
2382$pp = $attendance['profile_picture'] ?? '';
2383 $pp_url = resolve_attendance_profile_image_url((string)$pp, (int)($attendance['user_id'] ?? 0));
2384 if ($pp_url !== null) {
2385 echo '<div class="avatar-image avatar-md"><img src="' . htmlspecialchars($pp_url) . '" alt="" class="img-fluid"></div>';
2386 } else {
2387 echo '<div class="avatar-image avatar-md"><div class="avatar-text avatar-md bg-light-primary rounded">' . strtoupper(substr($attendance['first_name'] ?? 'N', 0, 1) . substr($attendance['last_name'] ?? 'A', 0, 1)) . '</div></div>';
2388 }
2389 ?>
2390 <div>
2391 <span class="text-truncate-1-line fw-bold"><?php
2392echo ($attendance['first_name'] ?? 'N/A') . ' ' . ($attendance['last_name'] ?? 'N/A'); ?><?php if ((int)($attendance['is_sa_student'] ?? 0) === 1): ?> <span class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary ms-1">SA</span><?php endif; ?></span>
2393 <span class="fs-12 text-muted d-block"><?php
2394echo $attendance['student_number'] ?? 'N/A'; ?></span>
2395 </div>
2396 </a>
2397 </td>
2398 <td data-label="Attendance Date"><span class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary"><?php
2399echo date('Y-m-d', strtotime($attendance['attendance_date'])); ?></span></td>
2400 <td data-label="Morning In"><?php echo attendanceDisplayTimeHtml($attendance, 'morning_time_in', 'bg-soft-success text-success'); ?></td>
2401 <td data-label="Morning Out"><?php echo attendanceDisplayTimeHtml($attendance, 'morning_time_out', 'bg-soft-success text-success'); ?></td>
2402 <td data-label="Afternoon In"><?php echo attendanceDisplayTimeHtml($attendance, 'afternoon_time_in', 'bg-soft-warning text-warning'); ?></td>
2403 <td data-label="Afternoon Out"><?php echo attendanceDisplayTimeHtml($attendance, 'afternoon_time_out', 'bg-soft-warning text-warning'); ?></td>
2404 <td data-label="Total Hours">
2405 <?php
2406echo attendance_hours_cell_html($attendance); ?>
2407 </td>
2408 <td data-label="Status">
2409 <?php
2410echo attendance_status_cell_html($attendance);
2411 ?>
2412 </td>
2413 <td data-label="Source"><?php
2414echo getSourceBadge($attendance['source'] ?? 'manual', $attendance); ?></td>
2415 <td data-label="Photo"><?php
2416echo attendance_photo_cell_html($attendance); ?></td>
2417 <td data-label="Reports"><?php
2418echo attendance_reports_cell_html($attendance); ?></td>
2419 <td data-label="Notes"><?php
2420echo attendance_notes_cell_html($attendance); ?></td>
2421 <td data-label="Review">
2422 <?php echo attendance_review_cell_html($attendance); ?>
2423 </td>
2424 </tr>
2425 <?php
2426endforeach; ?>
2427 <?php
2428endif; ?>
2429 </tbody>
2430 </table>
2431 </div>
2432 </div>
2433 </div>
2434 </div>
2435 </div>
2436 </div>
2437
2438 </div>
2439</main>

Attendance and DTR Module

pages/external-attendance.php

PHP / HTML / JavaScript 1216 lines 63.3 KB
Selected source code for capstone documentation. Vendor libraries, uploads, logs, and backup data are excluded.
1<?php
2require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/config/db.php';
3require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/auth-session.php';
4require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/avatar.php';
5require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/attendance_rules.php';
6require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/external_attendance.php';
7require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/section_format.php';
8
9biotern_boot_session(isset($conn) ? $conn : null);
10external_attendance_ensure_schema($conn);
11section_schedule_ensure_columns($conn);
12
13$currentUserId = (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0);
14$currentRole = strtolower(trim((string)($_SESSION['role'] ?? $_SESSION['user_role'] ?? '')));
15$canManage = in_array($currentRole, ['admin', 'coordinator', 'supervisor'], true);
16if ($currentUserId <= 0) {
17 header('Location: auth/auth-login.php');
18 exit;
19}
20
21if ($currentRole === 'student' && $_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST' && !defined('BIOTERN_ALLOW_STUDENT_EXTERNAL_DTR')) {
22 header('Location: student-external-dtr.php');
23 exit;
24}
25
26$externalFlash = $_SESSION['external_attendance_flash'] ?? null;
27unset($_SESSION['external_attendance_flash']);
28
29function external_attendance_flash_redirect(string $message, string $type, string $target = 'external-attendance.php'): void
30{
31 $_SESSION['external_attendance_flash'] = ['message' => $message, 'type' => $type];
32 header('Location: ' . $target);
33 exit;
34}
35
36function external_attendance_selected_student_id(): int
37{
38 return (int)($_POST['student_id'] ?? $_GET['student_id'] ?? $_POST['return_student_id'] ?? $_GET['return_student_id'] ?? 0);
39}
40
41function external_attendance_return_target(string $fallback = 'external-biometric.php', int $studentId = 0): string
42{
43 $requested = trim((string)($_POST['return_to'] ?? $_GET['return_to'] ?? ''));
44 $requestPath = $requested !== '' ? (string)(parse_url($requested, PHP_URL_PATH) ?? '') : '';
45 $candidate = strtolower(basename($requestPath !== '' ? $requestPath : $requested));
46 $allowed = [
47 'student-external-dtr.php',
48 'external-biometric.php',
49 'external-attendance-manual.php',
50 'students-external-dtr.php',
51 'students-view.php',
52 'external-attendance.php',
53 ];
54
55 if ($candidate === '' || !in_array($candidate, $allowed, true)) {
56 $candidate = $fallback;
57 }
58
59 $returnStudentId = (int)($_POST['return_student_id'] ?? $_GET['return_student_id'] ?? $studentId);
60 if ($returnStudentId > 0) {
61 if ($candidate === 'external-biometric.php') {
62 return $candidate . '?' . http_build_query(['student_id' => $returnStudentId]);
63 }
64 if ($candidate === 'students-external-dtr.php' || $candidate === 'students-view.php') {
65 return $candidate . '?' . http_build_query(['id' => $returnStudentId]);
66 }
67 }
68
69 return $candidate;
70}
71
72function external_attendance_month_rows(mysqli $conn, int $studentId, string $monthStart, string $monthEnd): array
73{
74 $rows = [];
75 $stmt = $conn->prepare("
76 SELECT *
77 FROM external_attendance
78 WHERE student_id = ? AND attendance_date BETWEEN ? AND ?
79 ORDER BY attendance_date DESC, id DESC
80 ");
81 if (!$stmt) {
82 return $rows;
83 }
84
85 $stmt->bind_param('iss', $studentId, $monthStart, $monthEnd);
86 $stmt->execute();
87 $result = $stmt->get_result();
88 while ($row = $result->fetch_assoc()) {
89 $rows[] = $row;
90 }
91 $stmt->close();
92
93 return $rows;
94}
95
96function external_attendance_action_locked(array $record, string $clockType): bool
97{
98 $column = attendance_action_to_column($clockType);
99 if ($column === null) {
100 return true;
101 }
102 if (!empty($record[$column])) {
103 return true;
104 }
105
106 $order = ['morning_in', 'morning_out', 'afternoon_in', 'afternoon_out'];
107 $currentIndex = array_search($clockType, $order, true);
108 if ($currentIndex === false) {
109 return true;
110 }
111
112 for ($i = $currentIndex + 1; $i < count($order); $i++) {
113 $laterColumn = attendance_action_to_column($order[$i]);
114 if ($laterColumn !== null && !empty($record[$laterColumn])) {
115 return true;
116 }
117 }
118
119 $previousAction = external_attendance_expected_previous($clockType);
120 if ($previousAction !== null) {
121 $previousColumn = attendance_action_to_column($previousAction);
122 if ($previousColumn !== null && empty($record[$previousColumn])) {
123 return true;
124 }
125 }
126
127 return false;
128}
129
130function external_attendance_admin_filters(array $source, string $prefix = ''): array
131{
132 $status = strtolower(trim((string)($source[$prefix . 'status'] ?? 'all')));
133 if (!in_array($status, ['all', 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected'], true)) {
134 $status = 'all';
135 }
136
137 $date = trim((string)($source[$prefix . 'date'] ?? ''));
138 if ($date !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $date)) {
139 $date = '';
140 }
141
142 $sourceFilter = strtolower(trim((string)($source[$prefix . 'source'] ?? 'all')));
143 if (!in_array($sourceFilter, ['all', 'manual', 'biometric', 'external-biometric'], true)) {
144 $sourceFilter = 'all';
145 }
146
147 $photo = strtolower(trim((string)($source[$prefix . 'photo'] ?? 'all')));
148 if (($source[$prefix . 'reports'] ?? '') === 'proof' && $photo === 'all') {
149 $photo = 'with';
150 }
151 if (!in_array($photo, ['all', 'with', 'without'], true)) {
152 $photo = 'all';
153 }
154
155 $student = trim((string)($source[$prefix . 'student'] ?? ''));
156 if ($student !== '') {
157 $student = function_exists('mb_substr') ? (string)mb_substr($student, 0, 80) : (string)substr($student, 0, 80);
158 }
159
160 return [
161 'status' => $status,
162 'date' => $date,
163 'source' => $sourceFilter,
164 'photo' => $photo,
165 'student' => $student,
166 ];
167}
168
169function external_attendance_admin_filter_target(array $filters): string
170{
171 $params = ['status' => (string)($filters['status'] ?? 'all')];
172
173 $date = trim((string)($filters['date'] ?? ''));
174 if ($date !== '') {
175 $params['date'] = $date;
176 }
177
178 $source = trim((string)($filters['source'] ?? 'all'));
179 if ($source !== '' && $source !== 'all') {
180 $params['source'] = $source;
181 }
182
183 $photo = trim((string)($filters['photo'] ?? 'all'));
184 if ($photo !== '' && $photo !== 'all') {
185 $params['photo'] = $photo;
186 }
187
188 $student = trim((string)($filters['student'] ?? ''));
189 if ($student !== '') {
190 $params['student'] = $student;
191 }
192
193 $query = http_build_query($params);
194 return 'external-attendance.php' . ($query !== '' ? ('?' . $query) : '');
195}
196
197if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
198 $action = strtolower(trim((string)($_POST['external_action'] ?? '')));
199 if ($action !== '') {
200 $targetStudentId = external_attendance_selected_student_id();
201 $targetStudent = null;
202
203 if ($currentRole === 'student') {
204 $targetStudent = external_attendance_student_context($conn, $currentUserId);
205 if (!$targetStudent) {
206 external_attendance_flash_redirect('Student profile not found for external attendance.', 'danger', 'student-external-dtr.php');
207 }
208 } elseif ($canManage) {
209 $targetStudent = external_attendance_student_context_by_student_id($conn, $targetStudentId);
210 if (!$targetStudent) {
211 external_attendance_flash_redirect(
212 'Select an external student first before opening the biometric page.',
213 'danger',
214 external_attendance_return_target('external-biometric.php', $targetStudentId)
215 );
216 }
217 } else {
218 external_attendance_flash_redirect('You do not have access to external attendance.', 'danger', 'external-attendance.php');
219 }
220
221 $targetStudentId = (int)($targetStudent['id'] ?? 0);
222 $redirectTarget = external_attendance_return_target('external-biometric.php', $targetStudentId);
223
224 $targetStudentName = trim((string)($targetStudent['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($targetStudent['last_name'] ?? ''));
225 if ($targetStudentName === '') {
226 $targetStudentName = 'Student #' . $targetStudentId;
227 }
228
229 if ($action === 'quick_clock') {
230 $clockDate = trim((string)($_POST['clock_date'] ?? date('Y-m-d')));
231 $clockType = strtolower(trim((string)($_POST['clock_type'] ?? '')));
232 $clockTime = date('H:i:s');
233 $notes = trim((string)($_POST['notes'] ?? ''));
234
235 if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $clockDate)) {
236 external_attendance_flash_redirect('A valid clock date is required.', 'danger', $redirectTarget);
237 }
238
239 $existing = external_attendance_student_record($conn, $targetStudentId, $clockDate) ?: [
240 'morning_time_in' => null,
241 'morning_time_out' => null,
242 'afternoon_time_in' => null,
243 'afternoon_time_out' => null,
244 ];
245
246 $validation = external_attendance_validate_transition($existing, $clockType, $clockTime);
247 if (!($validation['ok'] ?? false)) {
248 external_attendance_flash_redirect((string)($validation['message'] ?? 'Invalid external DTR punch.'), 'warning', $redirectTarget);
249 }
250
251 $column = attendance_action_to_column($clockType);
252 if ($column === null) {
253 external_attendance_flash_redirect('Invalid external DTR punch.', 'danger', $redirectTarget);
254 }
255
256 $payload = [
257 'morning_time_in' => null,
258 'morning_time_out' => null,
259 'afternoon_time_in' => null,
260 'afternoon_time_out' => null,
261 ];
262 $payload[$column] = $clockTime;
263
264 $save = external_attendance_upsert_day(
265 $conn,
266 $targetStudent,
267 $clockDate,
268 $payload,
269 null,
270 $notes,
271 $currentUserId,
272 true,
273 'external-biometric'
274 );
275
276 if (!empty($save['ok'])) {
277 $message = ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $clockType)) . ' recorded at ' . date('h:i A', strtotime($clockTime)) . '.';
278 if ($currentRole !== 'student') {
279 $message .= ' Updated for ' . $targetStudentName . '.';
280 }
281 external_attendance_flash_redirect($message, 'success', $redirectTarget);
282 }
283
284 external_attendance_flash_redirect((string)($save['message'] ?? 'Could not save the external DTR punch.'), 'danger', $redirectTarget);
285 }
286
287 if ($action === 'manual_range') {
288 $dates = isset($_POST['dates']) && is_array($_POST['dates']) ? $_POST['dates'] : [];
289 $morningIn = isset($_POST['morning_time_in']) && is_array($_POST['morning_time_in']) ? $_POST['morning_time_in'] : [];
290 $morningOut = isset($_POST['morning_time_out']) && is_array($_POST['morning_time_out']) ? $_POST['morning_time_out'] : [];
291 $afternoonIn = isset($_POST['afternoon_time_in']) && is_array($_POST['afternoon_time_in']) ? $_POST['afternoon_time_in'] : [];
292 $afternoonOut = isset($_POST['afternoon_time_out']) && is_array($_POST['afternoon_time_out']) ? $_POST['afternoon_time_out'] : [];
293 $notes = trim((string)($_POST['notes'] ?? ''));
294 $savedCount = 0;
295 $lastError = '';
296 $photoPath = null;
297 $proofUpload = null;
298 $hasProofUpload = isset($_FILES['proof_image'])
299 && is_array($_FILES['proof_image'])
300 && (int)($_FILES['proof_image']['error'] ?? UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) !== UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE;
301 $hasSubmittableRow = false;
302
303 $firstValidDate = '';
304 foreach ($dates as $index => $dateCandidate) {
305 $dateCandidate = trim((string)$dateCandidate);
306 if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $dateCandidate)) {
307 continue;
308 }
309 if ($firstValidDate === '') {
310 $firstValidDate = $dateCandidate;
311 }
312
313 foreach ([$morningIn, $morningOut, $afternoonIn, $afternoonOut] as $timeGroup) {
314 if (external_attendance_normalize_time((string)($timeGroup[$index] ?? '')) !== null) {
315 $hasSubmittableRow = true;
316 break 2;
317 }
318 }
319 }
320
321 if ($firstValidDate === '') {
322 external_attendance_flash_redirect('Choose at least one valid date before submitting external DTR.', 'warning', $redirectTarget);
323 }
324
325 if (!$hasSubmittableRow && !$hasProofUpload) {
326 external_attendance_flash_redirect('No manual external DTR rows were saved. Fill at least one row or upload proof for an existing row first.', 'warning', $redirectTarget);
327 }
328
329 if ($hasProofUpload) {
330 $upload = external_attendance_store_photo($_FILES['proof_image'], $targetStudentId, $firstValidDate);
331 if (empty($upload['ok'])) {
332 external_attendance_flash_redirect((string)($upload['message'] ?? 'Could not upload proof image.'), 'warning', $redirectTarget);
333 }
334 $photoPath = (string)($upload['path'] ?? '');
335 $proofUpload = $upload;
336 }
337
338 foreach ($dates as $index => $dateValue) {
339 $dateValue = trim((string)$dateValue);
340 if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $dateValue)) {
341 continue;
342 }
343
344 $payload = [
345 'morning_time_in' => external_attendance_normalize_time((string)($morningIn[$index] ?? '')),
346 'morning_time_out' => external_attendance_normalize_time((string)($morningOut[$index] ?? '')),
347 'afternoon_time_in' => external_attendance_normalize_time((string)($afternoonIn[$index] ?? '')),
348 'afternoon_time_out' => external_attendance_normalize_time((string)($afternoonOut[$index] ?? '')),
349 ];
350
351 $hasPunch = false;
352 foreach ($payload as $value) {
353 if ($value !== null && $value !== '') {
354 $hasPunch = true;
355 break;
356 }
357 }
358 if (!$hasPunch) {
359 if (is_array($proofUpload)) {
360 $existingExternalRecord = external_attendance_student_record($conn, $targetStudentId, $dateValue);
361 if ($existingExternalRecord && (int)($existingExternalRecord['id'] ?? 0) > 0) {
362 $proofNotes = $notes !== '' ? $notes : (string)($existingExternalRecord['notes'] ?? '');
363 $updateProof = $conn->prepare("
364 UPDATE external_attendance
365 SET photo_path = ?,
366 notes = CASE WHEN ? <> '' THEN ? ELSE notes END,
367 updated_at = NOW()
368 WHERE id = ?
369 ");
370 if ($updateProof) {
371 $existingAttendanceId = (int)$existingExternalRecord['id'];
372 $updateProof->bind_param('sssi', $photoPath, $proofNotes, $proofNotes, $existingAttendanceId);
373 $updateProof->execute();
374 $updateProof->close();
375 external_attendance_insert_attachment(
376 $conn,
377 $targetStudentId,
378 $existingAttendanceId,
379 $dateValue,
380 $proofUpload,
381 $notes !== '' ? $notes : 'External manual DTR proof',
382 $currentUserId
383 );
384 $savedCount++;
385 }
386 }
387 }
388 continue;
389 }
390
391 $save = external_attendance_upsert_day(
392 $conn,
393 $targetStudent,
394 $dateValue,
395 $payload,
396 $photoPath,
397 $notes,
398 $currentUserId,
399 false,
400 'manual'
401 );
402
403 if (!empty($save['ok'])) {
404 if (is_array($proofUpload) && (int)($save['attendance_id'] ?? 0) > 0) {
405 external_attendance_insert_attachment(
406 $conn,
407 $targetStudentId,
408 (int)$save['attendance_id'],
409 $dateValue,
410 $proofUpload,
411 $notes !== '' ? $notes : 'External manual DTR proof',
412 $currentUserId
413 );
414 }
415 $savedCount++;
416 } else {
417 $lastError = trim((string)($save['message'] ?? ''));
418 }
419 }
420
421 if ($savedCount > 0) {
422 $message = 'Manual external DTR saved for ' . $savedCount . ' day(s).';
423 if ($currentRole !== 'student') {
424 $message .= ' Updated for ' . $targetStudentName . '.';
425 }
426 external_attendance_flash_redirect($message, 'success', $redirectTarget);
427 }
428
429 external_attendance_flash_redirect(
430 $lastError !== '' ? $lastError : 'No manual external DTR rows were saved. Fill at least one row first.',
431 'warning',
432 $redirectTarget
433 );
434 }
435 }
436}
437
438if ($currentRole === 'student') {
439 $student = external_attendance_student_context($conn, $currentUserId);
440 if (!$student) {
441 external_attendance_flash_redirect('Student profile not found for external attendance.', 'danger', 'student-external-dtr.php');
442 }
443
444 $selectedMonth = trim((string)($_GET['month'] ?? date('Y-m')));
445 if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}$/', $selectedMonth)) {
446 $selectedMonth = date('Y-m');
447 }
448
449 $monthStart = $selectedMonth . '-01';
450 $monthEnd = date('Y-m-t', strtotime($monthStart));
451 $monthRows = external_attendance_month_rows($conn, (int)$student['id'], $monthStart, $monthEnd);
452 $monthHours = 0.0;
453 $approvedCount = 0;
454 $pendingCount = 0;
455 foreach ($monthRows as $row) {
456 $monthHours += (float)($row['total_hours'] ?? 0);
457 $status = strtolower(trim((string)($row['status'] ?? 'pending')));
458 if ($status === 'approved') {
459 $approvedCount++;
460 } elseif ($status === 'pending') {
461 $pendingCount++;
462 }
463 }
464
465 $today = date('Y-m-d');
466 $todayRecord = external_attendance_student_record($conn, (int)$student['id'], $today) ?: [
467 'morning_time_in' => null,
468 'morning_time_out' => null,
469 'afternoon_time_in' => null,
470 'afternoon_time_out' => null,
471 ];
472 $clockTypes = [
473 'morning_in' => ['Morning In', 'feather-sunrise'],
474 'morning_out' => ['Morning Out', 'feather-arrow-up-right'],
475 'afternoon_in' => ['Afternoon In', 'feather-sun'],
476 'afternoon_out' => ['Afternoon Out', 'feather-sunset'],
477 ];
478 $page_title = 'BioTern || External Attendance';
479 $page_styles = [
480 'assets/css/homepage-student.css',
481 'assets/css/student-dtr.css',
482 'assets/css/modules/pages/page-demo-biometric.css',
483 'assets/css/modules/pages/page-external-attendance-student.css',
484 ];
485 include 'includes/header.php';
486 ?>
487 <main class="nxl-container">
488 <div class="nxl-content">
489 <div class="main-content">
490 <div class="student-home-shell student-dtr-shell biometric-container">
491 <?php if (is_array($externalFlash) && !empty($externalFlash['message'])): ?>
492 <div class="alert alert-<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($externalFlash['type'] ?? 'info'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
493 <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$externalFlash['message'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
494 </div>
495 <?php endif; ?>
496
497 <section class="bio-hero">
498 <div class="bio-hero-chip">
499 <i class="feather-shield"></i>
500 <span>External DTR Biometric Demo</span>
501 </div>
502 <h2><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($student['first_name'] . ' ' . $student['last_name'])), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></h2>
503 <p>Use the same one-tap biometric flow for your external DTR. The system uses your current account automatically and disables punches that are already recorded.</p>
504 <div class="student-home-meta mt-3">
505 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($student['course_name'] ?? 'N/A'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
506 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars(biotern_format_section_code((string)($student['section_code'] ?? '')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
507 <span>External target: <?php echo (int)($student['external_total_hours'] ?? 0); ?> hrs</span>
508 <span>Remaining: <?php echo (int)($student['external_total_hours_remaining'] ?? 0); ?> hrs</span>
509 </div>
510 </section>
511
512 <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
513 <div class="col-md-4">
514 <div class="dtr-summary-card">
515 <div class="dtr-summary-label">Month Hours</div>
516 <div class="dtr-summary-value"><?php echo number_format($monthHours, 2); ?> hrs</div>
517 </div>
518 </div>
519 <div class="col-md-4">
520 <div class="dtr-summary-card">
521 <div class="dtr-summary-label">Approved Entries</div>
522 <div class="dtr-summary-value"><?php echo (int)$approvedCount; ?></div>
523 </div>
524 </div>
525 <div class="col-md-4">
526 <div class="dtr-summary-card">
527 <div class="dtr-summary-label">Pending Review</div>
528 <div class="dtr-summary-value"><?php echo (int)$pendingCount; ?></div>
529 </div>
530 </div>
531 </div>
532
533 <div class="bio-layout">
534 <aside class="scanner-card">
535 <figure class="fingerprint-image">
536 <div class="display-4 text-primary"><i class="feather-shield"></i></div>
537 <p class="scan-label">ACCOUNT-LINKED BIOMETRIC ACTION</p>
538 </figure>
539 <div class="scanner-stat">
540 External DTR for <?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('F d, Y', strtotime($today)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
541 </div>
542 </aside>
543
544 <section class="clock-section">
545 <h3>Quick External DTR Punch</h3>
546 <div class="time-display mb-3" id="externalCurrentTime"><?php echo date('H:i:s'); ?></div>
547 <form method="post" id="externalBiometricForm">
548 <input type="hidden" name="external_action" value="quick_clock">
549 <input type="hidden" name="clock_date" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($today, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
550 <input type="hidden" name="clock_type" id="externalBiometricClockType" value="">
551
552 <div class="form-group-custom">
553 <label>Clock Type</label>
554 <div class="clock-type-grid">
555 <?php foreach ($clockTypes as $type => [$label, $iconClass]): ?>
556 <?php $isLocked = external_attendance_action_locked($todayRecord, $type); ?>
557 <button
558 type="button"
559 class="clock-btn external-clock-btn<?php echo $isLocked ? ' is-complete' : ''; ?>"
560 data-clock-type="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($type, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"
561 value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($type, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"
562 <?php echo $isLocked ? 'disabled aria-disabled="true"' : ''; ?>
563 >
564 <i class="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($iconClass, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"></i><br><?php echo htmlspecialchars($label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
565 </button>
566 <?php endforeach; ?>
567 </div>
568 </div>
569
570 <div class="form-group-custom">
571 <label for="externalPunchNotes">Notes</label>
572 <input type="text" name="notes" id="externalPunchNotes" maxlength="255" placeholder="Optional note for this punch">
573 </div>
574 </form>
575 </section>
576 </div>
577
578 <section class="record-section mb-4">
579 <div class="card-header border-0 bg-transparent px-4 pt-4">
580 <h5 class="mb-0">Today&apos;s External DTR Status</h5>
581 </div>
582 <div class="card-body pt-3">
583 <div class="row g-3">
584 <?php foreach ($clockTypes as $type => [$label]): ?>
585 <?php $column = attendance_action_to_column($type); ?>
586 <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
587 <div class="dtr-summary-card">
588 <div class="dtr-summary-label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
589 <div class="dtr-summary-value" style="font-size: 1rem;">
590 <?php
591 $value = $column !== null ? trim((string)($todayRecord[$column] ?? '')) : '';
592 echo $value !== '' ? htmlspecialchars(date('h:i A', strtotime($value)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : '--';
593 ?>
594 </div>
595 </div>
596 </div>
597 <?php endforeach; ?>
598 </div>
599 </div>
600 </section>
601
602 <section class="record-section mb-4">
603 <div class="card-header border-0 bg-transparent px-4 pt-4">
604 <h5 class="mb-1">Manual External DTR Capture</h5>
605 <p class="text-muted mb-0">Open the dedicated encoder page when you need to enter many days from a physical DTR without crowding this screen.</p>
606 </div>
607 <div class="card-body pt-3">
608 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-3 align-items-center justify-content-between">
609 <div>
610 <div class="fw-semibold">Need to encode many dates?</div>
611 <div class="text-muted small">Use the standalone page for long physical DTR batches like 10 to 20 daily rows.</div>
612 </div>
613 <a href="external-biometric.php#manual-dtr" class="btn btn-primary">
614 <i class="feather-edit-3 me-2"></i>
615 <span>Open Manual DTR Page</span>
616 </a>
617 </div>
618 </div>
619 </section>
620
621 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
622 <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
623 <h5 class="mb-0">External Attendance History</h5>
624 <form method="get" class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center">
625 <label class="small text-muted" for="externalMonth">Month</label>
626 <input id="externalMonth" type="month" name="month" class="form-control" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($selectedMonth, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
627 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-light-brand">Load</button>
628 </form>
629 </div>
630 <div class="card-body p-0">
631 <div class="table-responsive">
632 <table class="table table-hover mb-0 external-history-table">
633 <thead>
634 <tr>
635 <th>Date</th>
636 <th>Morning</th>
637 <th>Afternoon</th>
638 <th>Total</th>
639 <th>Status</th>
640 <th>Notes</th>
641 </tr>
642 </thead>
643 <tbody>
644 <?php if ($monthRows === []): ?>
645 <tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted py-4">No external attendance records yet for this month.</td></tr>
646 <?php else: ?>
647 <?php foreach ($monthRows as $row): ?>
648 <tr>
649 <td data-label="Date"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y', strtotime((string)$row['attendance_date'])), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
650 <td data-label="Morning"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($row['morning_time_in'] ?? '')) !== '' ? (date('g:i A', strtotime((string)$row['morning_time_in'])) . ' - ' . (trim((string)($row['morning_time_out'] ?? '')) !== '' ? date('g:i A', strtotime((string)$row['morning_time_out'])) : '--')) : '--', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
651 <td data-label="Afternoon"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($row['afternoon_time_in'] ?? '')) !== '' ? (date('g:i A', strtotime((string)$row['afternoon_time_in'])) . ' - ' . (trim((string)($row['afternoon_time_out'] ?? '')) !== '' ? date('g:i A', strtotime((string)$row['afternoon_time_out'])) : '--')) : '--', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
652 <td data-label="Total">
653 <?php echo number_format((float)($row['total_hours'] ?? 0), 2); ?> hrs
654 <?php if ((float)($row['multiplier'] ?? 1) > 1): ?>
655 <div class="small text-muted">x<?php echo number_format((float)$row['multiplier'], 2); ?></div>
656 <?php endif; ?>
657 </td>
658 <td data-label="Status"><span class="badge bg-soft-<?php echo strtolower((string)($row['status'] ?? 'pending')) === 'approved' ? 'success text-success' : (strtolower((string)($row['status'] ?? 'pending')) === 'rejected' ? 'danger text-danger' : 'warning text-warning'); ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(ucfirst((string)($row['status'] ?? 'pending')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></td>
659 <td data-label="Notes"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row['notes'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
660 </tr>
661 <?php endforeach; ?>
662 <?php endif; ?>
663 </tbody>
664 </table>
665 </div>
666 </div>
667 </div>
668 </div>
669 </div>
670 </div>
671 </main>
672 <script>
673 (function () {
674 var timeNode = document.getElementById('externalCurrentTime');
675 var form = document.getElementById('externalBiometricForm');
676 var clockTypeInput = document.getElementById('externalBiometricClockType');
677 if (timeNode) {
678 var syncTime = function () {
679 var now = new Date();
680 var hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
681 var minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
682 var seconds = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
683 timeNode.textContent = hours + ':' + minutes + ':' + seconds;
684 };
685 syncTime();
686 window.setInterval(syncTime, 1000);
687 }
688
689 if (form && clockTypeInput) {
690 Array.prototype.forEach.call(form.querySelectorAll('.external-clock-btn'), function (button) {
691 button.addEventListener('click', function () {
692 if (button.disabled) {
693 return;
694 }
695 clockTypeInput.value = button.getAttribute('data-clock-type') || button.value || '';
696 if (typeof form.requestSubmit === 'function') {
697 form.requestSubmit();
698 } else {
699 form.submit();
700 }
701 window.setTimeout(function () {
702 button.disabled = true;
703 }, 0);
704 });
705 });
706 form.addEventListener('submit', function (event) {
707 if (!clockTypeInput.value) {
708 event.preventDefault();
709 }
710 });
711 }
712 }());
713 </script>
714 <?php
715 include 'includes/footer.php';
716 return;
717}
718
719if (!$canManage) {
720 external_attendance_flash_redirect('You do not have access to external attendance.', 'danger', 'student-external-dtr.php');
721}
722
723$adminFilters = external_attendance_admin_filters($_GET);
724$statusFilter = $adminFilters['status'];
725$dateFilter = $adminFilters['date'];
726$sourceFilter = $adminFilters['source'];
727$photoFilter = $adminFilters['photo'];
728$studentFilter = $adminFilters['student'];
729
730if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
731 $action = strtolower(trim((string)($_POST['external_admin_action'] ?? '')));
732 $redirectTarget = external_attendance_admin_filter_target(external_attendance_admin_filters($_POST, 'filter_'));
733 if ($action === 'review') {
734 $recordId = (int)($_POST['record_id'] ?? 0);
735 $status = strtolower(trim((string)($_POST['status'] ?? 'pending')));
736 $note = trim((string)($_POST['admin_note'] ?? ''));
737 if ($recordId > 0 && in_array($status, ['approved', 'rejected', 'pending'], true)) {
738 $stmt = $conn->prepare("
739 UPDATE external_attendance
740 SET status = ?, reviewed_by = ?, reviewed_at = NOW(),
741 notes = CASE WHEN ? <> '' THEN CONCAT(TRIM(COALESCE(notes, '')), CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(notes, '')) = '' THEN '' ELSE ' | ' END, ?) ELSE notes END,
742 updated_at = NOW()
743 WHERE id = ?
744 ");
745 if ($stmt) {
746 $stmt->bind_param('sissi', $status, $currentUserId, $note, $note, $recordId);
747 $stmt->execute();
748 $stmt->close();
749
750 $studentLookup = $conn->prepare("SELECT student_id FROM external_attendance WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1");
751 if ($studentLookup) {
752 $studentLookup->bind_param('i', $recordId);
753 $studentLookup->execute();
754 $row = $studentLookup->get_result()->fetch_assoc();
755 $studentLookup->close();
756 if ($row) {
757 external_attendance_sync_student_hours($conn, (int)$row['student_id']);
758 }
759 }
760 external_attendance_flash_redirect('External attendance review updated.', 'success', $redirectTarget);
761 }
762 }
763
764 external_attendance_flash_redirect('Could not update external attendance review.', 'danger', $redirectTarget);
765 }
766}
767
768$rows = [];
769$sql = "
770 SELECT
771 ea.*,
772 " . external_attendance_proof_url_sql('ea') . " AS proof_photo_path,
773 (
774 SELECT eda_reason.reason
775 FROM external_dtr_attachments eda_reason
776 WHERE eda_reason.external_attendance_id = ea.id
777 AND eda_reason.deleted_at IS NULL
778 ORDER BY eda_reason.id DESC
779 LIMIT 1
780 ) AS proof_reason,
781 s.student_id AS student_number,
782 s.user_id,
783 s.first_name,
784 s.last_name,
785 COALESCE(NULLIF(u.profile_picture, ''), NULLIF(s.profile_picture, '')) AS profile_picture,
786 c.name AS course_name
787 FROM external_attendance ea
788 LEFT JOIN students s ON s.id = ea.student_id
789 LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id
790 LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = s.course_id
791";
792$whereClauses = [];
793if ($statusFilter !== 'all') {
794 $whereClauses[] = "ea.status = '" . $conn->real_escape_string($statusFilter) . "'";
795}
796
797if ($dateFilter !== '') {
798 $whereClauses[] = "ea.attendance_date = '" . $conn->real_escape_string($dateFilter) . "'";
799}
800
801if ($sourceFilter !== 'all') {
802 if ($sourceFilter === 'biometric') {
803 $whereClauses[] = "(ea.source = 'biometric' OR ea.source = 'external-biometric')";
804 } else {
805 $whereClauses[] = "ea.source = '" . $conn->real_escape_string($sourceFilter) . "'";
806 }
807}
808
809if ($photoFilter === 'with') {
810 $whereClauses[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(ea.photo_path, '')) <> '' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM external_dtr_attachments eda_filter WHERE eda_filter.external_attendance_id = ea.id AND eda_filter.deleted_at IS NULL))";
811} elseif ($photoFilter === 'without') {
812 $whereClauses[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(ea.photo_path, '')) = '' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM external_dtr_attachments eda_filter WHERE eda_filter.external_attendance_id = ea.id AND eda_filter.deleted_at IS NULL))";
813}
814
815if ($studentFilter !== '') {
816 $safeStudent = $conn->real_escape_string($studentFilter);
817 $whereClauses[] = "(
818 s.student_id LIKE '%{$safeStudent}%'
819 OR CONCAT_WS(' ', s.first_name, s.last_name) LIKE '%{$safeStudent}%'
820 OR CONCAT_WS(' ', s.last_name, s.first_name) LIKE '%{$safeStudent}%'
821 )";
822}
823
824if ($whereClauses !== []) {
825 $sql .= " WHERE " . implode(' AND ', $whereClauses);
826}
827
828$sql .= " ORDER BY ea.attendance_date DESC, ea.id DESC LIMIT 200";
829$result = $conn->query($sql);
830if ($result instanceof mysqli_result) {
831 while ($row = $result->fetch_assoc()) {
832 $rows[] = $row;
833 }
834 $result->close();
835}
836
837$externalStatusLabels = [
838 'all' => 'All statuses',
839 'pending' => 'Pending',
840 'approved' => 'Approved',
841 'rejected' => 'Rejected',
842];
843$externalSourceLabels = [
844 'all' => 'All sources',
845 'manual' => 'Manual',
846 'biometric' => 'Biometric',
847 'external-biometric' => 'External biometric',
848];
849$externalPhotoLabels = [
850 'all' => 'All photos',
851 'with' => 'With photo',
852 'without' => 'Without photo',
853];
854$externalActiveFilters = [];
855if ($statusFilter !== 'all') {
856 $externalActiveFilters[] = 'Status: ' . ($externalStatusLabels[$statusFilter] ?? ucfirst($statusFilter));
857}
858if ($sourceFilter !== 'all') {
859 $externalActiveFilters[] = 'Source: ' . ($externalSourceLabels[$sourceFilter] ?? ucfirst($sourceFilter));
860}
861if ($photoFilter !== 'all') {
862 $externalActiveFilters[] = 'Photo: ' . ($externalPhotoLabels[$photoFilter] ?? ucfirst($photoFilter));
863}
864if ($dateFilter !== '') {
865 $externalActiveFilters[] = 'Date: ' . date('M d, Y', strtotime($dateFilter));
866}
867if ($studentFilter !== '') {
868 $externalActiveFilters[] = 'Student: ' . $studentFilter;
869}
870$externalHasActiveFilters = $externalActiveFilters !== [];
871
872function external_attendance_time_cell($time): string
873{
874 $value = trim((string)$time);
875 if ($value === '' || $value === '00:00:00') {
876 return '<span class="text-muted">-</span>';
877 }
878
879 $timestamp = strtotime($value);
880 if ($timestamp === false) {
881 return '<span class="text-muted">-</span>';
882 }
883
884 return '<span class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary">' . htmlspecialchars(date('h:i A', $timestamp), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>';
885}
886
887function external_attendance_photo_cell(array $row): string
888{
889 $proofPath = trim((string)($row['proof_photo_path'] ?? ''));
890 if ($proofPath === '') {
891 return '<span class="external-attendance-no-proof">No proof</span>';
892 }
893
894 return '<a class="external-attendance-proof-thumb" href="' . htmlspecialchars($proofPath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Open proof image">'
895 . '<img src="' . htmlspecialchars($proofPath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" alt="Proof image">'
896 . '</a>';
897}
898
899function external_attendance_reports_cell(array $row): string
900{
901 $studentId = (int)($row['student_id'] ?? 0);
902 $proofPath = trim((string)($row['proof_photo_path'] ?? ''));
903 $links = [];
904
905 if ($studentId > 0) {
906 $links[] = '<a class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary" href="external-biometric.php?student_id=' . $studentId . '">External DTR</a>';
907 }
908
909 if ($proofPath !== '') {
910 $links[] = '<a class="badge bg-soft-info text-info" href="' . htmlspecialchars($proofPath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Proof</a>';
911 }
912
913 if ($links === []) {
914 return '<span class="text-muted">N/A</span>';
915 }
916
917 return '<div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-1">' . implode('', $links) . '</div>';
918}
919
920function external_attendance_notes_cell(array $row): string
921{
922 $parts = [];
923 foreach (['notes', 'proof_reason'] as $key) {
924 $value = trim((string)($row[$key] ?? ''));
925 if ($value !== '' && !in_array($value, $parts, true)) {
926 $parts[] = $value;
927 }
928 }
929
930 if ($parts === []) {
931 return '<span class="external-attendance-no-proof">No notes</span>';
932 }
933
934 return '<div class="external-review-notes-text">' . htmlspecialchars(implode(' | ', $parts), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</div>';
935}

945<main class="nxl-container">

960 <button type="button" class="btn btn-light-brand page-header-actions-toggle" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#externalAttendanceActionsCollapse" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="externalAttendanceActionsCollapse">
961 <i class="feather-more-horizontal"></i>
962 </button>

965 <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 page-header-right-items-wrapper">
966 <span class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary fs-11">
967 <i class="feather-layers me-1"></i> <?php echo (int)count($rows); ?> Records
968 </span>

971 </a>

974 <i class="feather-rotate-ccw me-1"></i> Clear Filters
975 </a>
976 <?php endif; ?>
977 </div>
978 </div>
979 </div>
980 </div>
981 <div class="main-content">
982 <?php if (is_array($externalFlash) && !empty($externalFlash['message'])): ?>
983 <div class="alert alert-<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($externalFlash['type'] ?? 'info'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
984 <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$externalFlash['message'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
985 </div>
986 <script>
987 (function () {
988 var flash = <?php echo json_encode($externalFlash); ?>;
989 function showExternalFlash() {
990 var container = document.getElementById('bioternToastContainer');
991 if (!container || !flash || !flash.message) return;
992 var type = (flash.type || 'info');
993 var title = flash.title || '';
994 var message = flash.message || '';
995 var bg = type === 'success' ? '#155724' : (type === 'danger' ? '#721c24' : (type === 'warning' ? '#856404' : '#0c5460'));
996 var toast = document.createElement('div');
997 toast.className = 'biotern-toast';
998 toast.setAttribute('style', 'pointer-events:auto;background:' + bg + ';color:#fff;padding:12px;border-radius:8px;margin-top:8px;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)');
999 toast.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px">'
1000 + '<div style="flex:1"><div style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px">' + (title ? String(title) : '') + '</div>'
1001 + '<div style="font-size:0.95rem">' + String(message) + '</div></div>'
1002 + '<button type="button" class="biotern-toast-close" aria-label="Close" style="background:transparent;border:0;color:inherit;font-size:18px;line-height:1;padding:0 6px;">&times;</button>'
1003 + '</div>';
1004 container.appendChild(toast);
1005 var btn = toast.querySelector('.biotern-toast-close');
1006 if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', function () { toast.remove(); });
1007 setTimeout(function () { try { toast.remove(); } catch (e) {} }, 6000);
1008 }
1009 document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', showExternalFlash);
1010 }());
1011 </script>
1012 <?php endif; ?>
1013
1014 <div class="card stretch stretch-full mb-4 external-attendance-filter-card">
1015 <div class="card-body">
1016 <form method="get" class="filter-form" id="externalAttendanceFilterForm">

1020 </div>

1022 <label class="form-label" for="external-filter-status">Status</label>

1028 </select>

1035 <option value="external-biometric" <?php echo $sourceFilter === 'external-biometric' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>External Biometric</option>

1037 </select>
1038 </div>

1044 <option value="without" <?php echo $photoFilter === 'without' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Without Photo</option>
1045 </select>
1046 </div>
