1049 <input id="external-filter-student" type="text" name="student" class="form-control" placeholder="ID, first name, or last name" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$studentFilter, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1050 </div>
1051 <div class="external-filter-actions">
1052 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Apply Filters</button>
1053 <a href="external-attendance.php" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">Reset</a>
1054 </div>
1055 </form>
1056 </div>
1057 </div>
1058
1059 <div class="card stretch stretch-full external-attendance-table-card app-data-card app-data-toolbar">
1060 <div class="card-header d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2">
1061 <div>
1062 <h5 class="mb-0">External Attendance Review Queue</h5>
1063 </div>
1064 <span class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary"><?php echo (int)count($rows); ?> record(s)</span>
1065 </div>
1066 <div class="card-body p-0">
1067 <div class="table-responsive external-review-table-wrap">
1068 <table class="table table-hover mb-0 external-review-table app-data-table" id="externalAttendanceReviewTable">
1069 <thead>
1070 <tr>
1071 <th>Student</th>
1072 <th>Date</th>
1073 <th>Morning In</th>
1074 <th>Morning Out</th>
1075 <th>Afternoon In</th>
1076 <th>Afternoon Out</th>
1077 <th>Total</th>
1078 <th>Status</th>
1079 <th>Source</th>
1080 <th>Photo</th>
1081 <th>Reports</th>
1082 <th>Notes</th>
1083 <th>Review</th>
1084 </tr>
1085 </thead>
1086 <tbody>
1087 <?php if ($rows === []): ?>
1088 <tr><td colspan="13" class="text-center text-muted py-4">No external attendance records found.</td></tr>
1089 <?php else: ?>
1090 <?php foreach ($rows as $row): ?>
1091 <?php
1092 $avatar = biotern_avatar_public_src((string)($row['profile_picture'] ?? ''), (int)($row['user_id'] ?? 0));
1093 $rowStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($row['status'] ?? 'pending')));
1094 ?>
1095 <tr>
1096 <td class="external-review-student" data-label="Student">
1097 <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
1098 <div class="avatar-image avatar-md"><img src="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($avatar, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" alt="" class="img-fluid"></div>
1099 <div>
1100 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($row['first_name'] . ' ' . $row['last_name'])), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
1101 <div class="small text-muted"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row['student_number'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
1102 <div class="small text-muted"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row['course_name'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
1103 <div class="small mt-1"><a href="external-biometric.php?student_id=<?php echo (int)($row['student_id'] ?? 0); ?>">Open biometric</a></div>
1104 </div>
1105 </div>
1106 </td>
1107 <td data-label="Date" data-order="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$row['attendance_date'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y', strtotime((string)$row['attendance_date'])), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1108 <td data-label="Morning In"><?php echo external_attendance_time_cell($row['morning_time_in'] ?? ''); ?></td>
1109 <td data-label="Morning Out"><?php echo external_attendance_time_cell($row['morning_time_out'] ?? ''); ?></td>
1110 <td data-label="Afternoon In"><?php echo external_attendance_time_cell($row['afternoon_time_in'] ?? ''); ?></td>
1111 <td data-label="Afternoon Out"><?php echo external_attendance_time_cell($row['afternoon_time_out'] ?? ''); ?></td>
1112 <td data-label="Total" data-order="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)((float)($row['total_hours'] ?? 0)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1113 <?php echo number_format((float)($row['total_hours'] ?? 0), 2); ?> hrs
1114 <?php if ((float)($row['multiplier'] ?? 1) > 1): ?>
1115 <div class="small text-muted"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row['multiplier_reason'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
1116 <?php endif; ?>
1117 </td>
1118 <td data-label="Status">
1119 <span class="badge bg-soft-<?php echo $rowStatus === 'approved' ? 'success text-success' : ($rowStatus === 'rejected' ? 'danger text-danger' : 'warning text-warning'); ?>">
1120 <?php echo htmlspecialchars(ucfirst($rowStatus), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
1121 </span>
1122 </td>
1123 <td data-label="Source"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row['source'] ?? 'manual'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1124 <td data-label="Photo"><?php echo external_attendance_photo_cell($row); ?></td>
1125 <td data-label="Reports"><?php echo external_attendance_reports_cell($row); ?></td>
1126 <td class="small external-review-notes" data-label="Notes"><?php echo external_attendance_notes_cell($row); ?></td>
1127 <td data-label="Review">
1128 <form method="post" class="d-grid gap-2 external-review-form">
1129 <input type="hidden" name="external_admin_action" value="review">
1130 <input type="hidden" name="record_id" value="<?php echo (int)$row['id']; ?>">
1131 <input type="hidden" name="filter_status" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$statusFilter, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1132 <input type="hidden" name="filter_date" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$dateFilter, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1133 <input type="hidden" name="filter_source" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$sourceFilter, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1134 <input type="hidden" name="filter_photo" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$photoFilter, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1135 <input type="hidden" name="filter_student" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$studentFilter, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1136 <select name="status" class="form-select form-select-sm">
1137 <option value="approved" <?php echo $rowStatus === 'approved' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Approve</option>
1138 <option value="pending" <?php echo $rowStatus === 'pending' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Pending</option>
1139 <option value="rejected" <?php echo $rowStatus === 'rejected' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Reject</option>
1140 </select>
1141 <input type="text" name="admin_note" class="form-control form-control-sm" placeholder="Review note (optional)">
1142 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">Save</button>
1143 </form>
1144 </td>
1145 </tr>
1146 <?php endforeach; ?>
1147 <?php endif; ?>
1148 </tbody>
1149 </table>
1150 </div>
1151 </div>
1152 </div>
1153 </div>
1154 </div>
1155</main>
1156<?php include 'includes/footer.php'; ?>
1157<script>
1158(function () {
1159 if (window.jQuery && jQuery.fn && jQuery.fn.DataTable && document.getElementById('externalAttendanceReviewTable')) {
1160 jQuery('#externalAttendanceReviewTable').DataTable({
1161 pageLength: 10,
1162 ordering: true,
1163 searching: true,
1164 bLengthChange: true,
1165 info: true,
1166 paging: true,
1167 autoWidth: false,
1168 order: [[1, 'desc']],
1169 columnDefs: [
1170 { orderable: false, targets: [9, 10, 11, 12] }
1171 ],
1172 language: {
1173 emptyTable: 'No external attendance records found',
1174 lengthMenu: '<span class="attendance-length-prefix">Show</span> _MENU_ <span class="attendance-length-suffix">entries</span>'
1175 }
1176 });
1177 }
1178
1179 var form = document.getElementById('externalAttendanceFilterForm');
1180 if (!form) {
1181 return;
1182 }
1183
1184 var submitTimer = null;
1185 var isSubmitting = false;
1186
1187 function submitFilters(delay) {
1188 window.clearTimeout(submitTimer);
1189 submitTimer = window.setTimeout(function () {
1190 if (isSubmitting) {
1191 return;
1192 }
1193 isSubmitting = true;
1194 form.submit();
1195 }, delay || 0);
1196 }
1197
1198 form.addEventListener('change', function (event) {
1199 var target = event.target;
1200 if (!target || !target.matches('select, input[type="date"]')) {
1201 return;
1202 }
1203 submitFilters(0);
1204 });
1205
1206 form.addEventListener('input', function (event) {
1207 var target = event.target;
1208 if (!target || target.name !== 'student') {
1209 return;
1210 }
1211 submitFilters(450);
1212 });
1213}());
1214</script>
1215

pages/student-dtr.php

PHP / HTML / JavaScript 1595 lines 79.4 KB

4require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/attendance_workflow.php';

6if (session_status() === PHP_SESSION_NONE) {
7 session_start();
8}

10$studentDtrFlash = $_SESSION['student_dtr_flash'] ?? null;

14
15function student_dtr_ensure_runtime_dir(string $path): bool
16{
17 if (is_dir($path)) {
18 return true;
19 }
20
21 $parent = dirname($path);
22 if (!is_dir($parent) || !is_writable($parent)) {
23 return false;
24 }
25
26 return @mkdir($path, 0755, true) || is_dir($path);
27}
28
29function student_dtr_manual_upload_dir(): string
30{
31 return dirname(__DIR__) . '/uploads/manual_dtr';
32}
33
34function student_dtr_manual_upload_web_path(string $relativePath): string
35{
36 return '../uploads/manual_dtr/' . ltrim(str_replace('\\', '/', $relativePath), '/');
37}
38
39function student_dtr_time_select_options_html(string $selected = '', int $startHour = 0, int $endHour = 23): string
40{
41 $selected = substr(trim($selected), 0, 5);
42 $html = '<option value="">Select time</option>';
43 $startHour = max(0, min(23, $startHour));
44 $endHour = max($startHour, min(23, $endHour));
45 for ($hour = $startHour; $hour <= $endHour; $hour++) {
46 for ($minute = 0; $minute < 60; $minute += 30) {
47 $value = sprintf('%02d:%02d', $hour, $minute);
48 $label = date('g:i A', strtotime($value . ':00'));
49 $isSelected = $value === $selected ? ' selected' : '';
50 $html .= '<option value="' . htmlspecialchars($value, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '"' . $isSelected . '>' . htmlspecialchars($label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</option>';
51 }
52 }
53 return $html;
54}
55
56function student_dtr_ensure_manual_attachment_table(mysqli $conn): void
57{
58 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS manual_dtr_attachments (
59 id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
60 student_id INT NOT NULL,
61 attendance_id INT NOT NULL,
62 attendance_date DATE NULL,
63 file_path VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
64 file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
65 file_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
66 file_size INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
67 reason TEXT NULL,
68 uploaded_by INT NULL,
69 storage_driver VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'filesystem',
70 file_blob LONGBLOB NULL,
71 created_at DATETIME NULL,
72 updated_at DATETIME NULL,
73 deleted_at DATETIME NULL,
74 INDEX idx_manual_dtr_student (student_id),
75 INDEX idx_manual_dtr_attendance (attendance_id),
76 INDEX idx_manual_dtr_deleted (deleted_at)
77 )");
78
79 $columns = [];
80 if ($result = $conn->query('SHOW COLUMNS FROM manual_dtr_attachments')) {
81 while ($row = $result->fetch_assoc()) {
82 $columns[strtolower((string)($row['Field'] ?? ''))] = true;
83 }
84 $result->free();
85 }
86
87 $alterMap = [
88 'storage_driver' => "ALTER TABLE manual_dtr_attachments ADD COLUMN storage_driver VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'filesystem' AFTER uploaded_by",
89 'file_blob' => "ALTER TABLE manual_dtr_attachments ADD COLUMN file_blob LONGBLOB NULL AFTER storage_driver",
90 'deleted_at' => "ALTER TABLE manual_dtr_attachments ADD COLUMN deleted_at DATETIME NULL AFTER updated_at",
91 ];
92
93 foreach ($alterMap as $column => $sql) {
94 if (!isset($columns[$column])) {
95 $conn->query($sql);
96 }
97 }
98}
99
100function student_dtr_calculate_hours(array $attendance): float
101{
102 $segments = [
103 ['morning_time_in', 'morning_time_out'],
104 ['break_time_in', 'break_time_out'],
105 ['afternoon_time_in', 'afternoon_time_out'],
106 ];
107
108 $totalSeconds = 0;
109
110 foreach ($segments as [$startKey, $endKey]) {
111 $start = trim((string)($attendance[$startKey] ?? ''));
112 $end = trim((string)($attendance[$endKey] ?? ''));
113
114 if ($start === '' || $end === '') {
115 continue;
116 }
117
118 $startTs = strtotime('1970-01-01 ' . $start);
119 $endTs = strtotime('1970-01-01 ' . $end);
120 if ($startTs === false || $endTs === false || $endTs <= $startTs) {
121 continue;
122 }
123
124 $totalSeconds += ($endTs - $startTs);
125 }
126
127 return round($totalSeconds / 3600, 2);
128}
129
130function student_dtr_manual_metrics(array $attendance): array
131{
132 $toSeconds = static function (?string $time): ?int {
133 $value = trim((string)$time);
134 if ($value === '') {
135 return null;
136 }
137
138 $ts = strtotime('1970-01-01 ' . $value);
139 return $ts === false ? null : (int)$ts;
140 };
141
142 $morningIn = $toSeconds($attendance['morning_time_in'] ?? null);
143 $morningOut = $toSeconds($attendance['morning_time_out'] ?? null);
144 $afternoonIn = $toSeconds($attendance['afternoon_time_in'] ?? null);
145 $afternoonOut = $toSeconds($attendance['afternoon_time_out'] ?? null);
146
147 $rawHours = student_dtr_calculate_hours($attendance);
148 $lunchDeductionHours = 0.0;
149
150 if ($morningIn !== null && $morningOut !== null && $afternoonIn !== null && $afternoonOut !== null) {
151 $breakSeconds = max(0, $afternoonIn - $morningOut);
152 if ($breakSeconds < 3600) {
153 $lunchDeductionHours = round((3600 - $breakSeconds) / 3600, 2);
154 }
155 }
156
157 $netHours = max(0.0, round($rawHours - $lunchDeductionHours, 2));
158 $overtimeHours = $netHours > 8.0 ? round($netHours - 8.0, 2) : 0.0;
159
160 return [
161 'raw_hours' => $rawHours,
162 'lunch_deduction_hours' => $lunchDeductionHours,
163 'net_hours' => $netHours,
164 'overtime_hours' => $overtimeHours,
165 ];
166}
167
168function student_dtr_format_time(?string $value): string
169{
170 $raw = trim((string)$value);
171 if ($raw === '' || $raw === '00:00:00') {
172 return '--';
173 }
174
175 $ts = strtotime($raw);
176 return $ts !== false ? date('g:i A', $ts) : $raw;
177}
178
179function student_dtr_build_date_range(string $startDate, string $endDate, bool $weekdaysOnly = false): array
180{
181 $days = [];
182 if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $startDate) || !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $endDate)) {
183 return $days;
184 }
185
186 $startTs = strtotime($startDate);
187 $endTs = strtotime($endDate);
188 if ($startTs === false || $endTs === false || $endTs < $startTs) {
189 return $days;
190 }
191
192 $todayTs = strtotime(date('Y-m-d')) ?: time();
193 for ($cursor = $startTs; $cursor <= $endTs; $cursor += 86400) {
194 if ($cursor > $todayTs) {
195 continue;
196 }
197 if ($weekdaysOnly && (int)date('N', $cursor) >= 6) {
198 continue;
199 }
200 $days[] = date('Y-m-d', $cursor);
201 }
202
203 return $days;
204}
205
206function student_dtr_review_meta(array $attendance): array
207{
208 if (strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['source'] ?? ''))) === 'biometric') {
209 return ['label' => 'Auto-Verified', 'class' => 'approved'];
210 }
211
212 $status = strtolower(trim((string)($attendance['status'] ?? 'pending')));
213 if ($status === 'approved') {
214 return ['label' => 'Reviewed', 'class' => 'approved'];
215 }
216 if ($status === 'rejected') {
217 return ['label' => 'Rejected', 'class' => 'rejected'];
218 }
219
220 return ['label' => 'Needs Review', 'class' => 'pending'];
221}
222
223function student_dtr_time_options(int $stepMinutes = 30, int $startHour = 5, int $endHour = 20): array
224{
225 $options = [];
226 $stepMinutes = max(5, $stepMinutes);
227 $startMinutes = max(0, min(23 * 60 + 55, $startHour * 60));
228 $endMinutes = max($startMinutes, min(24 * 60 - $stepMinutes, $endHour * 60));
229
230 for ($minutes = $startMinutes; $minutes <= $endMinutes; $minutes += $stepMinutes) {
231 $hour = intdiv($minutes, 60);
232 $minute = $minutes % 60;
233 $value = sprintf('%02d:%02d', $hour, $minute);
234 $label = date('g:i A', strtotime($value . ':00'));
235 $options[$value] = $label;
236 }
237
238 return $options;
239}
240
241$currentUserId = (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0);
242$currentRole = strtolower(trim((string)($_SESSION['role'] ?? '')));
243if ($currentRole !== 'student' || $currentUserId <= 0) {
244 header('Location: homepage.php');
245 exit;
246}

248$requestedYear = isset($_GET['year']) ? (int)$_GET['year'] : 0;
249$requestedMonthNumber = isset($_GET['month_num']) ? (int)$_GET['month_num'] : 0;
250
251if ($requestedYear >= 2024 && $requestedMonthNumber >= 1 && $requestedMonthNumber <= 12) {
252 $selectedMonth = sprintf('%04d-%02d', $requestedYear, $requestedMonthNumber);
253} else {
254 $selectedMonth = trim((string)($_GET['month'] ?? date('Y-m')));
255 if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}\-\d{2}$/', $selectedMonth)) {
256 $selectedMonth = date('Y-m');
257 }
258}
259
260$selectedYear = (int)substr($selectedMonth, 0, 4);
261$selectedMonthNumber = (int)substr($selectedMonth, 5, 2);
262$availableYears = [];
263for ($year = max((int)date('Y') + 1, $selectedYear); $year >= 2024; $year--) {
264 $availableYears[] = $year;
265}
266$monthOptions = [
267 1 => 'January',
268 2 => 'February',
269 3 => 'March',
270 4 => 'April',
271 5 => 'May',
272 6 => 'June',
273 7 => 'July',
274 8 => 'August',
275 9 => 'September',
276 10 => 'October',
277 11 => 'November',
278 12 => 'December',
279];
280$monthStart = $selectedMonth . '-01';
281$monthEnd = date('Y-m-t', strtotime($monthStart));
282$monthLabel = date('F Y', strtotime($monthStart));
283
284$user = null;
285$student = null;
286$internship = null;
287$attendanceRows = [];
288$attendanceSummary = [
289 'total_logs' => 0,
290 'approved_logs' => 0,
291 'pending_logs' => 0,
292 'rejected_logs' => 0,
293 'total_hours' => 0.0,
294];
295$attendanceInsights = [
296 'approved_hours' => 0.0,
297 'pending_hours' => 0.0,
298 'rejected_hours' => 0.0,
299 'biometric_logs' => 0,
300 'manual_logs' => 0,
301 'days_present' => 0,
302 'average_hours' => 0.0,
303 'last_recorded_date' => '',
304];
305
306$userStmt = $conn->prepare('SELECT id, name, email, profile_picture FROM users WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1');
307if ($userStmt) {
308 $userStmt->bind_param('i', $currentUserId);
309 $userStmt->execute();
310 $user = $userStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
311 $userStmt->close();
312}
313
314$studentLookupSql = "SELECT s.id, s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.email AS student_email, s.phone, s.assignment_track,
315 s.internal_total_hours, s.internal_total_hours_remaining, s.external_total_hours, s.external_total_hours_remaining,
316 c.name AS course_name, sec.code AS section_code, sec.name AS section_name
317 FROM students s
318 LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = s.course_id
319 LEFT JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = s.section_id
320 WHERE s.user_id = ?
321 LIMIT 1";
322$studentStmt = $conn->prepare($studentLookupSql);
323if ($studentStmt) {
324 $studentStmt->bind_param('i', $currentUserId);
325 $studentStmt->execute();
326 $student = $studentStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
327 $studentStmt->close();
328}
329
330if (!$student && $user) {
331 $fallbackEmail = trim((string)($user['email'] ?? ''));
332 $fallbackName = trim((string)($user['name'] ?? ''));
333 $fallbackStmt = $conn->prepare(
334 "SELECT s.id, s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.email AS student_email, s.phone, s.assignment_track,
335 s.internal_total_hours, s.internal_total_hours_remaining, s.external_total_hours, s.external_total_hours_remaining,
336 c.name AS course_name, sec.code AS section_code, sec.name AS section_name
337 FROM students s
338 LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = s.course_id
339 LEFT JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = s.section_id
340 WHERE ((? <> '' AND LOWER(COALESCE(s.email, '')) = LOWER(?))
341 OR (? <> '' AND LOWER(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(s.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(s.last_name, '')))) = LOWER(?)))
342 ORDER BY s.id DESC
343 LIMIT 1"
344 );
345 if ($fallbackStmt) {
346 $fallbackStmt->bind_param('ssss', $fallbackEmail, $fallbackEmail, $fallbackName, $fallbackName);
347 $fallbackStmt->execute();
348 $student = $fallbackStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
349 $fallbackStmt->close();
350 }
351}
352
353if ($student) {
354 $studentId = (int)($student['id'] ?? 0);
355 student_dtr_ensure_manual_attachment_table($conn);
356 student_dtr_ensure_runtime_dir(student_dtr_manual_upload_dir());
357
358 $internshipStmt = $conn->prepare(
359 "SELECT company_name, position, status, start_date, end_date, required_hours, rendered_hours, completion_percentage
360 FROM internships
361 WHERE student_id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
362 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
363 LIMIT 1"
364 );
365 if ($internshipStmt) {
366 $internshipStmt->bind_param('i', $studentId);
367 $internshipStmt->execute();
368 $internship = $internshipStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
369 $internshipStmt->close();
370 }
371
372 $attendanceStmt = $conn->prepare(
373 "SELECT id, attendance_date, morning_time_in, morning_time_out, break_time_in, break_time_out,
374 afternoon_time_in, afternoon_time_out, total_hours, status, remarks, source
375 FROM attendances
376 WHERE student_id = ? AND attendance_date BETWEEN ? AND ?
377 ORDER BY attendance_date DESC, id DESC"
378 );
379 if ($attendanceStmt) {
380 $attendanceStmt->bind_param('iss', $studentId, $monthStart, $monthEnd);
381 $attendanceStmt->execute();
382 $attendanceResult = $attendanceStmt->get_result();
383 while ($attendanceResult && ($row = $attendanceResult->fetch_assoc())) {
384 $computedHours = isset($row['total_hours']) && $row['total_hours'] !== null && $row['total_hours'] !== ''
385 ? (float)$row['total_hours']
386 : student_dtr_calculate_hours($row);
387
388 $row['display_hours'] = $computedHours;
389 $attendanceRows[] = $row;
390
391 $attendanceSummary['total_logs']++;
392 $attendanceSummary['total_hours'] += $computedHours;
393 $attendanceInsights['days_present']++;
394
395 if ($attendanceInsights['last_recorded_date'] === '') {
396 $attendanceInsights['last_recorded_date'] = (string)($row['attendance_date'] ?? '');
397 }
398
399 $statusKey = strtolower(trim((string)($row['status'] ?? 'pending')));
400 if ($statusKey === 'approved') {
401 $attendanceSummary['approved_logs']++;
402 $attendanceInsights['approved_hours'] += $computedHours;
403 } elseif ($statusKey === 'rejected') {
404 $attendanceSummary['rejected_logs']++;
405 $attendanceInsights['rejected_hours'] += $computedHours;
406 } else {
407 $attendanceSummary['pending_logs']++;
408 $attendanceInsights['pending_hours'] += $computedHours;
409 }
410
411 $sourceKey = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? 'manual')));
412 if ($sourceKey === 'biometric') {
413 $attendanceInsights['biometric_logs']++;
414 } else {
415 $attendanceInsights['manual_logs']++;
416 }
417 }
418 $attendanceStmt->close();
419 }
420
421 if ($attendanceRows !== []) {
422 $attendanceIds = [];
423 foreach ($attendanceRows as $attendanceRow) {
424 $attendanceId = (int)($attendanceRow['id'] ?? 0);
425 if ($attendanceId > 0) {
426 $attendanceIds[] = $attendanceId;
427 }
428 }
429
430 if ($attendanceIds !== []) {
431 $idList = implode(',', array_map('intval', array_unique($attendanceIds)));
432 $proofMap = [];
433 $proofResult = $conn->query("
434 SELECT id, attendance_id, file_path, file_name, storage_driver
435 FROM manual_dtr_attachments
436 WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
437 AND attendance_id IN ($idList)
438 ORDER BY id ASC
439 ");
440 if ($proofResult) {
441 while ($proofRow = $proofResult->fetch_assoc()) {
442 $attendanceId = (int)($proofRow['attendance_id'] ?? 0);
443 if ($attendanceId <= 0 || isset($proofMap[$attendanceId])) {
444 continue;
445 }
446
447 $proofMap[$attendanceId] = [
448 'id' => (int)($proofRow['id'] ?? 0),
449 'file_path' => (string)($proofRow['file_path'] ?? ''),
450 'file_name' => (string)($proofRow['file_name'] ?? ''),
451 'storage_driver' => (string)($proofRow['storage_driver'] ?? 'filesystem'),
452 ];
453 }
454 }
455
456 foreach ($attendanceRows as &$attendanceRow) {
457 $attendanceId = (int)($attendanceRow['id'] ?? 0);
458 $attendanceRow['proof_attachment'] = $proofMap[$attendanceId] ?? null;
459 }
460 unset($attendanceRow);
461 }
462 }
463}
464
465if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST' && isset($_POST['student_action']) && $_POST['student_action'] === 'submit_machine_down' && !empty($student)) {
466 require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/attendance_rules.php';
467
468 $fallbackMode = strtolower(trim((string)($_POST['fallback_mode'] ?? 'daily')));
469 if (!in_array($fallbackMode, ['daily', 'weekly'], true)) {
470 $fallbackMode = 'daily';
471 }
472
473 $attendanceDate = trim((string)($_POST['attendance_date'] ?? ''));
474 $attendanceEndDate = trim((string)($_POST['attendance_end_date'] ?? ''));
475 $morningIn = trim((string)($_POST['morning_time_in'] ?? ''));
476 $morningOut = trim((string)($_POST['morning_time_out'] ?? ''));
477 $afternoonIn = trim((string)($_POST['afternoon_time_in'] ?? ''));
478 $afternoonOut = trim((string)($_POST['afternoon_time_out'] ?? ''));
479 $fallbackReason = trim((string)($_POST['fallback_reason'] ?? ''));
480 $proofClockTime = trim((string)($_POST['proof_clock_time'] ?? ''));
481 $proofFile = $_FILES['proof_image'] ?? null;
482 $generatedEntries = isset($_POST['generated_entries']) && is_array($_POST['generated_entries']) ? $_POST['generated_entries'] : [];
483
484 $normalize = static function (string $value): ?string {
485 if ($value === '') {
486 return null;
487 }
488 if (preg_match('/^(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})$/', $value, $matches)) {
489 $hour = max(0, min(23, (int)$matches[1]));
490 $minute = max(0, min(59, (int)$matches[2]));
491 return sprintf('%02d:%02d:00', $hour, $minute);
492 }
493 if (preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $value)) {
494 return $value;
495 }
496 return null;
497 };
498
499 $payload = [
500 'morning_time_in' => $normalize($morningIn),
501 'morning_time_out' => $normalize($morningOut),
502 'break_time_in' => null,
503 'break_time_out' => null,
504 'afternoon_time_in' => $normalize($afternoonIn),
505 'afternoon_time_out' => $normalize($afternoonOut),
506 ];
507
508 $trackKey = strtolower(trim((string)($student['assignment_track'] ?? 'internal')));
509 $studentRemainingHours = $trackKey === 'external'
510 ? (int)($student['external_total_hours_remaining'] ?? 0)
511 : (int)($student['internal_total_hours_remaining'] ?? 0);
512
513 $errors = [];
514 $useGeneratedEntries = ($generatedEntries !== []);
515 if (!$useGeneratedEntries && !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $attendanceDate)) {
516 $errors[] = 'Valid attendance date is required.';
517 }
518 if (!$useGeneratedEntries && $fallbackMode === 'weekly' && !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $attendanceEndDate)) {
519 $errors[] = 'Valid week end date is required for weekly fallback.';
520 }
521 if ($studentRemainingHours <= 0) {
522 $errors[] = 'Your required internship hours are already completed. Please contact your coordinator for corrections.';
523 }
524 if (!is_array($proofFile) || (int)($proofFile['error'] ?? UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) === UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) {
525 $errors[] = 'Proof image is required.';
526 }
527 if (!$useGeneratedEntries && $payload['morning_time_in'] === null && $payload['morning_time_out'] === null && $payload['afternoon_time_in'] === null && $payload['afternoon_time_out'] === null) {
528 $errors[] = 'Enter at least one time.';
529 }
530 if (!$useGeneratedEntries) {
531 $validation = attendance_validate_full_record($payload);
532 if (!($validation['ok'] ?? false)) {
533 $errors[] = (string)($validation['message'] ?? 'Invalid attendance values.');
534 }
535 }
536
537 $targetDates = [];
538 $payloadsByDate = [];
539 if ($errors === []) {
540 if ($useGeneratedEntries) {
541 foreach ($generatedEntries as $dateKey => $row) {
542 $dateKey = trim((string)$dateKey);
543 if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $dateKey)) {
544 continue;
545 }
546
547 $rowPayload = [
548 'morning_time_in' => $normalize((string)($row['morning_time_in'] ?? '')),
549 'morning_time_out' => $normalize((string)($row['morning_time_out'] ?? '')),
550 'break_time_in' => null,
551 'break_time_out' => null,
552 'afternoon_time_in' => $normalize((string)($row['afternoon_time_in'] ?? '')),
553 'afternoon_time_out' => $normalize((string)($row['afternoon_time_out'] ?? '')),
554 ];
555
556 $hasValue = false;
557 foreach (['morning_time_in', 'morning_time_out', 'afternoon_time_in', 'afternoon_time_out'] as $timeKey) {
558 if ($rowPayload[$timeKey] !== null) {
559 $hasValue = true;
560 break;
561 }
562 }
563 if (!$hasValue) {
564 continue;
565 }
566
567 $validation = attendance_validate_full_record($rowPayload);
568 if (!($validation['ok'] ?? false)) {
569 $errors[] = $dateKey . ': ' . (string)($validation['message'] ?? 'Invalid attendance values.');
570 break;
571 }
572
573 $targetDates[] = $dateKey;
574 $payloadsByDate[$dateKey] = $rowPayload;
575 }
576
577 if ($errors === [] && $targetDates === []) {
578 $errors[] = 'Generate the date rows first and fill at least one day.';
579 }
580 } else {
581 $startTs = strtotime($attendanceDate);
582 if ($startTs === false) {
583 $errors[] = 'Invalid start date.';
584 } else {
585 $endTs = $fallbackMode === 'weekly' ? strtotime($attendanceEndDate) : $startTs;
586 if ($endTs === false) {
587 $errors[] = 'Invalid end date.';
588 } elseif ($endTs < $startTs) {
589 $errors[] = 'Week end date must be the same as or later than start date.';
590 } elseif ($fallbackMode === 'weekly' && (($endTs - $startTs) / 86400) > 31) {
591 $errors[] = 'Range fallback can cover up to 31 days only.';
592 } else {
593 $targetDates = student_dtr_build_date_range($attendanceDate, $fallbackMode === 'weekly' ? $attendanceEndDate : $attendanceDate, false);
594 foreach ($targetDates as $targetDate) {
595 $payloadsByDate[$targetDate] = $payload;
596 }
597
598 if ($targetDates === []) {
599 $errors[] = 'No valid dates found in the selected range.';
600 }
601 }
602 }
603 }
604 }
605
606 if ($errors === []) {
607 $allowedMimeTypes = [
608 'image/jpeg' => 'jpg',
609 'image/png' => 'png',
610 'image/webp' => 'webp',
611 ];
612 $fileError = (int)($proofFile['error'] ?? UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE);
613 if ($fileError !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
614 $errors[] = 'Proof image upload failed.';
615 } else {
616 $tmpPath = (string)($proofFile['tmp_name'] ?? '');
617 $fileSize = (int)($proofFile['size'] ?? 0);
618 $detectedMime = $tmpPath !== '' && function_exists('mime_content_type') ? (string)@mime_content_type($tmpPath) : '';
619 if (!isset($allowedMimeTypes[$detectedMime])) {
620 $errors[] = 'Proof image must be JPG, PNG, or WEBP.';
621 }
622 if ($fileSize <= 0 || $fileSize > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
623 $errors[] = 'Proof image must be 5MB or smaller.';
624 }
625 }
626 }
627
628 if ($errors === []) {
629 $existingStmt = $conn->prepare("SELECT id, source FROM attendances WHERE student_id = ? AND attendance_date = ? ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1");
630 if ($existingStmt) {
631 foreach ($targetDates as $targetDate) {
632 $existingStmt->bind_param('is', $studentId, $targetDate);
633 $existingStmt->execute();
634 $existing = $existingStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
635 if ($existing) {
636 $existingSource = strtolower(trim((string)($existing['source'] ?? 'manual')));
637 $errors[] = $existingSource === 'biometric'
638 ? 'Biometric attendance already exists for ' . $targetDate . '. Please request a correction instead.'
639 : 'Manual fallback entry already exists for ' . $targetDate . '.';
640 break;
641 }
642 }
643 $existingStmt->close();
644 }
645 }
646
647 if ($errors === []) {
648 $uploadDir = student_dtr_manual_upload_dir();
649 $proofRelativePath = '';
650 $proofOriginalName = trim((string)($proofFile['name'] ?? 'proof-image'));
651 $proofMime = (string)@mime_content_type((string)$proofFile['tmp_name']);
652 $proofExtension = $allowedMimeTypes[$proofMime] ?? 'jpg';
653 $proofBlob = @file_get_contents((string)$proofFile['tmp_name']);
654 $proofStorageDriver = 'filesystem';
655 $safeDatePart = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', $attendanceDate) ?: date('Ymd');
656 $targetFileName = sprintf('student_%d_%s_%s.%s', $studentId, $safeDatePart, date('His'), $proofExtension);
657 $targetPath = rtrim($uploadDir, '/\\') . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $targetFileName;
658
659 if (student_dtr_ensure_runtime_dir($uploadDir) && @move_uploaded_file((string)$proofFile['tmp_name'], $targetPath)) {
660 $proofRelativePath = $targetFileName;
661 $proofBlob = null;
662 } elseif (is_string($proofBlob) && $proofBlob !== '') {
663 $proofStorageDriver = 'database';
664 $proofRelativePath = '';
665 } else {
666 $_SESSION['student_dtr_flash'] = [
667 'type' => 'danger',
668 'message' => 'Could not save the proof image.',
669 ];
670 $redirectMonth = preg_match('/^\d{4}\-\d{2}$/', $selectedMonth) ? $selectedMonth : date('Y-m');
671 header('Location: student-internal-dtr.php?month=' . urlencode($redirectMonth));
672 exit;
673 }
674
675 $insert = $conn->prepare("
676 INSERT INTO attendances (
677 student_id, attendance_date, morning_time_in, morning_time_out, afternoon_time_in, afternoon_time_out,
678 total_hours, source, status, remarks, created_at, updated_at
679 ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'manual', 'pending', ?, NOW(), NOW())
680 ");
681 if ($insert) {
682 $attendanceIds = [];
683 $successCount = 0;
684 foreach ($targetDates as $targetDate) {
685 $targetPayload = $payloadsByDate[$targetDate] ?? $payload;
686 $metrics = student_dtr_manual_metrics($targetPayload);
687 $remarks = $fallbackReason;
688 $notes = [];
689 if ($metrics['lunch_deduction_hours'] > 0) {
690 $notes[] = 'Lunch deduction: ' . number_format((float)$metrics['lunch_deduction_hours'], 2) . ' hr';
691 }
692 if ($metrics['overtime_hours'] > 0) {
693 $notes[] = 'Overtime: ' . number_format((float)$metrics['overtime_hours'], 2) . ' hr';
694 }
695 if ($notes !== []) {
696 $remarks = trim($remarks . ($remarks !== '' ? ' | ' : '') . implode(' | ', $notes));
697 }
698
699 $netHours = (float)$metrics['net_hours'];
700 $insert->bind_param(
701 'isssssds',
702 $studentId,
703 $targetDate,
704 $targetPayload['morning_time_in'],
705 $targetPayload['morning_time_out'],
706 $targetPayload['afternoon_time_in'],
707 $targetPayload['afternoon_time_out'],
708 $netHours,
709 $remarks
710 );
711 $insert->execute();
712 if ($insert->affected_rows > 0) {
713 $successCount++;
714 $attendanceIds[] = (int)$insert->insert_id;
715 }
716 }
717 $insert->close();
718
719 if ($attendanceIds !== []) {
720 $attachmentReason = 'Machine-down fallback proof';
721 if ($proofClockTime !== '') {
722 $attachmentReason .= ' | submitted at ' . $proofClockTime;
723 }
724 if ($fallbackMode === 'weekly') {
725 $attachmentReason .= ' | weekly range';
726 }
727
728 $attachmentStmt = $conn->prepare("
729 INSERT INTO manual_dtr_attachments (
730 student_id, attendance_id, attendance_date, file_path, file_name, file_type, file_size, reason, uploaded_by, storage_driver, file_blob, created_at, updated_at
731 ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NOW(), NOW())
732 ");
733 if ($attachmentStmt) {
734 $fileSize = (int)($proofFile['size'] ?? 0);
735 $uploadedBy = $currentUserId;
736 foreach ($attendanceIds as $index => $attendanceId) {
737 $attendanceDateForAttachment = $targetDates[$index] ?? $attendanceDate;
738 $attachmentStmt->bind_param(
739 'iissssisiss',
740 $studentId,
741 $attendanceId,
742 $attendanceDateForAttachment,
743 $proofRelativePath,
744 $proofOriginalName,
745 $proofMime,
746 $fileSize,
747 $attachmentReason,
748 $uploadedBy,
749 $proofStorageDriver,
750 $proofBlob
751 );
752 $attachmentStmt->execute();
753 }
754 $attachmentStmt->close();
755 }
756 }
757
758 $success = $successCount > 0;
759 if ($success && function_exists('attendance_workflow_sync_student_progress')) {
760 attendance_workflow_sync_student_progress($conn, $studentId);
761 }
762 $_SESSION['student_dtr_flash'] = [
763 'type' => $success ? 'success' : 'danger',
764 'message' => $success
765 ? ('Machine-down fallback attendance submitted for review for ' . $successCount . ' day(s).')
766 : 'Could not submit the fallback attendance.',
767 ];
768 } else {
769 $_SESSION['student_dtr_flash'] = [
770 'type' => 'danger',
771 'message' => 'Could not prepare fallback attendance submission.',
772 ];
773 }
774 } else {
775 $_SESSION['student_dtr_flash'] = [
776 'type' => 'danger',
777 'message' => implode(' ', $errors),
778 ];
779 }
780
781 $redirectMonth = preg_match('/^\d{4}\-\d{2}$/', $selectedMonth) ? $selectedMonth : date('Y-m');
782 header('Location: student-internal-dtr.php?month=' . urlencode($redirectMonth));
783 exit;
784}
785
786if ($attendanceSummary['total_logs'] > 0) {
787 $attendanceInsights['average_hours'] = round($attendanceSummary['total_hours'] / $attendanceSummary['total_logs'], 2);
788}
789
790$displayName = trim((string)($user['name'] ?? ''));
791if ($displayName === '' && $student) {
792 $displayName = trim((string)(($student['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($student['last_name'] ?? '')));
793}
794if ($displayName === '') {
795 $displayName = 'Student User';
796}
797
798$courseSection = array_filter([
799 trim((string)($student['course_name'] ?? '')),
800 biotern_format_section_code((string)($student['section_code'] ?? '')),
801 trim((string)($student['section_name'] ?? '')),
802]);
803$avatarSrc = biotern_avatar_public_src((string)($user['profile_picture'] ?? ''), $currentUserId);
804$requiredHours = (float)($internship['required_hours'] ?? 0);
805$renderedHours = (float)($internship['rendered_hours'] ?? 0);
806$completionPercentage = (float)($internship['completion_percentage'] ?? 0);
807$track = strtolower(trim((string)($student['assignment_track'] ?? 'internal')));
808$remainingHours = $track === 'external'
809 ? (int)($student['external_total_hours_remaining'] ?? 0)
810 : (int)($student['internal_total_hours_remaining'] ?? 0);
811$lastRecordedDateText = $attendanceInsights['last_recorded_date'] !== ''
812 ? date('M d, Y', strtotime($attendanceInsights['last_recorded_date']))
813 : 'No entries yet';
814
815$studentDtrManualOnly = defined('BIOTERN_STUDENT_MANUAL_DTR_PAGE') && BIOTERN_STUDENT_MANUAL_DTR_PAGE;
816$studentDtrPageHeading = $studentDtrManualOnly ? 'Manual Internal DTR' : 'My Internal DTR';
817$studentDtrHeroTitle = $studentDtrManualOnly ? 'Record Time Entry' : 'My Internal DTR';
818$studentDtrHeroCopy = $studentDtrManualOnly
819 ? 'Submit a missed internal attendance entry when the biometric machine was unavailable or your time was not captured.'
820 : 'Track your biometric logs, review attendance status, and download monthly attendance reports.';
821
822$page_title = 'BioTern || ' . $studentDtrPageHeading;
823$page_styles = [
824 'assets/css/homepage-student.css',
825 'assets/css/student-dtr.css',
826 'assets/css/modules/pages/page-external-attendance-student.css',
827];
828$page_scripts = [
829 'assets/js/modules/pages/student-dtr-proof-clock.js',
830];
831include 'includes/header.php';
832?>
833<main class="nxl-container">
834 <div class="nxl-content">
835 <div class="page-header dashboard-page-header">
836 <div class="page-header-left d-flex align-items-center">
837 <div class="page-header-title">
838 <h5 class="m-b-10"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($studentDtrPageHeading, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></h5>
839 </div>
840 <ul class="breadcrumb">
841 <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="homepage.php">Home</a></li>
842 <li class="breadcrumb-item"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($studentDtrPageHeading, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></li>
843 </ul>
844 </div>
845 </div>
846 <div class="main-content">
847 <div class="student-home-shell student-dtr-shell<?php echo $studentDtrManualOnly ? ' student-dtr-shell--manual' : ''; ?>">
848 <?php if (is_array($studentDtrFlash) && !empty($studentDtrFlash['message'])): ?>
849 <div class="alert alert-<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($studentDtrFlash['type'] ?? 'info'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?> mt-4">
850 <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$studentDtrFlash['message'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
851 </div>
852 <?php endif; ?>
853
854 <?php if ($studentDtrManualOnly): ?>
855 <section class="external-dtr-hero">
856 <div class="external-dtr-hero-main">
857 <div class="external-dtr-eyebrow"><i class="feather-edit-3"></i><span>My Internal DTR</span></div>
858 <h2><?php echo htmlspecialchars($displayName, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></h2>
859 <p>Submit missed internal attendance only when the biometric machine was unavailable or your time was not captured. Your entry will stay pending until school review.</p>
860 <div class="external-dtr-meta">
861 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($student['student_id'] ?? 'No student ID'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
862 <?php if (trim((string)($student['course_name'] ?? '')) !== ''): ?>
863 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$student['course_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
864 <?php endif; ?>
865 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars(biotern_format_section_code((string)($student['section_code'] ?? 'No section')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
866 </div>
867 </div>
868 <div class="external-dtr-clock-card">
869 <div class="external-dtr-clock-label">Today</div>
870 <div class="external-dtr-clock" id="proofClockDisplay"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('h:i:s A'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
871 <div class="external-dtr-clock-date" id="proofClockDate"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
872 </div>
873 </section>
874
875 <div class="external-dtr-stats">
876 <div class="external-dtr-stat">
877 <span>Month Hours</span>
878 <strong><?php echo number_format((float)$attendanceSummary['total_hours'], 2); ?> hrs</strong>
879 </div>
880 <div class="external-dtr-stat">
881 <span>Remaining</span>
882 <strong><?php echo number_format(max(0, $remainingHours), 0); ?> hrs</strong>
883 </div>
884 <div class="external-dtr-stat">
885 <span>Approved</span>
886 <strong><?php echo (int)$attendanceSummary['approved_logs']; ?></strong>
887 </div>
888 <div class="external-dtr-stat">
889 <span>Pending</span>
890 <strong><?php echo (int)$attendanceSummary['pending_logs']; ?></strong>
891 </div>
892 </div>
893
894 <section class="external-quick-card mb-4">
895 <div class="external-quick-heading">
896 <div>
897 <h3>Quick Time Picker</h3>
898 <p>Tap one slot to copy the nearest 30-minute time into the matching field below.</p>
899 </div>
900 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('F d, Y'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
901 </div>
902 <div class="external-clock-grid">
903 <button type="button" class="external-clock-btn student-dtr-manual-punch" data-target-select="fallbackMorningIn"><i class="feather-log-in"></i><span>Morning In</span></button>
904 <button type="button" class="external-clock-btn student-dtr-manual-punch" data-target-select="fallbackMorningOut"><i class="feather-log-out"></i><span>Morning Out</span></button>
905 <button type="button" class="external-clock-btn student-dtr-manual-punch" data-target-select="fallbackAfternoonIn"><i class="feather-sun"></i><span>Afternoon In</span></button>
906 <button type="button" class="external-clock-btn student-dtr-manual-punch" data-target-select="fallbackAfternoonOut"><i class="feather-log-out"></i><span>Afternoon Out</span></button>
907 </div>
908 <div class="external-note-field">
909 <label for="quickInternalPunchNote">Notes</label>
910 <input type="text" id="quickInternalPunchNote" maxlength="255" placeholder="Optional note copied to the reason field">
911 </div>
912 <div class="student-dtr-quick-status" id="quickTimePickerStatus" aria-live="polite"></div>
913 </section>
914 <?php else: ?>
915 <section class="student-dtr-station-hero">
916 <div class="student-dtr-hero-main">
917 <span class="student-dtr-station-chip"><?php echo $studentDtrManualOnly ? 'Manual Attendance Entry' : 'Internal Attendance Station'; ?></span>
918 <div class="student-dtr-persona">
919 <img src="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($avatarSrc, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" alt="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($displayName, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" class="student-dtr-avatar">
920 <div>
921 <h2 class="student-dtr-title"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($studentDtrHeroTitle, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></h2>
922 <p class="student-dtr-hero-copy">
923 <?php echo htmlspecialchars($studentDtrHeroCopy, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
924 </p>
925 </div>
926 </div>
927 <div class="student-dtr-hero-pills">
928 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars($displayName, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
929 <?php if (!empty($courseSection)): ?>
930 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars(implode(' / ', $courseSection), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
931 <?php endif; ?>
932 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars($monthLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
933 </div>
934 </div>
935 <?php if (!$studentDtrManualOnly): ?>
936 <form method="get" class="student-dtr-station-filter">
937 <div>
938 <label for="dtrHeroYear">Year</label>
939 <select id="dtrHeroYear" name="year">
940 <?php foreach ($availableYears as $yearOption): ?>
941 <option value="<?php echo (int)$yearOption; ?>" <?php echo (int)$yearOption === $selectedYear ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>
942 <?php echo (int)$yearOption; ?>
943 </option>
944 <?php endforeach; ?>
945 </select>
946 </div>
947 <div>
948 <label for="dtrHeroMonth">Month</label>
949 <select id="dtrHeroMonth" name="month_num">
950 <?php foreach ($monthOptions as $monthNumber => $monthLabelOption): ?>
951 <option value="<?php echo (int)$monthNumber; ?>" <?php echo (int)$monthNumber === $selectedMonthNumber ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>
952 <?php echo htmlspecialchars($monthLabelOption, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
953 </option>
954 <?php endforeach; ?>
955 </select>
956 </div>
957 <button type="submit">View DTR</button>
958 </form>
959 <?php endif; ?>
960 </section>
961 <?php endif; ?>
962
963 <?php if (!$studentDtrManualOnly): ?>
964 <div class="student-dtr-metrics">
965 <article class="student-metric-card student-dtr-metric">
966 <span class="student-dtr-metric-icon"><i class="feather-list"></i></span>
967 <div>
968 <div class="student-dtr-meta">Total Logs</div>
969 <strong><?php echo (int)$attendanceSummary['total_logs']; ?></strong>
970 <small>Recorded entries for <?php echo htmlspecialchars($monthLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>.</small>
971 </div>
972 </article>
973 <article class="student-metric-card student-dtr-metric">
974 <span class="student-dtr-metric-icon approved"><i class="feather-check-circle"></i></span>
975 <div>
976 <div class="student-dtr-meta">Approved</div>
977 <strong><?php echo (int)$attendanceSummary['approved_logs']; ?></strong>
978 <small><?php echo number_format((float)$attendanceInsights['approved_hours'], 2); ?> approved hours.</small>
979 </div>
980 </article>
981 <article class="student-metric-card student-dtr-metric">
982 <span class="student-dtr-metric-icon pending"><i class="feather-clock"></i></span>
983 <div>
984 <div class="student-dtr-meta">Pending</div>
985 <strong><?php echo (int)$attendanceSummary['pending_logs']; ?></strong>
986 <small><?php echo number_format((float)$attendanceInsights['pending_hours'], 2); ?> hours waiting.</small>
987 </div>
988 </article>
989 <article class="student-metric-card student-dtr-metric">
990 <span class="student-dtr-metric-icon hours"><i class="feather-activity"></i></span>
991 <div>
992 <div class="student-dtr-meta">Logged Hours</div>
993 <strong><?php echo number_format((float)$attendanceSummary['total_hours'], 2); ?></strong>
994 <small>Average <?php echo number_format((float)$attendanceInsights['average_hours'], 2); ?> hours per entry.</small>
995 </div>
996 </article>
997 </div>
998
999 <section class="card student-dtr-report-export-card">
1000 <div class="card-body">
1001 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-3 mb-2">
1002 <div>
1003 <span class="student-metric-label">Attendance Report</span>
1004 <h3 class="mb-1">Request Clock-in/Clock-out Report</h3>
1005 <div class="student-dtr-meta">Download a copy of your attendance logs for the selected month as PDF or CSV for your records or submission.</div>
1006 </div>
1007 </div>
1008 <form method="get" action="print_attendance.php" target="_blank" class="row g-2 align-items-end">
1009 <input type="hidden" name="student_id" value="<?php echo (int)($student['id'] ?? 0); ?>">
1010 <div class="col-md-4">
1011 <label class="form-label" for="exportMonth">Month</label>
1012 <select id="exportMonth" name="month" class="form-select">
1013 <?php foreach ($monthOptions as $monthNumber => $monthLabelOption): ?>
1014 <option value="<?php echo $selectedYear . '-' . sprintf('%02d', $monthNumber); ?>" <?php echo $monthNumber === $selectedMonthNumber ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>
1015 <?php echo htmlspecialchars($monthLabelOption, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
1016 </option>
1017 <?php endforeach; ?>
1018 </select>
1019 </div>
1020 <div class="col-md-4">
1021 <label class="form-label" for="exportFormat">Format</label>
1022 <select id="exportFormat" name="format" class="form-select">
1023 <option value="pdf">PDF</option>
1024 <option value="csv">CSV</option>
1025 </select>
1026 </div>
1027 <div class="col-md-4 d-flex align-items-end">
1028 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success">Download Report</button>
1029 </div>
1030 </form>
1031 </div>
1032 </section>
1033 <?php endif; ?>
1034
1035 <div class="row g-4 align-items-start mt-0">
1036 <div class="<?php echo $studentDtrManualOnly ? 'col-12' : 'col-12 col-xl-8'; ?>">
1037 <?php if ($studentDtrManualOnly): ?>
1038 <section class="record-section external-manual-card student-dtr-fallback-card student-dtr-record-entry-card mb-4" id="manual-dtr">
1039 <div class="external-manual-header">
1040 <h5 class="mb-1">Submit Missed Internal Time</h5>
1041 <p class="text-muted mb-0">Use this when your internal biometric DTR was not captured or the machine was unavailable.</p>
1042 </div>
1043 <div class="external-manual-body">
1044 <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" class="row g-3">
1045 <input type="hidden" name="student_action" value="submit_machine_down">
1046 <input type="hidden" name="proof_clock_time" id="proofClockTime" value="">
1047 <input type="hidden" id="fallbackMode" name="fallback_mode" value="weekly">
1048 <div class="col-12">
1049 <div class="external-manual-guide">
1050 <strong>How to submit internal manual DTR:</strong>
1051 <span>1. Choose one missed date or a date range, then click Create Time Rows.</span>
1052 <span>2. Pick the closest time from each dropdown, like 8:00 AM, 12:00 PM, 1:00 PM, and 5:00 PM.</span>
1053 <span>3. Upload proof and explain what happened. The entry stays pending until school review.</span>
1054 </div>
1055 </div>
1056 <div class="col-md-4">
1057 <label class="form-label" for="fallbackAttendanceDate">Start Date</label>
1058 <input type="date" class="form-control" id="fallbackAttendanceDate" name="attendance_date" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('Y-m-d'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" max="<?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('Y-m-d'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1059 </div>
1060 <div class="col-md-4">
1061 <label class="form-label" for="fallbackAttendanceEndDate">End Date</label>
1062 <input type="date" class="form-control" id="fallbackAttendanceEndDate" name="attendance_end_date" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('Y-m-d'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" max="<?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('Y-m-d'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1063 </div>
1064 <div class="col-md-4 d-flex align-items-end">
1065 <button type="button" class="btn btn-success w-100" id="generateFallbackRows">Create Time Rows</button>
1066 </div>
1067 <div class="col-12">
1068 <div class="external-date-range-hint" id="fallbackDateRangeHint">
1069 Start and end are both today, so this will create 1 row. Choose a wider date range to create more rows.
1070 </div>
1071 </div>
1072 <div class="col-12">
1073 <div class="external-manual-extra">
1074 <div>
1075 <label class="form-label" for="proofImage">Proof Image</label>
1076 <div class="external-file-upload">
1077 <input type="file" id="proofImage" name="proof_image" accept="image/png,image/jpeg,image/webp" capture="environment" required data-file-name-target="proofImageName">
1078 <label for="proofImage"><i class="feather-upload"></i><span>Upload proof</span></label>
1079 <span id="proofImageName">No file selected</span>
1080 </div>
1081 <div class="form-text">Upload JPG, PNG, or WEBP proof.</div>
1082 </div>
1083 <div>
1084 <label class="form-label" for="fallbackReason">Reason / Details (Optional)</label>
1085 <input type="text" class="form-control" id="fallbackReason" name="fallback_reason" maxlength="255" placeholder="Optional note for the reviewer.">
1086 </div>
1087 </div>
1088 </div>
1089 <div class="col-12">
1090 <div id="fallbackGeneratedRowsWrap" class="external-manual-rows-placeholder">
1091 Choose the date range, then create time rows to enter missed times.
1092 </div>
1093 </div>
1094 <div class="d-none" aria-hidden="true">
1095 <label class="form-label" for="fallbackMorningIn">Morning In</label>
1096 <select class="form-select student-dtr-time-select external-manual-time-select" id="fallbackMorningIn" name="morning_time_in">
1097 <?php echo student_dtr_time_select_options_html('', 5, 11); ?>
1098 </select>
1099 <label class="form-label" for="fallbackMorningOut">Morning Out</label>
1100 <select class="form-select student-dtr-time-select external-manual-time-select" id="fallbackMorningOut" name="morning_time_out">
1101 <?php echo student_dtr_time_select_options_html('', 5, 11); ?>
1102 </select>
1103 <label class="form-label" for="fallbackAfternoonIn">Afternoon In</label>
1104 <select class="form-select student-dtr-time-select external-manual-time-select" id="fallbackAfternoonIn" name="afternoon_time_in">
1105 <?php echo student_dtr_time_select_options_html('', 12, 23); ?>
1106 </select>
1107 <label class="form-label" for="fallbackAfternoonOut">Afternoon Out</label>
1108 <select class="form-select student-dtr-time-select external-manual-time-select" id="fallbackAfternoonOut" name="afternoon_time_out">
1109 <?php echo student_dtr_time_select_options_html('', 12, 23); ?>
1110 </select>
1111 </div>
1112 <div class="col-12" id="fallbackSubmitWrap" hidden>
1113 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100" <?php echo max(0, $remainingHours) <= 0 ? 'disabled' : ''; ?>>Submit Internal DTR for Review</button>
1114 </div>
1115 </form>
1116 </div>
1117 </section>
1118 <?php endif; ?>
1119
1120 <?php if (!$studentDtrManualOnly): ?>
1121 <section class="card student-panel">
1122 <div class="card-body">
1123 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-3 mb-3">
1124 <div>
1125 <span class="student-metric-label">Attendance Logs</span>
1126 <h3 class="mb-1">My Internal DTR Entries</h3>
1127 <div class="student-dtr-meta">Daily attendance records for the selected month.</div>
1128 </div>
1129 <a href="student-profile.php" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Back to Profile</a>
1130 </div>
1131
1132 <?php if (!empty($attendanceRows)): ?>
1133 <div class="student-dtr-table-wrap">
1134 <table class="student-dtr-table">
1135 <thead>
1136 <tr>
1137 <th>Date</th>
1138 <th>Morning In</th>
1139 <th>Morning Out</th>
1140 <th>Break In</th>
1141 <th>Break Out</th>
1142 <th>Afternoon In</th>
1143 <th>Afternoon Out</th>
1144 <th>Hours</th>
1145 <th>Status</th>
1146 <th>Source</th>
1147 </tr>
1148 </thead>
1149 <tbody>
1150 <?php foreach ($attendanceRows as $row): ?>
1151 <?php $reviewMeta = student_dtr_review_meta($row); ?>
1152 <tr>
1153 <td data-label="Date">
1154 <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y', strtotime((string)$row['attendance_date'])), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
1155 <?php if (trim((string)($row['remarks'] ?? '')) !== ''): ?>
1156 <div class="student-dtr-cell-note mt-1"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$row['remarks'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
1157 <?php endif; ?>
1158 <?php if (!empty($row['proof_attachment']['file_path'])): ?>
1159 <div class="student-dtr-cell-note mt-1">
1160 <a href="<?php echo htmlspecialchars(student_dtr_manual_upload_web_path((string)$row['proof_attachment']['file_path']), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View proof image</a>
1161 </div>
1162 <?php elseif (!empty($row['proof_attachment']['id']) && strtolower((string)($row['proof_attachment']['storage_driver'] ?? '')) === 'database'): ?>
1163 <div class="student-dtr-cell-note mt-1">
1164 <a href="manual-dtr-proof.php?id=<?php echo (int)$row['proof_attachment']['id']; ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View proof image</a>
1165 </div>
1166 <?php endif; ?>
1167 <?php
1168 // Show button if missing clock-out
1169 $missingClockOut = false;
1170 if (
1171 (isset($row['morning_time_in']) && $row['morning_time_in'] && empty($row['morning_time_out'])) ||
1172 (isset($row['afternoon_time_in']) && $row['afternoon_time_in'] && empty($row['afternoon_time_out']))
1173 ) {
1174 $missingClockOut = true;
1175 }
1176 if ($missingClockOut): ?>
1177 <form method="post" action="student-manual-dtr.php" style="display:inline; margin-top:4px;">
1178 <input type="hidden" name="attendance_id" value="<?php echo (int)($row['id'] ?? 0); ?>">
1179 <input type="hidden" name="attendance_date" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($row['attendance_date'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
1180 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-danger mt-1">Report missing clock-out</button>
1181 </form>
1182 <?php endif; ?>
1183 </td>
1184 <td data-label="Morning In"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(student_dtr_format_time($row['morning_time_in'] ?? null), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1185 <td data-label="Morning Out"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(student_dtr_format_time($row['morning_time_out'] ?? null), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1186 <td data-label="Break In"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(student_dtr_format_time($row['break_time_in'] ?? null), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1187 <td data-label="Break Out"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(student_dtr_format_time($row['break_time_out'] ?? null), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1188 <td data-label="Afternoon In"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(student_dtr_format_time($row['afternoon_time_in'] ?? null), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1189 <td data-label="Afternoon Out"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(student_dtr_format_time($row['afternoon_time_out'] ?? null), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1190 <td data-label="Hours"><strong><?php echo number_format((float)($row['display_hours'] ?? 0), 2); ?>h</strong></td>
1191 <td data-label="Status">
1192 <span class="student-dtr-status <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$reviewMeta['class'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$reviewMeta['label'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
1193 <?php
1194 // Manual correction badge/history panel
1195 $correctionStatus = null;
1196 if (isset($row['source']) && strtolower((string)$row['source']) === 'manual') {
1197 $correctionStatus = strtolower((string)($row['status'] ?? 'pending'));
1198 }
1199 if ($correctionStatus): ?>
1200 <span class="badge ms-1
1201 <?php if ($correctionStatus === 'pending') echo 'bg-warning'; ?>
1202 <?php if ($correctionStatus === 'approved') echo 'bg-success'; ?>
1203 <?php if ($correctionStatus === 'rejected') echo 'bg-danger'; ?>
1204 ">
1205 Manual correction <?php echo ucfirst($correctionStatus); ?>
1206 </span>
1207 <?php endif; ?>
1208 </td>
1209 <td data-label="Source"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(ucfirst((string)($row['source'] ?? 'manual')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1210 </tr>
1211 <?php endforeach; ?>
1212 </tbody>
1213 </table>
1214 </div>
1215 <?php else: ?>
1216 <div class="student-dtr-empty">No internal DTR entries found for <?php echo htmlspecialchars($monthLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?> yet.</div>
1217 <?php endif; ?>
1218 </div>
1219 </section>
1220 <?php endif; ?>
1221 </div>
1222
1223 <?php if (!$studentDtrManualOnly): ?>
1224 <div class="col-12 col-xl-4">
1225 <section class="card student-panel student-dtr-side-card">
1226 <div class="card-body">
1227 <span class="student-metric-label">Internship</span>
1228 <h3 class="mb-3">Progress</h3>
1229 <div class="student-detail-list student-dtr-side-list">
1230 <div>
1231 <span>Company</span>
1232 <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($internship['company_name'] ?? '')) !== '' ? (string)$internship['company_name'] : 'No company assigned yet', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
1233 </div>
1234 <div>
1235 <span>Position</span>
1236 <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($internship['position'] ?? '')) !== '' ? (string)$internship['position'] : 'No position assigned yet', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
1237 </div>
1238 <div>
1239 <span>Current status</span>
1240 <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($internship['status'] ?? '')) !== '' ? ucfirst((string)$internship['status']) : 'Not started', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
1241 </div>
1242 <div>
1243 <span>Rendered vs required</span>
1244 <strong><?php echo number_format($renderedHours, 0); ?> / <?php echo number_format($requiredHours, 0); ?> hrs</strong>
1245 </div>
1246 <div>
1247 <span>Completion</span>
1248 <strong><?php echo number_format($completionPercentage, 0); ?>%</strong>
1249 </div>
1250 <div>
1251 <span>Remaining on record</span>
1252 <strong><?php echo number_format(max(0, $remainingHours), 0); ?> hrs</strong>
1253 </div>
1254 </div>
1255 </div>
1256 </section>
1257
1258 <section class="card student-panel mt-4 student-dtr-side-card">
1259 <div class="card-body">
1260 <span class="student-metric-label">Month Snapshot</span>
1261 <h3 class="mb-3">Attendance Insight</h3>
1262 <div class="student-detail-list student-dtr-side-list">
1263 <div>
1264 <span>Days with logs</span>
1265 <strong><?php echo (int)$attendanceInsights['days_present']; ?></strong>
1266 </div>
1267 <div>
1268 <span>Biometric entries</span>
1269 <strong><?php echo (int)$attendanceInsights['biometric_logs']; ?></strong>
1270 </div>
1271 <div>
1272 <span>Manual entries</span>
1273 <strong><?php echo (int)$attendanceInsights['manual_logs']; ?></strong>
1274 </div>
1275 <div>
1276 <span>Rejected logs</span>
1277 <strong><?php echo (int)$attendanceSummary['rejected_logs']; ?></strong>
1278 </div>
1279 <div>
1280 <span>Last recorded day</span>
1281 <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($lastRecordedDateText, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
1282 </div>
1283 </div>
1284 </div>
1285 </section>
1286 </div>
1287 <?php endif; ?>
1288 </div>
1289 </div>
1290</div>
1291 </div>
1292</main>
1293<script>
1294Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('input[type="file"][data-file-name-target]')).forEach(function(input) {
1295 input.addEventListener('change', function() {
1296 var target = document.getElementById(input.getAttribute('data-file-name-target'));
1297 if (!target) {
1298 return;
1299 }
1300 target.textContent = input.files && input.files.length ? input.files[0].name : 'No file selected';
1301 });
1302});
1303
1304(function () {
1305 var generateButton = document.getElementById('generateFallbackRows');
1306 var startInput = document.getElementById('fallbackAttendanceDate');
1307 var endInput = document.getElementById('fallbackAttendanceEndDate');
1308 var rowsWrap = document.getElementById('fallbackGeneratedRowsWrap');
1309 var modeSelect = document.getElementById('fallbackMode');
1310 var rangeHint = document.getElementById('fallbackDateRangeHint');
1311 var submitWrap = document.getElementById('fallbackSubmitWrap');
1312
1313 if (!generateButton || !startInput || !endInput || !rowsWrap) {
1314 return;
1315 }
1316
1317 var escapeHtml = function (value) {
1318 return String(value)
1319 .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
1320 .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
1321 .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
1322 .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
1323 .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
1324 };
1325
1326 var buildTimeOptions = function (selected, startHour, endHour) {
1327 var options = ['<option value="">Select time</option>'];
1328 startHour = Math.max(0, Math.min(23, startHour || 0));
1329 endHour = Math.max(startHour, Math.min(23, endHour || 23));
1330 for (var hour = startHour; hour <= endHour; hour++) {
1331 for (var minute = 0; minute < 60; minute += 30) {
1332 var value = String(hour).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(minute).padStart(2, '0');
1333 var hour12 = hour % 12 || 12;
1334 var label = hour12 + ':' + String(minute).padStart(2, '0') + ' ' + (hour < 12 ? 'AM' : 'PM');
1335 options.push('<option value="' + value + '"' + (value === selected ? ' selected' : '') + '>' + label + '</option>');
1336 }
1337 }
1338 return options.join('');
1339 };
1340
1341 var buildTimeSelect = function (name, selected, startHour, endHour, slotName) {
1342 var slotAttr = slotName ? ' data-time-slot="' + escapeHtml(slotName) + '"' : '';
1343 return '<select class="form-select student-dtr-time-select external-manual-time-select" name="' + name + '"' + slotAttr + '>' + buildTimeOptions(selected || '', startHour, endHour) + '</select>';
1344 };
1345
1346 var formatLabel = function (dateValue) {
1347 var parts = dateValue.split('-');
1348 if (parts.length !== 3) {
1349 return dateValue;
1350 }
1351 var dateObj = new Date(parts[0], parseInt(parts[1], 10) - 1, parts[2]);
1352 if (isNaN(dateObj.getTime())) {
1353 return dateValue;
1354 }
1355 return dateObj.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: 'short', day: '2-digit', year: 'numeric', weekday: 'short' });
1356 };
1357
1358 var parseLocalDate = function (value) {
1359 var match = String(value || '').match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/);
1360 if (!match) {
1361 return null;
1362 }
1363 return new Date(Number(match[1]), Number(match[2]) - 1, Number(match[3]));
1364 };
1365
1366 var formatLocalDate = function (date) {
1367 return date.getFullYear() + '-' + String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
1368 };
1369
1370 var diffDays = function (startDate, endDate) {
1371 return Math.round((endDate.getTime() - startDate.getTime()) / (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)) + 1;
1372 };
1373
1374 var updateRangeHint = function () {
1375 if (!rangeHint) {
1376 return;
1377 }
1378 rangeHint.classList.remove('is-success', 'is-warning');
1379 endInput.min = startInput.value || '';
1380 var startDate = parseLocalDate(startInput.value);
1381 var endDate = parseLocalDate(endInput.value || startInput.value);
1382 if (!startDate || !endDate) {
1383 rangeHint.textContent = 'Choose both dates first. Same start and end date creates 1 row.';
1384 return;
1385 }
1386 if (endDate < startDate) {
1387 endInput.value = startInput.value;
1388 endDate = parseLocalDate(endInput.value);
1389 }
1390 var count = diffDays(startDate, endDate);
1391 rangeHint.textContent = count === 1
1392 ? 'This will create 1 row for ' + startInput.value + '. Pick an earlier Start Date or wider range if you need more days.'
1393 : 'This will create ' + count + ' rows, one for each date from ' + startInput.value + ' to ' + endInput.value + '.';
1394 };
1395
1396 startInput.addEventListener('input', updateRangeHint);
1397 startInput.addEventListener('change', updateRangeHint);
1398 endInput.addEventListener('input', updateRangeHint);
1399 endInput.addEventListener('change', updateRangeHint);
1400 updateRangeHint();
1401
1402 generateButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
1403 var startValue = startInput.value;
1404 var endValue = endInput.value || startValue;
1405 var startDate = parseLocalDate(startValue);
1406 var endDate = parseLocalDate(endValue);
1407 if (!startDate || !endDate) {
1408 updateRangeHint();
1409 return;
1410 }
1411 if (endDate < startDate) {
1412 endInput.value = startValue;
1413 endDate = parseLocalDate(startValue);
1414 updateRangeHint();
1415 }
1416 var rowCount = diffDays(startDate, endDate);
1417 if (rowCount > 31) {
1418 if (rangeHint) {
1419 rangeHint.classList.remove('is-success');
1420 rangeHint.classList.add('is-warning');
1421 rangeHint.textContent = 'Please create rows for 31 days or fewer at a time.';
1422 }
1423 return;
1424 }
1425
1426 var rows = [];
1427 for (var cursor = new Date(startDate); cursor <= endDate; cursor.setDate(cursor.getDate() + 1)) {
1428 var isoDate = formatLocalDate(cursor);
1429 var safeDate = escapeHtml(isoDate);
1430 rows.push(
1431 '<tr>' +
1432 '<td data-label="Date"><strong>' + escapeHtml(formatLabel(isoDate)) + '</strong></td>' +
1433 '<td data-label="Morning In">' + buildTimeSelect('generated_entries[' + safeDate + '][morning_time_in]', '', 5, 11, 'fallbackMorningIn') + '</td>' +
1434 '<td data-label="Morning Out">' + buildTimeSelect('generated_entries[' + safeDate + '][morning_time_out]', '', 5, 11, 'fallbackMorningOut') + '</td>' +
1435 '<td data-label="Afternoon In">' + buildTimeSelect('generated_entries[' + safeDate + '][afternoon_time_in]', '', 12, 23, 'fallbackAfternoonIn') + '</td>' +
1436 '<td data-label="Afternoon Out">' + buildTimeSelect('generated_entries[' + safeDate + '][afternoon_time_out]', '', 12, 23, 'fallbackAfternoonOut') + '</td>' +
1437 '</tr>'
1438 );
1439 }
1440
1441 rowsWrap.className = 'external-manual-rows-generated';
1442 rowsWrap.innerHTML =
1443 '<div class="table-responsive">' +
1444 '<table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0 external-manual-table">' +
1445 '<thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Morning In</th><th>Morning Out</th><th>Afternoon In</th><th>Afternoon Out</th></tr></thead>' +
1446 '<tbody>' + rows.join('') + '</tbody>' +
1447 '</table>' +
1448 '</div>';
1449 if (rangeHint) {
1450 rangeHint.classList.remove('is-warning');
1451 rangeHint.classList.add('is-success');
1452 rangeHint.textContent = 'Created ' + rows.length + ' time row' + (rows.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + '. Fill the missing times below, then submit for review.';
1453 }
1454 if (submitWrap) {
1455 submitWrap.hidden = false;
1456 }
1457 if (modeSelect) {
1458 modeSelect.value = 'weekly';
1459 }
1460 });
1461
1462 function normalizeTimeValue(value) {
1463 var digits = String(value || '').replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 4);
1464 if (digits.length >= 3) {
1465 return digits.slice(0, digits.length - 2).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + digits.slice(-2);
1466 }
1467 return digits;
1468 }
1469
1470 function clampTimeValue(value) {
1471 var match = String(value || '').match(/^(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})$/);
1472 if (!match) {
1473 return '';
1474 }
1475 var hour = Math.max(0, Math.min(23, parseInt(match[1], 10) || 0));
1476 var minute = Math.max(0, Math.min(59, parseInt(match[2], 10) || 0));
1477 return String(hour).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(minute).padStart(2, '0');
1478 }
1479
1480 function enhanceTimeFields(scope) {
1481 Array.prototype.slice.call((scope || document).querySelectorAll('.student-dtr-time-field')).forEach(function (input) {
1482 if (input.dataset.timeEnhanced === '1') {
1483 return;
1484 }
1485 input.dataset.timeEnhanced = '1';
1486 input.addEventListener('input', function () {
1487 input.value = normalizeTimeValue(input.value);
1488 });
1489 input.addEventListener('blur', function () {
1490 input.value = clampTimeValue(input.value);
1491 });
1492 });
1493 }
1494
1495 enhanceTimeFields(document);
1496}());
1497
1498(function () {
1499 var punchButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.student-dtr-manual-punch');
1500 if (!punchButtons.length) {
1501 return;
1502 }
1503
1504 function nearestThirtyMinuteValue() {
1505 var now = new Date();
1506 var minutes = now.getMinutes();
1507 var rounded = minutes < 15 ? 0 : (minutes < 45 ? 30 : 60);
1508 var hour = now.getHours();
1509 if (rounded === 60) {
1510 hour += 1;
1511 rounded = 0;
1512 }
1513 hour = Math.max(0, Math.min(23, hour));
1514 return String(hour).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(rounded).padStart(2, '0');
1515 }
1516
1517 function chooseClosestOption(select, value) {
1518 if (!select) {
1519 return '';
1520 }
1521 var options = Array.prototype.slice.call(select.options || []);
1522 var match = options.find(function (option) {
1523 return option.value === value;
1524 });
1525 if (match) {
1526 select.value = match.value;
1527 select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
1528 return match.value;
1529 }
1530
1531 return '';
1532 }
1533
1534 function formatTimeLabel(value) {
1535 var parts = String(value || '').split(':');
1536 var hour = parseInt(parts[0], 10);
1537 var minute = parseInt(parts[1], 10);
1538 if (Number.isNaN(hour) || Number.isNaN(minute)) {
1539 return '';
1540 }
1541 var suffix = hour >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
1542 var displayHour = hour % 12;
1543 if (displayHour === 0) {
1544 displayHour = 12;
1545 }
1546 return String(displayHour) + ':' + String(minute).padStart(2, '0') + ' ' + suffix;
1547 }
1548
1549 Array.prototype.forEach.call(punchButtons, function (button) {
1550 button.addEventListener('click', function () {
1551 Array.prototype.forEach.call(punchButtons, function (otherButton) {
1552 otherButton.classList.remove('is-selected');
1553 });
1554 button.classList.add('is-selected');
1555
1556 var selectId = button.getAttribute('data-target-select') || '';
1557 var generatedSelect = document.querySelector('#fallbackGeneratedRowsWrap select[data-time-slot="' + selectId + '"]');
1558 if (!generatedSelect) {
1559 var generateRowsButton = document.getElementById('generateFallbackRows');
1560 if (generateRowsButton) {
1561 generateRowsButton.click();
1562 }
1563 generatedSelect = document.querySelector('#fallbackGeneratedRowsWrap select[data-time-slot="' + selectId + '"]');
1564 if (!generatedSelect) {
1565 var missingRowsStatus = document.getElementById('quickTimePickerStatus');
1566 if (missingRowsStatus) {
1567 missingRowsStatus.textContent = 'Choose a date first, then tap a quick time button.';
1568 }
1569 return;
1570 }
1571 }
1572 var chosenValue = chooseClosestOption(generatedSelect, nearestThirtyMinuteValue());
1573
1574 var noteInput = document.getElementById('quickInternalPunchNote');
1575 var reasonBox = document.getElementById('fallbackReason');
1576 if (noteInput && reasonBox && noteInput.value.trim() !== '' && reasonBox.value.trim() === '') {
1577 reasonBox.value = noteInput.value.trim();
1578 }
1579
1580 var status = document.getElementById('quickTimePickerStatus');
1581 if (status) {
1582 var slotName = (button.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
1583 var timeLabel = formatTimeLabel(chosenValue);
1584 status.textContent = timeLabel
1585 ? slotName + ' filled with ' + timeLabel + ' in the generated row.'
1586 : slotName + ' was not changed because the current time is outside that slot. Use the dropdown below.';
1587 }
1588 });
1589 });
1590}());
1591</script>
1592<?php include 'includes/footer.php'; ?>
1593
1594
1595

18{

20 if ($params !== []) {
21 $target .= '?' . http_build_query($params);
22 }
23 header('Location: ' . $target);
24 exit;

27$flashType = 'info';
28$flashMessage = '';
29$userListRaw = '';
30$userDetailsRaw = '';
31$userListDecoded = null;
32$userDetailsDecoded = null;
33$selectedUserId = (int)($_GET['selected_user_id'] ?? $_POST['user_id'] ?? 0);
34$deviceInfoRaw = '';
35$configRaw = '';
36$ringSetRaw = '';
37$networkRaw = '';
38$timeRaw = '';
39$machineConfigPath = dirname(__DIR__) . '/tools/biometric_machine_config.json';

44function machine_h($value): string
45{

49function machine_connector_write_config(string $machineConfigPath, array $config): void
50{
51 $json = json_encode($config, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
52 if (!is_string($json)) {
53 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to encode connector config.');
54 }
55
56 machine_write_local_config_file($machineConfigPath, $json . PHP_EOL);
57}
58
59function machine_open_restart_bridge_shell(string $workspaceRoot): void
60{
61 if (stripos(PHP_OS_FAMILY, 'Windows') !== 0) {
62 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge worker restart shell launcher is only available on Windows hosts.');
63 }
64
65 $restartScript = $workspaceRoot . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'tools' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'restart-bridge-worker.ps1';
66 if (!file_exists($restartScript)) {
67 throw new RuntimeException('Restart script not found. Expected: ' . $restartScript);
68 }
69
70 $workspaceArg = str_replace('"', '""', $workspaceRoot);
71 $scriptArg = str_replace('"', '""', $restartScript);
72
73 $launchCmd = 'start "BioTern Bridge Restart" powershell.exe -NoExit -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& \""' . $scriptArg . '"\" -WorkspaceRoot \""' . $workspaceArg . '"\""';
74 pclose(popen($launchCmd, 'r'));
75}
76
77function machine_open_bridge_log_tail_shell(string $workspaceRoot): void
78{
79 if (stripos(PHP_OS_FAMILY, 'Windows') !== 0) {
80 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge log tail launcher is only available on Windows hosts.');
81 }
82
83 $logPath = $workspaceRoot . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'tools' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'bridge-worker.log';
84 $logArg = str_replace('"', '""', $logPath);
85 $launchCmd = 'start "BioTern Bridge Logs" powershell.exe -NoExit -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Content -Path \""' . $logArg . '"\" -Tail 80 -Wait"';
86 pclose(popen($launchCmd, 'r'));
87}
88
89function machine_run_local_powershell(array $arguments, int $timeoutSeconds = 90): array
90{
91 if (stripos(PHP_OS_FAMILY, 'Windows') !== 0 || machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
92 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge repair actions can only run from the local Windows bridge computer.');
93 }
94
95 $escaped = array_map('escapeshellarg', $arguments);
96 $command = 'powershell.exe ' . implode(' ', $escaped);
97 $descriptorSpec = [
98 0 => ['pipe', 'r'],
99 1 => ['pipe', 'w'],
100 2 => ['pipe', 'w'],
101 ];
102
103 $process = proc_open($command, $descriptorSpec, $pipes, dirname(__DIR__));
104 if (!is_resource($process)) {
105 throw new RuntimeException('Unable to start PowerShell.');
106 }
107
108 fclose($pipes[0]);
109 stream_set_blocking($pipes[1], false);
110 stream_set_blocking($pipes[2], false);
111
112 $stdout = '';
113 $stderr = '';
114 $startedAt = time();
115 while (true) {
116 $stdout .= (string)stream_get_contents($pipes[1]);
117 $stderr .= (string)stream_get_contents($pipes[2]);
118 $status = proc_get_status($process);
119 if (empty($status['running'])) {
120 break;
121 }
122 if ((time() - $startedAt) > $timeoutSeconds) {
123 proc_terminate($process);
124 throw new RuntimeException('PowerShell command timed out while repairing the bridge task.');
125 }
126 usleep(150000);
127 }
128
129 $stdout .= (string)stream_get_contents($pipes[1]);
130 $stderr .= (string)stream_get_contents($pipes[2]);
131 fclose($pipes[1]);
132 fclose($pipes[2]);
133 $exitCode = proc_close($process);
134
135 return [
136 'exit_code' => $exitCode,
137 'output' => trim($stdout . ($stderr !== '' ? "\n" . $stderr : '')),
138 ];
139}
140
141function machine_is_cloud_runtime(): bool
142{
143 return getenv('VERCEL') !== false
144 || getenv('RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT') !== false
145 || getenv('RAILWAY_STATIC_URL') !== false
146 || getenv('K_SERVICE') !== false;
147}
148
149function machine_write_local_config_file(string $path, string $contents): void
150{
151 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
152 throw new RuntimeException('Connector profile changes are disabled on cloud runtime because local files are read-only. Update connector settings on the always-on teacher PC bridge worker.');
153 }
154
155 $dir = dirname($path);
156 if (!is_dir($dir) || !is_writable($dir)) {
157 throw new RuntimeException('Config directory is not writable: ' . $dir);
158 }
159
160 $written = @file_put_contents($path, $contents);
161 if ($written === false) {
162 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to write connector config file.');
163 }
164}
165
166function machine_make_bridge_token(): string
167{
168 try {
169 return bin2hex(random_bytes(16));
170 } catch (Throwable $e) {
171 return bin2hex(pack('N2', time(), mt_rand(100000, 999999)));
172 }
173}
174
175function machine_bridge_default_cloud_base_url(): string
176{
177 $appUrl = getenv('APP_URL');
178 if (is_string($appUrl) && trim($appUrl) !== '') {
179 $normalized = rtrim(trim($appUrl), '/');
180 if (stripos($normalized, 'http://') === 0) {
181 $normalized = 'https://' . substr($normalized, 7);
182 }
183 return $normalized;
184 }
185
186 $host = trim((string)($_SERVER['HTTP_HOST'] ?? ''));
187 if ($host !== '') {
188 return 'https://' . $host;
189 }
190
191 return '';
192}
193
194function machine_probe_bridge_profile_endpoint(string $baseUrl, string $bridgeToken): array
195{
196 $base = rtrim(trim($baseUrl), '/');
197 if ($base === '' || $bridgeToken === '') {
198 return ['ok' => false, 'status' => 0, 'url' => '', 'message' => 'Cloud base URL and bridge token are required.'];
199 }
200
201 $url = $base . '/bridge_profile.php?bridge_token=' . rawurlencode($bridgeToken);
202 $context = stream_context_create([
203 'http' => [
204 'method' => 'GET',
205 'timeout' => 20,
206 'ignore_errors' => true,
207 ],
208 ]);
209
210 $body = @file_get_contents($url, false, $context);
211 $status = 0;
212 $responseHeaders = [];
213 if (function_exists('http_get_last_response_headers')) {
214 $headers = http_get_last_response_headers();
215 if (is_array($headers)) {
216 $responseHeaders = $headers;
