217 }
218 }
219
220 if ($responseHeaders !== []) {
221 foreach ($responseHeaders as $line) {
222 if (preg_match('/^HTTP\/\S+\s+(\d{3})/', (string)$line, $m)) {
223 $status = (int)$m[1];
224 break;
225 }
226 }
227 }
228
229 $decoded = is_string($body) ? json_decode($body, true) : null;
230 if ($status === 200 && is_array($decoded) && !empty($decoded['success'])) {
231 return ['ok' => true, 'status' => $status, 'url' => $url, 'message' => 'Bridge profile endpoint is reachable and token is valid.'];
232 }
233
234 $apiMessage = is_array($decoded) ? trim((string)($decoded['message'] ?? '')) : '';
235 if ($apiMessage === '') {
236 $apiMessage = 'Endpoint check failed with HTTP ' . $status . '.';
237 }
238
239 return ['ok' => false, 'status' => $status, 'url' => $url, 'message' => $apiMessage];
240}
241
242function machine_ensure_ingest_events_table(mysqli $conn): void
243{
244 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_ingest_events (
245 id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
246 received_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
247 source_ip VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT '',
248 source_node VARCHAR(120) DEFAULT '',
249 token_status VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'unknown',
250 http_status INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
251 events_received INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
252 events_accepted INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
253 auto_import TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
254 import_message TEXT NULL,
255 note VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '',
256 PRIMARY KEY (id),
257 KEY idx_received_at (received_at),
258 KEY idx_source_node (source_node),
259 KEY idx_token_status (token_status)
260 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
261
262 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE biometric_ingest_events ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_node VARCHAR(120) DEFAULT '' AFTER source_ip");
263 $conn->query("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_source_node ON biometric_ingest_events (source_node)");
264}
265
266function machine_fetch_ingest_health(mysqli $conn): array
267{
268 machine_ensure_ingest_events_table($conn);
269
270 $summary = [
271 'last_received_at' => '',
272 'last_source_ip' => '',
273 'last_source_node' => 'unknown-node',
274 'last_token_status' => 'unknown',
275 'last_http_status' => 0,
276 'total_today' => 0,
277 'accepted_today' => 0,
278 ];
279 $recent = [];
280
281 $summaryRes = $conn->query("SELECT
282 MAX(received_at) AS last_received_at,
283 SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(source_ip ORDER BY id DESC SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1) AS last_source_ip,
284 SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(source_node ORDER BY id DESC SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1) AS last_source_node,
285 SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(token_status ORDER BY id DESC SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1) AS last_token_status,
286 SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(http_status ORDER BY id DESC SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1) AS last_http_status,
287 SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(received_at) = CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_today,
288 SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(received_at) = CURRENT_DATE THEN events_accepted ELSE 0 END) AS accepted_today
289 FROM biometric_ingest_events");
290 if ($summaryRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
291 $row = $summaryRes->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
292 $summary['last_received_at'] = (string)($row['last_received_at'] ?? '');
293 $summary['last_source_ip'] = (string)($row['last_source_ip'] ?? '');
294 $summary['last_source_node'] = (string)($row['last_source_node'] ?? 'unknown-node');
295 $summary['last_token_status'] = (string)($row['last_token_status'] ?? 'unknown');
296 $summary['last_http_status'] = (int)($row['last_http_status'] ?? 0);
297 $summary['total_today'] = (int)($row['total_today'] ?? 0);
298 $summary['accepted_today'] = (int)($row['accepted_today'] ?? 0);
299 $summaryRes->close();
300 }
301
302 $recentRes = $conn->query("SELECT received_at, source_ip, source_node, token_status, http_status, events_received, events_accepted, note
303 FROM biometric_ingest_events
304 ORDER BY id DESC
305 LIMIT 8");
306 if ($recentRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
307 while ($row = $recentRes->fetch_assoc()) {
308 $recent[] = $row;
309 }
310 $recentRes->close();
311 }
312
313 return ['summary' => $summary, 'recent' => $recent];
314}
315
316function machine_fetch_bridge_runtime_status(mysqli $conn, int $pollSeconds): array
317{
318 machine_ensure_bridge_user_cache_table($conn);
319 machine_ensure_ingest_events_table($conn);
320 machine_ensure_bridge_command_queue_table($conn);
321 machine_ensure_bridge_heartbeat_table($conn);
322
323 $latestHeartbeatAt = '';
324 $heartbeatStatusText = '';
325 $heartbeatRes = $conn->query("SELECT updated_at, status_text FROM biometric_bridge_heartbeat ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1");
326 if ($heartbeatRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
327 $row = $heartbeatRes->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
328 $latestHeartbeatAt = (string)($row['updated_at'] ?? '');
329 $heartbeatStatusText = (string)($row['status_text'] ?? '');
330 $heartbeatRes->close();
331 }
332
333 $latestCacheAt = '';
334 $cacheRes = $conn->query("SELECT created_at FROM biometric_bridge_user_cache ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1");
335 if ($cacheRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
336 $row = $cacheRes->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
337 $latestCacheAt = (string)($row['created_at'] ?? '');
338 $cacheRes->close();
339 }
340
341 $latestIngestAt = '';
342 $ingestRes = $conn->query("SELECT received_at FROM biometric_ingest_events ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1");
343 if ($ingestRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
344 $row = $ingestRes->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
345 $latestIngestAt = (string)($row['received_at'] ?? '');
346 $ingestRes->close();
347 }
348
349 $latestCommandAt = '';
350 $commandRes = $conn->query("SELECT GREATEST(
351 COALESCE(MAX(claimed_at), '1970-01-01 00:00:00'),
352 COALESCE(MAX(completed_at), '1970-01-01 00:00:00'),
353 COALESCE(MAX(created_at), '1970-01-01 00:00:00')
354 ) AS latest_command_at
355 FROM biometric_bridge_command_queue");
356 if ($commandRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
357 $row = $commandRes->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
358 $latestCommandAt = (string)($row['latest_command_at'] ?? '');
359 $commandRes->close();
360 }
361
362 $workerHeartbeatAt = '';
363 $workerLogPath = dirname(__DIR__) . '/tools/bridge-worker.log';
364 $workerLogMtime = @filemtime($workerLogPath);
365 if ($workerLogMtime !== false && $workerLogMtime > 0) {
366 $workerHeartbeatAt = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', (int)$workerLogMtime);
367 }
368
369 $candidates = array_values(array_filter([$latestHeartbeatAt, $latestCacheAt, $latestIngestAt, $latestCommandAt, $workerHeartbeatAt], static function ($value): bool {
370 return trim((string)$value) !== '' && trim((string)$value) !== '1970-01-01 00:00:00';
371 }));
372
373 $lastSeenAt = '';
374 $lastSeenTs = 0;
375 foreach ($candidates as $candidate) {
376 $ts = strtotime((string)$candidate);
377 if ($ts !== false && $ts > $lastSeenTs) {
378 $lastSeenTs = $ts;
379 $lastSeenAt = (string)$candidate;
380 }
381 }
382
383 $pollSeconds = max(3, $pollSeconds);
384 $onlineThreshold = max(600, $pollSeconds * 12);
385 $ageSeconds = null;
386 $isOnline = false;
387
388 if ($lastSeenTs > 0) {
389 $ageSeconds = max(0, time() - $lastSeenTs);
390 $isOnline = $ageSeconds <= $onlineThreshold;
391 }
392
393 if ($lastSeenTs <= 0) {
394 return [
395 'label' => 'Bridge Status Unknown',
396 'badge_class' => 'secondary',
397 'detail' => 'No bridge activity seen yet.',
398 'last_seen_at' => '',
399 'is_online' => false,
400 ];
401 }
402
403 $pullStatus = strtolower($heartbeatStatusText);
404 $pullFailing = $isOnline && (
405 strpos($pullStatus, 'f20h pull failed') !== false
406 || strpos($pullStatus, 'device connection failed') !== false
407 || strpos($pullStatus, 'failed') !== false
408 );
409
410 return [
411 'label' => $pullFailing ? 'Bridge Online / F20H Pull Failing' : ($isOnline ? 'Bridge Online' : 'Bridge Offline'),
412 'badge_class' => $pullFailing ? 'warning' : ($isOnline ? 'success' : 'danger'),
413 'detail' => ($isOnline ? 'Last activity ' : 'Last activity stale: ') . $lastSeenAt
414 . ' (poll ' . $pollSeconds . 's, age ' . (int)$ageSeconds . 's).'
415 . ($heartbeatStatusText !== '' ? ' F20H: ' . $heartbeatStatusText : ''),
416 'last_seen_at' => $lastSeenAt,
417 'is_online' => $isOnline,
418 ];
419}
420
421function machine_bridge_cache_max_age_seconds(int $pollSeconds): int
422{
423 return max(600, $pollSeconds * 12);
424}
425
426function machine_ensure_bridge_heartbeat_table(mysqli $conn): void
427{
428 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_bridge_heartbeat (
429 id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
430 node_name VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
431 status_text VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
432 created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
433 updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
434 PRIMARY KEY (id),
435 UNIQUE KEY uniq_node_name (node_name),
436 KEY idx_updated_at (updated_at)
437 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
438}
439
440function machine_require_bridge_online_for_user_reads(mysqli $conn, int $pollSeconds): array
441{
442 $status = machine_fetch_bridge_runtime_status($conn, $pollSeconds);
443 if (!($status['is_online'] ?? false)) {
444 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge appears offline or stale. Reconnect bridge laptop to the router/F20H and wait for a fresh heartbeat before reading users.');
445 }
446
447 return $status;
448}
449
450function machine_ensure_bridge_profile_table(mysqli $conn): void
451{
452 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_bridge_profile (
453 id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
454 profile_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default',
455 selected_bridge_preset VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'laptop_custom',
456 router_name VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
457 bridge_name VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
458 bridge_enabled TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
459 bridge_token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
460 cloud_base_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
461 ingest_path VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '/api/f20h_ingest.php',
462 ingest_api_token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
463 poll_seconds INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
464 ip_address VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
465 gateway VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
466 mask VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '255.255.255.0',
467 port INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 5001,
468 device_number INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
469 communication_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
470 output_path VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
471 updated_by INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
472 created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
473 updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
474 PRIMARY KEY (id),
475 UNIQUE KEY uniq_profile_name (profile_name)
476 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
477
478 $hasPresetColumn = false;
479 $colRes = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM biometric_bridge_profile LIKE 'selected_bridge_preset'");
480 if ($colRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
481 $hasPresetColumn = $colRes->num_rows > 0;
482 $colRes->close();
483 }
484
485 if (!$hasPresetColumn) {
486 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE biometric_bridge_profile ADD COLUMN selected_bridge_preset VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'laptop_custom' AFTER profile_name");
487 }
488
489 $hasRouterNameColumn = false;
490 $routerColRes = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM biometric_bridge_profile LIKE 'router_name'");
491 if ($routerColRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
492 $hasRouterNameColumn = $routerColRes->num_rows > 0;
493 $routerColRes->close();
494 }
495 if (!$hasRouterNameColumn) {
496 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE biometric_bridge_profile ADD COLUMN router_name VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER selected_bridge_preset");
497 }
498
499 $hasBridgeNameColumn = false;
500 $bridgeColRes = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM biometric_bridge_profile LIKE 'bridge_name'");
501 if ($bridgeColRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
502 $hasBridgeNameColumn = $bridgeColRes->num_rows > 0;
503 $bridgeColRes->close();
504 }
505 if (!$hasBridgeNameColumn) {
506 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE biometric_bridge_profile ADD COLUMN bridge_name VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER router_name");
507 }
508}
509
510function machine_fetch_bridge_profile(mysqli $conn): array
511{
512 machine_ensure_bridge_profile_table($conn);
513
514 $defaults = [
515 'profile_name' => 'default',
516 'selected_bridge_preset' => 'laptop_custom',
517 'router_name' => 'Router 2',
518 'bridge_name' => 'Laptop Bridge Router 2',
519 'bridge_enabled' => 1,
520 'bridge_token' => '',
521 'cloud_base_url' => '',
522 'ingest_path' => '/api/f20h_ingest.php',
523 'ingest_api_token' => '',
524 'poll_seconds' => 30,
525 'ip_address' => '',
526 'gateway' => '',
527 'mask' => '255.255.255.0',
528 'port' => 5001,
529 'device_number' => 1,
530 'communication_password' => '0',
531 'output_path' => '',
532 'updated_at' => '',
533 ];
534
535 $res = $conn->query("SELECT * FROM biometric_bridge_profile WHERE profile_name = 'default' LIMIT 1");
536 if ($res instanceof mysqli_result) {
537 $row = $res->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
538 $res->close();
539 if ($row !== []) {
540 return array_merge($defaults, $row);
541 }
542 }
543
544 return $defaults;
545}
546
547function machine_save_bridge_profile(mysqli $conn, array $profile, int $updatedBy): void
548{
549 machine_ensure_bridge_profile_table($conn);
550
551 $hasPresetColumn = false;
552 $colRes = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM biometric_bridge_profile LIKE 'selected_bridge_preset'");
553 if ($colRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
554 $hasPresetColumn = $colRes->num_rows > 0;
555 $colRes->close();
556 }
557
558 $selectedBridgePreset = trim((string)($profile['selected_bridge_preset'] ?? 'laptop_custom'));
559 $routerName = trim((string)($profile['router_name'] ?? ''));
560 $bridgeName = trim((string)($profile['bridge_name'] ?? ''));
561 $bridgeEnabled = !empty($profile['bridge_enabled']) ? 1 : 0;
562 $bridgeToken = (string)($profile['bridge_token'] ?? '');
563 $cloudBaseUrl = (string)($profile['cloud_base_url'] ?? '');
564 $ingestPath = (string)($profile['ingest_path'] ?? '/api/f20h_ingest.php');
565 $ingestApiToken = (string)($profile['ingest_api_token'] ?? '');
566 $pollSeconds = max(5, (int)($profile['poll_seconds'] ?? 30));
567 $ipAddress = (string)($profile['ip_address'] ?? '');
568 $gateway = (string)($profile['gateway'] ?? '');
569 $mask = (string)($profile['mask'] ?? '255.255.255.0');
570 $port = max(1, (int)($profile['port'] ?? 5001));
571 $deviceNumber = max(1, (int)($profile['device_number'] ?? 1));
572 $communicationPassword = (string)($profile['communication_password'] ?? '0');
573 $outputPath = (string)($profile['output_path'] ?? '');
574
575 $stmt = null;
576 $lastPrepareError = '';
577
578 if ($hasPresetColumn) {
579 $stmt = $conn->prepare("INSERT INTO biometric_bridge_profile
580 (profile_name, selected_bridge_preset, router_name, bridge_name, bridge_enabled, bridge_token, cloud_base_url, ingest_path, ingest_api_token, poll_seconds, ip_address, gateway, mask, port, device_number, communication_password, output_path, updated_by)
581 VALUES ('default', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
582 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
583 selected_bridge_preset = VALUES(selected_bridge_preset),
584 router_name = VALUES(router_name),
585 bridge_name = VALUES(bridge_name),
586 bridge_enabled = VALUES(bridge_enabled),
587 bridge_token = VALUES(bridge_token),
588 cloud_base_url = VALUES(cloud_base_url),
589 ingest_path = VALUES(ingest_path),
590 ingest_api_token = VALUES(ingest_api_token),
591 poll_seconds = VALUES(poll_seconds),
592 ip_address = VALUES(ip_address),
593 gateway = VALUES(gateway),
594 mask = VALUES(mask),
595 port = VALUES(port),
596 device_number = VALUES(device_number),
597 communication_password = VALUES(communication_password),
598 output_path = VALUES(output_path),
599 updated_by = VALUES(updated_by)");
600
601 if ($stmt) {
602 $stmt->bind_param(
603 'sssissssisssiissi',
604 $selectedBridgePreset,
605 $routerName,
606 $bridgeName,
607 $bridgeEnabled,
608 $bridgeToken,
609 $cloudBaseUrl,
610 $ingestPath,
611 $ingestApiToken,
612 $pollSeconds,
613 $ipAddress,
614 $gateway,
615 $mask,
616 $port,
617 $deviceNumber,
618 $communicationPassword,
619 $outputPath,
620 $updatedBy
621 );
622 } else {
623 $lastPrepareError = (string)$conn->error;
624 }
625 }
626
627 if (!$stmt) {
628 $stmt = $conn->prepare("INSERT INTO biometric_bridge_profile
629 (profile_name, router_name, bridge_name, bridge_enabled, bridge_token, cloud_base_url, ingest_path, ingest_api_token, poll_seconds, ip_address, gateway, mask, port, device_number, communication_password, output_path, updated_by)
630 VALUES ('default', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
631 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
632 router_name = VALUES(router_name),
633 bridge_name = VALUES(bridge_name),
634 bridge_enabled = VALUES(bridge_enabled),
635 bridge_token = VALUES(bridge_token),
636 cloud_base_url = VALUES(cloud_base_url),
637 ingest_path = VALUES(ingest_path),
638 ingest_api_token = VALUES(ingest_api_token),
639 poll_seconds = VALUES(poll_seconds),
640 ip_address = VALUES(ip_address),
641 gateway = VALUES(gateway),
642 mask = VALUES(mask),
643 port = VALUES(port),
644 device_number = VALUES(device_number),
645 communication_password = VALUES(communication_password),
646 output_path = VALUES(output_path),
647 updated_by = VALUES(updated_by)");
648
649 if ($stmt) {
650 $stmt->bind_param(
651 'ssissssisssiissi',
652 $routerName,
653 $bridgeName,
654 $bridgeEnabled,
655 $bridgeToken,
656 $cloudBaseUrl,
657 $ingestPath,
658 $ingestApiToken,
659 $pollSeconds,
660 $ipAddress,
661 $gateway,
662 $mask,
663 $port,
664 $deviceNumber,
665 $communicationPassword,
666 $outputPath,
667 $updatedBy
668 );
669 } else {
670 $lastPrepareError = trim($lastPrepareError . ' | ' . (string)$conn->error, ' |');
671 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to prepare bridge profile save query. DB error: ' . $lastPrepareError);
672 }
673 }
674
675 if (!$stmt->execute()) {
676 $executeError = (string)$stmt->error;
677 $stmt->close();
678 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to execute bridge profile save query. DB error: ' . $executeError);
679 }
680 $stmt->close();
681}
682
683function machine_set_bridge_enabled(mysqli $conn, bool $enabled, int $updatedBy): void
684{
685 $profile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
686 $profile['bridge_enabled'] = $enabled ? 1 : 0;
687 machine_save_bridge_profile($conn, $profile, $updatedBy);
688}
689
690function machine_ensure_bridge_user_cache_table(mysqli $conn): void
691{
692 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_bridge_user_cache (
693 id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
694 source_node VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
695 users_json LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
696 users_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
697 created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
698 PRIMARY KEY (id),
699 KEY idx_created_at (created_at),
700 KEY idx_source_node (source_node)
701 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
702}
703
704function machine_ensure_bridge_command_queue_table(mysqli $conn): void
705{
706 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_bridge_command_queue (
707 id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
708 command_name VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL,
709 command_payload LONGTEXT NULL,
710 status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
711 requested_by INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
712 source VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'machine_manager',
713 created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
714 claimed_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
715 claimed_by VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
716 completed_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
717 result_text TEXT NULL,
718 attempts INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
719 PRIMARY KEY (id),
720 KEY idx_status_created (status, created_at),
721 KEY idx_claimed_by (claimed_by)
722 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
723}
724
725function machine_enqueue_bridge_command(mysqli $conn, string $commandName, array $payload, int $requestedBy): int
726{
727 machine_ensure_bridge_command_queue_table($conn);
728
729 $commandName = trim($commandName);
730 if ($commandName === '') {
731 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge command name is required.');
732 }
733
734 $payloadJson = json_encode($payload, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
735 if (!is_string($payloadJson)) {
736 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to encode bridge command payload.');
737 }
738
739 $stmt = $conn->prepare('INSERT INTO biometric_bridge_command_queue (command_name, command_payload, status, requested_by, source) VALUES (?, ?, \'queued\', ?, \'machine_manager\')');
740 if (!$stmt) {
741 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to prepare bridge command queue insert. DB error: ' . (string)$conn->error);
742 }
743
744 $stmt->bind_param('ssi', $commandName, $payloadJson, $requestedBy);
745 if (!$stmt->execute()) {
746 $error = (string)$stmt->error;
747 $stmt->close();
748 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to queue bridge command. DB error: ' . $error);
749 }
750
751 $commandId = (int)$stmt->insert_id;
752 $stmt->close();
753
754 machine_queue_watch_add($commandId);
755
756 return $commandId;
757}
758
759function machine_queue_watch_add(int $commandId): void
760{
761 if ($commandId <= 0) {
762 return;
763 }
764
765 $watchIds = [];
766 if (isset($_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids']) && is_array($_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids'])) {
767 $watchIds = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', $_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids']), static function (int $id): bool {
768 return $id > 0;
769 }));
770 }
771
772 if (!in_array($commandId, $watchIds, true)) {
773 $watchIds[] = $commandId;
774 }
775
776 if (count($watchIds) > 30) {
777 $watchIds = array_slice($watchIds, -30);
778 }
779
780 $_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids'] = $watchIds;
781}
782
783function machine_queue_watch_poll(mysqli $conn): array
784{
785 machine_ensure_bridge_command_queue_table($conn);
786
787 $watchIds = [];
788 if (isset($_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids']) && is_array($_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids'])) {
789 $watchIds = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', $_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids']), static function (int $id): bool {
790 return $id > 0;
791 }));
792 }
793
794 if ($watchIds === []) {
795 $_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids'] = [];
796 return ['watching' => [], 'completed' => []];
797 }
798
799 $placeholders = implode(',', array_map('intval', $watchIds));
800 $completed = [];
801 $stillWatching = [];
802
803 $res = $conn->query("SELECT id, command_name, status, completed_at, result_text FROM biometric_bridge_command_queue WHERE id IN ({$placeholders})");
804 if ($res instanceof mysqli_result) {
805 while ($row = $res->fetch_assoc()) {
806 $id = (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
807 if ($id <= 0) {
808 continue;
809 }
810
811 $status = strtolower(trim((string)($row['status'] ?? 'queued')));
812 if (in_array($status, ['succeeded', 'failed'], true)) {
813 $completed[] = [
814 'id' => $id,
815 'command_name' => (string)($row['command_name'] ?? ''),
816 'status' => $status,
817 'completed_at' => (string)($row['completed_at'] ?? ''),
818 'result_text' => (string)($row['result_text'] ?? ''),
819 ];
820 } else {
821 $stillWatching[] = $id;
822 }
823 }
824 $res->close();
825 }
826
827 $_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids'] = array_values(array_unique($stillWatching));
828
829 return [
830 'watching' => $_SESSION['machine_queue_watch_ids'],
831 'completed' => $completed,
832 ];
833}
834
835function machine_fetch_bridge_command_queue(mysqli $conn, int $limit = 20): array
836{
837 machine_ensure_bridge_command_queue_table($conn);
838
839 $limit = max(1, min(100, $limit));
840 $summary = [
841 'queued' => 0,
842 'claimed' => 0,
843 'succeeded' => 0,
844 'failed' => 0,
845 ];
846 $rows = [];
847
848 $summaryRes = $conn->query("SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS total
849 FROM biometric_bridge_command_queue
850 GROUP BY status");
851 if ($summaryRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
852 while ($row = $summaryRes->fetch_assoc()) {
853 $status = strtolower(trim((string)($row['status'] ?? '')));
854 $total = (int)($row['total'] ?? 0);
855 if (array_key_exists($status, $summary)) {
856 $summary[$status] = $total;
857 }
858 }
859 $summaryRes->close();
860 }
861
862 $rowsRes = $conn->query("SELECT id, command_name, status, requested_by, source, created_at, claimed_at, claimed_by, completed_at, result_text, attempts
863 FROM biometric_bridge_command_queue
864 ORDER BY id DESC
865 LIMIT {$limit}");
866 if ($rowsRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
867 while ($row = $rowsRes->fetch_assoc()) {
868 $rows[] = $row;
869 }
870 $rowsRes->close();
871 }
872
873 return [
874 'summary' => $summary,
875 'rows' => $rows,
876 ];
877}
878
879function machine_ensure_fingerprint_cleanup_log_table(mysqli $conn): void
880{
881 $conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_fingerprint_cleanup_log (
882 id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
883 student_id INT NOT NULL,
884 finger_id INT NOT NULL,
885 command_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
886 status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
887 last_message TEXT NULL,
888 queued_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
889 completed_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
890 updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
891 PRIMARY KEY (id),
892 UNIQUE KEY uniq_student_finger (student_id, finger_id),
893 KEY idx_command_id (command_id),
894 KEY idx_status (status)
895 ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
896}
897
898function machine_fetch_fingerprint_cleanup_log(mysqli $conn, int $limit = 20): array
899{
900 machine_ensure_fingerprint_cleanup_log_table($conn);
901 machine_ensure_bridge_command_queue_table($conn);
902
903 $limit = max(1, min(100, $limit));
904 $summary = [
905 'queued' => 0,
906 'claimed' => 0,
907 'succeeded' => 0,
908 'failed' => 0,
909 ];
910 $rows = [];
911
912 $summaryRes = $conn->query("SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS total
913 FROM biometric_fingerprint_cleanup_log
914 GROUP BY status");
915 if ($summaryRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
916 while ($row = $summaryRes->fetch_assoc()) {
917 $status = strtolower(trim((string)($row['status'] ?? '')));
918 $total = (int)($row['total'] ?? 0);
919 if (array_key_exists($status, $summary)) {
920 $summary[$status] = $total;
921 }
922 }
923 $summaryRes->close();
924 }
925
926 $rowsRes = $conn->query("SELECT
927 l.id,
928 l.student_id,
929 l.finger_id,
930 l.command_id,
931 l.status,
932 l.last_message,
933 l.queued_at,
934 l.completed_at,
935 q.status AS command_status,
936 q.result_text,
937 q.attempts,
938 s.student_id AS student_number,
939 s.first_name,
940 s.last_name
941 FROM biometric_fingerprint_cleanup_log l
942 LEFT JOIN biometric_bridge_command_queue q ON q.id = l.command_id
943 LEFT JOIN students s ON s.id = l.student_id
944 ORDER BY l.id DESC
945 LIMIT {$limit}");
946 if ($rowsRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
947 while ($row = $rowsRes->fetch_assoc()) {
948 $rows[] = $row;
949 }
950 $rowsRes->close();
951 }
952
953 return [
954 'summary' => $summary,
955 'rows' => $rows,
956 ];
957}
958
959function machine_load_user_list_from_bridge_cache(mysqli $conn, &$userListRaw, &$userListDecoded, ?int $maxAgeSeconds = null): array
960{
961 machine_ensure_bridge_user_cache_table($conn);
962
963 $res = $conn->query("SELECT source_node, users_json, users_count, created_at FROM biometric_bridge_user_cache ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1");
964 $row = ($res instanceof mysqli_result) ? ($res->fetch_assoc() ?: []) : [];
965 if ($res instanceof mysqli_result) {
966 $res->close();
967 }
968
969 if ($row === []) {
970 throw new RuntimeException('No bridge user cache available yet. Start the bridge worker first, then click Read All Users again.');
971 }
972
973 $json = trim((string)($row['users_json'] ?? ''));
974 if ($json === '') {
975 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge user cache is empty.');
976 }
977
978 $decoded = json_decode($json, true);
979 if (!is_array($decoded)) {
980 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge user cache payload is invalid JSON.');
981 }
982
983 // Normalize to the same shape expected by machine_extract_rows().
984 if (array_keys($decoded) !== range(0, count($decoded) - 1) && isset($decoded['users']) && is_array($decoded['users'])) {
985 $decoded = $decoded['users'];
986 $json = json_encode($decoded, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
987 }
988
989 $createdAt = trim((string)($row['created_at'] ?? ''));
990 $ageSeconds = null;
991 if ($createdAt !== '') {
992 $createdTs = strtotime($createdAt);
993 if ($createdTs !== false && $createdTs > 0) {
994 $ageSeconds = max(0, time() - $createdTs);
995 }
996 }
997
998 if ($maxAgeSeconds !== null) {
999 if ($ageSeconds === null) {
1000 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge user cache timestamp is missing. Run bridge worker user sync, then click Read All Users again.');
1001 }
1002 if ($ageSeconds > max(1, $maxAgeSeconds)) {
1003 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge user cache is stale (' . (int)$ageSeconds . 's old). Machine may be disconnected. Run bridge worker sync and try again.');
1004 }
1005 }
1006
1007 $userListDecoded = $decoded;
1008 $userListRaw = is_string($json) ? $json : json_encode($decoded, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
1009
1010 return [
1011 'source_node' => (string)($row['source_node'] ?? ''),
1012 'users_count' => (int)($row['users_count'] ?? count(machine_extract_rows($userListDecoded))),
1013 'created_at' => $createdAt,
1014 'age_seconds' => $ageSeconds,
1015 ];
1016}
1017
1018function machine_render_pairs(array $data): string
1019{
1020 global $isAdmin;
1021 $html = '';
1022 foreach ($data as $key => $value) {
1023 if (is_array($value)) {
1024 $value = json_encode($value, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
1025 }
1026 if (!$isAdmin && in_array(strtolower((string)$key), ['cardno', 'card_no', 'card'], true)) {
1027 $value = machine_mask_card_number((string)$value);
1028 }
1029 $html .= '<div class="col-md-6 col-xl-4"><div class="border rounded p-3 h-100">';
1030 $html .= '<div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">' . machine_h($key) . '</div>';
1031 $html .= '<div class="fw-semibold text-break">' . machine_h((string)$value) . '</div>';
1032 $html .= '</div></div>';
1033 }
1034 return $html;
1035}
1036
1037function machine_extract_rows($decoded): array
1038{
1039 if (!is_array($decoded)) {
1040 return [];
1041 }
1042
1043 $isList = array_keys($decoded) === range(0, count($decoded) - 1);
1044 if ($isList) {
1045 return array_values(array_filter($decoded, 'is_array'));
1046 }
1047
1048 if (isset($decoded['data']) && is_array($decoded['data'])) {
1049 return machine_extract_rows($decoded['data']);
1050 }
1051
1052 return [];
1053}
1054
1055function machine_row_value(array $row, array $keys): string
1056{
1057 foreach ($keys as $key) {
1058 if (array_key_exists($key, $row) && $row[$key] !== null && $row[$key] !== '') {
1059 return is_array($row[$key])
1060 ? json_encode($row[$key], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES)
1061 : (string)$row[$key];
1062 }
1063 }
1064
1065 return '';
1066}
1067
1068function machine_user_label(array $row): string
1069{
1070 global $isAdmin;
1071 $name = trim(machine_row_value($row, ['name', 'Name']));
1072 $userId = trim(machine_row_value($row, ['id', 'ID', 'user_id', 'userId']));
1073 $cardNo = trim(machine_row_value($row, ['cardno', 'cardNo', 'CardNo']));
1074
1075 $parts = [];
1076 if ($name !== '') {
1077 $parts[] = $name;
1078 }
1079 if ($userId !== '') {
1080 $parts[] = 'ID ' . $userId;
1081 }
1082 if ($cardNo !== '') {
1083 $parts[] = 'Card ' . ($isAdmin ? $cardNo : machine_mask_card_number($cardNo));
1084 }
1085
1086 return $parts !== [] ? implode(' | ', $parts) : 'Machine user';
1087}
1088
1089function machine_mask_card_number(string $value): string
1090{
1091 $digits = preg_replace('/\s+/', '', trim($value));
1092 if ($digits === '') {
1093 return '-';
1094 }
1095 if (strlen($digits) <= 4) {
1096 return str_repeat('*', max(strlen($digits) - 1, 0)) . substr($digits, -1);
1097 }
1098 return str_repeat('*', max(strlen($digits) - 4, 0)) . substr($digits, -4);
1099}
1100
1101function machine_person_label(array $anomaly): string
1102{
1103 $studentName = trim((string)($anomaly['student_first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($anomaly['student_last_name'] ?? ''));
1104 if ($studentName !== '') {
1105 $studentNumber = trim((string)($anomaly['student_number'] ?? ''));
1106 return $studentNumber !== '' ? ($studentName . ' (' . $studentNumber . ')') : $studentName;
1107 }
1108
1109 $userName = trim((string)($anomaly['mapped_user_name'] ?? ''));
1110 if ($userName !== '') {
1111 return $userName;
1112 }
1113
1114 $username = trim((string)($anomaly['mapped_username'] ?? ''));
1115 if ($username !== '') {
1116 return $username;
1117 }
1118
1119 return 'Unknown user';
1120}
1121
1122function machine_decode_raw_log_entry(string $rawData): array
1123{
1124 $decoded = json_decode($rawData, true);
1125 return is_array($decoded) ? $decoded : [];
1126}
1127
1128function machine_fetch_fingerprint_identity_map(mysqli $conn): array
1129{
1130 $map = [];
1131 $res = $conn->query("
1132 SELECT
1133 m.finger_id,
1134 m.user_id,
1135 u.name AS mapped_user_name,
1136 u.username AS mapped_username,
1137 s.first_name,
1138 s.last_name,
1139 s.student_id AS student_number
1140 FROM fingerprint_user_map m
1141 LEFT JOIN users u ON m.user_id = u.id
1142 LEFT JOIN students s ON s.user_id = m.user_id
1143 ");
1144 if ($res instanceof mysqli_result) {
1145 while ($row = $res->fetch_assoc()) {
1146 $map[(int)($row['finger_id'] ?? 0)] = $row;
1147 }
1148 $res->close();
1149 }
1150
1151 return $map;
1152}
1153
1154function machine_identity_label(array $identity): string
1155{
1156 $studentName = trim((string)($identity['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($identity['last_name'] ?? ''));
1157 if ($studentName !== '') {
1158 $studentNumber = trim((string)($identity['student_number'] ?? ''));
1159 return $studentNumber !== '' ? ($studentName . ' (' . $studentNumber . ')') : $studentName;
1160 }
1161
1162 $userName = trim((string)($identity['mapped_user_name'] ?? ''));
1163 if ($userName !== '') {
1164 return $userName;
1165 }
1166
1167 $username = trim((string)($identity['mapped_username'] ?? ''));
1168 if ($username !== '') {
1169 return $username;
1170 }
1171
1172 return 'Unknown user';
1173}
1174
1175function machine_load_user_list_into_state(&$userListRaw, &$userListDecoded): void
1176{
1177 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('get-user-list');
1178 if (!$result['success']) {
1179 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1180 }
1181
1182 $userListRaw = biometric_machine_clean_output((string)($result['text'] ?? ''));
1183 $userListDecoded = biometric_machine_decode_data($userListRaw);
1184}
1185
1186function machine_load_user_details_into_state(int $selectedUserId, &$userDetailsRaw, &$userDetailsDecoded): void
1187{
1188 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('get-user', [(string)$selectedUserId]);
1189 if (!$result['success']) {
1190 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1191 }
1192
1193 $userDetailsRaw = biometric_machine_clean_output((string)($result['text'] ?? ''));
1194 $userDetailsDecoded = biometric_machine_decode_data($userDetailsRaw);
1195}
1196
1197if (isset($_SESSION['machine_manager_flash']) && is_array($_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'])) {
1198 $flashType = (string)($_SESSION['machine_manager_flash']['type'] ?? 'info');
1199 $flashMessage = (string)($_SESSION['machine_manager_flash']['message'] ?? '');
1200 unset($_SESSION['machine_manager_flash']);
1201}
1202
1203if ((int)($_GET['queue_watch_status'] ?? 0) === 1) {
1204 header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
1205 try {
1206 $payload = machine_queue_watch_poll($conn);
1207 echo json_encode([
1208 'success' => true,
1209 'watching' => $payload['watching'] ?? [],
1210 'completed' => $payload['completed'] ?? [],
1211 ], JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
1212 } catch (Throwable $e) {
1213 http_response_code(500);
1214 echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()]);
1215 }
1216 exit;
1217}
1218
1219if ((int)($_GET['load_users'] ?? 0) === 1) {
1220 try {
1221 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1222 $bridgeProfile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
1223 $bridgePollSeconds = max(5, (int)($bridgeProfile['poll_seconds'] ?? 30));
1224 machine_require_bridge_online_for_user_reads($conn, $bridgePollSeconds);
1225 machine_load_user_list_from_bridge_cache(
1226 $conn,
1227 $userListRaw,
1228 $userListDecoded,
1229 machine_bridge_cache_max_age_seconds($bridgePollSeconds)
1230 );
1231 } else {
1232 machine_load_user_list_into_state($userListRaw, $userListDecoded);
1233 }
1234 } catch (Throwable $e) {
1235 if ($flashMessage === '') {
1236 $flashType = 'danger';
1237 $flashMessage = $e->getMessage();
1238 }
1239 }
1240}
1241
1242if ($selectedUserId > 0 && (int)($_GET['load_user'] ?? 0) === 1) {
1243 try {
1244 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1245 $bridgeProfile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
1246 $bridgePollSeconds = max(5, (int)($bridgeProfile['poll_seconds'] ?? 30));
1247 machine_require_bridge_online_for_user_reads($conn, $bridgePollSeconds);
1248 machine_load_user_list_from_bridge_cache(
1249 $conn,
1250 $userListRaw,
1251 $userListDecoded,
1252 machine_bridge_cache_max_age_seconds($bridgePollSeconds)
1253 );
1254 $rows = machine_extract_rows($userListDecoded);
1255 $matched = null;
1256 foreach ($rows as $row) {
1257 $rowUserId = (int)trim(machine_row_value($row, ['id', 'ID', 'user_id', 'userId', 'EnrollNumber']));
1258 if ($rowUserId === $selectedUserId) {
1259 $matched = $row;
1260 break;
1261 }
1262 }
1263
1264 if (!is_array($matched)) {
1265 throw new RuntimeException('User ID not found in latest bridge cache. Click Read All Users first to refresh cache.');
1266 }
1267
1268 $userDetailsDecoded = $matched;
1269 $userDetailsRaw = (string)json_encode($matched, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
1270 } else {
1271 machine_load_user_details_into_state($selectedUserId, $userDetailsRaw, $userDetailsDecoded);
1272 }
1273 } catch (Throwable $e) {
1274 if ($flashMessage === '') {
1275 $flashType = 'danger';
1276 $flashMessage = $e->getMessage();
1277 }
1278 }
1279}
1280
1281if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
1282 $action = trim((string)($_POST['machine_action'] ?? ''));
1283
1284 try {
1285 if ($action === 'delete_bridge_profile') {
1286 $profileName = trim((string)($_POST['profile_name'] ?? ''));
1287 if ($profileName === '' || strtolower($profileName) === 'default') {
1288 throw new RuntimeException('Cannot delete the default or empty profile.');
1289 }
1290 machine_delete_bridge_profile($conn, $profileName);
1291 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Bridge profile deleted: ' . $profileName];
1292 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1293 }
1294 $adminOnlyActions = [
1295 'save_user_json',
1296 'save_config',
1297 'save_network',
1298 'save_connector_config',
1299 'save_bridge_profile',
1300 'quick_fill_bridge_router_1',
1301 'pause_bridge_for_enrollment',
1302 'resume_bridge_after_enrollment',
1303 'revive_bridge_connection',
1304 'retry_fingerprint_cleanup',
1305 'retry_all_fingerprint_cleanup',
1306 'quick_fill_bridge_router_2',
1307 'open_restart_bridge_shell',
1308 'open_bridge_log_tail_shell',
1309 'clear_records',
1310 'clear_users',
1311 'clear_admin',
1312 'restart',
1313 'restart_windows',
1314 'save_device_identity',
1315 ];
1316 if (in_array($action, $adminOnlyActions, true) && !$isAdmin) {
1317 throw new RuntimeException('Only admins can perform that machine action.');
1318 }
1319
1320 $connectorBoundActions = [
1321 'save_user_json',
1322 'save_user_name',
1323 'save_list_user_name',
1324 'delete_user',
1325 'delete_fingerprint',
1326 'get_device_info',
1327 'get_config',
1328 'save_config',
1329 'get_network',
1330 'save_network',
1331 'get_time',
1332 'set_time',
1333 'clear_records',
1334 'clear_users',
1335 'clear_admin',
1336 'restart',
1337 'save_device_identity',
1338 ];
1339 $cloudRelayActions = [
1340 'save_user_name',
1341 'save_list_user_name',
1342 'delete_user',
1343 'delete_fingerprint',
1344 'set_time',
1345 'clear_records',
1346 'clear_users',
1347 'clear_admin',
1348 'restart',
1349 'save_device_identity',
1350 ];
1351 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime() && in_array($action, $connectorBoundActions, true) && !in_array($action, $cloudRelayActions, true)) {
1352 throw new RuntimeException('Direct machine commands are disabled in cloud runtime. Use F20H direct ingest by posting events to /api/f20h_ingest.php, then run Sync Now to reconcile logs into attendance.');
1353 }
1354
1355 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime() && in_array($action, ['open_restart_bridge_shell', 'open_bridge_log_tail_shell', 'repair_bridge_task_now', 'restart_bridge_task_now'], true)) {
1356 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge shell launcher actions are available only on the local Windows bridge computer.');
1357 }
1358
1359 switch ($action) {
1360 case 'revive_bridge_connection':
1361 $bridgeProfile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
1362 $bridgeProfile['bridge_enabled'] = 1;
1363 $bridgeProfile['poll_seconds'] = max(10, (int)($bridgeProfile['poll_seconds'] ?? 30));
1364 machine_save_bridge_profile($conn, $bridgeProfile, (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0));
1365
1366 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1367 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1368 'type' => 'warning',
1369 'message' => 'Bridge profile revived and left enabled. If the worker is stale, open this page on the Windows bridge PC and click Revive Bridge Connection there so BioTern can restart the local scheduled task.',
1370 ];
1371 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1372 }
1373
1374 $bridgeToken = trim((string)($bridgeProfile['bridge_token'] ?? ''));
1375 if ($bridgeToken === '') {
1376 $envBridgeToken = getenv('BIOTERN_BRIDGE_TOKEN');
1377 if (is_string($envBridgeToken) && trim($envBridgeToken) !== '') {
1378 $bridgeToken = trim($envBridgeToken);
1379 }
1380 }
1381 if ($bridgeToken === '') {
1382 $bridgeToken = trim((string)($bridgeProfile['ingest_api_token'] ?? ''));
1383 }
1384 if ($bridgeToken === '') {
1385 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge token is missing. Save the Bridge Profile first, then try revive again.');
1386 }
1387
1388 $baseUrl = trim((string)($bridgeProfile['cloud_base_url'] ?? ''));
1389 if ($baseUrl === '') {
1390 $baseUrl = machine_bridge_default_cloud_base_url();
1391 }
1392 if ($baseUrl === '') {
1393 throw new RuntimeException('Cloud base URL is missing. Save the Bridge Profile first, then try revive again.');
1394 }
1395
1396 $workspaceRoot = dirname(__DIR__);
1397 $repairResult = machine_run_local_powershell([
1398 '-NoProfile',
1399 '-ExecutionPolicy',
1400 'Bypass',
1401 '-File',
1402 $workspaceRoot . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'tools' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'install-bridge-worker-task.ps1',
1403 '-SiteBaseUrl',
1404 $baseUrl,
1405 '-BridgeToken',
1406 $bridgeToken,
1407 '-TaskName',
1408 'BioTernBridgeWorker',
1409 '-PreferLocalConnectorNetwork',
1410 '0',
1411 ]);
1412 if ((int)$repairResult['exit_code'] !== 0) {
1413 throw new RuntimeException($repairResult['output'] !== '' ? $repairResult['output'] : 'Bridge revive repair command failed.');
1414 }
1415
1416 $restartResult = machine_run_local_powershell([
1417 '-NoProfile',
1418 '-ExecutionPolicy',
1419 'Bypass',
1420 '-File',
1421 $workspaceRoot . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'tools' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'manage-bridge-worker-task.ps1',
1422 '-Action',
1423 'restart',
1424 '-TaskName',
1425 'BioTernBridgeWorker',
1426 ]);
1427 if ((int)$restartResult['exit_code'] !== 0) {
1428 throw new RuntimeException($restartResult['output'] !== '' ? $restartResult['output'] : 'Bridge revive restart command failed.');
1429 }
1430
1431 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1432 'type' => 'success',
1433 'message' => trim("Bridge connection revived. Profile enabled, auto-start task repaired, and BioTernBridgeWorker restarted.\n"
1434 . trim((string)$repairResult['output']) . "\n"
1435 . trim((string)$restartResult['output'])),
1436 ];
1437 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1438
1439 case 'repair_bridge_task_now':
1440 $bridgeProfile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
1441 $bridgeToken = trim((string)($bridgeProfile['bridge_token'] ?? ''));
1442 if ($bridgeToken === '') {
1443 $envBridgeToken = getenv('BIOTERN_BRIDGE_TOKEN');
1444 if (is_string($envBridgeToken) && trim($envBridgeToken) !== '') {
1445 $bridgeToken = trim($envBridgeToken);
1446 }
1447 }
1448 if ($bridgeToken === '') {
1449 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge token is missing. Save the Bridge Profile first, then try repair again.');
1450 }
1451
1452 $baseUrl = trim((string)($bridgeProfile['cloud_base_url'] ?? ''));
1453 if ($baseUrl === '') {
1454 $baseUrl = machine_bridge_default_cloud_base_url();
1455 }
1456 if ($baseUrl === '') {
1457 throw new RuntimeException('Cloud base URL is missing. Save the Bridge Profile first, then try repair again.');
1458 }
1459
1460 $workspaceRoot = dirname(__DIR__);
1461 $result = machine_run_local_powershell([
1462 '-NoProfile',
1463 '-ExecutionPolicy',
1464 'Bypass',
1465 '-File',
1466 $workspaceRoot . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'tools' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'install-bridge-worker-task.ps1',
1467 '-SiteBaseUrl',
1468 $baseUrl,
1469 '-BridgeToken',
1470 $bridgeToken,
1471 '-TaskName',
1472 'BioTernBridgeWorker',
1473 '-PreferLocalConnectorNetwork',
1474 '0',
1475 ]);
1476
1477 if ((int)$result['exit_code'] !== 0) {
1478 throw new RuntimeException($result['output'] !== '' ? $result['output'] : 'Bridge repair command failed.');
1479 }
1480
1481 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1482 'type' => 'success',
1483 'message' => 'Bridge auto-start task repaired and started.' . ($result['output'] !== '' ? "\n" . $result['output'] : ''),
1484 ];
1485 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1486
1487 case 'restart_bridge_task_now':
1488 $workspaceRoot = dirname(__DIR__);
1489 $result = machine_run_local_powershell([
1490 '-NoProfile',
1491 '-ExecutionPolicy',
1492 'Bypass',
1493 '-File',
1494 $workspaceRoot . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'tools' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'manage-bridge-worker-task.ps1',
1495 '-Action',
1496 'restart',
1497 '-TaskName',
1498 'BioTernBridgeWorker',
1499 ]);
1500
1501 if ((int)$result['exit_code'] !== 0) {
1502 throw new RuntimeException($result['output'] !== '' ? $result['output'] : 'Bridge restart command failed.');
1503 }
1504
1505 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1506 'type' => 'success',
1507 'message' => 'Bridge worker restarted.' . ($result['output'] !== '' ? "\n" . $result['output'] : ''),
1508 ];
1509 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1510
1511 case 'open_restart_bridge_shell':
1512 machine_open_restart_bridge_shell(dirname(__DIR__));
1513 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1514 'type' => 'success',
1515 'message' => 'Opened PowerShell for bridge worker restart.',
1516 ];
1517 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1518
1519 case 'open_bridge_log_tail_shell':
1520 machine_open_bridge_log_tail_shell(dirname(__DIR__));
1521 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1522 'type' => 'success',
1523 'message' => 'Opened PowerShell bridge log tail.',
1524 ];
1525 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1526
1527 case 'sync':
1528 $existingConfig = json_decode($machineConfigJson, true);
1529 if (!is_array($existingConfig)) {
1530 $existingConfig = [];
1531 }
1532
1533 $syncMode = strtolower(trim((string)($existingConfig['syncMode'] ?? 'direct_ingest')));
1534 if (!in_array($syncMode, ['direct_ingest', 'connector_fallback'], true)) {
1535 $syncMode = 'direct_ingest';
1536 }
1537
1538 $cloudRuntime = machine_is_cloud_runtime();
1539 $connectorText = '';
1540
1541 if ($syncMode === 'connector_fallback' && !$cloudRuntime) {
1542 $connector = biometric_machine_run_command('sync');
1543 if (!$connector['success']) {
1544 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $connector['output'] ?? [])));
1545 }
1546 $connectorText = trim((string)($connector['text'] ?? ''));
1547 } else {
1548 $connectorText = 'Connector step skipped. Processing direct-ingest queue from database.';
1549 }
1550
1551 $importStats = run_biometric_auto_import_stats();
1552 $importMessage = (string)($importStats['message'] ?? 'Biometric sync complete.');
1553 $flashLevel = 'success';
1554 if ($cloudRuntime && (int)($importStats['raw_inserted'] ?? 0) === 0 && (int)($importStats['processed_logs'] ?? 0) === 0) {
1555 $bridgeProfile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
1556 $bridgePollSeconds = max(5, (int)($bridgeProfile['poll_seconds'] ?? 30));
1557 $bridgeStatus = machine_fetch_bridge_runtime_status($conn, $bridgePollSeconds);
1558 if (empty($bridgeStatus['is_online'])) {
1559 $flashLevel = 'danger';
1560 $importMessage .= "\nBridge appears offline/stale. Start bridge worker on the bridge PC and verify router/F20H connectivity.";
1561 } else {
1562 $importMessage .= "\nBridge is online; no new biometric logs were waiting to import.";
1563 }
1564 }
1565 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1566 'type' => $flashLevel,
1567 'message' => trim($connectorText . "\n" . $importMessage),
1568 ];
1569 machine_redirect_after_post(['load_users' => 1]);
1570
1571 case 'list_users':
1572 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1573 $bridgeProfile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
1574 $bridgePollSeconds = max(5, (int)($bridgeProfile['poll_seconds'] ?? 30));
1575 machine_require_bridge_online_for_user_reads($conn, $bridgePollSeconds);
1576 $cacheMeta = machine_load_user_list_from_bridge_cache(
1577 $conn,
1578 $userListRaw,
1579 $userListDecoded,
1580 machine_bridge_cache_max_age_seconds($bridgePollSeconds)
1581 );
1582 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1583 'type' => 'success',
1584 'message' => 'Bridge user cache loaded from '
1585 . (($cacheMeta['source_node'] ?? '') !== '' ? ($cacheMeta['source_node'] . ' ') : '')
1586 . '(' . (int)($cacheMeta['users_count'] ?? 0) . ' users, updated ' . (string)($cacheMeta['created_at'] ?? '-')
1587 . ', age ' . (int)($cacheMeta['age_seconds'] ?? -1) . 's).',
1588 ];
1589 } else {
1590 machine_load_user_list_into_state($userListRaw, $userListDecoded);
1591 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Machine user list loaded.'];
1592 }
1593 machine_redirect_after_post(['load_users' => 1]);
1594
1595 case 'get_user':
1596 if ($selectedUserId <= 0) {
1597 throw new RuntimeException('Enter a valid user ID.');
1598 }
1599 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1600 $bridgeProfile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
1601 $bridgePollSeconds = max(5, (int)($bridgeProfile['poll_seconds'] ?? 30));
1602 machine_require_bridge_online_for_user_reads($conn, $bridgePollSeconds);
1603 $cacheMeta = machine_load_user_list_from_bridge_cache(
1604 $conn,
1605 $userListRaw,
1606 $userListDecoded,
1607 machine_bridge_cache_max_age_seconds($bridgePollSeconds)
1608 );
1609 $rows = machine_extract_rows($userListDecoded);
1610 $matched = null;
1611 foreach ($rows as $row) {
1612 $rowUserId = (int)trim(machine_row_value($row, ['id', 'ID', 'user_id', 'userId', 'EnrollNumber']));
1613 if ($rowUserId === $selectedUserId) {
1614 $matched = $row;
1615 break;
1616 }
1617 }
1618
1619 if (!is_array($matched)) {
1620 throw new RuntimeException('User ID not found in latest bridge cache. Click Read All Users first to refresh cache.');
1621 }
1622
1623 $userDetailsDecoded = $matched;
1624 $userDetailsRaw = (string)json_encode($matched, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
1625 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1626 'type' => 'success',
1627 'message' => 'Machine user record loaded from bridge cache (' . (string)($cacheMeta['created_at'] ?? '-') . ').',
1628 ];
1629 } else {
1630 machine_load_user_details_into_state($selectedUserId, $userDetailsRaw, $userDetailsDecoded);
1631 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Machine user record loaded.'];
1632 }
1633 machine_redirect_after_post(['selected_user_id' => $selectedUserId, 'load_users' => 1, 'load_user' => 1]);
1634
1635 case 'save_user_json':
1636 if ($userDetailsRaw === '') {
1637 throw new RuntimeException('User JSON cannot be empty.');
1638 }
1639 $tmp = tempnam(sys_get_temp_dir(), 'biotern_user_');
1640 file_put_contents($tmp, $userDetailsRaw);
1641 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('set-user', [$tmp]);
1642 @unlink($tmp);
1643 if (!$result['success']) {
1644 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1645 }
1646 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Machine user updated.'];
1647 biometric_ops_log_audit($conn, (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0), $role, 'machine_user_updated_raw', 'machine_user', (string)$selectedUserId, ['user_id' => $selectedUserId]);
1648 machine_redirect_after_post(['selected_user_id' => $selectedUserId, 'load_users' => 1, 'load_user' => 1]);
1649
1650 case 'save_user_name':
1651 $newName = trim((string)($_POST['user_name'] ?? ''));
1652 if ($newName === '' || $userDetailsRaw === '') {
1653 throw new RuntimeException('Load a user and enter a name first.');
1654 }
1655 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1656 if ($selectedUserId <= 0) {
1657 throw new RuntimeException('Load a valid machine user first.');
1658 }
1659 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
1660 $conn,
1661 'rename_user',
1662 ['user_id' => $selectedUserId, 'new_name' => $newName],
1663 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
1664 );
1665 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Rename command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '. Bridge runs in background via Scheduled Task; keep the laptop logged in and connected to the same LAN, then click Read All Users after a few seconds.'];
1666 machine_redirect_after_post(['selected_user_id' => $selectedUserId, 'load_users' => 1, 'load_user' => 1]);
1667 }
1668 $patchedJson = biometric_machine_patch_user_name($userDetailsRaw, $newName);
1669 $tmp = tempnam(sys_get_temp_dir(), 'biotern_user_');
1670 file_put_contents($tmp, $patchedJson);
1671 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('set-user', [$tmp]);
1672 @unlink($tmp);
1673 if (!$result['success']) {
1674 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1675 }
1676 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Machine user name updated.'];
1677 biometric_ops_log_audit($conn, (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0), $role, 'machine_user_renamed', 'machine_user', (string)$selectedUserId, ['user_id' => $selectedUserId, 'name' => $newName]);
1678 machine_redirect_after_post(['selected_user_id' => $selectedUserId, 'load_users' => 1, 'load_user' => 1]);
1679
1680 case 'save_list_user_name':
1681 $newName = trim((string)($_POST['inline_user_name'] ?? ''));
1682 $inlineUserId = (int)($_POST['inline_user_id'] ?? 0);
1683 if ($newName === '' || $inlineUserId <= 0) {
1684 throw new RuntimeException('Choose a machine user and enter a new name first.');
1685 }
1686 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1687 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
1688 $conn,
1689 'rename_user',
1690 ['user_id' => $inlineUserId, 'new_name' => $newName],
1691 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
1692 );
1693 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Rename command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '. Bridge runs in background via Scheduled Task; keep the laptop logged in and connected to the same LAN, then click Read All Users after a few seconds.'];
1694 machine_redirect_after_post(['selected_user_id' => $inlineUserId, 'load_users' => 1, 'load_user' => 1]);
1695 }
1696 machine_load_user_details_into_state($inlineUserId, $userDetailsRaw, $userDetailsDecoded);
1697 if ($userDetailsRaw === '') {
1698 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to load the full machine user record.');
1699 }
1700 $patchedJson = biometric_machine_patch_user_name($userDetailsRaw, $newName);
1701 $tmp = tempnam(sys_get_temp_dir(), 'biotern_user_');
1702 file_put_contents($tmp, $patchedJson);
1703 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('set-user', [$tmp]);
1704 @unlink($tmp);
1705 if (!$result['success']) {
1706 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1707 }
1708 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Machine user renamed on the F20H.'];
1709 biometric_ops_log_audit($conn, (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0), $role, 'machine_user_renamed', 'machine_user', (string)$inlineUserId, ['user_id' => $inlineUserId, 'name' => $newName]);
1710 machine_redirect_after_post(['selected_user_id' => $inlineUserId, 'load_users' => 1, 'load_user' => 1]);
1711
1712 case 'delete_user':
1713 if ($selectedUserId <= 0) {
1714 throw new RuntimeException('Enter a valid user ID to delete.');
1715 }
1716 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1717 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
1718 $conn,
1719 'delete_user',
1720 ['user_id' => $selectedUserId],
1721 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
1722 );
1723 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Delete user command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '.'];
1724 machine_redirect_after_post(['load_users' => 1]);
1725 }
1726 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('delete-user', [(string)$selectedUserId]);
1727 if (!$result['success']) {
1728 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1729 }
1730 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Machine user deleted.'];
1731 biometric_ops_log_audit($conn, (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0), $role, 'machine_user_deleted', 'machine_user', (string)$selectedUserId, ['user_id' => $selectedUserId]);
1732 machine_redirect_after_post(['load_users' => 1]);
1733
1734 case 'delete_fingerprint':
1735 if ($selectedUserId <= 0) {
1736 throw new RuntimeException('Enter a valid F20H user ID to delete.');
1737 }
1738 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1739 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
1740 $conn,
1741 'delete_user',
1742 ['user_id' => $selectedUserId],
1743 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
1744 );
1745 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Delete fingerprint command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '.'];
1746 machine_redirect_after_post(['load_users' => 1]);
1747 }
1748 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('delete-user', [(string)$selectedUserId]);
1749 if (!$result['success']) {
1750 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1751 }
1752 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Fingerprint record removed from the F20H machine user list.'];
1753 biometric_ops_log_audit($conn, (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0), $role, 'machine_fingerprint_deleted', 'machine_user', (string)$selectedUserId, ['user_id' => $selectedUserId]);
1754 machine_redirect_after_post(['load_users' => 1]);
1755
1756 case 'get_device_info':
1757 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('get-device-info');
1758 if (!$result['success']) {
1759 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1760 }
1761 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Device info loaded.'];
1762 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1763
1764 case 'get_config':
1765 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('get-config');
1766 if (!$result['success']) {
1767 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1768 }
1769 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Device config loaded.'];
1770 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1771
1772 case 'save_config':
1773 $configRaw = trim((string)($_POST['config_json'] ?? ''));
1774 if ($configRaw === '') {
1775 throw new RuntimeException('Config JSON cannot be empty.');
1776 }
1777 $tmp = tempnam(sys_get_temp_dir(), 'biotern_cfg_');
1778 file_put_contents($tmp, $configRaw);
1779 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('set-config', [$tmp]);
1780 @unlink($tmp);
1781 if (!$result['success']) {
1782 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1783 }
1784 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Device config updated.'];
1785 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1786
1787 case 'get_network':
1788 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('get-network');
1789 if (!$result['success']) {
1790 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1791 }
1792 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Network settings loaded.'];
1793 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1794
1795 case 'save_network':
1796 $ip = trim((string)($_POST['ip_address'] ?? ''));
1797 $gateway = trim((string)($_POST['gateway'] ?? ''));
1798 $mask = trim((string)($_POST['mask'] ?? ''));
1799 $port = trim((string)($_POST['port'] ?? ''));
1800 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('set-network', [$ip, $gateway, $mask, $port]);
1801 if (!$result['success']) {
1802 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1803 }
1804 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Network settings updated.'];
1805 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1806
1807 case 'get_time':
1808 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('get-time');
1809 if (!$result['success']) {
1810 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1811 }
1812 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Machine time loaded.'];
1813 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1814
1815 case 'set_time':
1816 $timeValue = trim((string)($_POST['time_value'] ?? ''));
1817 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
1818 if ($timeValue === '') {
1819 throw new RuntimeException('Device time value is required.');
1820 }
1821 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
1822 $conn,
1823 'set_time',
1824 ['time_value' => $timeValue],
1825 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
1826 );
1827 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Set time command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '.'];
1828 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1829 }
1830 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('set-time', [$timeValue]);
1831 if (!$result['success']) {
1832 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
1833 }
1834 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Machine time updated.'];
1835 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1836
1837 case 'save_connector_config':
1838 $machineConfigJson = trim((string)($_POST['connector_config_json'] ?? ''));
1839 if ($machineConfigJson === '') {
1840 throw new RuntimeException('Connector config cannot be empty.');
1841 }
1842 if (json_decode($machineConfigJson, true) === null && json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
1843 throw new RuntimeException('Connector config must be valid JSON.');
1844 }
1845 machine_write_local_config_file($machineConfigPath, $machineConfigJson . PHP_EOL);
1846 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Connector config updated.'];
1847 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1848
1849 case 'save_connector_profile':
1850 $existingConfig = json_decode($machineConfigJson, true);
1851 if (!is_array($existingConfig)) {
1852 $existingConfig = [];
1853 }
1854
1855 $existingConfig['ipAddress'] = trim((string)($_POST['connector_ip'] ?? ''));
1856 $existingConfig['gateway'] = trim((string)($_POST['connector_gateway'] ?? ''));
1857 $existingConfig['mask'] = trim((string)($_POST['connector_mask'] ?? '255.255.255.0'));
1858 $existingConfig['port'] = max(1, (int)($_POST['connector_port'] ?? 5001));
1859 $existingConfig['deviceNumber'] = max(1, (int)($_POST['connector_device_number'] ?? 1));
1860 $existingConfig['communicationPassword'] = trim((string)($_POST['connector_password'] ?? '0'));
1861 $selectedSyncMode = strtolower(trim((string)($_POST['sync_mode'] ?? 'direct_ingest')));
1862 $existingConfig['syncMode'] = in_array($selectedSyncMode, ['direct_ingest', 'connector_fallback'], true)
1863 ? $selectedSyncMode
1864 : 'direct_ingest';
1865 $submittedOutputPath = trim((string)($_POST['connector_output_path'] ?? ''));
1866 $existingOutputPath = trim((string)($existingConfig['outputPath'] ?? ''));
1867 if ($existingOutputPath === '' || strcasecmp($existingOutputPath, $legacyAttendanceOutputPath) === 0) {
1868 $existingOutputPath = $defaultAttendanceOutputPath;
1869 }
1870 $existingConfig['outputPath'] = $submittedOutputPath !== ''
1871 ? $submittedOutputPath
1872 : ($existingOutputPath !== '' ? $existingOutputPath : $defaultAttendanceOutputPath);
1873 $existingConfig['autoImportOnIngest'] = !isset($_POST['disable_auto_import_on_ingest']);
1874 $existingConfig['attendanceWindowEnabled'] = isset($_POST['attendance_window_enabled']);
1875 $existingConfig['attendanceStartTime'] = trim((string)($_POST['attendance_start_time'] ?? '08:00:00'));
1876 $existingConfig['attendanceEndTime'] = trim((string)($_POST['attendance_end_time'] ?? '20:00:00'));
1877 $existingConfig['duplicateGuardMinutes'] = max(1, (int)($_POST['duplicate_guard_minutes'] ?? 10));
1878 $existingConfig['slotAdvanceMinimumMinutes'] = max(1, (int)($_POST['slot_advance_minimum_minutes'] ?? 10));
1879 $selectedRouterPreset = trim((string)($_POST['router_preset'] ?? 'custom'));
1880 $allowedRouterPresets = ['router_1', 'router_2', 'custom'];
1881 $existingConfig['selectedRouterPreset'] = in_array($selectedRouterPreset, $allowedRouterPresets, true) ? $selectedRouterPreset : 'custom';
1882
1883 if ($existingConfig['ipAddress'] === '') {
1884 throw new RuntimeException('Connector IP address is required.');
1885 }
1886 machine_connector_write_config($machineConfigPath, $existingConfig);
1887 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Quick connector settings updated.'];
1888 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1889
1890 case 'save_bridge_profile':
1891 $bridgeEnabled = isset($_POST['bridge_enabled']);
1892 $selectedBridgePreset = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_preset_preview'] ?? 'laptop_custom'));
1893 $allowedBridgePresets = ['laptop_router_1', 'laptop_router_2', 'computer_router_2', 'laptop_custom'];
1894 if (!in_array($selectedBridgePreset, $allowedBridgePresets, true)) {
1895 $selectedBridgePreset = 'laptop_custom';
1896 }
1897 $routerName = trim((string)($_POST['router_name'] ?? ''));
1898 $bridgeName = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_name'] ?? ''));
1899 $bridgeToken = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_token'] ?? ''));
1900 $cloudBaseUrl = rtrim(trim((string)($_POST['cloud_base_url'] ?? '')), '/');
1901 $ingestPath = trim((string)($_POST['ingest_path'] ?? '/api/f20h_ingest.php'));
1902 $ingestApiToken = trim((string)($_POST['ingest_api_token'] ?? ''));
1903 $pollSeconds = max(5, (int)($_POST['poll_seconds'] ?? 30));
1904 $bridgeIp = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_ip'] ?? ''));
1905 $bridgeGateway = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_gateway'] ?? ''));
1906 $bridgeMask = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_mask'] ?? '255.255.255.0'));
1907 $bridgePort = max(1, (int)($_POST['bridge_port'] ?? 5001));
1908 $bridgeDeviceNo = max(1, (int)($_POST['bridge_device_number'] ?? 1));
1909 $bridgePassword = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_password'] ?? '0'));
1910 $bridgeOutputPath = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_output_path'] ?? $defaultAttendanceOutputPath));
1911
1912 if ($bridgeToken === '') {
1913 $bridgeToken = machine_make_bridge_token();
1914 }
1915 if ($cloudBaseUrl === '') {
1916 $appUrl = getenv('APP_URL');
1917 if (is_string($appUrl) && trim($appUrl) !== '') {
1918 $cloudBaseUrl = rtrim(trim($appUrl), '/');
1919 } else {
1920 $host = trim((string)($_SERVER['HTTP_HOST'] ?? ''));
1921 if ($host !== '') {
1922 $scheme = (!empty($_SERVER['HTTPS']) && strtolower((string)$_SERVER['HTTPS']) !== 'off') ? 'https' : 'http';
1923 $cloudBaseUrl = $scheme . '://' . $host;
1924 }
1925 }
1926 }
1927 if (stripos($cloudBaseUrl, 'http://') === 0) {
1928 $cloudBaseUrl = 'https://' . substr($cloudBaseUrl, 7);
1929 }
1930 if ($ingestApiToken === '') {
1931 $envApiToken = getenv('BIOTERN_API_TOKEN');
1932 if (is_string($envApiToken) && trim($envApiToken) !== '') {
1933 $ingestApiToken = trim($envApiToken);
1934 }
1935 }
1936 if ($bridgeIp === '') {
1937 throw new RuntimeException('Bridge F20H IP address is required.');
1938 }
1939 if ($cloudBaseUrl === '') {
1940 throw new RuntimeException('Cloud base URL is required.');
1941 }
1942 if ($ingestApiToken === '') {
1943 throw new RuntimeException('Ingest API token is required.');
1944 }
1945
1946 $presetNetworkDefaults = [
1947 'laptop_router_1' => ['ip' => '192.168.100.201', 'gateway' => '192.168.100.1', 'mask' => '255.255.255.0', 'port' => 5001, 'device_number' => 1],
1948 'laptop_router_2' => ['ip' => '192.168.110.201', 'gateway' => '192.168.110.1', 'mask' => '255.255.255.0', 'port' => 5001, 'device_number' => 1],
1949 'computer_router_2' => ['ip' => '192.168.110.201', 'gateway' => '192.168.110.1', 'mask' => '255.255.255.0', 'port' => 5001, 'device_number' => 1],
1950 ];
1951 if ($selectedBridgePreset !== 'laptop_custom' && isset($presetNetworkDefaults[$selectedBridgePreset])) {
1952 $presetDefaults = $presetNetworkDefaults[$selectedBridgePreset];
1953 $matchesPreset =
1954 strcasecmp($bridgeIp, (string)$presetDefaults['ip']) === 0
1955 && strcasecmp($bridgeGateway, (string)$presetDefaults['gateway']) === 0
1956 && strcasecmp($bridgeMask, (string)$presetDefaults['mask']) === 0
1957 && $bridgePort === (int)$presetDefaults['port']
1958 && $bridgeDeviceNo === (int)$presetDefaults['device_number'];
1959 if (!$matchesPreset) {
1960 $selectedBridgePreset = 'laptop_custom';
1961 }
1962 }
1963
1964 machine_save_bridge_profile($conn, [
1965 'selected_bridge_preset' => $selectedBridgePreset,
1966 'router_name' => $routerName,
1967 'bridge_name' => $bridgeName,
1968 'bridge_enabled' => $bridgeEnabled ? 1 : 0,
1969 'bridge_token' => $bridgeToken,
1970 'cloud_base_url' => $cloudBaseUrl,
1971 'ingest_path' => $ingestPath,
1972 'ingest_api_token' => $ingestApiToken,
1973 'poll_seconds' => $pollSeconds,
1974 'ip_address' => $bridgeIp,
1975 'gateway' => $bridgeGateway,
1976 'mask' => $bridgeMask,
1977 'port' => $bridgePort,
1978 'device_number' => $bridgeDeviceNo,
1979 'communication_password' => $bridgePassword,
1980 'output_path' => $bridgeOutputPath,
1981 ], (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0));
1982
1983 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Laptop bridge profile saved. Token: ' . $bridgeToken];
1984 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1985
1986 case 'pause_bridge_for_enrollment':
1987 machine_set_bridge_enabled($conn, false, (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0));
1988 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1989 'type' => 'warning',
1990 'message' => 'Enrollment mode enabled: bridge sync is paused. You can now enroll on F20H with less interruption. Click Resume Bridge after enrollment.',
1991 ];
1992 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
1993
1994 case 'resume_bridge_after_enrollment':
1995 machine_set_bridge_enabled($conn, true, (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0));
1996 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
1997 'type' => 'success',
1998 'message' => 'Bridge sync resumed. New attendance logs will continue uploading automatically.',
1999 ];
2000 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2001
2002 case 'quick_fill_bridge_router_1':
2003 $bridgeToken = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_token'] ?? ''));
2004 if ($bridgeToken === '') {
2005 $bridgeToken = machine_make_bridge_token();
2006 }
2007
2008 $ingestApiToken = trim((string)($_POST['ingest_api_token'] ?? ''));
2009 if ($ingestApiToken === '') {
2010 $envApiToken = getenv('BIOTERN_API_TOKEN');
2011 if (is_string($envApiToken) && trim($envApiToken) !== '') {
2012 $ingestApiToken = trim($envApiToken);
2013 }
2014 }
2015 if ($ingestApiToken === '') {
2016 $ingestApiToken = $bridgeToken;
2017 }
2018
2019 $cloudBaseUrl = machine_bridge_default_cloud_base_url();
2020 if ($cloudBaseUrl === '') {
2021 throw new RuntimeException('Unable to infer cloud base URL. Set APP_URL or open from the live domain.');
2022 }
2023
2024 machine_save_bridge_profile($conn, [
2025 'selected_bridge_preset' => 'laptop_router_1',
2026 'router_name' => 'Router 1',
2027 'bridge_name' => 'Laptop Bridge Router 1',
2028 'bridge_enabled' => 1,
2029 'bridge_token' => $bridgeToken,
2030 'cloud_base_url' => $cloudBaseUrl,
2031 'ingest_path' => '/api/f20h_ingest.php',
2032 'ingest_api_token' => $ingestApiToken,
2033 'poll_seconds' => 5,
2034 'ip_address' => '192.168.100.201',
2035 'gateway' => '192.168.100.1',
2036 'mask' => '255.255.255.0',
2037 'port' => 5001,
2038 'device_number' => 1,
2039 'communication_password' => '0',
2040 'output_path' => $defaultAttendanceOutputPath,
2041 ], (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0));
2042
2043 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
2044 'type' => 'success',
2045 'message' => 'Laptop Bridge (Router 1) defaults were applied and saved to shared bridge profile. Bridge token: ' . $bridgeToken,
2046 ];
2047 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2048
2049 case 'quick_fill_bridge_router_2':
2050 $bridgeToken = trim((string)($_POST['bridge_token'] ?? ''));
2051 if ($bridgeToken === '') {
2052 $bridgeToken = machine_make_bridge_token();
2053 }
2054
2055 $ingestApiToken = trim((string)($_POST['ingest_api_token'] ?? ''));
2056 if ($ingestApiToken === '') {
2057 $envApiToken = getenv('BIOTERN_API_TOKEN');
2058 if (is_string($envApiToken) && trim($envApiToken) !== '') {
2059 $ingestApiToken = trim($envApiToken);
2060 }
2061 }
2062 if ($ingestApiToken === '') {
2063 $ingestApiToken = $bridgeToken;
2064 }
2065
2066 $cloudBaseUrl = machine_bridge_default_cloud_base_url();
2067 if ($cloudBaseUrl === '') {
2068 throw new RuntimeException('Unable to infer cloud base URL. Set APP_URL or open from the live domain.');
2069 }
2070
2071 machine_save_bridge_profile($conn, [
2072 'selected_bridge_preset' => 'computer_router_2',
2073 'router_name' => 'Router 2',
2074 'bridge_name' => 'Computer Bridge Router 2',
2075 'bridge_enabled' => 1,
2076 'bridge_token' => $bridgeToken,
2077 'cloud_base_url' => $cloudBaseUrl,
2078 'ingest_path' => '/api/f20h_ingest.php',
2079 'ingest_api_token' => $ingestApiToken,
2080 'poll_seconds' => 5,
2081 'ip_address' => '192.168.110.201',
2082 'gateway' => '192.168.110.1',
2083 'mask' => '255.255.255.0',
2084 'port' => 5001,
2085 'device_number' => 1,
2086 'communication_password' => '0',
2087 'output_path' => $defaultAttendanceOutputPath,
2088 ], (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0));
2089
2090 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
2091 'type' => 'success',
2092 'message' => 'Computer Bridge (Router 2) defaults were applied and saved to shared bridge profile. Bridge token: ' . $bridgeToken,
2093 ];
2094 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2095
2096 case 'retry_fingerprint_cleanup':
2097 $cleanupLogId = (int)($_POST['cleanup_log_id'] ?? 0);
2098 if ($cleanupLogId <= 0) {
2099 throw new RuntimeException('Invalid cleanup log entry selected.');
2100 }
2101
2102 machine_ensure_fingerprint_cleanup_log_table($conn);
2103 machine_ensure_bridge_command_queue_table($conn);
2104
2105 $logStmt = $conn->prepare("SELECT id, student_id, finger_id, status FROM biometric_fingerprint_cleanup_log WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1");
2106 if (!$logStmt) {
2107 throw new RuntimeException('Failed to load cleanup log entry.');
2108 }
2109 $logStmt->bind_param('i', $cleanupLogId);
2110 $logStmt->execute();
2111 $logRow = $logStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
2112 $logStmt->close();
2113
2114 if (!is_array($logRow)) {
2115 throw new RuntimeException('Cleanup log entry not found.');
2116 }
2117
2118 $cleanupStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($logRow['status'] ?? 'failed')));
2119 if (in_array($cleanupStatus, ['queued', 'claimed'], true)) {
2120 throw new RuntimeException('Cleanup is already queued/claimed. Wait for bridge worker result.');
2121 }
2122
2123 $studentId = (int)($logRow['student_id'] ?? 0);
2124 $fingerId = (int)($logRow['finger_id'] ?? 0);
2125 if ($fingerId <= 0) {
2126 throw new RuntimeException('Invalid fingerprint ID in cleanup log.');
2127 }
2128
2129 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
2130 $conn,
2131 'delete_user',
2132 ['user_id' => $fingerId],
2133 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
2134 );
2135
2136 $retryMessage = 'Manual retry queued from Machine Manager.';
2137 $updateStmt = $conn->prepare("UPDATE biometric_fingerprint_cleanup_log
2138 SET command_id = ?, status = 'queued', last_message = ?, queued_at = NOW(), completed_at = NULL
2139 WHERE id = ?");
2140 if ($updateStmt) {
2141 $updateStmt->bind_param('isi', $queuedId, $retryMessage, $cleanupLogId);
2142 $updateStmt->execute();
2143 $updateStmt->close();
2144 }
2145
2146 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
2147 'type' => 'success',
2148 'message' => 'Fingerprint cleanup retry queued for student row #' . $studentId . ' (F20H user #' . $fingerId . '). Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '.',
2149 ];
2150 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2151
2152 case 'retry_all_fingerprint_cleanup':
2153 machine_ensure_fingerprint_cleanup_log_table($conn);
2154 machine_ensure_bridge_command_queue_table($conn);
2155
2156 $failedRows = [];
2157 $failedRes = $conn->query("SELECT id, student_id, finger_id
2158 FROM biometric_fingerprint_cleanup_log
2159 WHERE status = 'failed'
2160 ORDER BY id DESC
2161 LIMIT 200");
2162 if ($failedRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
2163 while ($failedRow = $failedRes->fetch_assoc()) {
2164 $failedRows[] = $failedRow;
2165 }
2166 $failedRes->close();
2167 }
2168
2169 if ($failedRows === []) {
2170 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
2171 'type' => 'info',
2172 'message' => 'No failed fingerprint cleanup entries to retry.',
2173 ];
2174 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2175 }
2176
2177 $queuedCount = 0;
2178 foreach ($failedRows as $failedRow) {
2179 $cleanupLogId = (int)($failedRow['id'] ?? 0);
2180 $studentId = (int)($failedRow['student_id'] ?? 0);
2181 $fingerId = (int)($failedRow['finger_id'] ?? 0);
2182 if ($cleanupLogId <= 0 || $fingerId <= 0) {
2183 continue;
2184 }
2185
2186 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
2187 $conn,
2188 'delete_user',
2189 ['user_id' => $fingerId],
2190 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
2191 );
2192
2193 $retryMessage = 'Bulk retry queued from Machine Manager.';
2194 $updateStmt = $conn->prepare("UPDATE biometric_fingerprint_cleanup_log
2195 SET command_id = ?, status = 'queued', last_message = ?, queued_at = NOW(), completed_at = NULL
2196 WHERE id = ?");
2197 if ($updateStmt) {
2198 $updateStmt->bind_param('isi', $queuedId, $retryMessage, $cleanupLogId);
2199 $updateStmt->execute();
2200 $updateStmt->close();
2201 }
2202
2203 $queuedCount++;
2204 }
2205
2206 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
2207 'type' => $queuedCount > 0 ? 'success' : 'warning',
2208 'message' => $queuedCount > 0
2209 ? ('Queued retry for ' . $queuedCount . ' failed fingerprint cleanup entr' . ($queuedCount === 1 ? 'y' : 'ies') . '.')
2210 : 'No failed cleanup entries were eligible for retry.',
2211 ];
2212 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2213
2214 case 'test_bridge_profile':
2215 $savedProfile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
2216 $probeBaseUrl = trim((string)($savedProfile['cloud_base_url'] ?? ''));
2217 $probeToken = trim((string)($savedProfile['bridge_token'] ?? ''));
2218 $probe = machine_probe_bridge_profile_endpoint($probeBaseUrl, $probeToken);
2219 if (empty($probe['ok'])) {
2220 $fallbackToken = trim((string)($savedProfile['ingest_api_token'] ?? ''));
2221 if ($fallbackToken !== '' && !hash_equals($fallbackToken, $probeToken)) {
2222 $fallbackProbe = machine_probe_bridge_profile_endpoint($probeBaseUrl, $fallbackToken);
2223 if (!empty($fallbackProbe['ok'])) {
2224 $probe = $fallbackProbe;
2225 $probe['message'] = 'Bridge profile endpoint accepted ingest token fallback. Save Bridge Profile to sync bridge token.';
2226 }
2227 }
2228 }
2229
2230 $message = ($probe['ok'] ? 'Bridge test passed. ' : 'Bridge test failed. ') . ($probe['message'] ?? '');
2231 if (empty($probe['ok']) && (int)($probe['status'] ?? 0) === 401) {
2232 $message .= ' HTTP 401 means token mismatch between saved bridge token and live API expectation. Click Fill Shared Bridge (Router 2), then Save Bridge Profile, then test again.';
2233 }
2234 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = [
