2235 'type' => $probe['ok'] ? 'success' : 'warning',
2236 'message' => $message
2237 . (($probe['url'] ?? '') !== '' ? (' Endpoint: ' . $probe['url']) : ''),
2238 ];
2239 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2240
2241 case 'clear_records':
2242 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
2243 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
2244 $conn,
2245 'clear_records',
2246 [],
2247 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
2248 );
2249 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Clear records command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '.'];
2250 machine_redirect_after_post(['load_users' => 1]);
2251 }
2252 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('clear-records');
2253 if (!$result['success']) {
2254 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
2255 }
2256 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Machine attendance records cleared.'];
2257 machine_redirect_after_post(['load_users' => 1]);
2258
2259 case 'clear_users':
2260 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
2261 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
2262 $conn,
2263 'clear_users',
2264 [],
2265 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
2266 );
2267 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Clear users command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '.'];
2268 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2269 }
2270 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('clear-users');
2271 if (!$result['success']) {
2272 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
2273 }
2274 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'All users on the machine were cleared.'];
2275 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2276
2277 case 'clear_admin':
2278 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
2279 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
2280 $conn,
2281 'clear_admin',
2282 [],
2283 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
2284 );
2285 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Clear admin command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '.'];
2286 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2287 }
2288 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('clear-admin');
2289 if (!$result['success']) {
2290 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
2291 }
2292 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Machine admin records cleared.'];
2293 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2294
2295 case 'restart':
2296 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
2297 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
2298 $conn,
2299 'restart',
2300 [],
2301 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
2302 );
2303 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Restart command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '.'];
2304 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2305 }
2306 $result = biometric_machine_run_command('restart');
2307 if (!$result['success']) {
2308 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $result['output'] ?? [])));
2309 }
2310 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Restart command sent to the machine.'];
2311 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2312
2313 case 'restart_windows':
2314 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
2315 throw new RuntimeException('Windows restart is not available in cloud runtime.');
2316 }
2317 if (stripos(PHP_OS_FAMILY, 'Windows') !== 0) {
2318 throw new RuntimeException('Windows restart is only available on Windows hosts.');
2319 }
2320 $shutdownCmd = 'powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "shutdown.exe /r /t 30 /c \"BioTern Bridge Restart initiated\""';
2321 pclose(popen($shutdownCmd, 'r'));
2322 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Windows restart initiated. System will restart in 30 seconds. Bridge will restart automatically on boot.'];
2323 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2324
2325 case 'save_device_identity':
2326 $deviceNo = trim((string)($_POST['device_number'] ?? ''));
2327 $password = trim((string)($_POST['communication_password'] ?? ''));
2328 if (machine_is_cloud_runtime()) {
2329 if ($deviceNo === '' && $password === '') {
2330 throw new RuntimeException('Enter device number and/or communication password.');
2331 }
2332 $queuedId = machine_enqueue_bridge_command(
2333 $conn,
2334 'save_device_identity',
2335 ['device_number' => $deviceNo, 'communication_password' => $password],
2336 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0)
2337 );
2338 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Device identity command queued for bridge worker. Queue ID #' . $queuedId . '.'];
2339 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2340 }
2341 if ($deviceNo !== '') {
2342 $deviceNoResult = biometric_machine_run_command('set-device-no', [$deviceNo]);
2343 if (!$deviceNoResult['success']) {
2344 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $deviceNoResult['output'] ?? [])));
2345 }
2346 }
2347 if ($password !== '') {
2348 $passwordResult = biometric_machine_run_command('set-password', [$password]);
2349 if (!$passwordResult['success']) {
2350 throw new RuntimeException(trim(implode("\n", $passwordResult['output'] ?? [])));
2351 }
2352 }
2353 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Machine identity settings updated.'];
2354 machine_redirect_after_post([]);
2355 }
2356 } catch (Throwable $e) {
2357 $_SESSION['machine_manager_flash'] = ['type' => 'danger', 'message' => $e->getMessage()];
2358 $errorParams = [];
2359 if ($selectedUserId > 0) {
2360 $errorParams['selected_user_id'] = $selectedUserId;
2361 $errorParams['load_user'] = 1;
2362 }
2363 $errorParams['load_users'] = 1;
2364 machine_redirect_after_post($errorParams);
2365 }
2366}
2367
2368$loadedUserRows = machine_extract_rows($userListDecoded);
2369biometric_ops_ensure_tables($conn);
2370$latestSyncRun = biometric_ops_fetch_latest_sync_run($conn);
2371$recentAnomalies = biometric_ops_fetch_recent_anomalies($conn, 6);
2372$recentAuditLogs = biometric_ops_fetch_recent_audit_logs($conn, 6);
2373$openAnomalyCount = biometric_ops_fetch_open_anomaly_count($conn);
2374$fingerprintIdentityMap = machine_fetch_fingerprint_identity_map($conn);
2375$rawLogsPerPage = 50;
2376$rawLogPage = max(1, (int)($_GET['raw_page'] ?? 1));
2377$rawLogTotal = 0;
2378$rawLogProcessedTotal = 0;
2379$rawLogRows = [];
2380$rawLogSummary = $conn->query("
2381 SELECT
2382 COUNT(*) AS total_logs,
2383 SUM(CASE WHEN processed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processed_logs,
2384 MAX(imported_at) AS latest_imported_at
2385 FROM biometric_raw_logs
2386");
2387if ($rawLogSummary instanceof mysqli_result) {
2388 $summaryRow = $rawLogSummary->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
2389 $rawLogTotal = (int)($summaryRow['total_logs'] ?? 0);
2390 $rawLogProcessedTotal = (int)($summaryRow['processed_logs'] ?? 0);
2391 $latestRawImportAt = (string)($summaryRow['latest_imported_at'] ?? '');
2392 $rawLogSummary->close();
2393} else {
2394 $latestRawImportAt = '';
2395}
2396$rawLogPages = max(1, (int)ceil($rawLogTotal / $rawLogsPerPage));
2397if ($rawLogPage > $rawLogPages) {
2398 $rawLogPage = $rawLogPages;
2399}
2400$rawLogOffset = ($rawLogPage - 1) * $rawLogsPerPage;
2401$rawLogResult = $conn->query("
2402 SELECT id, raw_data, imported_at, processed
2403 FROM biometric_raw_logs
2404 ORDER BY id DESC
2405 LIMIT {$rawLogsPerPage} OFFSET {$rawLogOffset}
2406");
2407if ($rawLogResult instanceof mysqli_result) {
2408 while ($row = $rawLogResult->fetch_assoc()) {
2409 $rawLogRows[] = $row;
2410 }
2411 $rawLogResult->close();
2412}
2413$syncAttemptRows = [];
2414$syncAttemptResult = $conn->query("
2415 SELECT id, trigger_source, status, raw_inserted, processed_logs, attendance_changed, anomalies_found, started_at, finished_at
2416 FROM biometric_sync_runs
2417 ORDER BY id DESC
2418 LIMIT 20
2419");
2420if ($syncAttemptResult instanceof mysqli_result) {
2421 while ($row = $syncAttemptResult->fetch_assoc()) {
2422 $syncAttemptRows[] = $row;
2423 }
2424 $syncAttemptResult->close();
2425}
2426$ingestHealth = machine_fetch_ingest_health($conn);
2427$ingestSummary = $ingestHealth['summary'] ?? [];
2428$recentIngestEvents = $ingestHealth['recent'] ?? [];
2429$bridgeQueueData = machine_fetch_bridge_command_queue($conn, 20);
2430$bridgeQueueSummary = $bridgeQueueData['summary'] ?? ['queued' => 0, 'claimed' => 0, 'succeeded' => 0, 'failed' => 0];
2431$bridgeQueueRows = $bridgeQueueData['rows'] ?? [];
2432$fingerprintCleanupData = machine_fetch_fingerprint_cleanup_log($conn, 20);
2433$fingerprintCleanupSummary = $fingerprintCleanupData['summary'] ?? ['queued' => 0, 'claimed' => 0, 'succeeded' => 0, 'failed' => 0];
2434$fingerprintCleanupRows = $fingerprintCleanupData['rows'] ?? [];
2435$bridgeProfile = machine_fetch_bridge_profile($conn);
2436$connectorConfig = json_decode($machineConfigJson, true);
2437$connectorIp = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['ipAddress'] ?? '') : '';
2438$connectorPort = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['port'] ?? '') : '';
2439$connectorDeviceNo = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['deviceNumber'] ?? '') : '';
2440$connectorGateway = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['gateway'] ?? '') : '';
2441$connectorMask = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['mask'] ?? '255.255.255.0') : '255.255.255.0';
2442$connectorPassword = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['communicationPassword'] ?? '0') : '0';
2443$syncMode = is_array($connectorConfig) ? strtolower(trim((string)($connectorConfig['syncMode'] ?? 'direct_ingest'))) : 'direct_ingest';
2444if (!in_array($syncMode, ['direct_ingest', 'connector_fallback'], true)) {
2445 $syncMode = 'direct_ingest';
2446}
2447$syncModeLabelMap = [
2448 'direct_ingest' => 'Direct machine ingest',
2449 'connector_fallback' => 'Connector fallback worker',
2450];
2451$syncModeLabel = $syncModeLabelMap[$syncMode] ?? 'Direct machine ingest';
2452$cloudRuntime = machine_is_cloud_runtime();
2453$connectorOutputPath = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['outputPath'] ?? '') : '';
2454$autoImportOnIngest = !is_array($connectorConfig) || !array_key_exists('autoImportOnIngest', $connectorConfig) || !empty($connectorConfig['autoImportOnIngest']);
2455$connectorWindowEnabled = is_array($connectorConfig) ? !empty($connectorConfig['attendanceWindowEnabled']) : false;
2456$connectorStartTime = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['attendanceStartTime'] ?? '08:00:00') : '08:00:00';
2457$connectorEndTime = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['attendanceEndTime'] ?? '20:00:00') : '20:00:00';
2458$duplicateGuardMinutes = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (int)($connectorConfig['duplicateGuardMinutes'] ?? 10) : 10;
2459$slotAdvanceMinimumMinutes = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (int)($connectorConfig['slotAdvanceMinimumMinutes'] ?? 10) : 10;
2460$selectedRouterPreset = is_array($connectorConfig) ? (string)($connectorConfig['selectedRouterPreset'] ?? 'custom') : 'custom';
2461if (!in_array($selectedRouterPreset, ['router_1', 'router_2', 'custom'], true)) {
2462 $selectedRouterPreset = 'custom';
2463}
2464
2465if ($selectedRouterPreset === 'custom') {
2466 if ($connectorIp === '192.168.100.201' && $connectorGateway === '192.168.100.1') {
2467 $selectedRouterPreset = 'router_1';
2468 } elseif ($connectorIp === '192.168.110.201' && $connectorGateway === '192.168.110.1') {
2469 $selectedRouterPreset = 'router_2';
2470 }
2471}
2472$bridgeEnabled = !empty($bridgeProfile['bridge_enabled']);
2473$bridgeRouterName = trim((string)($bridgeProfile['router_name'] ?? ''));
2474$bridgeFriendlyName = trim((string)($bridgeProfile['bridge_name'] ?? ''));
2475$bridgeToken = (string)($bridgeProfile['bridge_token'] ?? '');
2476$bridgeCloudBaseUrl = (string)($bridgeProfile['cloud_base_url'] ?? '');
2477$bridgeIngestPath = (string)($bridgeProfile['ingest_path'] ?? '/api/f20h_ingest.php');
2478$bridgeIngestApiToken = (string)($bridgeProfile['ingest_api_token'] ?? '');
2479$bridgePollSeconds = (int)($bridgeProfile['poll_seconds'] ?? 30);
2480$bridgeIpAddress = (string)($bridgeProfile['ip_address'] ?? $connectorIp);
2481$bridgeGateway = (string)($bridgeProfile['gateway'] ?? $connectorGateway);
2482$bridgeMask = (string)($bridgeProfile['mask'] ?? $connectorMask);
2483$bridgePort = (int)($bridgeProfile['port'] ?? ($connectorPort !== '' ? (int)$connectorPort : 5001));
2484$bridgeDeviceNumber = (int)($bridgeProfile['device_number'] ?? ($connectorDeviceNo !== '' ? (int)$connectorDeviceNo : 1));
2485$bridgePassword = (string)($bridgeProfile['communication_password'] ?? $connectorPassword);
2486$bridgeOutputPath = (string)($bridgeProfile['output_path'] ?? ($connectorOutputPath !== '' ? $connectorOutputPath : $defaultAttendanceOutputPath));
2487if ($connectorOutputPath === '' || strcasecmp($connectorOutputPath, $legacyAttendanceOutputPath) === 0) {
2488 $connectorOutputPath = $defaultAttendanceOutputPath;
2489}
2490if ($bridgeOutputPath === '' || strcasecmp($bridgeOutputPath, $legacyAttendanceOutputPath) === 0) {
2491 $bridgeOutputPath = $defaultAttendanceOutputPath;
2492}
2493$bridgeRuntimeStatus = machine_fetch_bridge_runtime_status($conn, $bridgePollSeconds);
2494
2495if ($bridgeToken === '') {
2496 $bridgeTokenEnv = getenv('BIOTERN_BRIDGE_TOKEN');
2497 if (is_string($bridgeTokenEnv) && trim($bridgeTokenEnv) !== '') {
2498 $bridgeToken = trim($bridgeTokenEnv);
2499 }
2500}
2501
2502if ($bridgeCloudBaseUrl === '') {
2503 $appUrl = getenv('APP_URL');
2504 if (is_string($appUrl) && trim($appUrl) !== '') {
2505 $bridgeCloudBaseUrl = rtrim(trim($appUrl), '/');
2506 } else {
2507 $host = trim((string)($_SERVER['HTTP_HOST'] ?? ''));
2508 if ($host !== '') {
2509 $bridgeCloudBaseUrl = 'https://' . $host;
2510 }
2511 }
2512}
2513if (stripos($bridgeCloudBaseUrl, 'http://') === 0) {
2514 $bridgeCloudBaseUrl = 'https://' . substr($bridgeCloudBaseUrl, 7);
2515}
2516
2517if ($bridgeIngestApiToken === '') {
2518 $apiTokenEnv = getenv('BIOTERN_API_TOKEN');
2519 if (is_string($apiTokenEnv) && trim($apiTokenEnv) !== '') {
2520 $bridgeIngestApiToken = trim($apiTokenEnv);
2521 }
2522}
2523
2524$bridgeProfileBaseUrl = machine_bridge_default_cloud_base_url();
2525if ($bridgeProfileBaseUrl === '') {
2526 $bridgeProfileBaseUrl = $bridgeCloudBaseUrl;
2527}
2528if ($bridgeProfileBaseUrl === '') {
2529 $bridgeProfileBaseUrl = 'https://your-app.vercel.app';
2530}
2531
2532$bridgeWorkerCommand = 'powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ".\\tools\\bridge-worker.ps1"'
2533 . ' -SiteBaseUrl "' . str_replace('"', '\\"', $bridgeProfileBaseUrl) . '"'
2534 . ' -BridgeToken "' . str_replace('"', '\\"', $bridgeToken !== '' ? $bridgeToken : 'YOUR_BRIDGE_TOKEN') . '"'
2535 . ' -WorkspaceRoot "."'
2536 . ' -PreferLocalConnectorNetwork 0';
2537
2538$bridgeTaskInstallCommand = 'powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ".\\tools\\install-bridge-worker-task.ps1"'
2539 . ' -SiteBaseUrl "' . str_replace('"', '\\"', $bridgeProfileBaseUrl) . '"'
2540 . ' -BridgeToken "' . str_replace('"', '\\"', $bridgeToken !== '' ? $bridgeToken : 'YOUR_BRIDGE_TOKEN') . '"'
2541 . ' -TaskName "BioTernBridgeWorker"'
2542 . ' -PreferLocalConnectorNetwork 0';
2543
2544$bridgeTaskStatusCommand = 'powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ".\\tools\\manage-bridge-worker-task.ps1" -Action status -TaskName "BioTernBridgeWorker"';
2545
2546$selectedBridgePreset = 'laptop_custom';
2547$savedBridgePreset = trim((string)($bridgeProfile['selected_bridge_preset'] ?? ''));
2548if (in_array($savedBridgePreset, ['laptop_router_1', 'laptop_router_2', 'computer_router_2', 'laptop_custom'], true)) {
2549 $selectedBridgePreset = $savedBridgePreset;

2551 $selectedBridgePreset = 'laptop_router_1';
2552} elseif ($bridgeIpAddress === '192.168.110.201' && $bridgeGateway === '192.168.110.1') {
2553 $selectedBridgePreset = 'computer_router_2';
2554}
2555

2652<main class="nxl-container">
2653 <div class="nxl-content">
2654 <div class="page-header" data-phc-skip="1">
2655 <div class="page-header-left d-flex align-items-center">
2656 <div class="page-header-title">
2657 <h5 class="m-b-10">F20H Machine Manager</h5>
2658 </div>
2659 <ul class="breadcrumb">
2660 <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="homepage.php">Home</a></li>
2661 <li class="breadcrumb-item">F20H Machine Manager</li>
2662 </ul>
2663 </div>
2664 <div class="page-header-right ms-auto bio-console-header-actions">
2665 <div class="page-header-right-items">
2666 <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 page-header-right-items-wrapper">
2667 <a href="bridge-setup-manual.php" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
2668 <i class="feather-book-open me-2"></i>
2669 <span>Bridge Setup Manual</span>
2670 </a>
2671 <a href="fingerprint_mapping.php" class="btn btn-light-brand">
2672 <i class="feather-link me-2"></i>
2673 <span>Fingerprint Mapping</span>
2674 </a>
2675 <a href="attendance.php" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
2676 <i class="feather-clock me-2"></i>
2677 <span>Attendance DTR</span>
2678 </a>
2679 </div>
2680 </div>
2681 </div>
2682 </div>
2683
2684 <?php if ($flashMessage !== ''): ?>
2685 <div class="alert alert-<?php echo machine_h($flashType); ?> alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
2686 <?php echo nl2br(machine_h($flashMessage)); ?>
2687 <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
2688 </div>
2689 <?php endif; ?>
2690
2691 <div class="card bio-console-hero mb-3">
2692 <div class="card-body">
2693 <div class="bio-console-hero-grid">
2694 <div>
2695 <span class="bio-console-eyebrow">Device Operations</span>
2696 <h3>Manage machine users, sync pipelines, and F20H data flow in one place</h3>
2697 <p>Use this console to inspect bridge health, read machine users, process logs into attendance, and keep the device side aligned with BioTern.</p>
2698 <div class="bio-console-pill-list">
2699 <span class="bio-console-pill">Connector: <?php echo machine_h($connectorIp !== '' ? $connectorIp : 'Not set'); ?><?php echo $connectorPort !== '' ? (':' . machine_h($connectorPort)) : ''; ?></span>
2700 <span class="bio-console-pill">Sync mode: <?php echo machine_h($syncModeLabel); ?></span>
2701 <span class="bio-console-pill">Open anomalies: <?php echo (int)$openAnomalyCount; ?></span>
2702 </div>
2703 </div>
2704 <div class="bio-console-hero-side machine-hero-status">
2705 <span class="badge bg-soft-<?php echo machine_h((string)($bridgeRuntimeStatus['badge_class'] ?? 'secondary')); ?> text-<?php echo machine_h((string)($bridgeRuntimeStatus['badge_class'] ?? 'secondary')); ?>">
2706 <?php echo machine_h((string)($bridgeRuntimeStatus['label'] ?? 'Bridge Status Unknown')); ?>
2707 </span>
2708 <h6>Bridge Worker Status</h6>
2709 <p><?php echo machine_h((string)($bridgeRuntimeStatus['detail'] ?? '')); ?></p>
2710 <?php if ($isAdmin): ?>
2711 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-2">
2712 <form method="post" class="d-inline" data-confirm="Revive the bridge connection? On the bridge PC this repairs and restarts BioTernBridgeWorker.">
2713 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="revive_bridge_connection">
2714 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">Revive Bridge Connection</button>
2715 </form>
2716 <?php if ($bridgeEnabled): ?>
2717 <form method="post" class="d-inline">
2718 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="pause_bridge_for_enrollment">
2719 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Pause Bridge for Enrollment</button>
2720 </form>
2721 <?php else: ?>
2722 <form method="post" class="d-inline">
2723 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="resume_bridge_after_enrollment">
2724 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">Resume Bridge Sync</button>
2725 </form>
2726 <?php endif; ?>
2727 </div>
2728 <small class="d-block mb-2 text-muted">
2729 <?php echo $bridgeEnabled
2730 ? 'Bridge is active. Pause before manual enrollment on F20H.'
2731 : 'Bridge is paused for enrollment mode. Resume after enrolling users.'; ?>
2732 </small>
2733 <?php endif; ?>
2734 <small>Background mode: Scheduled Task (no open PowerShell needed). If installed without admin rights, it runs after Windows sign-in.</small>
2735 </div>
2736 </div>
2737 </div>
2738 </div>
2739
2740 <div class="row g-3 mb-3">
2741 <div class="col-md-4">
2742 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-kpi-card">
2743 <div class="card-body">
2744 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">Connector Target</div>
2745 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h($connectorIp !== '' ? $connectorIp : 'Not set'); ?></div>
2746 <div class="text-muted">Port: <?php echo machine_h($connectorPort !== '' ? $connectorPort : '-'); ?> | Device: <?php echo machine_h($connectorDeviceNo !== '' ? $connectorDeviceNo : '-'); ?></div>
2747 </div>
2748 </div>
2749 </div>
2750 <div class="col-md-4">
2751 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-kpi-card">
2752 <div class="card-body">
2753 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">Loaded Machine Users</div>
2754 <div class="fs-3 fw-bold"><?php echo count($loadedUserRows); ?></div>
2755 <div class="text-muted"><?php echo $cloudRuntime
2756 ? 'Cloud mode: Read All Users uses bridge cache uploaded by your bridge computer.'
2757 : 'Use "Read All Users" to refresh this page view.'; ?></div>
2758 </div>
2759 </div>
2760 </div>
2761 <div class="col-md-4">
2762 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-kpi-card">
2763 <div class="card-body">
2764 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">Selected Machine User</div>
2765 <div class="fs-3 fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h($selectedUserId > 0 ? (string)$selectedUserId : '-'); ?></div>
2766 <div class="text-muted">Load a record, then edit its name or raw JSON below.</div>
2767 </div>
2768 </div>
2769 </div>
2770 <div class="col-md-4">
2771 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-kpi-card">
2772 <div class="card-body">
2773 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">Last Sync Status</div>
2774 <div class="fs-4 fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h($latestSyncRun['status'] ?? 'No runs yet'); ?></div>
2775 <div class="text-muted"><?php echo machine_h((string)($latestSyncRun['finished_at'] ?? $latestSyncRun['started_at'] ?? '')); ?></div>
2776 </div>
2777 </div>
2778 </div>
2779 <div class="col-md-4">
2780 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-kpi-card">
2781 <div class="card-body">
2782 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">Open Anomalies</div>
2783 <div class="fs-3 fw-bold"><?php echo $openAnomalyCount; ?></div>
2784 <div class="text-muted">Duplicate punches, unmapped scans, and suspicious attendance cases.</div>
2785 </div>
2786 </div>
2787 </div>
2788 <div class="col-md-4">
2789 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-kpi-card">
2790 <div class="card-body">
2791 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">Last Sync Totals</div>
2792 <div class="fw-bold">
2793 <?php echo machine_h('Raw ' . (string)($latestSyncRun['raw_inserted'] ?? 0) . ' | Logs ' . (string)($latestSyncRun['processed_logs'] ?? 0)); ?>
2794 </div>
2795 <div class="text-muted">
2796 <?php echo machine_h('Attendance changed: ' . (string)($latestSyncRun['attendance_changed'] ?? 0) . ' | Anomalies: ' . (string)($latestSyncRun['anomalies_found'] ?? 0)); ?>
2797 </div>
2798 </div>
2799 </div>
2800 </div>
2801 <div class="col-md-4">
2802 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-kpi-card">
2803 <div class="card-body">
2804 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">Last Ingest Event</div>
2805 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($ingestSummary['last_received_at'] ?? 'No ingest yet')); ?></div>
2806 <div class="text-muted">Node: <?php echo machine_h((string)($ingestSummary['last_source_node'] ?? 'unknown-node')); ?> | IP: <?php echo machine_h((string)($ingestSummary['last_source_ip'] ?? '-')); ?></div>
2807 <div class="text-muted">Token: <?php echo machine_h((string)($ingestSummary['last_token_status'] ?? 'unknown')); ?></div>
2808 </div>
2809 </div>
2810 </div>
2811 <div class="col-md-4">
2812 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-kpi-card">
2813 <div class="card-body">
2814 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">Ingest Today</div>
2815 <div class="fs-3 fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($ingestSummary['total_today'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
2816 <div class="text-muted">Accepted events: <?php echo machine_h((string)($ingestSummary['accepted_today'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
2817 </div>
2818 </div>
2819 </div>
2820 <div class="col-md-4">
2821 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-kpi-card">
2822 <div class="card-body">
2823 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-1">Last Ingest HTTP Status</div>
2824 <div class="fs-3 fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($ingestSummary['last_http_status'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
2825 <div class="text-muted">200 means accepted; 401 token mismatch; 422 invalid payload.</div>
2826 </div>
2827 </div>
2828 </div>
2829 </div>
2830
2831 <div class="row g-3">
2832 <div class="col-xl-4">
2833 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
2834 <div class="card-header"><h6 class="card-title mb-0">Machine Sync</h6></div>
2835 <div class="card-body">
2836 <p class="text-muted"><?php echo $cloudRuntime || $syncMode === 'direct_ingest'
2837 ? 'Process queued direct-ingest logs from Railway and reconcile them into attendance.'
2838 : 'Pull new logs from the F20H, then reconcile them into BioTern attendance.'; ?></p>
2839 <form method="post">
2840 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="sync">
2841 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100"><?php echo $cloudRuntime || $syncMode === 'direct_ingest' ? 'Process Ingest Queue' : 'Sync Now'; ?></button>
2842 </form>
2843 <?php if ($isAdmin && !$cloudRuntime): ?>
2844 <form method="post" class="mt-2" data-confirm="Revive the bridge connection now? This enables the bridge profile, repairs auto-start, and restarts BioTernBridgeWorker.">
2845 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="revive_bridge_connection">
2846 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success w-100">Revive Bridge Connection</button>
2847 </form>
2848 <form method="post" class="mt-2" data-confirm="Repair and start the BioTern bridge task on this Windows computer?">
2849 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="repair_bridge_task_now">
2850 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success w-100">Repair Bridge Now</button>
2851 </form>
2852 <form method="post" class="mt-2">
2853 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="restart_bridge_task_now">
2854 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-success w-100">Restart Bridge Now</button>
2855 </form>
2856 <form method="post" class="mt-2" onsubmit="return confirm('Restart Windows? System will restart in 30 seconds. Bridge will restart automatically on boot.')">
2857 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="restart_windows">
2858 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger w-100">Restart Windows</button>
2859 </form>
2860 <form method="post" class="mt-2">
2861 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="open_restart_bridge_shell">
2862 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-dark w-100">Open PowerShell: Restart Bridge Worker</button>
2863 </form>
2864 <form method="post" class="mt-2">
2865 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="open_bridge_log_tail_shell">
2866 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-secondary w-100">Open PowerShell: Bridge Log Tail</button>
2867 </form>
2868 <?php elseif ($isAdmin && $cloudRuntime): ?>
2869 <form method="post" class="mt-2" data-confirm="Revive the shared bridge profile? To restart the Windows task itself, use this same button from the bridge PC.">
2870 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="revive_bridge_connection">
2871 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success w-100">Revive Bridge Profile</button>
2872 </form>
2873 <div class="alert alert-info mt-2 mb-0 fs-12">Cloud can keep the bridge profile enabled, but only the local Windows bridge PC can restart BioTernBridgeWorker.</div>
2874 <?php endif; ?>
2875 </div>
2876 </div>
2877 </div>
2878
2879 <div class="col-xl-4">
2880 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
2881 <div class="card-header"><h6 class="card-title mb-0">Machine Status</h6></div>
2882 <div class="card-body">
2883 <div class="d-grid gap-2">
2884 <form method="post">
2885 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="get_device_info">
2886 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-primary w-100">Read Device Info</button>
2887 </form>
2888 <form method="post">
2889 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="get_network">
2890 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-primary w-100">Read Network Settings</button>
2891 </form>
2892 <form method="post">
2893 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="get_time">
2894 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-primary w-100">Read Device Time</button>
2895 </form>
2896 </div>
2897 </div>
2898 </div>
2899 </div>
2900
2901 <div class="col-xl-4">
2902 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
2903 <div class="card-header"><h6 class="card-title mb-0">Machine Config</h6></div>
2904 <div class="card-body">
2905 <div class="d-grid gap-2">
2906 <form method="post">
2907 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="get_config">
2908 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-secondary w-100" <?php echo $cloudRuntime ? 'disabled title="Unavailable in cloud runtime"' : ''; ?>>Read Device Config</button>
2909 </form>
2910 <form method="post">
2911 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="list_users">
2912 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-secondary w-100" title="<?php echo $cloudRuntime ? 'Loads latest user list from bridge cache' : 'Reads directly from machine'; ?>"><?php echo $cloudRuntime ? 'Read All Users (Bridge Cache)' : 'Read All Users'; ?></button>
2913 </form>
2914 <a href="attendance.php" class="btn btn-outline-secondary w-100">Open Attendance DTR</a>
2915 </div>
2916 </div>
2917 </div>
2918 </div>
2919
2920 <div class="col-xl-8">
2921 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-users-card">
2922 <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2">
2923 <h6 class="card-title mb-0">Users on Machine</h6>
2924 <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary machine-section-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#machineUsersCollapse" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="machineUsersCollapse">Toggle Users</button>
2925 </div>
2926 <div class="card-body collapse show" id="machineUsersCollapse">
2927 <form method="post" class="row g-2 align-items-end mb-3">
2928 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="get_user">
2929 <div class="col-sm-6">
2930 <label class="form-label">User ID on F20H</label>
2931 <input type="number" name="user_id" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($selectedUserId); ?>" min="1">
2932 </div>
2933 <div class="col-sm-6">
2934 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100" title="<?php echo $cloudRuntime ? 'Loads selected user from bridge cache' : 'Loads selected user from machine'; ?>">Load User Record</button>
2935 </div>
2936 </form>
2937
2938 <?php $rows = machine_extract_rows($userListDecoded); ?>
2939 <?php if (!empty($rows)): ?>
2940 <div class="table-responsive mb-3">
2941 <table class="table table-sm table-hover align-middle">
2942 <thead>
2943 <tr>
2944 <th>Machine ID</th>
2945 <th>Name</th>
2946 <th>Card No</th>
2947 <th>Privilege</th>
2948 <th>Rename on F20H</th>
2949 <th class="text-end">Actions</th>
2950 </tr>
2951 </thead>
2952 <tbody>
2953 <?php foreach ($rows as $row): ?>
2954 <tr>
2955 <?php $rowUserId = machine_row_value($row, ['id', 'ID', 'user_id', 'userId', 'EnrollNumber']); ?>
2956 <?php $rowName = machine_row_value($row, ['name', 'Name']); ?>
2957 <?php $rowCardNo = machine_row_value($row, ['cardno', 'cardNo', 'CardNo']); ?>
2958 <?php $rowPrivilege = machine_row_value($row, ['privilege', 'privalege', 'Privilege']); ?>
2959 <td><?php echo machine_h($rowUserId !== '' ? $rowUserId : '-'); ?></td>
2960 <td>
2961 <div class="fw-semibold"><?php echo machine_h($rowName !== '' ? $rowName : '(blank)'); ?></div>
2962 <small class="text-muted"><?php echo machine_h(machine_user_label($row)); ?></small>
2963 </td>
2964 <td><?php echo machine_h($rowCardNo !== '' ? ($isAdmin ? $rowCardNo : machine_mask_card_number($rowCardNo)) : '-'); ?></td>
2965 <td><?php echo machine_h($rowPrivilege !== '' ? $rowPrivilege : '-'); ?></td>
2966 <td class="machine-rename-cell">
2967 <?php if ($rowUserId !== ''): ?>
2968 <form method="post" class="d-flex gap-2">
2969 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="save_list_user_name">
2970 <input type="hidden" name="inline_user_id" value="<?php echo machine_h($rowUserId); ?>">
2971 <input type="text" name="inline_user_name" class="form-control form-control-sm" value="<?php echo machine_h($rowName); ?>" placeholder="Type new name">
2972 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">Save</button>
2973 </form>
2974 <?php else: ?>
2975 <span class="text-muted fs-12">Unavailable</span>
2976 <?php endif; ?>
2977 </td>
2978 <td class="text-end">
2979 <?php if ($rowUserId !== ''): ?>
2980 <div class="machine-inline-actions">
2981 <form method="post" class="d-inline">
2982 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="get_user">
2983 <input type="hidden" name="user_id" value="<?php echo machine_h($rowUserId); ?>">
2984 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">Load</button>
2985 </form>
2986 <form method="post" class="d-inline" data-confirm="Delete this fingerprint record from the F20H machine? This removes the machine user entry.">
2987 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="delete_fingerprint">
2988 <input type="hidden" name="user_id" value="<?php echo machine_h($rowUserId); ?>">
2989 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger">Delete FP</button>
2990 </form>
2991 </div>
2992 <?php else: ?>
2993 <span class="text-muted fs-12">No ID</span>
2994 <?php endif; ?>
2995 </td>
2996 </tr>
2997 <?php endforeach; ?>
2998 </tbody>
2999 </table>
3000 </div>
3001 <?php endif; ?>
3002
3003 <?php if ($isAdmin): ?>
3004 <label class="form-label">Raw User List</label>
3005 <textarea class="form-control" rows="10" readonly><?php echo machine_h($userListRaw); ?></textarea>
3006 <?php endif; ?>
3007 </div>
3008 </div>
3009 </div>
3010
3011 <div class="col-xl-4">
3012 <div class="card">
3013 <div class="card-header"><h6 class="card-title mb-0">Selected User Editor</h6></div>
3014 <div class="card-body">
3015 <form method="post" class="row g-2 mb-3">
3016 <div class="col-sm-8">
3017 <label class="form-label">Quick Name Update</label>
3018 <input type="text" name="user_name" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h((string)($_POST['user_name'] ?? machine_row_value(is_array($userDetailsDecoded) ? $userDetailsDecoded : [], ['name', 'Name', 'username', 'userName', 'UserName']))); ?>">
3019 </div>
3020 <div class="col-sm-4 d-flex align-items-end">
3021 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="save_user_name">
3022 <input type="hidden" name="user_id" value="<?php echo machine_h($selectedUserId); ?>">
3023 <input type="hidden" name="user_json" value="<?php echo machine_h($userDetailsRaw); ?>">
3024 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-primary w-100">Save Name</button>
3025 </div>
3026 </form>
3027
3028 <form method="post" class="mt-2" data-confirm="Delete this fingerprint record from the F20H machine? This removes the machine user entry.">
3029 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="delete_fingerprint">
3030 <input type="hidden" name="user_id" value="<?php echo machine_h($selectedUserId); ?>">
3031 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger">Delete Fingerprint</button>
3032 </form>
3033 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mt-2">This device SDK removes the whole F20H machine user record, which also removes the enrolled fingerprint from the device.</div>
3034
3035 <?php if ($isAdmin || is_array($userDetailsDecoded)): ?>
3036 <div class="mt-3">
3037 <button
3038 class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary"
3039 type="button"
3040 data-bs-toggle="collapse"
3041 data-bs-target="#machineUserAdvanced"
3042 aria-expanded="false"
3043 aria-controls="machineUserAdvanced"
3044 >
3045 Toggle Advanced Record
3046 </button>
3047 </div>
3048 <div class="collapse mt-3" id="machineUserAdvanced">
3049 <?php if ($isAdmin): ?>
3050 <form method="post">
3051 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="save_user_json">
3052 <input type="hidden" name="user_id" value="<?php echo machine_h($selectedUserId); ?>">
3053 <label class="form-label">Raw User JSON</label>
3054 <textarea
3055 name="user_json"
3056 class="form-control machine-user-json-field"
3057 rows="4"
3058 ><?php echo machine_h($userDetailsRaw); ?></textarea>
3059 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-3">
3060 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Save Raw User</button>
3061 </div>
3062 </form>
3063 <?php endif; ?>
3064
3065 <?php if (is_array($userDetailsDecoded)): ?>
3066 <div class="row g-2 mt-3">
3067 <?php echo machine_render_pairs($userDetailsDecoded); ?>
3068 </div>
3069 <?php endif; ?>
3070 </div>
3071 <?php endif; ?>
3072 </div>
3073 </div>
3074 </div>
3075
3076 <div class="col-xl-6">
3077 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
3078 <div class="card-header"><h6 class="card-title mb-0">Laptop Bridge Profile</h6></div>
3079 <div class="card-body">
3080 <div class="machine-config-pane h-100">
3081 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-3">Use this profile for your laptop bridge worker now. It is saved in Railway and used by Vercel endpoints.</div>
3082 <?php if (!$isAdmin): ?>
3083 <div class="alert alert-info mb-0">Only admins can change bridge profile settings.</div>
3084 <?php else: ?>
3085 <form method="post" class="row g-2 machine-compact-form">
3086 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="save_bridge_profile">
3087 <div class="col-sm-4">
3088 <label class="form-label">Laptop Bridge Preset</label>
3089 <select class="form-select" id="bridgePresetSelect" name="bridge_preset_preview">
3090 <?php foreach ($quickBridgeOptions as $presetKey => $preset): ?>
3091 <option
3092 value="<?php echo machine_h($presetKey); ?>"
3093 data-cloud-base-url="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['cloud_base_url']); ?>"
3094 data-ingest-path="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['ingest_path']); ?>"
3095 data-ingest-api-token="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['ingest_api_token']); ?>"
3096 data-poll-seconds="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['poll_seconds']); ?>"
3097 data-ip="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['ip']); ?>"
3098 data-gateway="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['gateway']); ?>"
3099 data-mask="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['mask']); ?>"
3100 data-port="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['port']); ?>"
3101 data-device-number="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['device_number']); ?>"
3102 data-output-path="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['output_path']); ?>"
3103 <?php echo $selectedBridgePreset === $presetKey ? 'selected' : ''; ?>
3104 >
3105 <?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['label']); ?>
3106 </option>
3107 <?php endforeach; ?>
3108 </select>
3109 </div>
3110 <div class="col-sm-4 d-flex align-items-end">
3111 <div class="form-check mb-2">
3112 <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" name="bridge_enabled" id="bridgeEnabled" <?php echo $bridgeEnabled ? 'checked' : ''; ?>>
3113 <label class="form-check-label" for="bridgeEnabled">Laptop Bridge Enabled</label>
3114 </div>
3115 </div>
3116 <div class="col-sm-4">
3117 <label class="form-label">Router Name</label>
3118 <input type="text" name="router_name" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeRouterName); ?>" placeholder="Router 2">
3119 </div>
3120 <div class="col-sm-4">
3121 <label class="form-label">Bridge Name</label>
3122 <input type="text" name="bridge_name" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeFriendlyName); ?>" placeholder="Laptop Bridge Router 2">
3123 </div>
3124 <div class="col-sm-4">
3125 <label class="form-label">Bridge Token</label>
3126 <input type="text" name="bridge_token" id="bridgeTokenField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeToken); ?>" placeholder="shared token for bridge_profile.php">
3127 </div>
3128 <div class="col-sm-6">
3129 <label class="form-label">Cloud Base URL</label>
3130 <input type="text" name="cloud_base_url" id="bridgeCloudBaseUrlField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeCloudBaseUrl); ?>" placeholder="https://your-app.vercel.app">
3131 </div>
3132 <div class="col-sm-6">
3133 <label class="form-label">Ingest Path</label>
3134 <input type="text" name="ingest_path" id="bridgeIngestPathField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeIngestPath); ?>" placeholder="/api/f20h_ingest.php">
3135 </div>
3136 <div class="col-sm-6">
3137 <label class="form-label">Ingest API Token</label>
3138 <input type="text" name="ingest_api_token" id="bridgeIngestApiTokenField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeIngestApiToken); ?>" placeholder="BIOTERN_API_TOKEN">
3139 </div>
3140 <div class="col-sm-6">
3141 <label class="form-label">Poll Seconds</label>
3142 <input type="number" name="poll_seconds" id="bridgePollSecondsField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h((string)$bridgePollSeconds); ?>" min="5" max="300">
3143 </div>
3144 <div class="col-sm-6">
3145 <label class="form-label">F20H IP</label>
3146 <input type="text" name="bridge_ip" id="bridgeIpField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeIpAddress); ?>" placeholder="192.168.110.201">
3147 </div>
3148 <div class="col-sm-6">
3149 <label class="form-label">Gateway</label>
3150 <input type="text" name="bridge_gateway" id="bridgeGatewayField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeGateway); ?>" placeholder="192.168.110.1">
3151 </div>
3152 <div class="col-sm-4">
3153 <label class="form-label">Mask</label>
3154 <input type="text" name="bridge_mask" id="bridgeMaskField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeMask); ?>" placeholder="255.255.255.0">
3155 </div>
3156 <div class="col-sm-4">
3157 <label class="form-label">Port</label>
3158 <input type="number" name="bridge_port" id="bridgePortField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h((string)$bridgePort); ?>" min="1">
3159 </div>
3160 <div class="col-sm-4">
3161 <label class="form-label">Device Number</label>
3162 <input type="number" name="bridge_device_number" id="bridgeDeviceNumberField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h((string)$bridgeDeviceNumber); ?>" min="1">
3163 </div>
3164 <div class="col-sm-6">
3165 <label class="form-label">Communication Password</label>
3166 <input type="text" name="bridge_password" id="bridgePasswordField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgePassword); ?>" placeholder="0">
3167 </div>
3168 <div class="col-sm-6">
3169 <label class="form-label">Local Output Path (bridge PC)</label>
3170 <input type="text" name="bridge_output_path" id="bridgeOutputPathField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeOutputPath); ?>" placeholder="<?php echo machine_h($defaultAttendanceOutputPath); ?>">
3171 </div>
3172 <div class="col-12">
3173 <label class="form-label">Install Auto-Start Bridge Task (recommended)</label>
3174 <div class="input-group mb-2">
3175 <input type="text" class="form-control" id="bridgeTaskInstallCommandField" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeTaskInstallCommand); ?>" readonly>
3176 <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" id="copyBridgeTaskInstallCmdBtn">Copy</button>
3177 </div>
3178 <small class="text-muted d-block mb-2">Run this once on the laptop bridge computer. It installs and starts a background task at startup/logon.</small>
3179
3180 <label class="form-label">Check Bridge Task Status</label>
3181 <div class="input-group mb-2">
3182 <input type="text" class="form-control" id="bridgeTaskStatusCommandField" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeTaskStatusCommand); ?>" readonly>
3183 <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" id="copyBridgeTaskStatusCmdBtn">Copy</button>
3184 </div>
3185 <small class="text-muted d-block mb-2">Use this to verify the background bridge task state anytime.</small>
3186
3187 <label class="form-label">Manual Start Bridge Worker (fallback)</label>
3188 <div class="input-group">
3189 <input type="text" class="form-control" id="bridgeWorkerCommandField" value="<?php echo machine_h($bridgeWorkerCommand); ?>" readonly>
3190 <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" id="copyBridgeWorkerCmdBtn">Copy</button>
3191 </div>
3192 <small class="text-muted">Use manual start only if task install is unavailable.</small>
3193 </div>
3194 <div class="col-12 d-flex flex-wrap gap-2">
3195 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">Save Laptop Bridge Profile</button>
3196 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" formaction="" formmethod="post" name="machine_action" value="quick_fill_bridge_router_1">Fill Shared Bridge (Router 1)</button>
3197 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" formaction="" formmethod="post" name="machine_action" value="quick_fill_bridge_router_2">Fill Shared Bridge (Router 2)</button>
3198 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-info btn-sm" formaction="" formmethod="post" name="machine_action" value="test_bridge_profile">Test Shared Bridge</button>
3199 <small class="text-muted align-self-center">Laptop worker fetches this profile from /bridge_profile.php using the bridge token.</small>
3200 <?php if ($isAdmin && strtolower((string)($bridgeProfile['profile_name'] ?? 'default')) !== 'default'): ?>
3201 <form method="post" class="d-inline ms-2" onsubmit="return confirm('Delete this bridge profile? This cannot be undone.');">
3202 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="delete_bridge_profile">
3203 <input type="hidden" name="profile_name" value="<?php echo machine_h((string)($bridgeProfile['profile_name'] ?? '')); ?>">
3204 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm">Delete Profile</button>
3205 </form>
3206 <?php endif; ?>
3207 </div>
3208 </form>
3209 <?php endif; ?>
3210 </div>
3211 </div>
3212 </div>
3213 </div>
3214
3215 <div class="col-xl-6">
3216 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
3217 <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
3218 <h6 class="card-title mb-0">Quick Router Switch</h6>
3219 <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" id="copyConnectorToMachineBtn">Copy to Network Form</button>
3220 </div>
3221 <div class="card-body">
3222 <div class="machine-config-pane h-100">
3223 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-2">Choose a router preset, adjust values, then save.</div>
3224 <form method="post" class="row g-2 mt-1 machine-compact-form">
3225 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="save_connector_profile">
3226 <div class="col-sm-6">
3227 <label class="form-label">Router Preset</label>
3228 <select class="form-select" id="routerPresetSelect" name="router_preset">
3229 <?php foreach ($quickRouterOptions as $presetKey => $preset): ?>
3230 <option
3231 value="<?php echo machine_h($presetKey); ?>"
3232 data-ip="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['ip']); ?>"
3233 data-gateway="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['gateway']); ?>"
3234 data-mask="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['mask']); ?>"
3235 data-port="<?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['port']); ?>"
3236 <?php echo $selectedRouterPreset === $presetKey ? 'selected' : ''; ?>
3237 >
3238 <?php echo machine_h((string)$preset['label']); ?>
3239 </option>
3240 <?php endforeach; ?>
3241 </select>
3242 </div>
3243 <div class="col-sm-6">
3244 <label class="form-label">Sync Mode</label>
3245 <select class="form-select" name="sync_mode">
3246 <option value="direct_ingest" <?php echo $syncMode === 'direct_ingest' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Direct machine ingest</option>
3247 <option value="connector_fallback" <?php echo $syncMode === 'connector_fallback' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Connector fallback worker</option>
3248 </select>
3249 </div>
3250 <div class="col-sm-6">
3251 <label class="form-label">Attendance File</label>
3252 <input type="text" name="connector_output_path" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorOutputPath !== '' ? $connectorOutputPath : $defaultAttendanceOutputPath); ?>" placeholder="<?php echo machine_h($defaultAttendanceOutputPath); ?>">
3253 </div>
3254 <div class="col-sm-6">
3255 <label class="form-label">Connector IP</label>
3256 <input type="text" name="connector_ip" id="connectorIpField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorIp); ?>" placeholder="192.168.110.201">
3257 </div>
3258 <div class="col-sm-6">
3259 <label class="form-label">Gateway</label>
3260 <input type="text" name="connector_gateway" id="connectorGatewayField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorGateway); ?>" placeholder="192.168.110.1">
3261 </div>
3262 <div class="col-sm-6">
3263 <label class="form-label">Mask</label>
3264 <input type="text" name="connector_mask" id="connectorMaskField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorMask); ?>" placeholder="255.255.255.0">
3265 </div>
3266 <div class="col-sm-6">
3267 <label class="form-label">Port</label>
3268 <input type="number" name="connector_port" id="connectorPortField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorPort !== '' ? $connectorPort : '5001'); ?>" min="1">
3269 </div>
3270 <div class="col-sm-6">
3271 <label class="form-label">Device Number</label>
3272 <input type="number" name="connector_device_number" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorDeviceNo !== '' ? $connectorDeviceNo : '1'); ?>" min="1">
3273 </div>
3274 <div class="col-sm-6">
3275 <label class="form-label">Communication Password</label>
3276 <input type="text" name="connector_password" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorPassword); ?>" placeholder="0">
3277 </div>
3278 <div class="col-sm-4">
3279 <label class="form-label">Duplicate Guard (minutes)</label>
3280 <input type="number" name="duplicate_guard_minutes" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h((string)$duplicateGuardMinutes); ?>" min="1" max="60">
3281 </div>
3282 <div class="col-sm-4">
3283 <label class="form-label">Slot Advance Minimum</label>
3284 <input type="number" name="slot_advance_minimum_minutes" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h((string)$slotAdvanceMinimumMinutes); ?>" min="1" max="240">
3285 </div>
3286 <div class="col-sm-4 d-flex align-items-end">
3287 <div class="form-check mb-2">
3288 <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" name="attendance_window_enabled" id="attendanceWindowEnabled" <?php echo $connectorWindowEnabled ? 'checked' : ''; ?>>
3289 <label class="form-check-label" for="attendanceWindowEnabled">Use Attendance Window</label>
3290 </div>
3291 </div>
3292 <div class="col-12">
3293 <div class="form-check">
3294 <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" name="disable_auto_import_on_ingest" id="disableAutoImportOnIngest" <?php echo !$autoImportOnIngest ? 'checked' : ''; ?>>
3295 <label class="form-check-label" for="disableAutoImportOnIngest">Disable automatic attendance import after direct ingest</label>
3296 </div>
3297 </div>
3298 <div class="col-sm-6">
3299 <label class="form-label">Window Start</label>
3300 <input type="text" name="attendance_start_time" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorStartTime); ?>" placeholder="08:00:00">
3301 </div>
3302 <div class="col-sm-6">
3303 <label class="form-label">Window End</label>
3304 <input type="text" name="attendance_end_time" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorEndTime); ?>" placeholder="20:00:00">
3305 </div>
3306 <div class="col-12 d-flex flex-wrap gap-2">
3307 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">Save Quick Router Settings</button>
3308 <small class="text-muted align-self-center">Use direct ingest for Vercel deployments. Use connector fallback when a Windows worker pulls from F20H first.</small>
3309 </div>
3310 <div class="col-12">
3311 <div class="machine-endpoint-box border rounded p-3">
3312 <div class="fw-semibold mb-1">Dedicated F20H Ingest Endpoint</div>
3313 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-2">Point the machine or bridge to this endpoint for raw F20H payload delivery. The same BIOTERN_API_TOKEN header/token used by the biometric API is accepted here.</div>
3314 <div class="d-flex flex-column gap-1">
3315 <code>/api/f20h_ingest.php</code>
3316 <small class="text-muted">Vercel fallback route: <code>/f20h_ingest.php</code></small>
3317 </div>
3318 </div>
3319 </div>
3320 </form>
3321 </div>
3322 </div>
3323 </div>
3324 </div>
3325
3326 <div class="col-12">
3327 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
3328 <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2">
3329 <h6 class="card-title mb-0">Direct Device Controls</h6>
3330 <button class="btn btn-sm machine-section-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#machineNetworkDirectControls" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="machineNetworkDirectControls">Toggle Device Controls</button>
3331 </div>
3332 <div class="card-body">
3333 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mb-2">Optional controls for direct machine networking and time adjustments.</div>
3334 <div class="collapse" id="machineNetworkDirectControls">
3335 <form method="post" class="row g-2 mb-4">
3336 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="save_network">
3337 <div class="col-sm-6">
3338 <label class="form-label">IP Address</label>
3339 <input type="text" name="ip_address" id="machineIpField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorIp); ?>" placeholder="192.168.100.201">
3340 </div>
3341 <div class="col-sm-6">
3342 <label class="form-label">Gateway</label>
3343 <input type="text" name="gateway" id="machineGatewayField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorGateway); ?>" placeholder="192.168.100.1">
3344 </div>
3345 <div class="col-sm-6">
3346 <label class="form-label">Mask</label>
3347 <input type="text" name="mask" id="machineMaskField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorMask); ?>" placeholder="255.255.255.0">
3348 </div>
3349 <div class="col-sm-6">
3350 <label class="form-label">Port</label>
3351 <input type="number" name="port" id="machinePortField" class="form-control" value="<?php echo machine_h($connectorPort !== '' ? $connectorPort : '5001'); ?>" placeholder="5001">
3352 </div>
3353 <div class="col-12">
3354 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-secondary">Save Network Settings</button>
3355 </div>
3356 </form>
3357
3358 <form method="post" class="row g-2">
3359 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="set_time">
3360 <div class="col-sm-8">
3361 <label class="form-label">Device Time</label>
3362 <input type="text" name="time_value" class="form-control" placeholder="2026-03-25 08:00:00">
3363 </div>
3364 <div class="col-sm-4 d-flex align-items-end">
3365 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-secondary w-100">Set Time</button>
3366 </div>
3367 </form>
3368
3369 <div class="mt-3">
3370 <label class="form-label">Last Network Readback</label>
3371 <textarea class="form-control" rows="4" readonly><?php echo machine_h($networkRaw); ?></textarea>
3372 </div>
3373 <div class="mt-3">
3374 <label class="form-label">Last Time Readback</label>
3375 <textarea class="form-control" rows="2" readonly><?php echo machine_h($timeRaw); ?></textarea>
3376 </div>
3377 </div>
3378 </div>
3379 </div>
3380 </div>
3381
3382 <div class="col-xl-8">
3383 <div class="card stretch stretch-full machine-raw-logs-card">
3384 <div class="card-header d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between gap-2">
3385 <div>
3386 <h6 class="card-title mb-0">Raw Machine Logs</h6>
3387 <div class="text-muted fs-12 mt-1">Every log BioTern has already pulled from the F20H. Use this to monitor volume before clearing the machine records.</div>
3388 </div>
3389 <div class="text-end">
3390 <div class="fw-semibold"><?php echo machine_h((string)$rawLogTotal); ?> total logs</div>
3391 <small class="text-muted"><?php echo machine_h((string)$rawLogProcessedTotal); ?> processed<?php echo $latestRawImportAt !== '' ? ' | Last import ' . machine_h($latestRawImportAt) : ''; ?></small>
3392 <div class="mt-2">
3393 <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary machine-section-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#machineRawLogsCollapse" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="machineRawLogsCollapse">Toggle Logs</button>
3394 </div>
3395 </div>
3396 </div>
3397 <div class="card-body p-0 collapse" id="machineRawLogsCollapse">
3398 <div class="table-responsive">
3399 <table class="table table-sm mb-0 align-middle">
3400 <thead>
3401 <tr>
3402 <th>Raw ID</th>
3403 <th>Fingerprint</th>
3404 <th>Matched Person</th>
3405 <th>Time</th>
3406 <th>Type</th>
3407 <th>Processed</th>
3408 <th>Imported</th>
3409 <th>Raw JSON</th>
3410 </tr>
3411 </thead>
3412 <tbody>
3413 <?php if (empty($rawLogRows)): ?>
3414 <tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted py-3">No raw machine logs stored yet.</td></tr>
3415 <?php else: ?>
3416 <?php foreach ($rawLogRows as $rawLog): ?>
3417 <?php $rawEntry = machine_decode_raw_log_entry((string)($rawLog['raw_data'] ?? '')); ?>
3418 <?php $rawFingerId = (int)($rawEntry['finger_id'] ?? $rawEntry['id'] ?? 0); ?>
3419 <?php $rawIdentity = $fingerprintIdentityMap[$rawFingerId] ?? []; ?>
3420 <tr>
3421 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($rawLog['id'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3422 <td><?php echo machine_h($rawFingerId > 0 ? (string)$rawFingerId : '-'); ?></td>
3423 <td><?php echo machine_h($rawIdentity !== [] ? machine_identity_label($rawIdentity) : 'Unmapped fingerprint'); ?></td>
3424 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($rawEntry['time'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3425 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($rawEntry['type'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3426 <td><?php echo machine_h(!empty($rawLog['processed']) ? 'Yes' : 'No'); ?></td>
3427 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($rawLog['imported_at'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3428 <td class="machine-raw-json-cell"><code><?php echo machine_h((string)($rawLog['raw_data'] ?? '')); ?></code></td>
3429 </tr>
3430 <?php endforeach; ?>
3431 <?php endif; ?>
3432 </tbody>
3433 </table>
3434 </div>
3435 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2 px-3 py-3 border-top">
3436 <small class="text-muted">Page <?php echo machine_h((string)$rawLogPage); ?> of <?php echo machine_h((string)$rawLogPages); ?></small>
3437 <div class="d-flex gap-2">
3438 <?php if ($rawLogPage > 1): ?>
3439 <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="biometric-machine.php?raw_page=<?php echo $rawLogPage - 1; ?>">Previous</a>
3440 <?php endif; ?>
3441 <?php if ($rawLogPage < $rawLogPages): ?>
3442 <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="biometric-machine.php?raw_page=<?php echo $rawLogPage + 1; ?>">Next</a>
3443 <?php endif; ?>
3444 </div>
3445 </div>
3446 </div>
3447 </div>
3448 </div>
3449
3450 <div class="col-xl-4">
3451 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
3452 <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2">
3453 <h6 class="card-title mb-0">Sync Attempts</h6>
3454 <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary machine-section-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#machineSyncAttemptsCollapse" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="machineSyncAttemptsCollapse">Toggle</button>
3455 </div>
3456 <div class="card-body p-0 collapse" id="machineSyncAttemptsCollapse">
3457 <div class="table-responsive">
3458 <table class="table table-sm mb-0 align-middle">
3459 <thead>
3460 <tr>
3461 <th>Status</th>
3462 <th>Started</th>
3463 <th>Imported</th>
3464 <th>Anomalies</th>
3465 </tr>
3466 </thead>
3467 <tbody>
3468 <?php if (empty($syncAttemptRows)): ?>
3469 <tr><td colspan="4" class="text-center text-muted py-3">No sync attempts yet.</td></tr>
3470 <?php else: ?>
3471 <?php foreach ($syncAttemptRows as $syncAttempt): ?>
3472 <tr>
3473 <td>
3474 <div class="fw-semibold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($syncAttempt['status'] ?? '-')); ?></div>
3475 <small class="text-muted"><?php echo machine_h((string)($syncAttempt['trigger_source'] ?? 'manual')); ?></small>
3476 </td>
3477 <td>
3478 <div><?php echo machine_h((string)($syncAttempt['started_at'] ?? '-')); ?></div>
3479 <small class="text-muted"><?php echo machine_h((string)($syncAttempt['finished_at'] ?? '')); ?></small>
3480 </td>
3481 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($syncAttempt['processed_logs'] ?? 0)); ?> logs</td>
3482 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($syncAttempt['anomalies_found'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
3483 </tr>
3484 <?php endforeach; ?>
3485 <?php endif; ?>
3486 </tbody>
3487 </table>
3488 </div>
3489 <div class="px-3 py-3 border-top text-muted fs-12">If these counts keep growing, run a sync, confirm the raw logs are stored here, then you can use "Clear Records" on the F20H to avoid filling the device.</div>
3490 </div>
3491 </div>
3492 </div>
3493
3494 <div class="col-xl-12">
3495 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
3496 <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2">
3497 <h6 class="card-title mb-0">Ingest Health Monitor</h6>
3498 <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary machine-section-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#machineIngestHealthCollapse" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="machineIngestHealthCollapse">Toggle</button>
3499 </div>
3500 <div class="card-body p-0 collapse" id="machineIngestHealthCollapse">
3501 <div class="table-responsive">
3502 <table class="table table-sm mb-0 align-middle">
3503 <thead>
3504 <tr>
3505 <th>Received</th>
3506 <th>Bridge Node</th>
3507 <th>Source IP</th>
3508 <th>Token</th>
3509 <th>HTTP</th>
3510 <th>Events</th>
3511 <th>Accepted</th>
3512 <th>Note</th>
3513 </tr>
3514 </thead>
3515 <tbody>
3516 <?php if (empty($recentIngestEvents)): ?>
3517 <tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted py-3">No ingest requests captured yet.</td></tr>
3518 <?php else: ?>
3519 <?php foreach ($recentIngestEvents as $event): ?>
3520 <tr>
3521 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($event['received_at'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3522 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($event['source_node'] ?? 'unknown-node')); ?></td>
3523 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($event['source_ip'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3524 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($event['token_status'] ?? 'unknown')); ?></td>
3525 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($event['http_status'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
3526 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($event['events_received'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
3527 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($event['events_accepted'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
3528 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($event['note'] ?? '')); ?></td>
3529 </tr>
3530 <?php endforeach; ?>
3531 <?php endif; ?>
3532 </tbody>
3533 </table>
3534 </div>
3535 </div>
3536 </div>
3537 </div>
3538
3539 <div class="col-xl-12">
3540 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
3541 <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2">
3542 <h6 class="card-title mb-0">Bridge Command Queue Monitor</h6>
3543 <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary machine-section-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#machineBridgeQueueCollapse" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="machineBridgeQueueCollapse">Toggle</button>
3544 </div>
3545 <div class="card-body collapse" id="machineBridgeQueueCollapse">
3546 <div class="row g-2 mb-3">
3547 <div class="col-sm-3">
3548 <div class="border rounded p-2">
3549 <div class="text-muted fs-12">Queued</div>
3550 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($bridgeQueueSummary['queued'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
3551 </div>
3552 </div>
3553 <div class="col-sm-3">
3554 <div class="border rounded p-2">
3555 <div class="text-muted fs-12">Claimed</div>
3556 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($bridgeQueueSummary['claimed'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
3557 </div>
3558 </div>
3559 <div class="col-sm-3">
3560 <div class="border rounded p-2">
3561 <div class="text-muted fs-12">Succeeded</div>
3562 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($bridgeQueueSummary['succeeded'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
3563 </div>
3564 </div>
3565 <div class="col-sm-3">
3566 <div class="border rounded p-2">
3567 <div class="text-muted fs-12">Failed</div>
3568 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($bridgeQueueSummary['failed'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
3569 </div>
3570 </div>
3571 </div>
3572
3573 <div class="table-responsive">
3574 <table class="table table-sm mb-0 align-middle">
3575 <thead>
3576 <tr>
3577 <th>ID</th>
3578 <th>Command</th>
3579 <th>Status</th>
3580 <th>Requested</th>
3581 <th>Claimed By</th>
3582 <th>Completed</th>
3583 <th>Attempts</th>
3584 <th>Result</th>
3585 </tr>
3586 </thead>
3587 <tbody>
3588 <?php if (empty($bridgeQueueRows)): ?>
3589 <tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted py-3">No bridge commands queued yet.</td></tr>
3590 <?php else: ?>
3591 <?php foreach ($bridgeQueueRows as $queueRow): ?>
3592 <?php
3593 $queueStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($queueRow['status'] ?? 'queued')));
3594 $statusClass = 'secondary';
3595 if ($queueStatus === 'queued') {
3596 $statusClass = 'warning';
3597 } elseif ($queueStatus === 'claimed') {
3598 $statusClass = 'info';
3599 } elseif ($queueStatus === 'succeeded') {
3600 $statusClass = 'success';
3601 } elseif ($queueStatus === 'failed') {
3602 $statusClass = 'danger';
3603 }
3604 $resultText = trim((string)($queueRow['result_text'] ?? ''));
3605 if ($resultText !== '' && strlen($resultText) > 110) {
3606 $resultText = substr($resultText, 0, 110) . '...';
3607 }
3608 ?>
3609 <tr>
3610 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($queueRow['id'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
3611 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($queueRow['command_name'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3612 <td><span class="badge bg-soft-<?php echo machine_h($statusClass); ?> text-<?php echo machine_h($statusClass); ?>"><?php echo machine_h((string)($queueRow['status'] ?? '-')); ?></span></td>
3613 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($queueRow['created_at'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3614 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($queueRow['claimed_by'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3615 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($queueRow['completed_at'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3616 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($queueRow['attempts'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
3617 <td><?php echo machine_h($resultText !== '' ? $resultText : '-'); ?></td>
3618 </tr>
3619 <?php endforeach; ?>
3620 <?php endif; ?>
3621 </tbody>
3622 </table>
3623 </div>
3624 </div>
3625 </div>
3626 </div>
3627
3628 <div class="col-xl-12">
3629 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
3630 <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2">
3631 <h6 class="card-title mb-0">Automatic Fingerprint Cleanup Monitor</h6>
3632 <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
3633 <?php if ($isAdmin): ?>
3634 <form method="post" class="d-inline">
3635 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="retry_all_fingerprint_cleanup">
3636 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-warning">Retry All Failed</button>
3637 </form>
3638 <?php endif; ?>
3639 <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary machine-section-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#machineAutoCleanupCollapse" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="machineAutoCleanupCollapse">Toggle</button>
3640 </div>
3641 </div>

3644 <div class="col-sm-3">
3645 <div class="border rounded p-2">
3646 <div class="text-muted fs-12">Queued</div>
3647 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($fingerprintCleanupSummary['queued'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
3648 </div>
3649 </div>
3650 <div class="col-sm-3">
3651 <div class="border rounded p-2">
3652 <div class="text-muted fs-12">Claimed</div>
3653 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($fingerprintCleanupSummary['claimed'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
3654 </div>
3655 </div>
3656 <div class="col-sm-3">
3657 <div class="border rounded p-2">
3658 <div class="text-muted fs-12">Succeeded</div>
3659 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($fingerprintCleanupSummary['succeeded'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
3660 </div>
3661 </div>
3662 <div class="col-sm-3">
3663 <div class="border rounded p-2">
3664 <div class="text-muted fs-12">Failed</div>
3665 <div class="fw-bold"><?php echo machine_h((string)($fingerprintCleanupSummary['failed'] ?? 0)); ?></div>

3668 </div>
3669
3670 <div class="table-responsive">
3671 <table class="table table-sm mb-0 align-middle">
3672 <thead>
3673 <tr>
3674 <th>Student</th>
3675 <th>Finger ID</th>
3676 <th>Log Status</th>
3677 <th>Queue ID</th>
3678 <th>Queue Status</th>
3679 <th>Queued</th>
3680 <th>Completed</th>
3681 <th>Message</th>
3682 <th class="text-end">Action</th>
3683 </tr>
3684 </thead>
3685 <tbody>
3686 <?php if (empty($fingerprintCleanupRows)): ?>
3687 <tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center text-muted py-3">No automatic fingerprint cleanup logs yet.</td></tr>
3688 <?php else: ?>
3689 <?php foreach ($fingerprintCleanupRows as $cleanupRow): ?>
3690 <?php
3691 $studentName = trim((string)($cleanupRow['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($cleanupRow['last_name'] ?? ''));
3692 $studentNumber = trim((string)($cleanupRow['student_number'] ?? ''));
3693 $displayStudent = $studentName !== ''
3694 ? ($studentNumber !== '' ? ($studentName . ' (' . $studentNumber . ')') : $studentName)
3695 : ('Student row #' . (int)($cleanupRow['student_id'] ?? 0));
3696
3697 $logStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($cleanupRow['status'] ?? 'queued')));
3698 $logStatusClass = 'secondary';
3699 if ($logStatus === 'queued') {
3700 $logStatusClass = 'warning';
3701 } elseif ($logStatus === 'claimed') {
3702 $logStatusClass = 'info';
3703 } elseif ($logStatus === 'succeeded') {
3704 $logStatusClass = 'success';
3705 } elseif ($logStatus === 'failed') {
3706 $logStatusClass = 'danger';
3707 }
3708
3709 $queueStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($cleanupRow['command_status'] ?? '')));
3710 $queueStatusClass = 'secondary';
3711 if ($queueStatus === 'queued') {
3712 $queueStatusClass = 'warning';
3713 } elseif ($queueStatus === 'claimed') {
3714 $queueStatusClass = 'info';
3715 } elseif ($queueStatus === 'succeeded') {
3716 $queueStatusClass = 'success';
3717 } elseif ($queueStatus === 'failed') {
3718 $queueStatusClass = 'danger';
3719 }
3720
3721 $cleanupMessage = trim((string)($cleanupRow['last_message'] ?? ''));
3722 if ($cleanupMessage === '') {
3723 $cleanupMessage = trim((string)($cleanupRow['result_text'] ?? ''));
3724 }
3725 if ($cleanupMessage !== '' && strlen($cleanupMessage) > 120) {
3726 $cleanupMessage = substr($cleanupMessage, 0, 120) . '...';
3727 }
3728 ?>
3729 <tr>
3730 <td><?php echo machine_h($displayStudent); ?></td>
3731 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($cleanupRow['finger_id'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
3732 <td><span class="badge bg-soft-<?php echo machine_h($logStatusClass); ?> text-<?php echo machine_h($logStatusClass); ?>"><?php echo machine_h((string)($cleanupRow['status'] ?? '-')); ?></span></td>
3733 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($cleanupRow['command_id'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
3734 <td><span class="badge bg-soft-<?php echo machine_h($queueStatusClass); ?> text-<?php echo machine_h($queueStatusClass); ?>"><?php echo machine_h($queueStatus !== '' ? $queueStatus : '-'); ?></span></td>
3735 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($cleanupRow['queued_at'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3736 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($cleanupRow['completed_at'] ?? '-')); ?></td>
3737 <td><?php echo machine_h($cleanupMessage !== '' ? $cleanupMessage : '-'); ?></td>
3738 <td class="text-end">
3739 <?php if ($isAdmin && $logStatus === 'failed'): ?>
3740 <form method="post" class="d-inline">
3741 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="retry_fingerprint_cleanup">
3742 <input type="hidden" name="cleanup_log_id" value="<?php echo (int)($cleanupRow['id'] ?? 0); ?>">
3743 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-warning">Retry</button>
3744 </form>
3745 <?php else: ?>
3746 <span class="text-muted small">-</span>
3747 <?php endif; ?>
3748 </td>
3749 </tr>
3750 <?php endforeach; ?>
3751 <?php endif; ?>
3752 </tbody>
3753 </table>
3754 </div>
3755 </div>
3756 </div>
3757 </div>
3758
3759 <?php if ($isAdmin): ?>
3760 <div class="col-12 d-flex justify-content-end">
3761 <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary machine-section-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#machineAdminAdvancedPanels" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="machineAdminAdvancedPanels">Toggle Admin Advanced Panels</button>
3762 </div>
3763 <div class="col-12 collapse" id="machineAdminAdvancedPanels">
3764 <div class="row g-3">
3765 <div class="col-xl-6">
3766 <div class="card stretch stretch-full">
3767 <div class="card-header"><h6 class="card-title mb-0">Recent Anomalies</h6></div>
3768 <div class="card-body p-0">
3769 <div class="table-responsive">
3770 <table class="table table-sm mb-0">
3771 <thead>
3772 <tr>
3773 <th>Type</th>
3774 <th>Fingerprint</th>
3775 <th>Matched Person</th>
3776 <th>Severity</th>
3777 <th>Message</th>
3778 <th>When</th>
3779 </tr>
3780 </thead>
3781 <tbody>
3782 <?php if (empty($recentAnomalies)): ?>

3784 <?php else: ?>

3791 <small class="text-muted">
3792 <?php echo machine_h((string)($anomaly['mapped_user_name'] ?? '') !== '' ? ('User #' . (string)($anomaly['user_id'] ?? '-')) : ((string)($anomaly['student_id'] ?? '') !== '' ? ('Student row #' . (string)$anomaly['student_id']) : 'No BioTern match')); ?>
3793 </small>
3794 </td>
3795 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)$anomaly['severity']); ?></td>
3796 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)$anomaly['message']); ?></td>
3797 <td><?php echo machine_h((string)($anomaly['event_time'] ?: $anomaly['created_at'])); ?></td>
3798 </tr>
3799 <?php endforeach; ?>
3800 <?php endif; ?>
3801 </tbody>
3802 </table>
3803 </div>
3804 </div>
3805 </div>
3806 </div>

3869 </form>

3877 <div class="card-body">

3883 </div>

3886 <input type="text" name="communication_password" class="form-control" placeholder="0">
3887 </div>

3889 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">Save Device Identity</button>
3890 </div>
3891 </form>
3892
3893 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2">
3894 <form method="post" data-confirm="Restart the F20H now?">
3895 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="restart">
3896 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Restart Machine</button>
3897 </form>
3898 <form method="post" data-confirm="Clear only attendance records from the F20H?">
3899 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="clear_records">
3900 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-warning">Clear Records</button>
3901 </form>
3902 <form method="post" data-confirm="Clear admin data on the F20H?">
3903 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="clear_admin">
3904 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-warning">Clear Admin</button>
3905 </form>
3906 <form method="post" data-confirm="Clear all users from the F20H? This removes the machine user list.">
3907 <input type="hidden" name="machine_action" value="clear_users">
3908 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-danger">Clear All Users</button>
3909 </form>
3910 </div>
3911 </div>
3912 </div>
3913 </div>
3914 </div>
3915 </div>
3916 <?php endif; ?>
3917 </div>
3918</div>
3919</main>
