Biometric Integration Module

pages/fingerprint_mapping.php

PHP / HTML / JavaScript 1177 lines 58.8 KB
Selected source code for capstone documentation. Vendor libraries, uploads, logs, and backup data are excluded.
1<?php
2ob_start();
3require_once __DIR__ . '/../config/db.php';
4require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/tools/biometric_ops.php';
5require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/section_format.php';
6
7require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/auth-session.php';
8biotern_boot_session(isset($conn) ? $conn : null);
9
10$role = strtolower(trim((string)($_SESSION['role'] ?? $_SESSION['user_role'] ?? '')));
11if (!in_array($role, ['admin', 'coordinator', 'supervisor'], true)) {
12 header('Location: homepage.php');
13 exit;
14}
15
16$host = defined('DB_HOST') ? DB_HOST : 'localhost';
17$db_user = defined('DB_USER') ? DB_USER : 'root';
18$db_password = defined('DB_PASS') ? DB_PASS : '';
19$db_name = defined('DB_NAME') ? DB_NAME : 'biotern_db';
20$db_port = defined('DB_PORT') ? DB_PORT : 3306;
21
22if (!isset($conn) || !($conn instanceof mysqli)) {
23 $conn = new mysqli($host, $db_user, $db_password, $db_name, $db_port);
24 if ($conn->connect_error) {
25 ob_end_clean();
26 die('Connection failed: ' . $conn->connect_error);
27 }
28 $conn->set_charset('utf8mb4');
29}
30
31$conn->query("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fingerprint_user_map (\n finger_id INT NOT NULL,\n user_id INT NOT NULL,\n created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n PRIMARY KEY (finger_id),\n UNIQUE KEY uniq_fingerprint_user_map_user_id (user_id),\n KEY idx_fingerprint_user_map_user_id (user_id)\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4");
32
33$colCreatedAt = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM fingerprint_user_map LIKE 'created_at'");
34if ($colCreatedAt instanceof mysqli_result) {
35 if ($colCreatedAt->num_rows === 0) {
36 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE fingerprint_user_map ADD COLUMN created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP");
37 }
38 $colCreatedAt->close();
39}
40
41$colUpdatedAt = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM fingerprint_user_map LIKE 'updated_at'");
42if ($colUpdatedAt instanceof mysqli_result) {
43 if ($colUpdatedAt->num_rows === 0) {
44 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE fingerprint_user_map ADD COLUMN updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP");
45 }
46 $colUpdatedAt->close();
47}
48
49$idxUniqueUser = $conn->query("SHOW INDEX FROM fingerprint_user_map WHERE Key_name = 'uniq_fingerprint_user_map_user_id'");
50if ($idxUniqueUser instanceof mysqli_result) {
51 if ($idxUniqueUser->num_rows === 0) {
52 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE fingerprint_user_map ADD UNIQUE KEY uniq_fingerprint_user_map_user_id (user_id)");
53 }
54 $idxUniqueUser->close();
55}
56
57$idxUser = $conn->query("SHOW INDEX FROM fingerprint_user_map WHERE Key_name = 'idx_fingerprint_user_map_user_id'");
58if ($idxUser instanceof mysqli_result) {
59 if ($idxUser->num_rows === 0) {
60 $conn->query("ALTER TABLE fingerprint_user_map ADD KEY idx_fingerprint_user_map_user_id (user_id)");
61 }
62 $idxUser->close();
63}
64
65$flashType = 'success';
66$msg = '';
67$editFingerId = (int)($_GET['edit_finger_id'] ?? 0);
68$filterCourseId = (int)($_GET['filter_course_id'] ?? 0);
69$filterSectionId = (int)($_GET['filter_section_id'] ?? 0);
70$detectedStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($_GET['detected_status'] ?? 'all')));
71if (!in_array($detectedStatus, ['all', 'mapped', 'unmapped'], true)) {
72 $detectedStatus = 'all';
73}
74$detectedQuery = trim((string)($_GET['detected_query'] ?? ''));
75$unmappedQuery = trim((string)($_GET['unmapped_query'] ?? ''));
76$unmappedAdminOnly = (int)($_GET['unmapped_admin_only'] ?? 0) === 1;
77$printMode = strtolower(trim((string)($_GET['print'] ?? '')));
78if (!in_array($printMode, ['mapped', 'unmapped_students'], true)) {
79 $printMode = '';
80}
81$authorizedRoles = ['admin', 'coordinator', 'supervisor'];
82
83function fingerprint_mapping_requeue_raw_logs(mysqli $conn, int $fingerId): int
84{
85 if ($fingerId <= 0) {
86 return 0;
87 }
88
89 $res = $conn->query('SELECT id, raw_data FROM biometric_raw_logs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1000');
90 if (!($res instanceof mysqli_result)) {
91 return 0;
92 }
93
94 $ids = [];
95 while ($row = $res->fetch_assoc()) {
96 $entry = json_decode((string)($row['raw_data'] ?? ''), true);
97 if (!is_array($entry)) {
98 continue;
99 }
100
101 $entryFingerId = isset($entry['finger_id']) ? (int)$entry['finger_id'] : (isset($entry['id']) ? (int)$entry['id'] : 0);
102 if ($entryFingerId === $fingerId) {
103 $ids[] = (int)$row['id'];
104 }
105 }
106 $res->close();
107
108 if ($ids === []) {
109 return 0;
110 }
111
112 $idList = implode(',', array_map('intval', array_unique($ids)));
113 $conn->query("UPDATE biometric_raw_logs SET processed = 0 WHERE id IN ({$idList})");
114 return max(0, (int)$conn->affected_rows);
115}
116
117if (isset($_SESSION['fingerprint_mapping_flash']) && is_array($_SESSION['fingerprint_mapping_flash'])) {
118 $flashType = (string)($_SESSION['fingerprint_mapping_flash']['type'] ?? 'success');
119 $msg = (string)($_SESSION['fingerprint_mapping_flash']['message'] ?? '');
120 unset($_SESSION['fingerprint_mapping_flash']);
121}
122
123if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
124 $action = trim((string)($_POST['mapping_action'] ?? 'save_student'));
125
126 try {
127 if ($action === 'delete') {
128 $fingerId = (int)($_POST['finger_id'] ?? 0);
129 if ($fingerId <= 0) {
130 throw new RuntimeException('Invalid fingerprint ID.');
131 }
132
133 $stmt = $conn->prepare('DELETE FROM fingerprint_user_map WHERE finger_id = ?');
134 $stmt->bind_param('i', $fingerId);
135 $stmt->execute();
136 $stmt->close();
137
138 biometric_ops_log_audit(
139 $conn,
140 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0),
141 $role,
142 'fingerprint_mapping_removed',
143 'fingerprint_mapping',
144 (string)$fingerId,
145 ['finger_id' => $fingerId]
146 );
147
148 $_SESSION['fingerprint_mapping_flash'] = ['type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Mapping removed.'];
149 header('Location: fingerprint_mapping.php');
150 exit;
151 }
152
153 $fingerId = (int)($_POST['finger_id'] ?? 0);
154 $userId = (int)($_POST['user_id'] ?? 0);
155
156 if ($fingerId <= 0 || $userId <= 0) {
157 throw new RuntimeException('Fingerprint ID and user are required.');
158 }
159
160 $userStmt = $conn->prepare('SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1');
161 $userStmt->bind_param('i', $userId);
162 $userStmt->execute();
163 $userRes = $userStmt->get_result();
164 $userRow = $userRes ? $userRes->fetch_assoc() : null;
165 $userStmt->close();
166
167 if (!$userRow) {
168 throw new RuntimeException('Selected user does not exist.');
169 }
170
171 $targetRole = strtolower(trim((string)($userRow['role'] ?? '')));
172
173 $studentCheck = $conn->prepare('SELECT id FROM students WHERE user_id = ? LIMIT 1');
174 $studentCheck->bind_param('i', $userId);
175 $studentCheck->execute();
176 $studentResult = $studentCheck->get_result();
177 $studentRow = $studentResult ? $studentResult->fetch_assoc() : null;
178 $studentCheck->close();
179
180 if ($action === 'save_student' && !$studentRow) {
181 throw new RuntimeException('Selected user is not linked to a student record yet.');
182 }
183
184 if ($action === 'save_personnel' && !in_array($targetRole, $authorizedRoles, true)) {
185 throw new RuntimeException('Selected user is not an authorized personnel account.');
186 }
187
188 if (!$studentRow && !in_array($targetRole, $authorizedRoles, true)) {
189 throw new RuntimeException('Selected user must be either a student-linked user or authorized personnel.');
190 }
191
192 $duplicateCheck = $conn->prepare('SELECT finger_id FROM fingerprint_user_map WHERE user_id = ? AND finger_id <> ? LIMIT 1');
193 $duplicateCheck->bind_param('ii', $userId, $fingerId);
194 $duplicateCheck->execute();
195 $duplicateResult = $duplicateCheck->get_result();
196 $duplicateRow = $duplicateResult ? $duplicateResult->fetch_assoc() : null;
197 $duplicateCheck->close();
198
199 if ($duplicateRow) {
200 throw new RuntimeException('That user is already mapped to another fingerprint.');
201 }
202
203 $stmt = $conn->prepare('INSERT INTO fingerprint_user_map (finger_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP');
204 $stmt->bind_param('ii', $fingerId, $userId);
205 $stmt->execute();
206 $stmt->close();
207
208 $requeuedLogs = fingerprint_mapping_requeue_raw_logs($conn, $fingerId);
209
210 biometric_ops_log_audit(
211 $conn,
212 (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0),
213 $role,
214 'fingerprint_mapping_saved',
215 'fingerprint_mapping',
216 (string)$fingerId,
217 ['finger_id' => $fingerId, 'user_id' => $userId, 'mapping_action' => $action]
218 );
219
220 $_SESSION['fingerprint_mapping_flash'] = [
221 'type' => 'success',
222 'message' => 'Mapping updated.' . ($requeuedLogs > 0 ? ' Requeued ' . $requeuedLogs . ' raw log(s) for attendance import.' : ''),
223 ];
224 header('Location: fingerprint_mapping.php');
225 exit;
226 } catch (Throwable $e) {
227 $_SESSION['fingerprint_mapping_flash'] = ['type' => 'danger', 'message' => $e->getMessage()];
228 $redirect = 'fingerprint_mapping.php';
229 if ($editFingerId > 0) {
230 $redirect .= '?edit_finger_id=' . $editFingerId;
231 }
232 header('Location: ' . $redirect);
233 exit;
234 }
235}
236
237$courses = [];
238$courseRes = $conn->query('SELECT id, name FROM courses ORDER BY name ASC');
239if ($courseRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
240 while ($row = $courseRes->fetch_assoc()) {
241 $courses[] = $row;
242 }
243 $courseRes->close();
244}
245
246$sections = [];
247$sectionRes = $conn->query("SELECT id, course_id, code, name, COALESCE(NULLIF(code, ''), name) AS section_label FROM sections ORDER BY section_label ASC");
248if ($sectionRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
249 while ($row = $sectionRes->fetch_assoc()) {
250 $row['section_label'] = biotern_format_section_label((string)($row['code'] ?? ''), (string)($row['name'] ?? ''));
251 $sections[] = $row;
252 }
253 $sectionRes->close();
254}
255
256$mappings = [];
257$mappingSql = "
258 SELECT
259 m.finger_id,
260 m.user_id,
261 m.created_at,
262 m.updated_at,
263 u.name AS user_name,
264 LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(u.role, ''))) AS user_role,
265 s.id AS student_row_id,
266 s.student_id AS student_number,
267 s.created_at AS enrolled_at,
268 s.assignment_track,
269 s.internal_total_hours_remaining,
270 s.external_total_hours_remaining,
271 s.course_id,
272 s.section_id,
273 c.name AS course_name,
274 sec.code AS section_code,
275 sec.name AS section_name,
276 CONCAT(COALESCE(s.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(s.last_name, '')) AS student_name
277 FROM fingerprint_user_map m
278 LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id
279 LEFT JOIN students s ON s.user_id = m.user_id
280 LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = s.course_id
281 LEFT JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = s.section_id
282 ORDER BY m.finger_id ASC
283";
284$mappingRes = $conn->query($mappingSql);
285if ($mappingRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
286 while ($row = $mappingRes->fetch_assoc()) {
287 $row['section_label'] = biotern_format_section_label((string)($row['section_code'] ?? ''), (string)($row['section_name'] ?? ''));
288 $mappings[] = $row;
289 }
290 $mappingRes->close();
291}
292
293$studentMappings = [];
294$personnelMappings = [];
295foreach ($mappings as $row) {
296 if ((int)($row['student_row_id'] ?? 0) > 0) {
297 $studentMappings[] = $row;
298 continue;
299 }
300
301 if (in_array((string)($row['user_role'] ?? ''), $authorizedRoles, true)) {
302 $personnelMappings[] = $row;
303 continue;
304 }
305
306 $studentMappings[] = $row;
307}
308
309$filteredStudentMappings = array_values(array_filter($studentMappings, static function (array $row) use ($filterCourseId, $filterSectionId): bool {
310 if ($filterCourseId > 0 && (int)($row['course_id'] ?? 0) !== $filterCourseId) {
311 return false;
312 }
313
314 if ($filterSectionId > 0 && (int)($row['section_id'] ?? 0) !== $filterSectionId) {
315 return false;
316 }
317
318 return true;
319}));
320
321$unmappedStudents = [];
322$unmappedStudentSql = "
323 SELECT
324 s.id AS student_row_id,
325 s.student_id AS student_number,
326 s.created_at,
327 s.course_id,
328 s.section_id,
329 c.name AS course_name,
330 sec.code AS section_code,
331 sec.name AS section_name,
332 TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(s.last_name, ''), ', ', COALESCE(s.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(s.middle_name, ''))) AS student_name
333 FROM students s
334 LEFT JOIN fingerprint_user_map m ON m.user_id = s.user_id
335 LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = s.course_id
336 LEFT JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = s.section_id
337 WHERE COALESCE(s.user_id, 0) > 0
338 AND m.user_id IS NULL
339 ORDER BY s.last_name ASC, s.first_name ASC
340";
341$unmappedStudentRes = $conn->query($unmappedStudentSql);
342if ($unmappedStudentRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
343 while ($row = $unmappedStudentRes->fetch_assoc()) {
344 $row['section_label'] = biotern_format_section_label((string)($row['section_code'] ?? ''), (string)($row['section_name'] ?? ''));
345 $unmappedStudents[] = $row;
346 }
347 $unmappedStudentRes->close();
348}
349$filteredUnmappedStudents = array_values(array_filter($unmappedStudents, static function (array $row) use ($filterCourseId, $filterSectionId): bool {
350 if ($filterCourseId > 0 && (int)($row['course_id'] ?? 0) !== $filterCourseId) {
351 return false;
352 }
353
354 if ($filterSectionId > 0 && (int)($row['section_id'] ?? 0) !== $filterSectionId) {
355 return false;
356 }
357
358 return true;
359}));
360
361$orphanMappings = array_values(array_filter($studentMappings, static function (array $row) use ($authorizedRoles): bool {
362 return (int)($row['student_row_id'] ?? 0) <= 0 && !in_array((string)($row['user_role'] ?? ''), $authorizedRoles, true);
363}));
364
365$detectedFingerprints = [];
366$extractFingerId = static function (array $entry): int {
367 $candidates = [
368 $entry['finger_id'] ?? null,
369 $entry['fingerId'] ?? null,
370 $entry['id'] ?? null,
371 $entry['user_id'] ?? null,
372 $entry['userId'] ?? null,
373 $entry['uid'] ?? null,
374 $entry['enroll_number'] ?? null,
375 $entry['enrollNumber'] ?? null,
376 $entry['EnrollNumber'] ?? null,
377 ];
378
379 foreach ($candidates as $candidate) {
380 if ($candidate === null) {
381 continue;
382 }
383 $parsed = (int)trim((string)$candidate);
384 if ($parsed > 0) {
385 return $parsed;
386 }
387 }
388
389 return 0;
390};
391
392$rawLogRes = $conn->query('SELECT raw_data FROM biometric_raw_logs ORDER BY id DESC');
393if ($rawLogRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
394 while ($row = $rawLogRes->fetch_assoc()) {
395 $entry = json_decode((string)($row['raw_data'] ?? ''), true);
396 if (!is_array($entry)) {
397 continue;
398 }
399
400 if (isset($entry['data']) && is_array($entry['data'])) {
401 $entry = $entry['data'];
402 }
403
404 $fingerId = $extractFingerId($entry);
405 $timeValue = trim((string)($entry['time'] ?? ''));
406 if ($fingerId <= 0) {
407 continue;
408 }
409
410 if (!isset($detectedFingerprints[$fingerId])) {
411 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId] = [
412 'finger_id' => $fingerId,
413 'last_seen' => $timeValue,
414 'machine_user_name' => '',
415 'machine_is_admin' => false,
416 'machine_admin_label' => '',
417 'is_mapped' => false,
418 'mapped_user_name' => '',
419 'mapped_user_id' => 0,
420 'student_name' => '',
421 'student_number' => '',
422 'mapped_created_at' => '',
423 ];
424 }
425 }
426 $rawLogRes->close();
427}
428
429$extractBridgeRows = static function ($decoded): array {
430 if (!is_array($decoded)) {
431 return [];
432 }
433
434 foreach (['rows', 'users', 'data', 'items', 'list'] as $key) {
435 if (isset($decoded[$key]) && is_array($decoded[$key])) {
436 return $decoded[$key];
437 }
438 }
439
440 $isList = array_keys($decoded) === range(0, count($decoded) - 1);
441 return $isList ? $decoded : [$decoded];
442};
443
444$extractMachineAdminMeta = static function (array $userRow): array {
445 $indicatorKeys = [
446 'privilege', 'Privilege', 'role', 'Role', 'user_role', 'userRole',
447 'authority', 'Authority', 'admin', 'is_admin', 'isAdmin',
448 'user_type', 'UserType', 'type',
449 ];
450
451 foreach ($indicatorKeys as $key) {
452 if (!array_key_exists($key, $userRow)) {
453 continue;
454 }
455
456 $raw = $userRow[$key];
457 $valueText = strtolower(trim((string)$raw));
458
459 if (is_numeric($raw) && (int)$raw > 0) {
460 return ['is_admin' => true, 'label' => $key . ':' . (string)$raw];
461 }
462
463 if ($valueText !== '' && preg_match('/admin|manager|super|master|owner/', $valueText)) {
464 return ['is_admin' => true, 'label' => $key . ':' . (string)$raw];
465 }
466 }
467
468 foreach ($userRow as $rawValue) {
469 if (!is_scalar($rawValue)) {
470 continue;
471 }
472
473 $valueText = strtolower(trim((string)$rawValue));
474 if ($valueText !== '' && preg_match('/admin|manager|super|master|owner/', $valueText)) {
475 return ['is_admin' => true, 'label' => (string)$rawValue];
476 }
477 }
478
479 return ['is_admin' => false, 'label' => ''];
480};
481
482$bridgeCacheRes = $conn->query('SELECT users_json FROM biometric_bridge_user_cache ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1');
483if ($bridgeCacheRes instanceof mysqli_result) {
484 $bridgeCacheRow = $bridgeCacheRes->fetch_assoc();
485 $bridgeCacheRes->close();
486
487 $usersJson = trim((string)($bridgeCacheRow['users_json'] ?? ''));
488 if ($usersJson !== '') {
489 $decodedUsers = json_decode($usersJson, true);
490 if (is_array($decodedUsers)) {
491 foreach ($extractBridgeRows($decodedUsers) as $userRow) {
492 if (!is_array($userRow)) {
493 continue;
494 }
495
496 $fingerId = (int)trim((string)($userRow['id'] ?? $userRow['ID'] ?? $userRow['user_id'] ?? $userRow['userId'] ?? $userRow['EnrollNumber'] ?? 0));
497 if ($fingerId <= 0) {
498 continue;
499 }
500
501 $machineName = trim((string)($userRow['name'] ?? $userRow['Name'] ?? $userRow['user_name'] ?? ''));
502 $machineAdminMeta = $extractMachineAdminMeta($userRow);
503 $machineIsAdmin = !empty($machineAdminMeta['is_admin']);
504 $machineAdminLabel = trim((string)($machineAdminMeta['label'] ?? ''));
505
506 if (!isset($detectedFingerprints[$fingerId])) {
507 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId] = [
508 'finger_id' => $fingerId,
509 'last_seen' => '',
510 'machine_user_name' => $machineName,
511 'machine_is_admin' => $machineIsAdmin,
512 'machine_admin_label' => $machineAdminLabel,
513 'is_mapped' => false,
514 'mapped_user_name' => '',
515 'mapped_user_id' => 0,
516 'student_name' => '',
517 'student_number' => '',
518 'mapped_created_at' => '',
519 ];
520 } elseif ($machineName !== '' && trim((string)($detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['machine_user_name'] ?? '')) === '') {
521 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['machine_user_name'] = $machineName;
522 }
523
524 if ($machineIsAdmin) {
525 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['machine_is_admin'] = true;
526 if ($machineAdminLabel !== '') {
527 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['machine_admin_label'] = $machineAdminLabel;
528 }
529 }
530 }
531 }
532 }
533}
534
535foreach ($mappings as $mapping) {
536 $fingerId = (int)($mapping['finger_id'] ?? 0);
537 if ($fingerId <= 0) {
538 continue;
539 }
540
541 if (!isset($detectedFingerprints[$fingerId])) {
542 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId] = [
543 'finger_id' => $fingerId,
544 'last_seen' => '',
545 'machine_user_name' => '',
546 'machine_is_admin' => false,
547 'machine_admin_label' => '',
548 'is_mapped' => false,
549 'mapped_user_name' => '',
550 'mapped_user_id' => 0,
551 'student_name' => '',
552 'student_number' => '',
553 'mapped_created_at' => '',
554 ];
555 }
556
557 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['is_mapped'] = true;
558 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['mapped_user_name'] = (string)($mapping['user_name'] ?? '');
559 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['mapped_user_id'] = (int)($mapping['user_id'] ?? 0);
560 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['student_name'] = trim((string)($mapping['student_name'] ?? ''));
561 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['student_number'] = (string)($mapping['student_number'] ?? '');
562 $detectedFingerprints[$fingerId]['mapped_created_at'] = (string)($mapping['created_at'] ?? '');
563}
564
565ksort($detectedFingerprints);
566$unmappedDetectedCount = 0;
567foreach ($detectedFingerprints as $detectedFingerprint) {
568 if (empty($detectedFingerprint['is_mapped'])) {
569 $unmappedDetectedCount++;
570 }
571}
572
573$latestDetectedFingerId = empty($detectedFingerprints) ? 0 : (int)max(array_keys($detectedFingerprints));
574$latestMappedFingerId = 0;
575$machineAdminDetectedCount = 0;
576foreach ($detectedFingerprints as $fingerId => $detectedFingerprint) {
577 if (!empty($detectedFingerprint['is_mapped']) && (int)$fingerId > $latestMappedFingerId) {
578 $latestMappedFingerId = (int)$fingerId;
579 }
580
581 if (!empty($detectedFingerprint['machine_is_admin'])) {
582 $machineAdminDetectedCount++;
583 }
584}
585
586$unmappedDetectedFingerprints = array_values(array_filter($detectedFingerprints, static function (array $row) use ($unmappedQuery, $unmappedAdminOnly): bool {
587 if (!empty($row['is_mapped'])) {
588 return false;
589 }
590
591 if ($unmappedAdminOnly && empty($row['machine_is_admin'])) {
592 return false;
593 }
594
595 if ($unmappedQuery === '') {
596 return true;
597 }
598
599 $haystack = strtolower(trim(implode(' ', [
600 (string)($row['finger_id'] ?? ''),
601 (string)($row['last_seen'] ?? ''),
602 (string)($row['machine_user_name'] ?? ''),
603 (string)($row['machine_admin_label'] ?? ''),
604 ])));
605
606 return str_contains($haystack, strtolower($unmappedQuery));
607}));
608
609$filteredDetectedFingerprints = array_values(array_filter($detectedFingerprints, static function (array $row) use ($detectedStatus, $detectedQuery): bool {
610 $isMapped = !empty($row['is_mapped']);
611 if ($detectedStatus === 'mapped' && !$isMapped) {
612 return false;
613 }
614 if ($detectedStatus === 'unmapped' && $isMapped) {
615 return false;
616 }
617
618 if ($detectedQuery === '') {
619 return true;
620 }
621
622 $haystack = strtolower(trim(implode(' ', [
623 (string)($row['finger_id'] ?? ''),
624 (string)($row['last_seen'] ?? ''),
625 (string)($row['machine_user_name'] ?? ''),
626 (string)($row['mapped_user_name'] ?? ''),
627 (string)($row['mapped_user_id'] ?? ''),
628 (string)($row['student_name'] ?? ''),
629 (string)($row['student_number'] ?? ''),
630 ])));
631
632 return str_contains($haystack, strtolower($detectedQuery));
633}));
634
635$courseFilterLabel = '';
636foreach ($courses as $course) {
637 if ((int)($course['id'] ?? 0) === $filterCourseId) {
638 $courseFilterLabel = (string)($course['name'] ?? '');
639 break;
640 }
641}
642$sectionFilterLabel = '';
643foreach ($sections as $section) {
644 if ((int)($section['id'] ?? 0) === $filterSectionId) {
645 $sectionFilterLabel = (string)($section['section_label'] ?? '');
646 break;
647 }
648}
649$fingerprintFilterParts = [];
650if ($courseFilterLabel !== '') {
651 $fingerprintFilterParts[] = 'Course: ' . $courseFilterLabel;
652}
653if ($sectionFilterLabel !== '') {
654 $fingerprintFilterParts[] = 'Section: ' . $sectionFilterLabel;
655}
656$fingerprintPrintFilterLabel = $fingerprintFilterParts !== [] ? implode(' / ', $fingerprintFilterParts) : 'All students';
657
658if ($printMode !== '') {
659 $printRows = $printMode === 'mapped' ? $filteredStudentMappings : $filteredUnmappedStudents;
660 $printTitle = $printMode === 'mapped' ? 'Mapped Fingerprint Students' : 'Students Without Fingerprint Mapping';
661 ob_end_clean();
662 ?>
663<!doctype html>
664<html lang="en">
665<head>
666 <meta charset="utf-8">
667 <title><?php echo htmlspecialchars($printTitle, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></title>
668 <style>
669 body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #111827; margin: 18px; }
670 .toolbar { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
671 .toolbar button { border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 9px 14px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }
672 .toolbar .primary { background: #0ea5e9; color: #fff; }
673 .toolbar .light { background: #eef2f7; color: #172033; }
674 .print-head { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 74px 1fr 74px; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1.5px solid #2f6fca; padding-bottom: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: #0b4aa2; }
675 .print-head img { width: 62px; height: 62px; object-fit: contain; justify-self: center; }
676 .print-head-copy { text-align: center; }
677 .print-head h2 { margin: 0 0 3px; font-size: 17px; color: #0b4aa2; }
678 .print-head div { font-size: 11px; color: #0b4aa2; line-height: 1.25; }
679 .print-title { text-align: center; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; margin: 12px 0 8px; }
680 .print-meta { font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
681 table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: fixed; font-size: 11px; }
682 th, td { border: 1px solid #1f2937; padding: 5px 6px; vertical-align: top; word-break: break-word; }
683 th { background: #f3f4f6; }
684 .col-index { width: 34px; text-align: center; }
685 @media print { body { margin: 10mm; } .toolbar { display: none; } }
686 </style>
687</head>
688<body>
689 <div class="toolbar"><button class="light" type="button" onclick="window.close()">Close</button><button class="primary" type="button" onclick="window.print()">Print</button></div>
690 <div class="print-head">
691 <img src="assets/images/ccstlogo.png" alt="CCST">
692 <div class="print-head-copy">
693 <h2>CLARK COLLEGE OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY</h2>
694 <div>SNS Bldg. Aurea St., Samsonville Subd., Dau, Mabalacat, Pampanga</div>
695 <div>Telefax No.: (045) 624-0215</div>
696 </div>
697 <div aria-hidden="true"></div>
698 </div>
699 <div class="print-title"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(strtoupper($printTitle), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
700 <div class="print-meta"><strong>FILTER:</strong> <?php echo htmlspecialchars($fingerprintPrintFilterLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
701 <table>
702 <thead>
703 <tr>
704 <th class="col-index">#</th>
705 <th>Finger ID</th>
706 <th>Student No.</th>
707 <th>Name</th>
708 <th>Course / Section</th>
709 <th>Date Registered</th>
710 </tr>
711 </thead>
712 <tbody>
713 <?php if ($printRows === []): ?>
714 <tr><td class="col-index">1</td><td colspan="5">No students matched the current filters.</td></tr>
715 <?php else: ?>
716 <?php foreach ($printRows as $index => $row): ?>
717 <tr>
718 <td class="col-index"><?php echo (int)$index + 1; ?></td>
719 <td><?php echo $printMode === 'mapped' ? (int)($row['finger_id'] ?? 0) : 'Not mapped'; ?></td>
720 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row['student_number'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
721 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($row['student_name'] ?? '')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
722 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)($row['course_name'] ?? '-') . ' / ' . (string)($row['section_label'] ?? '-')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
723 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row[$printMode === 'mapped' ? 'created_at' : 'created_at'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
724 </tr>
725 <?php endforeach; ?>
726 <?php endif; ?>
727 </tbody>
728 </table>
729</body>
730</html>
731 <?php
732 exit;
733}
734
735$page_title = 'Fingerprint Mapping';
736$page_body_class = 'page-fingerprint-mapping';
737$page_styles = [
738 'assets/css/layout/page_shell.css',
739 'assets/css/modules/pages/page-biometric-console.css',
740];
741$page_scripts = [
742 'assets/js/modules/pages/biometric-management-runtime.js',
743];
744$base_href = '';
745include __DIR__ . '/../includes/header.php';
746ob_end_flush();
747?>
748<main class="nxl-container">
749 <div class="nxl-content">
750 <div class="page-header">
751 <div class="page-header-left d-flex align-items-center">
752 <div class="page-header-title">
753 <h5 class="m-b-10">Fingerprint Mapping</h5>
754 </div>
755 <ul class="breadcrumb">
756 <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="homepage.php">Home</a></li>
757 <li class="breadcrumb-item">Fingerprint Mapping</li>
758 </ul>
759 </div>
760 <div class="page-header-right ms-auto bio-console-header-actions">
761 <div class="page-header-right-items">
762 <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 page-header-right-items-wrapper">
763 <a href="biometric-machine.php" class="btn btn-light-brand">
764 <i class="feather-cpu me-2"></i>
765 <span>F20H Manager</span>
766 </a>
767 <a href="attendance.php" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
768 <i class="feather-clock me-2"></i>
769 <span>Attendance DTR</span>
770 </a>
771 </div>
772 </div>
773 </div>
774 </div>
775
776 <div class="bio-console-shell">
777
778 <?php if ($msg !== ''): ?>
779 <div class="alert alert-<?php echo htmlspecialchars($flashType, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?> py-2">
780 <?php echo htmlspecialchars($msg, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
781 </div>
782 <?php endif; ?>
783
784 <?php if (!empty($orphanMappings)): ?>
785 <div class="alert alert-warning">
786 Some mapped fingerprints are attached to users with no student profile and no authorized role. Please remap those records.
787 </div>
788 <?php endif; ?>
789
790 <div class="card bio-console-hero">
791 <div class="card-body">
792 <div class="bio-console-hero-grid">
793 <div>
794 <span class="bio-console-eyebrow">Biometric Access</span>
795 <h3>Link each fingerprint to the correct BioTern account</h3>
796 <p>Review detected F20H fingerprint IDs and prioritize unmapped entries, especially machine-admin capable fingerprints that may control device configuration access.</p>
797 <div class="bio-console-pill-list">
798 <span class="bio-console-pill">Latest detected ID: <?php echo $latestDetectedFingerId > 0 ? $latestDetectedFingerId : 'N/A'; ?></span>
799 <span class="bio-console-pill">Latest mapped Finger ID: <?php echo $latestMappedFingerId > 0 ? $latestMappedFingerId : 'N/A'; ?></span>
800 <span class="bio-console-pill">Unmapped detected: <?php echo (int)$unmappedDetectedCount; ?></span>
801 <span class="bio-console-pill">Machine admin-capable: <?php echo (int)$machineAdminDetectedCount; ?></span>
802 </div>
803 </div>
804 <div class="bio-console-note-surface">
805 <span class="badge bg-soft-info text-info">Mapping Workflow</span>
806 <h6>Best results come from the latest machine logs</h6>
807 <p>Read users and logs in the F20H Machine Manager first, then review the unmapped table below. Entries tagged as Admin-capable are likely the fingerprints that can open machine configuration menus.</p>
808 </div>
809 </div>
810 </div>
811 </div>
812
813 <div class="card mb-4 bio-console-panel">
814 <div class="card-header"><strong>Unmapped Fingerprints (Priority Queue)</strong></div>
815 <div class="card-body border-bottom">
816 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-3">
817 <a href="fingerprint-unmapped-internal.php" class="btn btn-sm btn-light-brand">Open Unmapped Internal Students</a>
818 <a href="ojt-external-list.php" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">Open External List</a>
819 <a href="import-ojt-internal.php" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">Import OJT Internal</a>
820 <a href="import-ojt-external.php" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">Import OJT External</a>
821 </div>
822 <form method="get" class="row g-2 align-items-end fingerprint-form">
823 <input type="hidden" name="unmapped_admin_only" value="<?php echo $unmappedAdminOnly ? '1' : '0'; ?>">
824 <div class="col-12 col-md-8 col-xl-8">
825 <label class="form-label" for="unmapped_query">Search Unmapped Fingerprints</label>
826 <input type="text" class="form-control" id="unmapped_query" name="unmapped_query" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($unmappedQuery, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" placeholder="Search by fingerprint ID, machine name, or admin hint">
827 </div>
828 <div class="col-12 col-xl-4 fm-actions">
829 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Apply Unmapped Filter</button>
830 <a href="fingerprint_mapping.php" class="btn btn-light">Clear</a>
831 </div>
832 </form>
833 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2">
834 <a href="fingerprint_mapping.php?unmapped_admin_only=1<?php echo $unmappedQuery !== '' ? '&unmapped_query=' . urlencode($unmappedQuery) : ''; ?>" class="btn btn-sm <?php echo $unmappedAdminOnly ? 'btn-primary' : 'btn-outline-primary'; ?>">Admin-Capable Only</a>
835 <?php if ($unmappedAdminOnly): ?>
836 <a href="fingerprint_mapping.php<?php echo $unmappedQuery !== '' ? '?unmapped_query=' . urlencode($unmappedQuery) : ''; ?>" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">Show All Unmapped</a>
837 <?php endif; ?>
838 </div>
839 </div>
840 <div class="card-body p-0">
841 <div class="table-responsive">
842 <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0 bio-console-table">
843 <thead>
844 <tr>
845 <th>Fingerprint ID</th>
846 <th>Last Seen</th>
847 <th>Machine User</th>
848 <th>Machine Access Hint</th>
849 <th>Status</th>
850 <th class="text-end">Action</th>
851 </tr>
852 </thead>
853 <tbody>
854 <?php if ($unmappedDetectedCount === 0): ?>
855 <tr>
856 <td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted py-4">No unmapped fingerprints right now.</td>
857 </tr>
858 <?php elseif (empty($unmappedDetectedFingerprints)): ?>
859 <tr>
860 <td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted py-4">No unmapped fingerprints match your search.</td>
861 </tr>
862 <?php else: ?>
863 <?php foreach ($unmappedDetectedFingerprints as $fingerprint): ?>
864 <tr>
865 <td><?php echo (int)$fingerprint['finger_id']; ?></td>
866 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars($fingerprint['last_seen'] !== '' ? $fingerprint['last_seen'] : 'Not seen in raw logs yet', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
867 <td>
868 <?php if (!empty($fingerprint['machine_user_name'])): ?>
869 <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$fingerprint['machine_user_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
870 <?php else: ?>
871 <span class="text-muted">Unknown</span>
872 <?php endif; ?>
873 </td>
874 <td>
875 <?php if (!empty($fingerprint['machine_is_admin'])): ?>
876 <span class="badge bg-soft-danger text-danger">Admin-capable</span>
877 <?php if (!empty($fingerprint['machine_admin_label'])): ?>
878 <div class="text-muted small"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$fingerprint['machine_admin_label'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
879 <?php endif; ?>
880 <?php else: ?>
881 <span class="badge bg-soft-secondary text-secondary">Standard/Unknown</span>
882 <?php endif; ?>
883 </td>
884 <td><span class="badge bg-soft-warning text-warning">Needs Mapping</span></td>
885 <td class="text-end">
886 <a href="fingerprint-unmapped-internal.php?map_finger_id=<?php echo (int)$fingerprint['finger_id']; ?>" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">Map To Student</a>
887 </td>
888 </tr>
889 <?php endforeach; ?>
890 <?php endif; ?>
891 </tbody>
892 </table>
893 </div>
894 </div>
895 </div>
896
897
898 <div class="card mb-4 fingerprint-map-card bio-console-panel">
899 <div class="card-header"><strong>Current Student Mappings</strong></div>
900 <div class="card-body border-bottom">
901 <form method="get" class="row g-2 align-items-end fingerprint-form">
902 <div class="col-12 col-md-6 col-xl-4">
903 <label class="form-label" for="filter_course_id">Filter by Course</label>
904 <select class="form-select" name="filter_course_id" id="filter_course_id">
905 <option value="0">All Courses</option>
906 <?php foreach ($courses as $course): ?>
907 <option value="<?php echo (int)$course['id']; ?>" <?php echo ((int)$course['id'] === $filterCourseId) ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>
908 <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$course['name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
909 </option>
910 <?php endforeach; ?>
911 </select>
912 </div>
913 <div class="col-12 col-md-6 col-xl-4">
914 <label class="form-label" for="filter_section_id">Filter by Section</label>
915 <select class="form-select" name="filter_section_id" id="filter_section_id">
916 <option value="0">All Sections</option>
917 <?php foreach ($sections as $section): ?>
918 <option value="<?php echo (int)$section['id']; ?>" data-course-id="<?php echo (int)($section['course_id'] ?? 0); ?>" <?php echo ((int)$section['id'] === $filterSectionId) ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>
919 <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$section['section_label'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
920 </option>
921 <?php endforeach; ?>
922 </select>
923 </div>
924 <div class="col-12 col-xl-4 fm-actions">
925 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Apply Filters</button>
926 <a href="fingerprint_mapping.php" class="btn btn-light">Clear</a>
927 </div>
928 </form>
929 <?php $fingerprintPrintQuery = http_build_query(array_filter([
930 'filter_course_id' => $filterCourseId > 0 ? (string)$filterCourseId : '',
931 'filter_section_id' => $filterSectionId > 0 ? (string)$filterSectionId : '',
932 ], static fn($value): bool => $value !== '')); ?>
933 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-3">
934 <a href="fingerprint_mapping.php?print=mapped<?php echo $fingerprintPrintQuery !== '' ? '&' . htmlspecialchars($fingerprintPrintQuery, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : ''; ?>" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
935 <i class="feather-printer me-1"></i> Print Mapped Students
936 </a>
937 <a href="fingerprint_mapping.php?print=unmapped_students<?php echo $fingerprintPrintQuery !== '' ? '&' . htmlspecialchars($fingerprintPrintQuery, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : ''; ?>" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">
938 <i class="feather-printer me-1"></i> Print Not Mapped Students
939 </a>
940 </div>
941 </div>
942 <div class="card-body p-0">
943 <div class="table-responsive">
944 <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0 bio-console-table">
945 <thead>
946 <tr>
947 <th>Fingerprint ID</th>
948 <th>User</th>
949 <th>Student Link</th>
950 <th>Course</th>
951 <th>Section</th>
952 <th>OJT Status</th>
953 <th>Mapped Info</th>
954 <th class="text-end">Actions</th>
955 </tr>
956 </thead>
957 <tbody>
958 <?php if (empty($filteredStudentMappings)): ?>
959 <tr>
960 <td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted py-4">No student mappings match the selected filters.</td>
961 </tr>
962 <?php else: ?>
963 <?php foreach ($filteredStudentMappings as $map): ?>
964 <?php
965 $track = strtolower(trim((string)($map['assignment_track'] ?? 'internal')));
966 $remainingHours = $track === 'external'
967 ? (int)($map['external_total_hours_remaining'] ?? 0)
968 : (int)($map['internal_total_hours_remaining'] ?? 0);
969 $ojtCompleted = $remainingHours <= 0 && (int)($map['student_row_id'] ?? 0) > 0;
970 ?>
971 <tr>
972 <td><?php echo (int)$map['finger_id']; ?></td>
973 <td>
974 <div class="fw-semibold"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($map['user_name'] ?? 'Unknown'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
975 <small class="text-muted">User ID: <?php echo (int)$map['user_id']; ?></small>
976 </td>
977 <td>
978 <?php if ((int)($map['student_row_id'] ?? 0) > 0): ?>
979 <div class="fw-semibold"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(trim((string)$map['student_name']), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
980 <small class="text-muted">Student #: <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$map['student_number'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></small>
981 <br>
982 <small class="text-muted">Enrolled: <?php echo !empty($map['enrolled_at']) ? htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y', strtotime((string)$map['enrolled_at'])), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : 'N/A'; ?></small>
983 <?php else: ?>
984 <span class="badge bg-soft-warning text-warning">No student profile linked</span>
985 <?php endif; ?>
986 </td>
987 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($map['course_name'] ?? 'N/A'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
988 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($map['section_label'] ?? 'N/A'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
989 <td>
990 <?php if ((int)($map['student_row_id'] ?? 0) <= 0): ?>
991 <span class="badge bg-soft-secondary text-secondary">N/A</span>
992 <?php elseif ($ojtCompleted): ?>
993 <span class="badge bg-soft-success text-success">Completed</span>
994 <div class="text-muted small">Ready for fingerprint slot reuse</div>
995 <?php else: ?>
996 <span class="badge bg-soft-warning text-warning">In Progress</span>
997 <div class="text-muted small">Remaining: <?php echo (int)$remainingHours; ?>h</div>
998 <?php endif; ?>
999 </td>
1000 <td>
1001 <?php $createdAt = (string)($map['created_at'] ?? ''); ?>
1002 <?php $updatedAt = (string)($map['updated_at'] ?? ''); ?>
1003 <div class="text-muted small">Created: <?php echo $createdAt !== '' ? htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y h:i A', strtotime($createdAt)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : 'N/A'; ?></div>
1004 <div class="text-muted small">Updated: <?php echo $updatedAt !== '' ? htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y h:i A', strtotime($updatedAt)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : 'N/A'; ?></div>
1005 </td>
1006 <td class="text-end">
1007 <div class="fingerprint-actions ms-auto">
1008 <?php if ($ojtCompleted): ?>
1009 <a href="biometric-machine.php?selected_user_id=<?php echo (int)$map['finger_id']; ?>&load_users=1&load_user=1" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-warning">Cleanup Fingerprint Slot</a>
1010 <?php endif; ?>
1011 <form method="post" class="d-inline" data-confirm="Remove this fingerprint mapping?">
1012 <input type="hidden" name="mapping_action" value="delete">
1013 <input type="hidden" name="finger_id" value="<?php echo (int)$map['finger_id']; ?>">
1014 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger">Remove</button>
1015 </form>
1016 </div>
1017 </td>
1018 </tr>
1019 <?php endforeach; ?>
1020 <?php endif; ?>
1021 </tbody>
1022 </table>
1023 </div>
1024 </div>
1025 </div>
1026
1027 <div class="card mb-4 bio-console-panel">
1028 <div class="card-header"><strong>Authorized Personnel Mappings</strong></div>
1029 <div class="card-body p-0">
1030 <div class="table-responsive">
1031 <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0 bio-console-table">
1032 <thead>
1033 <tr>
1034 <th>Fingerprint ID</th>
1035 <th>User</th>
1036 <th>Role</th>
1037 <th>Mapped Info</th>
1038 <th class="text-end">Actions</th>
1039 </tr>
1040 </thead>
1041 <tbody>
1042 <?php if (empty($personnelMappings)): ?>
1043 <tr>
1044 <td colspan="5" class="text-center text-muted py-4">No authorized personnel mappings yet.</td>
1045 </tr>
1046 <?php else: ?>
1047 <?php foreach ($personnelMappings as $map): ?>
1048 <tr>
1049 <td><?php echo (int)$map['finger_id']; ?></td>
1050 <td>
1051 <div class="fw-semibold"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($map['user_name'] ?? 'Unknown'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
1052 <small class="text-muted">User ID: <?php echo (int)$map['user_id']; ?></small>
1053 </td>
1054 <td>
1055 <span class="badge bg-soft-info text-info"><?php echo htmlspecialchars(ucfirst((string)($map['user_role'] ?? 'Unknown')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
1056 </td>
1057 <td>
1058 <?php $createdAt = (string)($map['created_at'] ?? ''); ?>
1059 <?php $updatedAt = (string)($map['updated_at'] ?? ''); ?>
1060 <div class="text-muted small">Created: <?php echo $createdAt !== '' ? htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y h:i A', strtotime($createdAt)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : 'N/A'; ?></div>
1061 <div class="text-muted small">Updated: <?php echo $updatedAt !== '' ? htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y h:i A', strtotime($updatedAt)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : 'N/A'; ?></div>
1062 </td>
1063 <td class="text-end">
1064 <div class="fingerprint-actions ms-auto">
1065 <form method="post" class="d-inline" data-confirm="Remove this fingerprint mapping?">
1066 <input type="hidden" name="mapping_action" value="delete">
1067 <input type="hidden" name="finger_id" value="<?php echo (int)$map['finger_id']; ?>">
1068 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger">Remove</button>
1069 </form>
1070 </div>
1071 </td>
1072 </tr>
1073 <?php endforeach; ?>
1074 <?php endif; ?>
1075 </tbody>
1076 </table>
1077 </div>
1078 </div>
1079 </div>
1080
1081 <div class="card mt-4 bio-console-panel">
1082 <div class="card-header"><strong>Detected Fingerprints From Machine Logs</strong></div>
1083 <div class="card-body border-bottom">
1084 <form method="get" class="row g-2 align-items-end fingerprint-form">
1085 <div class="col-12 col-md-6 col-xl-3">
1086 <label class="form-label" for="detected_status">Filter by Status</label>
1087 <select class="form-select" name="detected_status" id="detected_status">
1088 <option value="all" <?php echo $detectedStatus === 'all' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>All</option>
1089 <option value="mapped" <?php echo $detectedStatus === 'mapped' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Mapped</option>
1090 <option value="unmapped" <?php echo $detectedStatus === 'unmapped' ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>Needs Mapping</option>
1091 </select>
1092 </div>
1093 <div class="col-12 col-md-6 col-xl-5">
1094 <label class="form-label" for="detected_query">Search Fingerprint/User/Student</label>
1095 <input type="text" class="form-control" id="detected_query" name="detected_query" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($detectedQuery, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" placeholder="e.g. ID, name, student number">
1096 </div>
1097 <div class="col-12 col-xl-4 fm-actions">
1098 <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Apply Table Filters</button>
1099 <a href="fingerprint_mapping.php" class="btn btn-light">Clear</a>
1100 </div>
1101 </form>
1102 </div>
1103 <div class="card-body p-0">
1104 <div class="table-responsive">
1105 <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0 bio-console-table">
1106 <thead>
1107 <tr>
1108 <th>Fingerprint ID</th>
1109 <th>Last Seen</th>
1110 <th>Status</th>
1111 <th>Mapped To</th>
1112 <th class="text-end">Action</th>
1113 </tr>
1114 </thead>
1115 <tbody>
1116 <?php if (empty($detectedFingerprints)): ?>
1117 <tr>
1118 <td colspan="5" class="text-center text-muted py-4">No fingerprints detected from machine logs yet.</td>
1119 </tr>
1120 <?php elseif (empty($filteredDetectedFingerprints)): ?>
1121 <tr>
1122 <td colspan="5" class="text-center text-muted py-4">No fingerprints match your current filters.</td>
1123 </tr>
1124 <?php else: ?>
1125 <?php foreach ($filteredDetectedFingerprints as $fingerprint): ?>
1126 <tr>
1127 <td><?php echo (int)$fingerprint['finger_id']; ?></td>
1128 <td><?php echo htmlspecialchars($fingerprint['last_seen'] !== '' ? $fingerprint['last_seen'] : 'Not seen in raw logs yet', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
1129 <td>
1130 <?php if (!empty($fingerprint['is_mapped'])): ?>
1131 <span class="badge bg-soft-success text-success">Mapped</span>
1132 <?php else: ?>
1133 <span class="badge bg-soft-warning text-warning">Needs Mapping</span>
1134 <?php endif; ?>
1135 </td>
1136 <td>
1137 <?php if (!empty($fingerprint['is_mapped'])): ?>
1138 <div class="fw-semibold"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$fingerprint['mapped_user_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
1139 <small class="text-muted">
1140 User ID: <?php echo (int)$fingerprint['mapped_user_id']; ?>
1141 <?php if ($fingerprint['student_name'] !== ''): ?>
1142 | <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$fingerprint['student_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
1143 <?php endif; ?>
1144 <?php if ($fingerprint['student_number'] !== ''): ?>
1145 (<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$fingerprint['student_number'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>)
1146 <?php endif; ?>
1147 </small>
1148 <div class="text-muted small">Mapped: <?php echo $fingerprint['mapped_created_at'] !== '' ? htmlspecialchars(date('M d, Y h:i A', strtotime((string)$fingerprint['mapped_created_at'])), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : 'N/A'; ?></div>
1149 <?php else: ?>
1150 <span class="text-muted">Not mapped yet</span>
1151 <?php if (!empty($fingerprint['machine_user_name'])): ?>
1152 <div class="text-muted small">Machine Name: <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$fingerprint['machine_user_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
1153 <?php endif; ?>
1154 <?php endif; ?>
1155 </td>
1156 <td class="text-end">
1157 <div class="fingerprint-actions ms-auto">
1158 <span class="text-muted small"><?php echo !empty($fingerprint['is_mapped']) ? 'Mapped' : 'Pending Mapping'; ?></span>
1159 </div>
1160 </td>
1161 </tr>
1162 <?php endforeach; ?>
1163 <?php endif; ?>
1164 </tbody>
1165 </table>
1166 </div>
1167 </div>
1168 </div>
1169 </div>
1170 </div>
1171</main>
1172<?php
1173include __DIR__ . '/../includes/footer.php';
1174$conn->close();
1175?>
1176
1177

Dashboard Module

pages/homepage.php

PHP / HTML / JavaScript 1359 lines 78.4 KB
Selected source code for capstone documentation. Vendor libraries, uploads, logs, and backup data are excluded.
1<?php
2// Start session early to avoid headers-sent warnings
3include_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/config/db.php';
4require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/auth-session.php';
5biotern_boot_session(isset($conn) ? $conn : null);
6include_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/dashboard_data.php';
7require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/avatar.php';
8require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/section_format.php';
9require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/attendance_workflow.php';
10
11if (!function_exists('dashboard_fetch_count')) {
12 function dashboard_fetch_count(?mysqli $conn, string $sql, string $key = 'count'): int
13 {
14 if (!isset($conn)) {
15 return 0;
16 }
17
18 $result = $conn->query($sql);
19 if (!$result) {
20 return 0;
21 }
22
23 $row = $result->fetch_assoc();
24 return (int)($row[$key] ?? 0);
25 }
26}
27
28if (!function_exists('dashboard_fetch_all')) {
29 function dashboard_fetch_all(?mysqli $conn, string $sql): array
30 {
31 $rows = array();
32 if (!isset($conn)) {
33 return $rows;
34 }
35
36 $result = $conn->query($sql);
37 if (!$result || $result->num_rows <= 0) {
38 return $rows;
39 }
40
41 while ($row = $result->fetch_assoc()) {
42 $rows[] = $row;
43 }
44
45 return $rows;
46 }
47}
48
49if (!function_exists('dashboard_table_exists')) {
50 function dashboard_table_exists(?mysqli $conn, string $table): bool
51 {
52 if (!isset($conn)) {
53 return false;
54 }
55
56 $escapedTable = $conn->real_escape_string($table);
57 $result = $conn->query("SHOW TABLES LIKE '{$escapedTable}'");
58 return $result && $result->num_rows > 0;
59 }
60}
61
62if (!function_exists('dashboard_column_exists')) {
63 function dashboard_column_exists(?mysqli $conn, string $table, string $column): bool
64 {
65 if (!isset($conn)) {
66 return false;
67 }
68
69 $escapedTable = $conn->real_escape_string($table);
70 $escapedColumn = $conn->real_escape_string($column);
71 $result = $conn->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM `{$escapedTable}` LIKE '{$escapedColumn}'");
72 return $result && $result->num_rows > 0;
73 }
74}
75
76if (!function_exists('dashboard_safe_table_count')) {
77 function dashboard_safe_table_count(?mysqli $conn, string $table, string $where = '1'): int
78 {
79 if (!dashboard_table_exists($conn, $table)) {
80 return 0;
81 }
82
83 $escapedTable = $conn->real_escape_string($table);
84 return dashboard_fetch_count($conn, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM `{$escapedTable}` WHERE {$where}", 'cnt');
85 }
86}
87
88if (!function_exists('dashboard_format_section_chip')) {
89 function dashboard_format_section_chip(string $code, string $name): string
90 {
91 return biotern_format_section_label($code, $name);
92 }
93}
94
95if (!function_exists('dashboard_format_duration_clock')) {
96 function dashboard_format_duration_clock(float $seconds): string
97 {
98 $totalSeconds = max(0, (int)round((float)$seconds));
99 $hours = (int)floor($totalSeconds / 3600);
100 $minutes = (int)floor(($totalSeconds % 3600) / 60);
101 $remainingSeconds = $totalSeconds % 60;
102
103 return sprintf('%03d:%02d:%02d', $hours, $minutes, $remainingSeconds);
104 }
105}
106
107if (!function_exists('dashboard_avatar_html')) {
108 function dashboard_avatar_html(string $name, string $profilePath = '', int $userId = 0, string $className = 'dash-avatar'): string
109 {
110 $name = trim($name);
111 $profilePath = trim($profilePath);
112 $src = '';
113
114 if ($profilePath !== '') {
115 $normalized = strtolower(trim($profilePath));
116 if (preg_match('#^https?://#i', $profilePath) === 1) {
117 $src = $profilePath;
118 } elseif ($normalized === 'db-avatar' || $normalized === 'db_avatar') {
119 $src = biotern_avatar_db_src('db-avatar', $userId);
120 } else {
121 $resolved = biotern_avatar_resolve_existing_path($profilePath);
122 if ($resolved !== '') {
123 $src = $resolved;
124 }
125 }
126 }
127
128 if ($src === '' && $userId > 0 && biotern_avatar_has_db_picture($userId)) {
129 $src = biotern_avatar_db_src('db-avatar', $userId);
130 }
131
132 if ($src !== '') {
133 return '<div class="' . htmlspecialchars($className, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . ' dash-avatar--image"><img src="' . htmlspecialchars($src, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" alt="' . htmlspecialchars($name !== '' ? $name : 'Profile', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '"></div>';
134 }
135
136 $parts = preg_split('/\s+/', $name);
137 $initials = '';
138 if (is_array($parts)) {
139 foreach ($parts as $part) {
140 if ($part === '') {
141 continue;
142 }
143 $initials .= strtoupper(substr($part, 0, 1));
144 if (strlen($initials) >= 2) {
145 break;
146 }
147 }
148 }
149
150 return '<div class="' . htmlspecialchars($className, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '">' . htmlspecialchars($initials !== '' ? $initials : 'BT', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</div>';
151 }
152}
153
154// Initialize dashboard values
155$dashboard_stats = array(
156 'attendance_awaiting' => 0,
157 'attendance_completed' => 0,
158 'attendance_rejected' => 0,
159 'attendance_total' => 0,
160 'student_count' => 0,
161 'internship_count' => 0,
162 'active_students' => 0,
163 'active_internships' => 0,
164 'completed_internships' => 0,
165 'today_attendance' => 0,
166 'biometric_registered' => 0,
167 'pending_biometrics' => 0,
168 'attendance_approval_rate' => 0,
169 'attendance_pending_rate' => 0,
170 'active_student_rate' => 0,
171);
172
173$ojt_status_counts = array('pending' => 0, 'ongoing' => 0, 'completed' => 0, 'cancelled' => 0);
174$ojt_type_counts = array('internal' => 0, 'external' => 0);
175$avg_completion_percentage = 0.0;
176
177$recent_students = array();
178$recent_attendance = array();
179$active_students_list = array();
180$coordinators = array();
181$supervisors = array();
182$recent_activities = array();
183
184if (isset($dashboard_data) && is_array($dashboard_data) && !empty($dashboard_data)) {
185 $dashboard_stats['attendance_awaiting'] = (int)($dashboard_data['pending_approvals'] ?? 0);
186 $dashboard_stats['attendance_completed'] = (int)($dashboard_data['approved_attendances'] ?? 0);
187 $dashboard_stats['attendance_rejected'] = (int)($dashboard_data['rejected_attendances'] ?? 0);
188 $dashboard_stats['attendance_total'] = $dashboard_stats['attendance_awaiting'] + $dashboard_stats['attendance_completed'] + $dashboard_stats['attendance_rejected'];
189 $dashboard_stats['student_count'] = (int)($dashboard_data['total_students'] ?? 0);
190 $dashboard_stats['active_students'] = (int)($dashboard_data['active_students'] ?? 0);
191 $dashboard_stats['internship_count'] = (int)($dashboard_data['total_internships'] ?? 0);
192 $dashboard_stats['active_internships'] = (int)($dashboard_data['active_internships'] ?? 0);
193 $dashboard_stats['completed_internships'] = (int)($dashboard_data['completed_internships'] ?? 0);
194 $dashboard_stats['biometric_registered'] = (int)($dashboard_data['biometric_students'] ?? 0);
195 $dashboard_stats['today_attendance'] = (int)($dashboard_data['today_attendance'] ?? 0);
196
197 if (isset($recent_attendances) && is_array($recent_attendances) && !empty($recent_attendances)) {
198 $recent_attendance = $recent_attendances;
199 }
200}
201
202try {
203 // Core counts
204 $dashboard_stats['attendance_awaiting'] = dashboard_fetch_count($conn, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM attendances WHERE status = 'pending'");
205 $dashboard_stats['attendance_completed'] = dashboard_fetch_count($conn, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM attendances WHERE status = 'approved'");
206 $dashboard_stats['attendance_rejected'] = dashboard_fetch_count($conn, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM attendances WHERE status = 'rejected'");
207 $dashboard_stats['attendance_total'] = dashboard_fetch_count($conn, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM attendances");
208 $dashboard_stats['student_count'] = dashboard_fetch_count($conn, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM students WHERE deleted_at IS NULL");
209
210 $dashboard_stats['active_students'] = dashboard_fetch_count(
211 $conn,
212 "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS count
213 FROM students s
214 INNER JOIN internships i ON i.student_id = s.id
215 WHERE s.deleted_at IS NULL
216 AND i.deleted_at IS NULL
217 AND i.status = 'ongoing'"
218 );
219
220 // OJT / internship distribution
221 $ojt_rows = dashboard_fetch_all($conn, "SELECT status, type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM internships WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY status, type");
222 $dashboard_stats['internship_count'] = 0;
223 foreach ($ojt_rows as $ojt_row) {
224 $status = $ojt_row['status'] ?? null;
225 $type = $ojt_row['type'] ?? null;
226 $count = (int)($ojt_row['cnt'] ?? 0);
227
228 if ($status && array_key_exists($status, $ojt_status_counts)) {
229 $ojt_status_counts[$status] += $count;
230 }
231
232 if ($type && array_key_exists($type, $ojt_type_counts)) {
233 $ojt_type_counts[$type] += $count;
234 }
235
236 $dashboard_stats['internship_count'] += $count;
237 }
238
239 $avg_completion_row = dashboard_fetch_all($conn, "SELECT AVG(completion_percentage) AS avg_completion FROM internships WHERE deleted_at IS NULL");
240 if (!empty($avg_completion_row) && $avg_completion_row[0]['avg_completion'] !== null) {
241 $avg_completion_percentage = round((float)$avg_completion_row[0]['avg_completion'], 2);
242 }
243
244 $dashboard_stats['active_internships'] = (int)($ojt_status_counts['ongoing'] ?? 0);
245 $dashboard_stats['completed_internships'] = (int)($ojt_status_counts['completed'] ?? 0);
246 $dashboard_stats['biometric_registered'] = dashboard_fetch_count($conn, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM students WHERE biometric_registered = 1");
247
248 $today = date('Y-m-d');
249 $dashboard_stats['today_attendance'] = dashboard_fetch_count($conn, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM attendances WHERE DATE(attendance_date) = '{$today}'");
250
251 // Lists used by dashboard widgets
252 $recent_students = dashboard_fetch_all(
253 $conn,
254 "SELECT s.id, s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.email, s.status, s.biometric_registered, s.created_at
255 FROM students s
256 WHERE s.deleted_at IS NULL
257 ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
258 LIMIT 5"
259 );
260
261 $recent_attendance = dashboard_fetch_all(
262 $conn,
263 "SELECT a.id, a.student_id, a.attendance_date, a.morning_time_in, a.morning_time_out, a.status, a.created_at,
264 s.first_name, s.last_name, s.email, s.student_id AS student_num, s.user_id,
265 COALESCE(NULLIF(u.profile_picture, ''), NULLIF(s.profile_picture, '')) AS profile_picture
266 FROM attendances a
267 LEFT JOIN students s ON a.student_id = s.id
268 LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id
269 ORDER BY (DATE(a.attendance_date) = CURDATE()) DESC, a.attendance_date DESC, a.created_at DESC
270 LIMIT 10"
271 );
272
273 $active_students_list = dashboard_fetch_all(
274 $conn,
275 "SELECT
276 s.id,
277 s.user_id,
278 s.student_id,
279 s.first_name,
280 s.last_name,
281 s.email,
282 COALESCE(NULLIF(u.profile_picture, ''), NULLIF(s.profile_picture, '')) AS profile_picture,
283 s.biometric_registered,
284 i.type AS internship_type,
285 i.status AS internship_status,
286 i.completion_percentage,
287 a.attendance_date,
288 a.morning_time_in,
289 a.status AS attendance_status
290 FROM students s
291 LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id
292 INNER JOIN internships i
293 ON i.student_id = s.id
294 AND i.deleted_at IS NULL
295 AND i.status = 'ongoing'
296 LEFT JOIN attendances a
297 ON a.id = (
298 SELECT a2.id
299 FROM attendances a2
300 WHERE a2.student_id = s.id
301 ORDER BY a2.attendance_date DESC, a2.created_at DESC
302 LIMIT 1
303 )
304 WHERE s.deleted_at IS NULL
305 ORDER BY COALESCE(a.attendance_date, '1970-01-01') DESC, s.created_at DESC
306 LIMIT 6"
307 );
308
309 $coordinators = dashboard_fetch_all(
310 $conn,
311 "SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.profile_picture, c.department_id, c.phone, c.created_at
312 FROM users u
313 LEFT JOIN coordinators c ON u.id = c.user_id
314 WHERE u.role = 'coordinator' AND u.is_active = 1
315 ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
316 LIMIT 5"
317 );
318
319 $supervisors = dashboard_fetch_all(
320 $conn,
321 "SELECT
322 s.id AS supervisor_id,
323 s.user_id,
324 COALESCE(NULLIF(u.name, ''), TRIM(CONCAT(s.first_name, ' ', s.last_name))) AS name,
325 COALESCE(NULLIF(u.email, ''), s.email) AS email,
326 u.profile_picture,
327 s.phone,
328 s.department_id,
329 s.specialization,
330 s.created_at
331 FROM supervisors s
332 LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id
333 WHERE s.is_active = 1
334 AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
335 AND (u.id IS NULL OR u.is_active = 1)
336 ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
337 LIMIT 5"
338 );
339
340 $recent_activities = dashboard_fetch_all(
341 $conn,
342 "SELECT
343 CONCAT('Student Application Submitted: ', COALESCE(s.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(s.last_name, '')) AS activity,
344 u.application_submitted_at AS activity_date,
345 'application_submitted' AS activity_type,
346 u.id AS entity_id
347 FROM users u
348 LEFT JOIN students s ON s.user_id = u.id
349 WHERE u.role = 'student'
350 AND COALESCE(u.application_status, 'approved') = 'pending'
351 AND u.application_submitted_at IS NOT NULL
352 UNION ALL
353 SELECT
354 CONCAT('Student Application Approved: ', COALESCE(s.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(s.last_name, '')) AS activity,
355 u.approved_at AS activity_date,
356 'application_approved' AS activity_type,
357 u.id AS entity_id
358 FROM users u
359 LEFT JOIN students s ON s.user_id = u.id
360 WHERE u.role = 'student'
361 AND COALESCE(u.application_status, 'approved') = 'approved'
362 AND u.approved_at IS NOT NULL
363 UNION ALL
364 SELECT
365 CONCAT('Student Application Rejected: ', COALESCE(s.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(s.last_name, '')) AS activity,
366 u.rejected_at AS activity_date,
367 'application_rejected' AS activity_type,
368 u.id AS entity_id
369 FROM users u
370 LEFT JOIN students s ON s.user_id = u.id
371 WHERE u.role = 'student'
372 AND COALESCE(u.application_status, 'approved') = 'rejected'
373 AND u.rejected_at IS NOT NULL
374 UNION ALL
375 SELECT
376 CONCAT('Attendance Recorded for ', s.first_name, ' ', s.last_name) AS activity,
377 a.created_at AS activity_date,
378 'attendance_recorded' AS activity_type,
379 a.id AS entity_id
380 FROM attendances a
381 LEFT JOIN students s ON a.student_id = s.id
382 UNION ALL
383 SELECT
384 CONCAT('Biometric Registered: ', s.first_name, ' ', s.last_name) AS activity,
385 s.biometric_registered_at AS activity_date,
386 'biometric_registered' AS activity_type,
387 s.id AS entity_id
388 FROM students s
389 WHERE s.biometric_registered = 1 AND s.biometric_registered_at IS NOT NULL
390 UNION ALL
391 SELECT
392 CONCAT(
393 'Login ',
394 CASE WHEN l.status = 'success' THEN 'Success' ELSE 'Failed' END,
395 ': ',
396 COALESCE(NULLIF(u.name, ''), l.identifier, 'Unknown User')
397 ) AS activity,
398 l.created_at AS activity_date,
399 CASE WHEN l.status = 'success' THEN 'login_success' ELSE 'login_failed' END AS activity_type,
400 l.id AS entity_id
401 FROM login_logs l
402 LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = l.user_id
403 ORDER BY activity_date DESC
404 LIMIT 15"
405 );
406} catch (Exception $e) {
407 error_log('Dashboard error: ' . $e->getMessage());
408}
409
410// Derived metrics
411$dashboard_stats['pending_biometrics'] = max(0, $dashboard_stats['student_count'] - $dashboard_stats['biometric_registered']);
412$dashboard_stats['attendance_approval_rate'] = ($dashboard_stats['attendance_total'] > 0)
413 ? round(($dashboard_stats['attendance_completed'] / $dashboard_stats['attendance_total']) * 100)
414 : 0;
415$dashboard_stats['attendance_pending_rate'] = ($dashboard_stats['attendance_total'] > 0)
416 ? round(($dashboard_stats['attendance_awaiting'] / $dashboard_stats['attendance_total']) * 100)
417 : 0;
418$dashboard_stats['active_student_rate'] = ($dashboard_stats['student_count'] > 0)
419 ? round(($dashboard_stats['active_students'] / $dashboard_stats['student_count']) * 100)
420 : 0;
421
422// Keep original variable names for template compatibility
423$attendance_awaiting = $dashboard_stats['attendance_awaiting'];
424$attendance_completed = $dashboard_stats['attendance_completed'];
425$attendance_rejected = $dashboard_stats['attendance_rejected'];
426$attendance_total = $dashboard_stats['attendance_total'];
427$student_count = $dashboard_stats['student_count'];
428$internship_count = $dashboard_stats['internship_count'];
429$active_students = $dashboard_stats['active_students'];
430$active_internships = $dashboard_stats['active_internships'];
431$completed_internships = $dashboard_stats['completed_internships'];
432$today_attendance = $dashboard_stats['today_attendance'];
433$today_attendance_progress = min(100, max(0, $today_attendance));
434$pending_biometrics = $dashboard_stats['pending_biometrics'];
435$attendance_approval_rate = $dashboard_stats['attendance_approval_rate'];
436$attendance_pending_rate = $dashboard_stats['attendance_pending_rate'];
437$active_student_rate = $dashboard_stats['active_student_rate'];
438$biometric_registered = $dashboard_stats['biometric_registered'];
439$dashboard_role = strtolower(trim((string)($_SESSION['role'] ?? '')));
440$dashboard_can_review_applications = in_array($dashboard_role, ['admin', 'coordinator', 'supervisor'], true);
441$dashboard_user_id = (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0);
442
443$student_dashboard = [
444 'student' => null,
445 'attendance_this_month' => 0,
446 'attendance_pending' => 0,
447 'attendance_approved' => 0,
448 'latest_internship' => null,
449 'recent_attendance' => [],
450 'timer' => [],
451];
452
453if ($dashboard_role === 'student' && isset($conn) && $dashboard_user_id > 0) {
454 $student_stmt = $conn->prepare(
455 "SELECT s.id, s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.assignment_track,
456 s.internal_total_hours, s.internal_total_hours_remaining,
457 s.external_total_hours, s.external_total_hours_remaining,
458 c.name AS course_name, sec.code AS section_code, sec.name AS section_name
459 FROM students s
460 LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = s.course_id
461 LEFT JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = s.section_id
462 WHERE s.user_id = ?
463 LIMIT 1"
464 );
465
466 if ($student_stmt) {
467 $student_stmt->bind_param('i', $dashboard_user_id);
468 $student_stmt->execute();
469 $student_dashboard['student'] = $student_stmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
470 $student_stmt->close();
471 }
472
473 if (!empty($student_dashboard['student']['id'])) {
474 $student_id = (int)$student_dashboard['student']['id'];
475 $month_start = date('Y-m-01');
476 $month_end = date('Y-m-t');
477
478 $attendance_stmt = $conn->prepare(
479 "SELECT
480 COUNT(*) AS total_count,
481 SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_count,
482 SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_count
483 FROM attendances
484 WHERE student_id = ? AND attendance_date BETWEEN ? AND ?"
485 );
486
487 if ($attendance_stmt) {
488 $attendance_stmt->bind_param('iss', $student_id, $month_start, $month_end);
489 $attendance_stmt->execute();
490 $attendance_summary = $attendance_stmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
491 $attendance_stmt->close();
492
493 $student_dashboard['attendance_this_month'] = (int)($attendance_summary['total_count'] ?? 0);
494 $student_dashboard['attendance_pending'] = (int)($attendance_summary['pending_count'] ?? 0);
495 $student_dashboard['attendance_approved'] = (int)($attendance_summary['approved_count'] ?? 0);
496 }
497
498 $internship_stmt = $conn->prepare(
499 "SELECT status, company_name, required_hours, rendered_hours, completion_percentage
500 FROM internships
501 WHERE student_id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
502 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
503 LIMIT 1"
504 );
505
506 if ($internship_stmt) {
507 $internship_stmt->bind_param('i', $student_id);
508 $internship_stmt->execute();
509 $student_dashboard['latest_internship'] = $internship_stmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
510 $internship_stmt->close();
511 }
512
513 $recent_attendance_stmt = $conn->prepare(
514 "SELECT attendance_date, status, total_hours
515 FROM attendances
516 WHERE student_id = ?
517 ORDER BY attendance_date DESC, id DESC
518 LIMIT 5"
519 );
520
521 if ($recent_attendance_stmt) {
522 $recent_attendance_stmt->bind_param('i', $student_id);
523 $recent_attendance_stmt->execute();
524 $recent_attendance_result = $recent_attendance_stmt->get_result();
525 while ($recent_attendance_result && ($row = $recent_attendance_result->fetch_assoc())) {
526 $student_dashboard['recent_attendance'][] = $row;
527 }
528 $recent_attendance_stmt->close();
529 }
530
531 $student_row = is_array($student_dashboard['student']) ? $student_dashboard['student'] : [];
532 $assignment_track = strtolower(trim((string)($student_row['assignment_track'] ?? 'internal')));
533 if (!in_array($assignment_track, ['internal', 'external'], true)) {
534 $assignment_track = 'internal';
535 }
536
537 $open_session = ['clocked_in_now' => false, 'is_open' => false, 'elapsed_preview_seconds' => 0, 'cutoff_time' => null];
538 $attendance_record = null;
539 $today_attendance_stmt = $conn->prepare(
540 "SELECT
541 a.id,
542 a.student_id,
543 a.attendance_date,
544 a.status,
545 a.remarks,
546 a.morning_time_in,
547 a.morning_time_out,
548 a.afternoon_time_in,
549 a.afternoon_time_out,
550 sec.attendance_session,
551 sec.schedule_time_in,
552 sec.schedule_time_out,
553 sec.late_after_time,
554 sec.weekly_schedule_json
555 FROM attendances a
556 LEFT JOIN students s2 ON a.student_id = s2.id
557 LEFT JOIN sections sec ON s2.section_id = sec.id
558 WHERE a.student_id = ? AND a.attendance_date = ?
559 ORDER BY a.id DESC
560 LIMIT 1"
561 );
562 if ($today_attendance_stmt) {
563 $today = date('Y-m-d');
564 $today_attendance_stmt->bind_param('is', $student_id, $today);
565 $today_attendance_stmt->execute();
566 $attendance_record = $today_attendance_stmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
567 $today_attendance_stmt->close();
568 }
569
570 if ($assignment_track === 'internal' && $attendance_record) {
571 $open_session = attendance_workflow_mark_incomplete_if_needed($conn, $attendance_record);
572 }
573
574 $internal_hours_rendered = 0.0;
575 $internal_sum_stmt = $conn->prepare(
576 "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_hours), 0) AS rendered
577 FROM attendances
578 WHERE student_id = ? AND (status IS NULL OR status <> 'rejected')"
579 );
580 if ($internal_sum_stmt) {
581 $internal_sum_stmt->bind_param('i', $student_id);
582 $internal_sum_stmt->execute();
583 $internal_sum_row = $internal_sum_stmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: [];
584 $internal_sum_stmt->close();
585 $internal_hours_rendered = isset($internal_sum_row['rendered']) ? (float)$internal_sum_row['rendered'] : 0.0;
586 }
587
588 $internal_total_hours = isset($student_row['internal_total_hours']) ? (int)$student_row['internal_total_hours'] : 140;
589 if ($internal_total_hours <= 0) {
590 $internal_total_hours = 140;
591 }
592
593 $stored_internal_remaining = isset($student_row['internal_total_hours_remaining']) && $student_row['internal_total_hours_remaining'] !== null
594 ? (int)$student_row['internal_total_hours_remaining']
595 : null;
596 $internal_remaining_hours_live = max(0, $internal_total_hours - $internal_hours_rendered);
597 $internal_remaining_hours_effective = $stored_internal_remaining !== null
598 ? max(0, $stored_internal_remaining)
599 : $internal_remaining_hours_live;
600
601 if ($internal_hours_rendered > 0) {
602 $internal_remaining_hours_effective = $internal_remaining_hours_live;
603 }
604 if ($internal_hours_rendered <= 0 && $stored_internal_remaining !== null && $stored_internal_remaining <= 0) {
605 $internal_remaining_hours_effective = $internal_total_hours;
606 }
607 if ($internal_hours_rendered > 0 && $internal_remaining_hours_effective <= 0 && $internal_remaining_hours_live > 0) {
608 $internal_remaining_hours_effective = $internal_remaining_hours_live;
609 }
610 if ($assignment_track === 'internal' && $internal_remaining_hours_effective >= $internal_total_hours && $internal_hours_rendered > 0) {
611 $internal_remaining_hours_effective = $internal_remaining_hours_live;
612 }
613
614 $remaining_seconds_without_open = (int)max(0, round($internal_remaining_hours_effective * 3600));
615 $open_session_seconds = ($assignment_track === 'internal' && $attendance_record && !empty($open_session['is_open']))
616 ? (int)($open_session['elapsed_preview_seconds'] ?? 0)
617 : 0;
618 $preview_remaining_seconds = (int)max(0, $remaining_seconds_without_open - $open_session_seconds);
619
620 $student_dashboard['timer'] = [
621 'assignment_track' => $assignment_track,
622 'internal_total_hours' => $internal_total_hours,
623 'internal_rendered_hours' => $internal_hours_rendered,
624 'internal_remaining_hours' => $internal_remaining_hours_effective,
625 'preview_remaining_hours' => $preview_remaining_seconds / 3600,
626 'preview_remaining_seconds' => $preview_remaining_seconds,
627 'remaining_seconds_without_open' => $remaining_seconds_without_open,
628 'is_clocked_in' => $assignment_track === 'internal' && !empty($open_session['clocked_in_now']),
629 ];
630 }
631}
632
633$page_title = 'BioTern || Dashboard';
634$page_body_class = 'dashboard-home';
635$page_styles = array('assets/css/modules/pages/page-home-dashboard.css');
636if ($dashboard_role === 'student') {
637 $page_styles[] = 'assets/css/homepage-student.css';
638}
639$page_vendor_scripts = array(
640 'assets/vendors/js/daterangepicker.min.js',
641 'assets/vendors/js/apexcharts.min.js',
642 'assets/vendors/js/circle-progress.min.js',
643);
644$page_scripts = array(
645 'assets/js/modules/pages/dashboard-init.min.js',
646 'assets/js/modules/pages/homepage-movable.js',
647 'assets/js/theme-customizer-init.min.js',
648);
649if ($dashboard_role === 'student') {
650 $page_scripts[] = 'assets/js/modules/pages/homepage-student-live-timer.js';
651}
652include 'includes/header.php';
653?>
654<main class="nxl-container">
655 <div class="nxl-content">
656 <?php if ($dashboard_role === 'student'): ?>
657 <?php
658 $student_name = trim((string)(
659 ($student_dashboard['student']['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($student_dashboard['student']['last_name'] ?? '')
660 ));
661 $student_course = trim((string)($student_dashboard['student']['course_name'] ?? ''));
662 $student_section = dashboard_format_section_chip(
663 (string)($student_dashboard['student']['section_code'] ?? ''),
664 (string)($student_dashboard['student']['section_name'] ?? '')
665 );
666 $student_internship = is_array($student_dashboard['latest_internship']) ? $student_dashboard['latest_internship'] : [];
667 $student_completion = (float)($student_internship['completion_percentage'] ?? 0);
668 $student_status = trim((string)($student_internship['status'] ?? 'Not started'));
669 $student_company = trim((string)($student_internship['company_name'] ?? ''));
670 $student_required_hours = (float)($student_internship['required_hours'] ?? 0);
671 $student_rendered_hours = (float)($student_internship['rendered_hours'] ?? 0);
672 $student_assignment_track = strtolower(trim((string)($student_dashboard['student']['assignment_track'] ?? 'internal')));
673 $student_has_external_track = $student_assignment_track === 'external';
674 $student_timer_data = is_array($student_dashboard['timer'] ?? null) ? $student_dashboard['timer'] : [];
675 $student_timer_total_hours = (float)($student_has_external_track
676 ? ($student_dashboard['student']['external_total_hours'] ?? 0)
677 : ($student_timer_data['internal_total_hours'] ?? $student_dashboard['student']['internal_total_hours'] ?? 0));
678 if (!$student_has_external_track && $student_timer_data !== []) {
679 $student_timer_remaining_hours = max(0, (float)($student_timer_data['preview_remaining_hours'] ?? 0));
680 $student_timer_rendered_hours = max(0, $student_timer_total_hours - $student_timer_remaining_hours);
681 $student_timer_seconds = (int)($student_timer_data['preview_remaining_seconds'] ?? round($student_timer_remaining_hours * 3600));
682 $student_timer_is_live = !empty($student_timer_data['is_clocked_in']);
683 } else {
684 $student_timer_remaining_value = $student_has_external_track
685 ? ($student_dashboard['student']['external_total_hours_remaining'] ?? null)
686 : ($student_dashboard['student']['internal_total_hours_remaining'] ?? null);
687 $student_timer_remaining_hours = is_numeric($student_timer_remaining_value)
688 ? max(0, (float)$student_timer_remaining_value)
689 : max(0, $student_timer_total_hours - $student_rendered_hours);
690 $student_timer_rendered_hours = max(0, $student_timer_total_hours - $student_timer_remaining_hours);
691 $student_timer_seconds = (int)round($student_timer_remaining_hours * 3600);
692 $student_timer_is_live = false;
693 }
694 $student_timer_progress = $student_timer_total_hours > 0
695 ? min(100, max(0, ($student_timer_rendered_hours / $student_timer_total_hours) * 100))
696 : 0;
697 $student_timer_clock = explode(':', dashboard_format_duration_clock($student_timer_seconds));
698 $student_timer_label = $student_has_external_track ? 'External Hours Remaining' : 'Internal Hours Remaining';
699 $student_timer_track_label = $student_has_external_track ? 'External Track' : 'Internal Track';
700 $student_timer_summary = $student_timer_total_hours > 0
701 ? number_format($student_timer_remaining_hours, 2) . ' hrs remaining'
702 . ' | ' . number_format($student_timer_rendered_hours, 2)
703 . ' of ' . number_format($student_timer_total_hours, 0) . ' hrs completed'
704 : 'No required hours are configured yet. Check your profile for assignment details.';
705 $student_dtr_route = $student_has_external_track ? 'external-biometric.php' : 'student-internal-dtr.php';
706 $student_dtr_label = $student_has_external_track ? 'My External DTR' : 'My Internal DTR';
707 $student_dtr_summary = $student_has_external_track
708 ? 'Check your external attendance and hours.'
709 : 'Check attendance and hours.';
710 $student_timer_route = $student_timer_total_hours > 0
711 ? $student_dtr_route
712 : 'student-profile.php';
713 $student_timer_button_label = $student_timer_total_hours > 0 ? 'Open DTR' : 'View Profile';
714 $student_has_started = (
715 (int)($student_dashboard['attendance_this_month'] ?? 0) > 0
716 || !empty($student_dashboard['recent_attendance'])
717 || !empty($student_internship)
718 );
719 $student_greeting = $student_name !== ''
720 ? ($student_has_started ? 'Welcome back, ' . $student_name : 'Welcome, ' . $student_name)
721 : ($student_has_started ? 'Welcome back' : 'Welcome');
722 ?>
723 <div class="page-header student-page-header">
724 <div class="page-header-left d-flex align-items-center">
725 <div class="page-header-title">
726 <h5 class="m-b-10">Dashboard</h5>
727 </div>
728 <ul class="breadcrumb">
729 <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="homepage.php">Home</a></li>
730 <li class="breadcrumb-item">Dashboard</li>
