735 <div class="card student-panel student-hours-timer-card">
736 <div class="card-body">
737 <div
738 class="student-hours-timer"
739 data-student-hours-timer
740 data-remaining-seconds="<?php echo (int)$student_timer_seconds; ?>"
741 data-live-countdown="<?php echo $student_timer_is_live ? '1' : '0'; ?>"
742 >
743 <div class="student-hours-timer__header">
744 <div>
745 <h6><?php echo htmlspecialchars($student_timer_label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></h6>
746 </div>
747 <span class="student-hours-timer__badge"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($student_timer_track_label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
748 </div>
749 <div class="student-hours-timer__clock">
750 <div class="student-hours-timer__segment">
751 <strong data-student-hours-part="hours"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($student_timer_clock[0] ?? '000'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
752 <small>Hours</small>
753 </div>
754 <span class="student-hours-timer__divider">:</span>
755 <div class="student-hours-timer__segment">
756 <strong data-student-hours-part="minutes"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($student_timer_clock[1] ?? '00'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
757 <small>Minutes</small>
758 </div>
759 <span class="student-hours-timer__divider">:</span>
760 <div class="student-hours-timer__segment">
761 <strong data-student-hours-part="seconds"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($student_timer_clock[2] ?? '00'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
762 <small>Seconds</small>
763 </div>
764 </div>
765 <p class="student-hours-timer__summary"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($student_timer_summary, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></p>
766 <div class="student-hours-timer__progress" aria-hidden="true">
767 <span style="width: <?php echo htmlspecialchars(number_format($student_timer_progress, 2, '.', ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>%;"></span>
768 </div>
769 <div class="student-hours-timer__footer">
770 <span class="student-hours-timer__sync">
771 <i class="feather-activity"></i>
772 Synced at <strong data-student-hours-sync><?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('h:i:s A'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
773 </span>
774 <a href="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($student_timer_route, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($student_timer_button_label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></a>
775 </div>
776 </div>
777 </div>
778 </div>
779
780 <div class="student-home-hero card border-0">
781 <div class="card-body">
782 <div class="student-home-hero__content">
783 <div>
784 <span class="student-home-eyebrow">Student Workspace</span>
785 <h2><?php echo htmlspecialchars($student_greeting, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></h2>
786 <p>Keep track of your attendance, internship progress, documents, and daily tools in one place.</p>
787 <div class="student-home-meta">
788 <?php if ($student_course !== ''): ?><span><?php echo htmlspecialchars($student_course, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span><?php endif; ?>
789 <?php if ($student_section !== ''): ?><span><?php echo htmlspecialchars($student_section, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span><?php endif; ?>

795 </div>

801 <div class="col-xl-3 col-md-6"><div class="card student-metric-card h-100"><div class="card-body"><span class="student-metric-label">Attendance This Month</span><h3><?php echo (int)$student_dashboard['attendance_this_month']; ?></h3><p>Your logged DTR entries for <?php echo date('F Y'); ?>.</p></div></div></div>
802 <div class="col-xl-3 col-md-6"><div class="card student-metric-card h-100"><div class="card-body"><span class="student-metric-label">Pending Logs</span><h3><?php echo (int)$student_dashboard['attendance_pending']; ?></h3><p>Attendance entries still waiting for approval.</p></div></div></div>

830 <div class="student-attendance-item">
831 <div>
832 <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars(date('F j, Y', strtotime((string)$attendance_row['attendance_date'])), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
833 <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars(ucfirst((string)($attendance_row['status'] ?? 'pending')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
834 </div>
835 <b><?php echo number_format((float)($attendance_row['total_hours'] ?? 0), 2); ?> hrs</b>
836 </div>
837 <?php endforeach; ?>
838 </div>

939 </div>

944 </div>

949 <strong class="dashboard-mobile-stat-value"><?php echo $today_attendance; ?></strong>

964 <span class="dashboard-mobile-stat-label">Coordinators</span>

966 </button>

968 <span class="dashboard-mobile-stat-label">Supervisors</span>
969 <strong class="dashboard-mobile-stat-value"><?php echo count($supervisors); ?></strong>
970 </button>
971 </div>
972
973 <div class="main-content dashboard-shell widgets-preloading">
974 <div class="row">
975
976 <div class="col-12 dashboard-movable" data-move-key="kpi-strip" data-mobile-panel="kpi">
977 <div class="card stretch stretch-full kpi-strip">
978 <div class="card-header">
979 <h5 class="card-title">Today at a Glance</h5>
980 <div class="card-header-action">
981 <div class="card-header-btn"></div>
982 </div>
983 </div>
984 <div class="card-body">
985 <div class="row g-3">
986 <div class="col-sm-6 col-xl-3">

1040 <?php if (count($active_students_list) > 0): ?>

1042 <?php foreach ($active_students_list as $student): ?>
1043 <?php
1044 $firstName = (string)($student['first_name'] ?? '');
1045 $lastName = (string)($student['last_name'] ?? '');
1046 $studentName = trim($firstName . ' ' . $lastName);
1047 $attendanceDate = $student['attendance_date'] ? date('M d, Y', strtotime($student['attendance_date'])) : 'No attendance yet';
1048 $attendanceTime = $student['morning_time_in'] ? date('h:i a', strtotime($student['morning_time_in'])) : '';
1049 $attendanceStatus = (string)($student['attendance_status'] ?? '');
1050 $internshipType = ucfirst((string)($student['internship_type'] ?? ''));
1051 ?>

1053 <div class="dash-list-main">
1054 <?php echo dashboard_avatar_html($studentName, (string)($student['profile_picture'] ?? ''), (int)($student['user_id'] ?? 0)); ?>

1056 <a href="students-view.php?id=<?php echo (int)$student['id']; ?>" class="dash-list-title">

1058 </a>
1059 <div class="dash-list-sub">
1060 <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($student['student_id'] ?? '')); ?> | <?php echo htmlspecialchars($internshipType); ?>
1061 </div>
1062 </div>
1063 </div>

1073 <?php endif; ?>

1075 <?php echo $attendanceDate; ?><?php echo $attendanceTime ? ' | ' . $attendanceTime : ''; ?>
1076 </div>
1077 </div>
1078 </div>
1079 <?php endforeach; ?>
1080 </div>

1085 </div>

1300 data-ojt-ongoing="<?php echo isset($ojt_status_counts['ongoing']) ? intval($ojt_status_counts['ongoing']) : 0; ?>"
1301 data-ojt-completed="<?php echo isset($ojt_status_counts['completed']) ? intval($ojt_status_counts['completed']) : 0; ?>"
1302 data-ojt-cancelled="<?php echo isset($ojt_status_counts['cancelled']) ? intval($ojt_status_counts['cancelled']) : 0; ?>"
1303 hidden></div>
1304 <script>
1305 (function () {
1306 function initMobileDashboardPanels() {
1307 var body = document.body;
1308 if (!body || !window.matchMedia('(max-width: 991.98px)').matches) {
1309 return;
1310 }
1311
1312 var buttons = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('[data-mobile-panel-btn]'));
1313 var panels = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.dashboard-movable[data-mobile-panel]'));
1314 if (!buttons.length || !panels.length) {
1315 return;
1316 }
1317
1318 function activatePanel(panelKey) {
1319 body.classList.add('mobile-dashboard-filtered');
1320 buttons.forEach(function (btn) {
1321 var isActive = btn.getAttribute('data-mobile-panel-btn') === panelKey;
1322 btn.classList.toggle('is-active', isActive);
1323 btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', isActive ? 'true' : 'false');
1324 });
1325
1326 panels.forEach(function (panel) {
1327 var isActivePanel = panel.getAttribute('data-mobile-panel') === panelKey;
1328 panel.classList.toggle('is-mobile-panel-active', isActivePanel);
1329 });
1330 }
1331
1332 buttons.forEach(function (btn) {
1333 btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
1334 activatePanel(btn.getAttribute('data-mobile-panel-btn'));
1335 });
1336 });
1337
1338 activatePanel('kpi');
1339 }
1340
1341 if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
1342 document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initMobileDashboardPanels);
1343 } else {
1344 initMobileDashboardPanels();
1345 }
1346 })();
1347 </script>
1348
1349 <?php endif; ?>
1350</div>
1351</main>
1352<?php include 'includes/footer.php'; ?>
1353
1354
1355
1356
1357
1358
1359

Document Management Module

documents/generate_document.php

PHP / HTML / JavaScript 74 lines 2.2 KB
Selected source code for capstone documentation. Vendor libraries, uploads, logs, and backup data are excluded.
1<?php
2require_once '../config/db.php';
3require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/document_access.php';
4
5$student_id = (int)($_GET['student_id'] ?? 0);
6$doc_type = strtolower(trim((string)($_GET['doc_type'] ?? 'application')));
7
8$allowed_templates = [
9 'application' => 'document_application.php',
10 'endorsement' => 'document_endorsement.php',
11 'moa' => 'document_moa.php',
12 'dtr' => 'document_dtr.php',
13 'dau_moa' => 'document_dau_moa.php',
14 'waiver' => 'document_waiver.php',
15 'resume' => 'document_resume.php',
16];
17
18if ($student_id <= 0) {
19 http_response_code(400);
20 die('Student not specified.');
21}
22if (!isset($allowed_templates[$doc_type])) {
23 http_response_code(400);
24 die('Invalid document type.');
25}
26
27$student = null;
28$stmt_student = $conn->prepare("SELECT s.*, i.coordinator_id FROM students s LEFT JOIN internships i ON i.student_id = s.id AND i.status IN ('ongoing','completed') WHERE s.id = ? LIMIT 1");
29if ($stmt_student) {
30 $stmt_student->bind_param('i', $student_id);
31 $stmt_student->execute();
32 $student = $stmt_student->get_result()->fetch_assoc();
33 $stmt_student->close();
34}
35
36if (!$student) {
37 http_response_code(404);
38 die('Student not found.');
39}
40
41$access = documents_student_can_generate($conn, $student_id);
42if (empty($access['allowed'])) {
43 http_response_code(403);
44 die((string)($access['reason'] ?? 'Document access denied.'));
45}
46
47$coordinator = null;
48$coordinator_id = (int)($student['coordinator_id'] ?? 0);
49if ($coordinator_id > 0) {
50 $stmt_coordinator = $conn->prepare("SELECT * FROM coordinators WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1");
51 if ($stmt_coordinator) {
52 $stmt_coordinator->bind_param('i', $coordinator_id);
53 $stmt_coordinator->execute();
54 $coordinator = $stmt_coordinator->get_result()->fetch_assoc();
55 $stmt_coordinator->close();
56 }
57}
58
59$template_file = __DIR__ . '/' . $allowed_templates[$doc_type];
60if (!is_file($template_file)) {
61 http_response_code(404);
62 die('Template not found.');
63}
64
65ob_start();
66include $template_file;
67$content = ob_get_clean();
68
69header('Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8');
70echo $content;
71
72
73
74

Document Management Module

pages/student-documents.php

PHP / HTML / JavaScript 223 lines 9.1 KB
Selected source code for capstone documentation. Vendor libraries, uploads, logs, and backup data are excluded.
1<?php
2require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/config/db.php';
3require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/auth-session.php';
4require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/includes/avatar.php';
5require_once dirname(__DIR__) . '/lib/section_format.php';
6
7biotern_boot_session(isset($conn) ? $conn : null);
8
9function student_documents_table_exists(mysqli $conn, string $table): bool
10{
11 $table = trim($table);
12 if ($table === '') {
13 return false;
14 }
15
16 $safeTable = $conn->real_escape_string($table);
17 $result = $conn->query("SHOW TABLES LIKE '{$safeTable}'");
18 return $result instanceof mysqli_result && $result->num_rows > 0;
19}
20
21function student_documents_fetch_row(mysqli $conn, string $table, int $studentId): ?array
22{
23 if ($studentId <= 0 || !student_documents_table_exists($conn, $table)) {
24 return null;
25 }
26
27 $stmt = $conn->prepare("SELECT * FROM `{$table}` WHERE user_id = ? LIMIT 1");
28 if (!$stmt) {
29 return null;
30 }
31
32 $stmt->bind_param('i', $studentId);
33 $stmt->execute();
34 $row = $stmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
35 $stmt->close();
36
37 return $row;
38}
39
40function student_documents_fetch_by_student_or_user(mysqli $conn, string $table, int $studentId, int $userId): ?array
41{
42 if ($studentId <= 0 || !student_documents_table_exists($conn, $table)) {
43 return null;
44 }
45
46 $stmt = $conn->prepare("SELECT * FROM `{$table}` WHERE user_id IN (?, ?) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1");
47 if (!$stmt) {
48 return student_documents_fetch_row($conn, $table, $studentId);
49 }
50
51 $stmt->bind_param('ii', $studentId, $userId);
52 $stmt->execute();
53 $row = $stmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
54 $stmt->close();
55
56 return $row;
57}
58
59function student_documents_build_url(string $base, array $params): string
60{
61 $clean = [];
62 foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
63 if ($value === null) {
64 continue;
65 }
66 $clean[(string)$key] = (string)$value;
67 }
68
69 return $base . (empty($clean) ? '' : ('?' . http_build_query($clean)));
70}
71
72$currentUserId = (int)($_SESSION['user_id'] ?? 0);
73$currentRole = strtolower(trim((string)($_SESSION['role'] ?? $_SESSION['user_role'] ?? '')));
74if ($currentRole !== 'student' || $currentUserId <= 0) {
75 header('Location: homepage.php');
76 exit;
77}
78
79$student = null;
80$user = null;
81
82$userStmt = $conn->prepare('SELECT id, name, profile_picture FROM users WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1');
83if ($userStmt) {
84 $userStmt->bind_param('i', $currentUserId);
85 $userStmt->execute();
86 $user = $userStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
87 $userStmt->close();
88}
89
90$studentStmt = $conn->prepare("
91 SELECT s.id, s.student_id, s.first_name, s.middle_name, s.last_name, s.assignment_track,
92 c.name AS course_name, sec.code AS section_code, sec.name AS section_name
93 FROM students s
94 LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = s.course_id
95 LEFT JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = s.section_id
96 WHERE s.user_id = ?
97 LIMIT 1
98");
99if ($studentStmt) {
100 $studentStmt->bind_param('i', $currentUserId);
101 $studentStmt->execute();
102 $student = $studentStmt->get_result()->fetch_assoc() ?: null;
103 $studentStmt->close();
104}
105
106if (!$student) {
107 header('Location: homepage.php');
108 exit;
109}
110
111$studentId = (int)($student['id'] ?? 0);
112$displayName = trim((string)($user['name'] ?? ''));
113if ($displayName === '') {
114 $displayName = trim((string)(($student['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($student['middle_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($student['last_name'] ?? '')));
115}
116$sectionLabel = biotern_format_section_label((string)($student['section_code'] ?? ''), (string)($student['section_name'] ?? ''));
117$avatarSrc = biotern_avatar_public_src((string)($user['profile_picture'] ?? ''), $currentUserId);
118
119$applicationRow = student_documents_fetch_by_student_or_user($conn, 'application_letter', $studentId, $currentUserId);
120$endorsementRow = student_documents_fetch_by_student_or_user($conn, 'endorsement_letter', $studentId, $currentUserId);
121$moaRow = student_documents_fetch_by_student_or_user($conn, 'moa', $studentId, $currentUserId);
122$dauMoaRow = student_documents_fetch_by_student_or_user($conn, 'dau_moa', $studentId, $currentUserId);
123
124$documentCards = [
125 [
126 'title' => 'Application Letter',
127 'status' => $applicationRow ? 'Ready to view and print.' : 'No saved application letter yet.',
128 'view_url' => $applicationRow ? student_documents_build_url('document_application.php', ['id' => $studentId]) : '',
129 ],
130 [
131 'title' => 'Endorsement Letter',
132 'status' => $endorsementRow ? 'Ready to view and print.' : 'No saved endorsement letter yet.',
133 'view_url' => $endorsementRow ? student_documents_build_url('document_endorsement.php', ['id' => $studentId]) : '',
134 ],
135 [
136 'title' => 'MOA',
137 'status' => $moaRow ? 'Ready to view and print.' : 'No saved MOA yet.',
138 'view_url' => $moaRow ? student_documents_build_url('document_moa.php', ['id' => $studentId]) : '',
139 ],
140 [
141 'title' => 'DAU MOA',
142 'status' => $dauMoaRow ? 'Ready to view and print.' : 'No saved DAU MOA yet.',
143 'view_url' => $dauMoaRow ? student_documents_build_url('document_dau_moa.php', ['id' => $studentId]) : '',
144 ],
145 [
146 'title' => 'Parent Consent and Waiver',
147 'status' => 'Available to view and print anytime.',
148 'view_url' => student_documents_build_url('document_parent_consent.php', ['student_id' => $studentId]),
149 ],
150 [
151 'title' => 'Resume',
152 'status' => 'Available from your linked BioTern profile.',
153 'view_url' => student_documents_build_url('generate_resume.php', ['id' => $studentId]),
154 ],
155];
156
157$page_title = 'BioTern || My Documents';
158$page_styles = [
159 'assets/css/homepage-student.css',
160 'assets/css/student-dtr.css',
161];
162include 'includes/header.php';
163?>
164<main class="nxl-container">
165 <div class="nxl-content">
166 <div class="page-header dashboard-page-header">
167 <div class="page-header-left d-flex align-items-center">
168 <div class="page-header-title">
169 <h5 class="m-b-10">My Documents</h5>
170 </div>
171 <ul class="breadcrumb">
172 <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="homepage.php">Home</a></li>
173 <li class="breadcrumb-item">My Documents</li>
174 </ul>
175 </div>
176 <div class="page-header-right ms-auto">
177 <a href="student-profile.php" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Back to Profile</a>
178 </div>
179 </div>
180 <div class="main-content">
181 <div class="student-home-shell">
182 <section class="card student-panel mt-4">
183 <div class="card-body">
184 <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-3 mb-3">
185 <div>
186 <span class="student-metric-label">Printing Access</span>
187 <h3 class="mb-1">My Generated Documents</h3>
188 <div class="student-dtr-meta">Editing stays exclusive to admin, coordinator, and supervisor accounts.</div>
189 </div>
190 </div>
191
192 <div class="row g-3">
193 <?php foreach ($documentCards as $card): ?>
194 <div class="col-12 col-md-6 col-xl-4">
195 <article class="student-metric-card h-100">
196 <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column gap-3">
197 <div>
198 <span class="student-metric-label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($card['title'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
199 <p class="mb-0 mt-2"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($card['status'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></p>
200 </div>
201 <div class="mt-auto">
202 <?php if ($card['view_url'] !== ''): ?>
203 <a href="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($card['view_url'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" class="btn btn-primary w-100" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
204 View / Print
205 </a>
206 <?php else: ?>
207 <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary w-100" disabled>Waiting for staff input</button>
208 <?php endif; ?>
209 </div>
210 </div>
211 </article>
212 </div>
213 <?php endforeach; ?>
214 </div>
215 </div>
216 </section>
217 </div>
218 </div>
219 </div>
220</main>
221<?php include 'includes/footer.php'; ?>
